This restriction enforces a static trade-off between price responsiveness and worst-case loss despite inherently nonstationary trading conditions. We propose a fundamentally different approach that treats liquidity selection itself as an online learning problem. Our mechanism mixes a family of cost-function markets via learnable weights, yielding a single adaptive market that preserves no-arbitrage, bounded worst-case loss, expressiveness, and positive upside. We introduce a hybrid structural risk signal, a per-round objective that quantifies the trade-off between price impact and inventory risk, and show that standard online learning algorithms achieve switching-regret guarantees relative to the best sequence of liquidity regimes in hindsight. Simulations demonstrate that the mechanism adaptively shifts liquidity across regimes in response to both order flow and inventory dynamics. Our results establish a principled framework for adaptive liquidity, connecting prediction market design with online learning.

</details>


### [551] [Fair Allocation under Conflict Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09930)
*Sarfaraz Equbal,Rohit Gurjar,Ayumi Igarashi,Yatharth Kumar,Pasin Manurangsi,Swaprava Nath,Raghuvansh Saxena,Rohit Vaish,Hirotaka Yoneda*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 研究图上带冲突约束的不可分物品公平分配，证明两Agent下最大EF1分配存在性及计算复杂度，揭示多Agent下存在性失效与NP困难性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际分配中物品间常存在冲突（如时间冲突、资源冲突），传统公平分配模型未考虑此类约束。本文旨在将冲突建模为图，研究在冲突约束下实现公平（EF1）与高效（最大性）分配的可行性。

Method: 针对两Agent，提出颜色交换技术（color-switching）局部修改最大分配以恢复EF1；针对多Agent，利用"cycle plus triangles"定理证明路径图上EF[1,1]分配存在性。

Result: 两Agent下：单调估值时最大EF1分配始终存在，伪多项式时间可计算；可加估值在任意图上多项式时间可解；单调估值在区间图和二分图上多项式时间可解。非单调时存在性失效且NP难。多Agent下：三Agent相同单调估值时最大EF1分配不存在，判定NP难；路径图上相同非单调可加估值时EF[1,1]最大分配始终存在。

Conclusion: 冲突约束下公平高效分配的可行性高度依赖Agent数量、估值类型和图结构；两Agent情形相对乐观，多Agent情形则充满挑战。

Abstract: We study the fair allocation of indivisible items subject to conflict constraints. In this framework, the items are represented as the vertices of a graph, with edges corresponding to conflicts between pairs of items. Each agent is assigned an independent set of items from the graph. Our goal is to achieve a fair and efficient allocation of these items. Fairness pertains to satisfying envy-freeness up to one item (EF1), while efficiency is defined by maximality, meaning that no unallocated item can be feasibly assigned to any agent.
  First, we explore the case of two agents. For monotone valuations, we show that a maximal EF1 allocation always exists on any graph. Our existence proof relies on a color-switching technique, which locally modifies a maximal allocation while preserving feasibility and restoring EF1. We further show that such allocations can be computed in pseudopolynomial time in general, and in polynomial time for additive valuations on arbitrary graphs, as well as for monotone valuations on interval and bipartite graphs. By contrast, once monotonicity is dropped, maximal EF1 allocations need not exist even for identical additive valuations, and deciding existence becomes NP-hard.
  Next, we consider the case with a general number of agents. Again, we arrive at a negative result: An EF1 and maximal allocation fails to exist even for three agents under identical monotone valuations, and determining the existence of such an allocation is NP-hard. On the positive side, we show that under identical non-monotone additive valuations on a path graph, an EF[1,1] and maximal allocation always exists. This result involves a novel application of the "cycle plus triangles" theorem.

</details>


### [552] [Structure from Strategic Interaction & Uncertainty Risk Sensitive Games for Robust Preference Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09946)
*Max Horwitz,Jake Gonzales,Eric Mazumdar,Lillian J. Ratliff*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出风险敏感偏好博弈（Risk-Sensitive Preference Games），通过引入凸风险度量来优化语言模型的偏好微调，解决了NLHF方法忽略数据分布尾部行为的问题，并证明了在非零和结构下仍能保持单调性收敛，同时通过分层博弈和双时间尺度外梯度算法实现偏差校正，实验表明该方法在跨数据层级上具有鲁棒性且无性能损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有NLHF方法在偏好微调中只关注期望胜率，忽视了策略在数据分布不同区域（如提示、标注者或安全关键层）的失败模式，强平均表现可能掩盖系统性失败。

Method: 提出风险敏感偏好博弈，利用凸风险度量优化偏好损失；证明平移不变性确保单调性保留；引入分层博弈和双时间尺度外梯度算法进行偏差校正。

Result: 风险调整策略在数据层级上鲁棒，在不同风险选择下稳定，匹配或超越风险中性表现。

Conclusion: 风险敏感方法能在不牺牲性能的情况下实现鲁棒性提升。

Abstract: A growing line of work reframes preference-based fine-tuning of large language models game-theoretically: Nash Learning from Human Feedback (NLHF) recasts the problem as a zero-sum game over policies. However, optimization is over expected pairwise payoffs, thereby conflating policies with similar win rates but different tail behavior. As such, these methods are agnostic to where in the data distribution they succeed or fail: strong average performance can mask systematic failure across prompts, annotators, or safety-critical strata. We introduce risk-sensitive preference games, in which players optimize convex risk measures of their preference loss, exploiting structure in preference uncertainty. While risk-sensitivity generally breaks the zero-sum structure, we show that translation invariance of many risk metrics ensures that we retain monotonicity, yielding fast convergence of sample-efficient self-play methods. Furthermore, we establish algorithmic stability and offline sample complexity bounds that scale with risk, requiring simultaneous control of structural bias from nonlinear risk transformations, statistical bias in risk estimation, and concentration tailored to the risk-sensitive setting. To address statistical bias, we introduce a hierarchical game formulation and a two-timescale extragradient algorithm with bias correction that converges to the Stackelberg equilibrium and is especially effective in low-sample regimes. Empirically, risk-adjusted policies are robust across data strata, stable across risk choices, and match or exceed risk-neutral performance thereby achieving robustness without a performance tax.

</details>


### [553] [A Resource Allocation Game and its Equilibrium Strategies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09988)
*Duan-Shin Lee*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种贝叶斯博弈模型来分配资源，分析了两人博弈中的均衡策略（AIF函数族），并针对大规模n人博弈提出了均值场一阶近似和二阶高斯近似，设计了一种有限步收敛的构造算法，该算法在梯度冲突时进入“颤振”模式以维持高收益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在资源分配问题中，玩家对资源有私有需求，且资源按最小请求优先、全有或全无的方式分配。作者希望在这种不完全信息（贝叶斯博弈）框架下，找到玩家理性策略的均衡解，特别是当玩家数量很大时如何有效逼近均衡策略。

Method: 1. 建立贝叶斯博弈模型，定义策略函数、收益函数和分配规则（最小请求优先、全有或全无）。2. 对两人博弈，在交替恒等-平坦（AIF）函数族内解析求解纳什均衡。3. 对大规模n人博弈（c_n = O(n)），采用均值场一阶近似和二阶高斯近似。4. 提出构造算法：先搜索AIF函数族，若出现梯度冲突则进入“颤振”模式（连续严格递增的非恒等非平坦策略），算法有限步终止并保证得到纳什均衡。

Result: 两人博弈的均衡策略剖面有三种情形：两个恒等函数、两个AIF函数共用一个切换点、两个AIF函数分别具有一个和三个切换点。大规模博弈中，一阶分析得到带一个切换点的AIF函数；二阶高斯近似下构造算法可在有限步内收敛到纳什均衡，颤振模式提供了非平凡的策略形式。

Conclusion: 本文提出的贝叶斯博弈模型和AIF函数族能有效刻画资源分配中的均衡策略，构造算法保证了大规模博弈中均衡的可计算性，数值实验验证了理论结果。

Abstract: In this paper we propose a Bayesian game to allocate resources.
  In this game, there are $c$ units of resources to be
  allocated to $n$ players. Agent $i$ has a demand of $V_i$ units of resources
  and takes action $X_i$ according to a strategy function $s_i$, \ie $X_i=s_i(V_i)$.
  Payoffs are setup such that player $i$ is contented with no more than $V_i$
  units of resources. We assume that resources are granted to the players
  on a smallest-request-first and all-or-nothing basis.
  For this game with two players, we analyze the equilibrium strategy
  functions mathematically within the family of alternating identity-and-flat (AIF)
  functions. We show that Nash equilibrium profiles consist of two identity functions,
  two AIF functions with a common switch point, or two AIF functions with one
  and three switch points, respectively.
  For an $n$-player game with a large $n$ and a large $c_n$
  of order $O(n)$, we present a mean-field first order approximation and a
  second-order Gaussian approximation for its
  equilibrium strategy function. The first-order analysis obtains an equilibrium
  AIF function with one switch point. In Gaussian analysis of large games, we
  propose a construction algorithm. This construction algorithm begins in searching
  within the family of AIF functions. If a gradient conflict condition occurs, the game
  enters a chattering regime, in which players
  play a continuous, strictly increasing strategy function that is not an identity nor a flat function.
  Conceptually one can view the chattering regime as if players alternate between
  a slope-one strategy and a flat strategy infinitely fast in order to sustain a high payoff.
  We prove that the construction algorithm always
  obtains a Nash equilibrium and terminates in a finite number of steps.
  We present several numerical examples for the two player game as well as the Gaussian model.

</details>


### [554] [The Vote-Left Equilibrium: A Deterministic Coordination Strategy for the Faithful in The Traitors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10233)
*Vince Knight*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出Vote-Left协议，一种社会推理游戏中的确定性投票规则，使随机投票的分布得以实现且可检测偏离，显著提高忠诚方胜率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在社交推理游戏中，知情少数派（叛徒）可协同操纵投票，而不知情多数派（忠诚者）在串通情况下随机投票并非最优，需要一种可检测偏离、抵御串通的投票机制。

Method: 提出Vote-Left协议：每个玩家按固定循环顺序投票给下一个存活的玩家；结合惩罚规则，使偏离行为可被立即识别，并构建完美贝叶斯均衡。

Result: 在n_t > 2m_t + 2条件下（包含所有电视节目配置），Vote-Left构成完美贝叶斯均衡；在晚期阶段叛徒的最佳反应是串通偏离；电视配置下，忠诚方胜率比随机投票提高约三倍。

Conclusion: Vote-Left通过确定性投票与惩罚机制，有效抵御叛徒串通，显著提升忠诚方胜率，为社交推理游戏中的投票问题提供了理论上的最优解。

Abstract: The Traitors is a social deduction game in which an informed minority of Traitors face an uninformed majority of Faithful, and the
  recurring question facing the Faithful is how to vote. Random voting is known to be optimal for the uninformed majority under
  simultaneous-signal protocols [Braverman, Etesami and Mossel, 2008], but when votes are cast individually, random votes are
  indistinguishable from strategic ones and the Faithful remain exposed to coordinated Traitor collusion. We introduce the Vote-Left
  protocol, a deterministic rule under which every player votes for the next surviving player in a fixed cyclic ordering. Under full
  compliance every surviving player receives exactly one vote, so the banishment distribution coincides with random voting; since
  prescribed votes are deterministic functions of public information, any deviation is immediately identifiable. Combined with a simple
  punishment rule, Vote-Left constitutes a Perfect Bayesian Equilibrium for every state with $n_t > 2m_t + 2$, a region that contains every
  televised configuration. We characterise the Traitors' best response in the late-game phase ($n_t \leq 2m_t + 2$): deviate via collusion
  once the Faithful no longer have enough votes to guarantee punishment. Across the configurations played on television, Vote-Left raises
  the Faithful's winning probability by a factor of approximately three over random voting under collusion.

</details>


### [555] [Approximate Envy-Free Allocations up to any $k$ Goods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10371)
*Aris Filos-Ratsikas,Georgios Kalantzis,Fangxiao Wang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了在可加性偏好下，任意k个商品的近似无嫉妒公平分配（α-EFkX）问题。主要结果包括：对任意k>2，存在(k+1)/(k+2)-EFkX分配且可在多项式时间内计算；作为推论，3/4-EF2X分配对任意数量智能体存在；改进了2/3-EFX分配的结果至8个智能体；证明了EFkX图定向问题不一定存在解且判定其存在性是NP完全的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无嫉妒公平分配是资源分配领域的核心问题，但精确EFX分配的存在性仍未解决。本文旨在放宽条件，研究近似EFkX分配的存在性与算法，并探索EFkX图定向问题的计算复杂性。

Method: 推广了[Amanatidis et al., 2024]的3PA算法以构造(k+1)/(k+2)-EFkX分配；针对8个智能体设计了专门算法实现2/3-EFX；通过归约证明EFkX图定向的NP完全性。

Result: 对任意k>2，存在(k+1)/(k+2)-EFkX分配；3/4-EF2X分配对任意智能体数存在；2/3-EFX分配扩展至8个智能体；EFkX图定向问题NP完全。

Conclusion: 本文在近似EFkX分配的存在性与算法方面取得了重要进展，同时揭示了EFkX图定向问题的计算困难性，为后续研究提供了新方向。

Abstract: We study the problem of finding approximate envy-free allocations up to any $k$ goods ($α$-EFkX), when agents have additive values over goods in a bundle. As our main result, we show that for any $k>2$, $\frac{k+1}{k+2}$-EFkX allocations exist for any number of agents, and can be computed in polynomial time, via an appropriate generalization of the 3PA algorithm of [Amanatidis et al., 2024]. An immediate corollary of this result is that $3/4$-EF2X allocations exist for any number of agents; in contrast, $2/3$-EFX allocations are only known to exist for up to 7 agents. We improve this latter result by devising an algorithm that achieves $2/3$-EFX for 8 agents. We also consider EFkX graph orientations; we prove that such orientations do not always exist, and that deciding their existence is NP-complete, thereby generalizing the corresponding result of [Christodoulou et., 2023] for $k=1$.

</details>


### [556] [Regret Minimization in Bilateral Trade With Perturbed Markets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10475)
*Anna Lunghi,Matteo Castiglioni,Alberto Marchesi*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了重复议价环境中在全局预算平衡约束下最大化交易收益（GFT）的问题。作者提出了一个在对抗性扰动市场（随机分布受对抗性污染C影响）中工作的算法，实现了对最优预算平衡价格分布的$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{3/4}) + \mathcal{O}(C\log(T))$遗憾界，同时在完全对抗环境下保持$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{3/4})$的遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往研究在完全对抗和完全随机环境下存在显著差距：随机环境下可学习期望预算平衡的价格分布（GFT可翻倍），而对抗环境下只能学固定价格机制。作者希望弥合这两种极端情况。

Method: 提出一种自适应算法，能够根据污染程度C调整，在扰动市场（随机分布受对抗性污染）中运行，同时兼容完全对抗和完全随机两种极端情形。

Result: 在扰动市场下达到$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{3/4}) + \mathcal{O}(C\log(T))$遗憾界，在完全对抗环境下保持$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{3/4})$遗憾界。

Conclusion: 成功弥合了对抗与随机环境之间的差距，通过扰动市场模型实现了自适应的最优学习，证明了即使存在对抗性污染，仍可近似达到随机环境下的最优性能。

Abstract: We address the problem of maximizing Gain from Trade (GFT) in repeated buyer-seller exchanges subject to global budget balance constraints. While this problem is well-understood in purely adversarial and stochastic settings, these environments exhibit a sharp dichotomy: adversarial environments allow for no-regret learning against the best fixed-price mechanism, whereas stochastic environments allow for no-regret learning against the best distribution over prices that is budget balanced in expectation. This gap is significant, as policies balanced in expectation can increase the GFT by a multiplicative factor of two. In this work, we bridge these extremes by studying perturbed markets, where an underlying stochastic distribution is subject to an adversarial corruption $C$. We design an algorithm that adaptively scales with the level of corruption, achieving an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{3/4}) + \mathcal{O}(C\log(T))$ regret bound against the best budget-balanced distribution over prices. Simultaneously, our algorithm maintains the worst-case $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{3/4})$ regret bound relative to a per-round budget-balanced baseline, ensuring optimality even in fully adversarial environments.

</details>


### [557] [Online Resource Allocation With General Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10519)
*Eleonora Fidelia Chiefari,Francesco Emanuele Stradi,Matteo Castiglioni,Alberto Marchesi*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文针对在线资源分配问题，在预算约束之外引入通用约束（如ROI约束），提出了一种同时适用于随机和对抗环境的算法，实现了$\widetilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{T})$的遗憾界和$\widetilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{T})$的累积违规，并首次在通用约束下达成最佳双世界保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典的在线资源分配只考虑预算约束，无法建模诸如投资回报率(ROI)等关键经济约束。本文旨在将框架扩展到同时包含预算约束和通用约束的更一般场景。

Method: 提出一种基于弱自适应性(weak adaptivity)的新分析方法，克服了通用约束下无法使用零消耗"安全"动作的困难，通过控制拉格朗日乘子的有界性来实现最佳双世界保证。

Result: 在随机环境下达到$\widetilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{T})$的动态基准遗憾；在对抗环境下达到$\widetilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{T})$的$\alpha$-遗憾；预算约束严格满足，通用约束的累积违规为$\widetilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{T})$。

Conclusion: 本文成功将在线资源分配从仅含预算约束推广到包含通用约束，通过弱自适应性分析克服了技术障碍，首次在此泛化框架下实现了最佳双世界保证。

Abstract: Online resource allocation (ORA) is a fundamental framework for sequential decision-making problems under budget constraints, with applications ranging from online advertising to revenue management. In this work, we study a broader setting that includes both budget constraints and general constraints, extending the classical budget-only model. This extension is essential for modeling critical economic requirements, such as Return-on-Investment (ROI) constraints. We develop an algorithm that achieves best-of-both-world guarantees within this generalized framework. In particular, against a dynamic benchmark, our algorithm achieves $\widetilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{T})$ regret in the \emph{stochastic} regime and $α$-regret of order $\widetilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{T})$ in the \emph{adversarial} regime, where $α$ depends on the feasibility margin of the corresponding offline problem. At the same time, our algorithm guarantees strict satisfaction of the budget constraints and $\widetilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{T})$ cumulative violation for the general ones. From a technical perspective, introducing general constraints alongside budgets precludes the use of standard budget-focus methods. While budget methods rely on a zero-consumption ``safe'' action to ensure feasibility, general constraints are much less ``aligned'' towards feasibility. We overcome these difficulties with a new analysis that exploits \emph{weak adaptivity} to get boundedness of the Lagrangian multipliers and best-of-both-world guarantees.

</details>


### [558] [Constant Inapproximability for Fisher Markets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10802)
*Argyrios Deligkas,John Fearnley,Alexandros Hollender,Themistoklis Melissourgos*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文证明在Fisher市场（可分离分段线性凹效用函数）中，计算近似市场均衡的常数近似问题是PPAD完全的，特别地，任何优于1/11的近似都是PPAD完全的，这意味着该问题不存在PTAS（除非PPAD=P）。该结论同样适用于Arrow-Debreu交换市场。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在Fisher市场中，可分离分段线性凹（SPLC）效用函数下的近似市场均衡计算问题，此前仅知道逆多项式近似是PPAD完全的。作者希望探究常数近似下问题的计算复杂性边界。

Method: 通过复杂性归约，证明任何优于1/11的近似都是PPAD完全的，强化了已有的逆多项式近似PPAD完全性结果。

Result: SPLC效用函数的Fisher市场均衡问题在常数近似下是PPAD完全的，具体界限为1/11。该结果直接推广到Arrow-Debreu交换市场。

Conclusion: 该问题不存在多项式时间近似方案（PTAS），除非PPAD=P。这为计算市场均衡的近似问题提供了更紧的不可近似性下界。

Abstract: We study the problem of computing approximate market equilibria in Fisher markets with separable piecewise-linear concave (SPLC) utility functions. In this setting, the problem was only known to be PPAD-complete for inverse-polynomial approximations. We strengthen this result by showing PPAD-hardness for constant approximations. This means that the problem does not admit a polynomial time approximation scheme (PTAS) unless PPAD$=$P. In fact, we prove that computing any approximation better than $1/11$ is PPAD-complete. As a direct byproduct of our main result, we get the same inapproximability bound for Arrow-Debreu exchange markets with SPLC utility functions.

</details>


### [559] [Effective, Efficient, and General Information Abstraction for Imperfect-Information Extensive-Form Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10900)
*Boning Li,Longbo Huang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出WEVA方法，通过少量CFR迭代的预热阶段提取期望值特征，再使用k-means++聚类进行信息抽象，无需领域知识或预训练，在多种游戏中将可剥削性降低高达80%以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有信息抽象方法要么依赖领域特定特征（如等级、权益），难以适用于非标准收益结构的游戏；要么需要昂贵的离线神经网络训练，成本高昂。因此需要一种通用、高效且无需领域知识的信息抽象方法。

Method: WEVA方法包含三个阶段：(1) 预热阶段：在全游戏上运行少量CFR迭代；(2) 特征提取：为每个决策节点提取每手牌的期望值特征，构建深度加权的多节点特征向量；(3) 聚类抽象：应用k-means++聚类得到信息集的分桶映射。

Result: 在三种结构不同的游戏上，使用不同桶数量和CFR变体进行实验，WEVA一致优于基于权益和基于等级的抽象方法，可剥削性降低高达80%以上。仅需W=10次预热迭代即可超越现有方法。

Conclusion: WEVA是一种有效、高效且通用的不完美信息扩展式游戏信息抽象方法，无需领域知识、无需预训练，计算开销小，为信息抽象提供了新的通用解决方案。

Abstract: Information abstraction reduces the computational cost of solving imperfect-information games by clustering information sets into a smaller number of \emph{buckets}. Existing methods either rely on domain-specific features such as rank or equity, which are inapplicable to games with non-standard payoff structures, or require expensive offline neural-network training on billions of samples. We propose \textbf{Warm-up Expected Value-based Abstraction (WEVA)}, a simple yet effective alternative: run a small number of Counterfactual Regret Minimization (CFR) iterations on the full game as a \emph{warm-up} phase, extract per-hand expected value features at every decision node, form a depth-weighted multi-node feature vector, and apply $k$-means++ clustering to obtain the abstraction mapping. WEVA requires no domain knowledge, no pre-training, and incurs only a small overhead on top of the abstract-game solve. Experiments on three structurally diverse games, with different bucket numbers and CFR variants, show that WEVA consistently outperforms equity-based and rank-based abstractions, reducing exploitability by up to over $80\%$. Surprisingly, as few as $W{=}10$ warm-up iterations already produce abstractions that outperform existing information abstraction methods in most settings. These results establish WEVA as an \emph{effective, efficient, and general} approach to information abstraction in imperfect-information extensive-form games.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [560] [UserGPT Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08766)
*Yunyi Xuan,Hao Yi,Fengling Mao,Daye Cai,Leikun Liang,Xingsheng He,Jiangnan Xie,Guoshuai Wang,Yushan Han,Wenwen Guo,Xiaoxiao Xu,Lin Qu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出UserGPT框架，利用大语言模型生成叙事性用户画像，通过行为模拟引擎、语义化模块和课程式后训练策略（多阶段SFT+DF-GRPO）解决用户画像碎片化、逻辑不一致等问题。在HPR-Bench基准上，标签预测Avg@10达0.7325，摘要生成Acc_ex达0.7528，压缩率97.9%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统用户画像方法依赖判别式模型和手动特征工程，预测离散属性，导致画像碎片化、逻辑不一致，且难以泛化到长尾行为。需要一种能捕捉用户演化、生成连贯叙事的生成式方法。

Method: 提出UserGPT框架，包括三个核心模块：1）用户行为模拟引擎（生成真实复杂的行为轨迹）；2）数据为中心的语义化模块（将异构行为日志转化为结构化语义输入，减少噪声和稀疏性）；3）课程式后训练策略（多阶段SFT+双过滤组相对策略优化DF-GRPO）。同时构建HPR-Bench基准。

Result: 在HPR-Bench上，标签预测Avg@10达0.7325，摘要生成Acc_ex达0.7528，行为记录压缩率高达97.9%且关键信息保留完好。

Conclusion: UserGPT在全貌人物推理和个性化用户-智能体交互中展现出有效性，证明了生成式范式在用户画像领域的潜力。

Abstract: Personalized user understanding from large-scale digital traces remains a fundamental challenge. Traditional user profiling methods rely on discriminative models and manual feature engineering to predict discrete attributes, often producing fragmented and logically inconsistent profiles that generalize poorly to long-tail behaviors. In this work, we study a generative paradigm in which large language models (LLMs) summarize long and noisy behavioral histories into coherent narratives that capture nuanced user evolution. Our experiments show that even strong LLMs remain limited in complex and implicit personalization reasoning.
  We propose UserGPT, a framework for improving LLM-based persona understanding through both attribute generation and summary generation. To address the scarcity of real-world behavioral data, we develop a User Behavior Simulation Engine that produces realistic and complex user trajectories. We further introduce a Data-Centric Semantization module that transforms heterogeneous behavioral logs into structured and semantically coherent inputs, reducing noise and sparsity. On top of this pipeline, we design a curriculum-driven post-training strategy that combines multi-stage Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with Dual-Filter Group Relative Policy Optimization (DF-GRPO) to strengthen reasoning over long behavioral histories.
  We also construct HPR-Bench, a benchmark for holistic persona reasoning derived from simulated data. On HPR-Bench, UserGPT achieves an Avg@10 score of 0.7325 on tag prediction and an $Acc_{Ex}$ score of 0.7528 on summary generation, while compressing behavioral records by up to 97.9% with critical information preserved. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of UserGPT for holistic persona reasoning and personalized user-agent interaction.

</details>


### [561] [Reddit2Deezer: A Scalable Dataset for Real-World Grounded Conversational Music Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09120)
*Haven Kim,Julian McAuley*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了Reddit2Deezer，一个基于19万条Reddit真实对话构建的对话音乐推荐数据集，同时提供原始版和改写版，每条音乐实体链接到Deezer标识符便于获取音频和元数据，经人工验证确认质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对话音乐推荐（CMR）研究面临两难：真实对话语料规模有限，而合成语料虽可扩展但对话人为构造、缺乏自然性。作者希望构建一个既真实又具有规模的可落地CMR资源。

Method: 从Reddit提取19万条{帖子, 叶子评论}对，构建原始版（保真）和改写版（增强长期可复现性）。每条音乐实体关联Deezer ID，提供音频预览和丰富元数据（流派、流行度、BPM等）。

Result: 人工验证确认了对话质量、音乐实体标注的准确性以及改写质量。数据集已公开发布在Hugging Face。

Conclusion: Reddit2Deezer填补了CMR领域真实大规模数据集缺失的空白，其内容锚定特性为未来内容驱动的对话推荐研究铺平道路。

Abstract: Conversational music recommendation (CMR) research currently faces a tradeoff between authentic dialogue corpora that are limited in scale and synthesized corpora that scale up but whose conversations are artificially constructed rather than naturally observed. In this paper, we introduce Reddit2Deezer, a reality-grounded CMR resource derived from 190k unique {thread, leaf-comment} pairs. We release the resource in two versions: a raw version that preserves authenticity, and a paraphrased version that maximizes long-term reproducibility. Each musical entity is linked to a Deezer identifier, which provides straightforward access to audio previews and rich metadata (e.g., genre tags, popularity, BPM), opening the door to future research on content-grounded conversational recommendation. A human validation confirms the quality of the dialogues, item grounding, and paraphrases. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/McAuley-Lab/Reddit2Deezer.

</details>


### [562] [OpenIIR: An Open Simulation Platform for Information Retrieval Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09321)
*Saber Zerhoudi*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: OpenIIR是一个用于运行LLM驱动多智能体信息检索实验的框架，提供可复现、可配置的研究平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM驱动的信息检索研究缺乏可复现、参数化、标准化的实验平台，研究者难以比较不同设置下的多智能体交互结果。

Method: 构建共享核心框架（智能体运行时、世界模型存储、检索原语等），提供四种多智能体研究类型（审议小组、社交平台、策划推荐、多代进化），支持参数化配置和插件式场景扩展。

Result: 实现了四种参考运行场景，产生结构化的输出（论点图、曝光日志、适应度追踪、对话记录），且新研究仅需200-400行插件代码。

Conclusion: OpenIIR为LLM多智能体IR研究提供了可复现、可扩展的实验基础设施，并提出了六个面向开放IR研究问题的模块化扩展方向。

Abstract: OpenIIR runs hundreds of LLM-driven personas as parameterised, reproducible IR research experiments. Researchers configure agents across four kinds of multi-agent study (deliberative panels, social platforms, curated recommender feeds, and evolutionary co-evolution between content producers and credibility detectors) under many priors, rounds, and constraints. Persona budgets, retrieval policies, ranker choices, intervention timings, and mutation rates are declared up front, and the same study can be re-run under different settings to compare outcomes side by side. Every run produces structured outputs (argument graphs, exposure logs, fitness traces, transcripts) that a downstream evaluator can consume directly, and a new study is a 200--400 line plug-in over a shared core (agent runtime, world-model store, retrieval primitives, claim extractor, persona ontology). The contributions are: (i) the shared core; (ii) a type interface for pluggable scenarios; (iii) four released types with reference runs (Panel, Social-Media, Curated-Feed, Multi-Generational); and (iv) six modular extensions sketched against open IR research questions.

</details>


### [563] [A General Framework for Multimodal LLM-Based Multimedia Understanding in Large-Scale Recommendation Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09338)
*Yiming Zhu,Xu Liu,Ziyun Xu,Zheng Wu,Joena Zhang,Sirius Chen,Chenheli Hua,Silvester Yao,Qichao Que,Wentao Shi,Junfeng Pan,Linhong Zhu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于多模态大语言模型（MM-LLM）的三元架构框架，通过LLaMA2生成描述性标题并转化为分类型特征，以提升大规模推荐系统的性能，离线AUC提升0.35%，在线指标提升0.02%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统推荐系统未能充分利用多模态内容中的高维语义信号，限制了用户偏好建模的准确性，而MM-LLM虽能理解复杂数据但难以集成到延迟敏感的工业级架构中。

Method: 提出三元架构框架，包括内容解释、表征提取和系统化流水线集成；通过LLaMA2模型生成描述性标题，并将其作为分类型特征输入推荐系统。

Result: 离线AUC提升0.35%，在线指标提升0.02%，验证了MM-LLM在大规模推荐场景中的实际可行性。

Conclusion: MM-LLM驱动的多模态理解框架能有效提升大规模推荐系统的性能，解决了其工业级部署的挑战。

Abstract: Conventional recommendation systems frequently fail to fully exploit the high-dimensional semantic signals inherent in multimedia content, thereby limiting the fidelity of user preference modeling. While Multimodal Large Language Models (MM-LLMs) offer robust mechanisms for interpreting such complex data, their integration into latency-constrained, industrial-scale architectures remains a significant challenge. To address this, we propose a generalized framework for MM-LLM-driven multimedia understanding. Our methodology employs a tripartite architecture encompassing content interpretation, representation extraction, and systematic pipeline integration, instantiated via a LLaMA2-based model that generates descriptive captions subsequently ingested as tokenized categorical features. Empirical evaluation demonstrates the efficacy of this approach, yielding a $0.35\%$ increase in offline AUC and a $0.02\%$ improvement in online metrics at scale, substantiating the practical viability of leveraging MM-LLMs to enhance large-scale recommendation performance.

</details>


### [564] [LLM Agents Enable User-Governed Personalization Beyond Platform Boundaries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09794)
*Jiacheng Lin,Kun Qian,Arvind Srinivasan,Tian Wang,Fang Han,Changran Hu,Junze Liu,Ziyi Wang,Hanwen Xu,Mengmeng Xue,Shuo Yang,Hansi Zeng,Simon Sinong Zhan,Kai Zhong,Weiqi Zhang,Dakuo Wang,Tianhao Wang,Zhiyuan Li*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文主张从平台驱动的个性化转向用户自主的个性化，利用LLM代理整合跨平台和离线数据，实验表明该方法优于单平台个性化基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有个性化系统以平台为中心，各平台仅能观察用户行为的碎片，受限于竞争、法律、隐私和认知边界，无法构建完整的用户画像。

Method: 提出用户自主个性化范式，利用LLM代理处理跨平台导出的异构个人数据，将跨上下文信息转化为可操作的个性化能力。

Result: 概念验证表明，用户使用跨平台数据导出和现成LLM代理，可超越单平台个性化基线。

Conclusion: 呼吁转向用户主导的个性化，并列出构建可扩展用户自主个性化系统的研究议程。

Abstract: Personalization today is fundamentally platform-centric: services build user representations from the behavioral fragments they observe. Yet no platform can construct a complete picture of the user, as competitive incentives, legal constraints, user privacy concerns, and epistemic limits create persistent data barriers. This paper argues for a shift from platform-centric personalization to user-governed personalization, where only the user can integrate fragmented contexts across platforms and the offline world. The key asymmetry lies in data access: only users can aggregate their own cross-platform and offline information. Large language model (LLM) agents make such integration practically feasible for the first time by enabling reasoning over heterogeneous personal data and transforming users' cross-context information into actionable personalization capabilities. We provide proof-of-concept evidence that users equipped with cross-platform data exports and an off-the-shelf LLM agent can outperform single-platform personalization baselines. We conclude by outlining a research agenda for building scalable user-governed personalization systems.

</details>


### [565] [Loom: Hybrid Retrieval-Scoring Outfit Recommendation with Semantic Material Compatibility and Occasion-Aware Embedding Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09830)
*Anushree Berlia*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: Loom是一个结合神经嵌入检索与结构化领域评分的全套搭配推荐系统。给定锚定单品，通过FashionCLIP嵌入的槽位约束近邻搜索获取互补单品，并利用六维多目标函数（嵌入相似度、色彩和谐、正式度一致、场合连贯、风格方向、多样性）评分。引入语义材质权重（基于CLIP几何推断衣物厚重感）和氛围/反氛围场合先验（用文本描述嵌入作为锚点向量）两项技术。在620件商品目录上的消融实验显示，完整系统平均搭配得分0.179，硬违例率9.3%，相比类别约束随机基线的0.054分和16.0%违例率，得分提升3.3倍、违例减少42%。方向重排序为不可缺失组件，移除后得分降至0.052。系统在普通硬件上5秒内生成三种风格截然不同的搭配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时尚搭配推荐面临两个核心挑战：一是单品间兼容性难以用简单规则建模（如材质层次、色彩协调、风格一致等）；二是纯学习方法缺乏可解释性和结构化约束，纯规则方法则难以捕捉视觉语义的细微差别。现有方法要么依赖手动编码的分类体系（如材质标签），要么无法处理"氛围感"等模糊概念。Loom试图通过混合范式——神经嵌入检索提供语义理解，结构化评分函数注入领域知识——来弥合这一鸿沟。

Method: 1) 检索阶段：基于锚定单品，通过槽位约束的近似近邻搜索（使用FashionCLIP嵌入）检索互补单品。2) 评分阶段：六维多目标函数，包括嵌入相似度、色彩和谐度、正式度一致性、场合连贯性、风格方向以及组内多样性。3) 两项技术：a) 语义材质权重——利用CLIP嵌入空间几何推断衣物厚重感（如"牛仔"vs"丝绸"），无需人工材质分类；b) 氛围/反氛围场合先验——将场合的散文描述嵌入CLIP空间作为锚点向量，通过差异亲和力评分单品与场合的匹配/不匹配度。4) 通过方向重排序确保风格方向一致。

Result: 在620件商品目录上的消融实验：完整系统平均搭配得分0.179，硬违例率9.3%；类别约束随机基线得分0.054，违例率16.0%（得分提升3.3倍，违例减少42%）。方向重排序为最关键组件：移除后得分降至0.052，几乎与随机基线持平。系统在消费级硬件上5秒内生成三种风格各异的搭配。

Conclusion: Loom验证了神经检索与结构化领域知识混合范式在时尚搭配中的有效性。语义材质权重和氛围先验两项技术展示了如何利用CLIP嵌入空间的几何特性来推断高层语义属性，规避了手动编码分类的局限性。方向重排序的不可缺失性表明风格方向一致性是搭配质量的主导因素。该工作为可解释、可控制的推荐系统设计提供了新思路，但620件商品规模较小，且主观评分指标的实际用户体验验证有待进一步探索。

Abstract: We present Loom, an outfit recommendation system that combines neural embedding retrieval with structured domain scoring to generate complete, coherent outfits from fashion catalogs. Given an anchor clothing item, Loom retrieves complementary pieces via slot-constrained approximate nearest neighbor search over FashionCLIP embeddings, then scores candidate outfits using a multi-objective function that integrates six signals: embedding similarity, color harmony, formality consistency, occasion coherence, style direction, and within-outfit diversity.
  We introduce two techniques that address limitations of purely learned or purely rule-based approaches: (1) semantic material weight, which uses CLIP embedding geometry to infer garment heaviness for layer compatibility without hand-coded material taxonomies; and (2) vibe/anti-vibe occasion priors, which embed prose descriptions of occasion contexts as anchor vectors in CLIP space and score items by differential affinity.
  Ablation experiments on a catalog of 620 items show that each component contributes measurably to outfit quality: the full system achieves a mean outfit score of 0.179 with a 9.3% hard violation rate, compared to 0.054 score and 16.0% violations for a category-constrained random baseline, a 3.3x improvement in score and 42% reduction in violations. Direction reranking is the single indispensable component: removing it drops score to 0.052, essentially equal to random. The system generates three stylistically distinct outfits in under 5 seconds on commodity hardware.

</details>


### [566] [ReCoVR: Closing the Loop in Interactive Composed Video Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09836)
*Bingqing Zhang,Yi Zhang,Zhuo Cao,Yang Li,Xue Li,Jiajun Liu,Sen Wang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出ReCoVR，一种支持多轮交互的组合视频检索方法，通过双通道架构（意图通道+反思通道）来克服传统方法单轮交互和开环检索的局限，在多个基准上取得SOTA效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有组合视频检索（CoVR）仅支持单轮交互，无法满足真实场景中用户通过多轮自然语言反馈逐步细化搜索意图的需求。

Method: 提出ReCoVR，包含两条通路：1) 意图通路（Intent Pathway）将多样化的用户反馈路由到互补的检索通道；2) 反思通路（Reflection Pathway）对检索历史进行轨迹级反思，监控结果演化并跨轮次纠正检索错误。

Result: 在多个基准上优于交互式基线，在WebVid-CoVR-Test数据集上仅一轮交互后R@1达到74.30%。

Conclusion: 反思性感知架构（将检索历史作为诊断证据）能有效解决多轮交互检索中的漂移和停滞问题，提升渐进式视频搜索性能。

Abstract: Composed video retrieval (CoVR) searches for target videos using a reference video and a modification text, but existing methods are restricted to a single interaction round and cannot support the progressive nature of real-world visual search. To bridge this gap, we first formalize interactive composed video retrieval, a multi-turn extension of CoVR, where users progressively refine their search intent through natural-language feedback across turns. Adapting existing interactive retrieval methods to this setting reveals two structural weaknesses: reliance on a single retrieval channel and an open-loop retrieval design that consumes user feedback but does not diagnose whether its own retrieval trajectory is drifting or stagnating. To address these limitations, we propose ReCoVR (Reflexive Composed Video Retrieval), a dual-pathway architecture built on reflexive perception, where the system treats its retrieval history as diagnostic evidence alongside user feedback. Specifically, an Intent Pathway routes heterogeneous feedback to complementary retrieval channels, while a Reflection Pathway performs trajectory-level reflection to monitor result evolution and correct retrieval errors across turns. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that ReCoVR consistently outperforms interactive baselines, notably achieving 74.30% R@1 after just one interactive round on the WebVid-CoVR-Test dataset.

</details>


### [567] [OpenZL: Using Graphs to Compress Smaller and Faster](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09928)
*Yann Collet,Nick Terrell,W. Felix Handte,Danielle Rozenblit,Victor Zhang,Kevin Zhang,Yaelle Goldschlag,Jennifer Lee,Elliot Gorokhovsky,Yonatan Komornik,Daniel Riegel,Stan Angelov,Nadav Rotem*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: OpenZL 提出了一种基于有向无环图（DAG）模块化编解码器的压缩框架“图模型”（graph model），支持快速构建应用特定压缩器，兼具高压缩比、高吞吐和易维护性，在Meta实际部署中显著缩短了开发周期。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有通用压缩器因追求压缩比而牺牲速度，难以满足工业界高吞吐、低资源的需求；应用特定压缩器虽性能优越，但开发困难、适用范围窄、难以维护。因此，亟需一种兼具通用性、高性能和可维护性的压缩方案。

Method: 提出“图模型”理论框架，将压缩过程表示为模块化编解码器的有向无环图（DAG），数据被压缩为自描述的线格式，可由通用解码器解压。OpenZL基于此框架实现，支持以少量代码快速开发应用特定压缩器。

Result: 在多种真实数据集上，OpenZL在压缩比和速度上均优于先进通用压缩器；与基于深度学习的压缩方法相比，压缩比相当但速度快多个数量级；在Meta内部部署中，体积和/或速度持续改善，开发周期从数月缩短至数天。

Conclusion: OpenZL在实际、可扩展、可维护的数据压缩方面取得了显著进展，特别适用于现代数据密集型应用场景。

Abstract: In the last few decades, research techniques have improved lossless compression ratios by significantly increasing processing time. However, these techniques have not gained popularity in industry because production systems require high throughput and low resource utilization. Instead, real world improvements in compression are increasingly realized by building application-specific compressors which can exploit knowledge about the structure and semantics of the data being compressed. Application-specific compressor systems outperform even the best generic compressors, but these techniques have severe drawbacks -- they are inherently limited in applicability, are hard to develop, and are difficult to maintain and deploy. In this work, we show that these challenges can be overcome with a new compression strategy. We propose the "graph model" of compression, a new theoretical framework for representing compression as a directed acyclic graph of modular codecs. OpenZL implements this framework and compresses data into a self-describing wire format, any configuration of which can be decompressed by a universal decoder. OpenZL's design enables rapid development of application-specific compressors with minimal code. Experimental results demonstrate that OpenZL achieves superior compression ratios and speeds compared to state-of-the-art general-purpose compressors on a variety of real-world datasets. Compared to ratio-focused deep-learning compressors, OpenZL is competitive on ratio while being many orders of magnitude faster. Internal deployments at Meta have also shown consistent improvements in size and/or speed, with development timelines reduced from months to days. OpenZL thus represents a significant advance in practical, scalable, and maintainable data compression for modern data-intensive applications.

</details>


### [568] [Enhancing Healthcare Search Intent Recognition with Query Representation Learning and Session Context](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10021)
*Harshita Jagdish Sahijwani,Madhav Sigdel,Song Aslan,Priya Gopi Achuthan,Monica D. Skidmore,Eugene Agichtein,Chen Lin*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文针对医疗搜索查询意图分类中存在的多义性、标签稀缺及全局统计与局部会话不一致等问题，提出通过聚类聚合相似查询并设计新型损失函数来改进查询表示学习，同时引入一致率（CR）评分量化查询歧义性与意图偏差，在两个真实数据集上验证了方法在查询表示聚类和会话级意图分类上的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖点击行为的成对损失函数学习查询表示，但医疗查询常具有多重意图导致点击行为模糊；且基于全局统计学习单一流行意图会忽略特定会话中的意图差异性，导致分类性能下降。

Method: 1) 通过聚类聚合相似查询改进查询表示学习；2) 设计新颖损失函数捕捉医疗搜索查询的多面性；3) 提出一致率（CR）评分量化查询歧义性与全局-局部意图错位；4) 将学习到的查询表示融入上下文相关的会话级意图分类。

Result: 在Health Search (HS)和TripClick两个真实搜索日志数据集上，该方法不仅提升了查询表示的内在聚类指标，还提高了后续搜索意图分类任务的准确性。

Conclusion: 所提方法通过缓解多意图带来的模糊性和全局-局部意图偏差，实现了更可扩展和准确的医疗查询表示学习与意图分类。

Abstract: Classifying the intent behind healthcare search queries is crucial for improving the delivery of online healthcare information. The intricate nature of medical search queries, coupled with the limited availability of high-quality labeled data, presents substantial challenges for developing efficient classification models. Previous studies have exploited user interaction data, such as user clicks from search logs and employed pairwise loss functions to model co-click behavior for query representation learning. However, many health queries could have multiple intents, resulting in ambiguous or divergent click behavior. Furthermore, learning the single most popular intent of queries as inferred from global statistics based on the aggregate behavior of different users could potentially lead to disparity and performance drop when classifying the query intent within specific search sessions. To address these limitations, our work improves the query representation learning by aggregating similar queries via clustering, and introducing a novel loss function designed to capture the multifaceted nature of health search queries, resulting in a more scalable and accurate learning procedure. Furthermore, we quantify the ambiguity of health queries and the misalignment between global search intents and those discerned from individual sessions, by introducing the concordance rate (CR) score, and demonstrate a simple and effective method for incorporating our learned query representation into contextual, session-based search intent classification. Our extensive experimental results and analysis on two real-world search log datasets, i.e., a Health Search (HS) dataset and the publicly available TripClick dataset, demonstrate that our approach not only improves the intrinsic clustering metrics for query representation learning but also enhances accuracy for subsequent search intent classification tasks.

</details>


### [569] [CCD-Level and Load-Aware Thread Orchestration for In-Memory Vector ANNS on Multi-Core CPUs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10090)
*Yuchen Huang,Baiteng Ma,Yiping Sun,Yang Shi,Xiao Chen,Xiaocheng Zhong,Zhiyong Wang,Yao Hu,Chuliang Weng*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出一种面向CCD架构CPU的线程编排框架，通过感知工作负载和硬件特性（缓存局部性、CCD芯片间通信），优化HNSW和IVF向量搜索的并行调度，在红书搜索/推荐/广告场景下实现最高3.7倍吞吐提升和30-90%的延迟降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代CCD多核CPU在部署中增加核心数并不能线性提升ANNS性能，主要原因在于内存访问延迟和距离计算的计算强度受限，且现有方案忽视了多芯片架构的缓存利用率和访问局部性问题。

Method: 提出CCD级线程编排框架：(i) 统一接口支持查询间并行HNSW和查询内并行IVF搜索；(ii) 缓存友好且工作负载自适应的任务调度映射；(iii) CCD感知的任务窃取机制解决负载不均衡。

Result: 在小红书搜索、推荐、广告生产负载上，吞吐提升高达3.7倍；P50和P999延迟降低30-90%；缓存缺失率降低6-30%；总CPU停顿减少20-80%。

Conclusion: 通过硬件-工作负载协同优化（CCD感知+访问局部性利用），可以显著突破多核CPU在向量搜索上的性能瓶颈，为生产级ANNS系统提供低成本高性能方案。

Abstract: Vector approximate nearest neighbor search (ANNS) underpins search engines, recommendation systems, and advertising services. Recent advances in ANNS indexes make CPU a cost-effective choice for serving million-scale, in-memory vector search, yet per-core throughput remains constrained by memory access latency of vector reading and the compute intensity of distance evaluations in production deployments. With the growing scale of the business and advances in hardware, modern CCD-based multi-core CPUs have been widely deployed for high throughput in our services. However, we find that simply increasing core counts does not yield optimal performance scaling. To improve the efficiency of more cores from the CCD-based architecture, we analyze the distributions of real-world requests in our production environments. We observe high access locality in vector search in our online services and low cache utilization, resulting from overlooking the multi-chiplet nature of CCD based CPUs. Hence, we propose a workload- and hardware-aware thread orchestration framework at CCD-level that (i) provides a uniform interface for both inter-query parallel HNSW search and intra-query parallel IVF search, (ii) achieves cache-friendly and workload-adaptive mapping of task dispatching, and (iii) employs CCD-aware task stealing to address load imbalance. Applied to real production workloads from search, recommendation, and advertising services of Xiaohongshu (RedNote), our approach delivers up to 3.7x higher throughput and 30-90% reductions in P50 and P999 latency. In detail, compared with the original framework, the cache-miss ratio decreases by 6-30%, and the total CPU stall is reduced by 20-80%.

</details>


### [570] [H-MAPS: Hierarchical Memory-Augmented Proactive Search Assistant for Scientific Literature](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10097)
*Koji Nishikawa,Makoto P. Kato*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: H-MAPS是一个利用三层分层记忆机制（用户画像、阅读上下文、会话历史）来解析用户隐性信息需求的主动式文献探索助手，能在本地设备上实现隐私保护的神经检索，并针对不同背景用户生成个性化问题与文献推荐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统主动信息检索系统仅依赖屏幕文本，忽略读者特定背景和意图，导致上下文歧义问题，打断阅读流并增加认知负担。

Method: 提出H-MAPS系统，核心为三层分层记忆（Hierarchical Memory）：用户画像层（长期专业背景）、阅读上下文层（当前论文内容）、会话历史层（短期交互行为）。通过隐性阅读行为触发，将潜在信息需求转化为显式自然语言问题，并在本地设备进行神经检索。

Result: 通过两位不同领域研究者（NLP与HCI）阅读同一篇论文的场景演示，系统能生成画像特异的问题并为不同用户检索出差异化的相关文献。

Conclusion: H-MAPS证明了通过分层记忆建模读者背景可以有效消除主动检索中的上下文歧义，同时本地化处理保障了隐私，为个性化主动阅读辅助提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Scientific reading is an active process that frequently requires consulting external resources, but manual keyword searching interrupts the reading flow and imposes a high cognitive load. Existing proactive information retrieval systems often suffer from context ambiguity, as they rely solely on on-screen text and ignore the reader's specific background and intent. In this demonstration, we present H-MAPS (Hierarchical Memory-Augmented Proactive Search Assistant), a proactive literature exploration assistant that resolves this ambiguity by leveraging a three-layered hierarchical memory. Triggered by implicit reading behaviors, H-MAPS articulates the user's latent information needs into explicit natural language questions and performs neural retrieval entirely on the local device to ensure privacy. We demonstrate H-MAPS using a scenario where two researchers, specializing in NLP and HCI, read the same paper. In response, the system generates profile-specific questions and retrieves distinct literature tailored to each user.

</details>


### [571] [NumColBERT: Non-Intrusive Numeracy Injection for Late-Interaction Retrieval Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10109)
*Haruki Fujimaki,Makoto P. Kato*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: NumColBERT提出了一种非侵入式的推理方法，通过数值门控机制和对比学习目标，在不修改ColBERT原有延迟交互架构的前提下，提升对含数值条件查询的检索性能，效果优于标准微调基线，且与分离式文本-数值打分方法性能相当或更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有密集检索模型在处理含数值条件的查询（如"研发支出超过10亿美元的公司"）时表现不佳。虽然已有方法将查询拆分为文本和数值部分分别打分，但这类方案需要修改ColBERT等延迟交互模型，带来了部署、延迟和维护方面的挑战。

Method: 提出NumColBERT，包含两个核心组件：(1) 数值门控机制，放大携带关键数值约束的token、抑制上下文无关的数值提及；(2) 数值对比学习目标，塑造嵌入空间以反映数值的大小、单位和条件。该方法保留标准ColBERT的索引和MaxSim打分流程，属于推理时的非侵入式方法。

Result: 实验结果表明，NumColBERT显著优于标准微调基线，并且与依赖分离式文本-数值打分的已有方法相比，精度相当或更优。

Conclusion: 这项工作证明了在非侵入式推理流程中实现数值条件检索的可行性，为实际部署提供了一种可维护的解决方案。

Abstract: This study addresses the challenge of improving dense retrieval performance for queries containing numerical conditions, such as ``companies with more than one billion dollars in R&D expenditure.'' Although recent research has shown that standard models struggle with numeric information in domains such as finance, e-commerce, and medicine, existing solutions typically decompose queries into textual and numerical components and score them separately. These approaches modify late-interaction retrieval models such as ColBERT and introduce challenges in deployment, latency, and maintainability. To overcome these limitations, we propose NumColBERT, an inference-time non-intrusive method that enhances numerically conditioned retrieval while preserving the original late-interaction mechanism. Because NumColBERT retains the standard ColBERT indexing and MaxSim scoring pipeline, existing optimizations and ecosystem components can be reused directly, facilitating practical deployment. NumColBERT introduces a Numerical Gating Mechanism and a Numerical Contrastive Learning objective to enable numerical conditions to contribute more effectively within standard ColBERT scoring. The gating mechanism amplifies tokens carrying critical numerical constraints while suppressing context-neutral numerical mentions, and the contrastive objective shapes the embedding space to reflect numerical magnitudes, units, and conditions. Experimental results show that NumColBERT substantially outperforms standard fine-tuning baselines and achieves accuracy comparable to or better than prior approaches relying on separate textual and numerical scoring. These findings demonstrate the feasibility of numerically conditioned retrieval with a non-intrusive inference pipeline and present a maintainable solution for real-world deployment.

</details>


### [572] [LASAR: Latent Adaptive Semantic Aligned Reasoning for Generative Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10207)
*Yiwen Chen,Fuwei Zhang,Zehao Chen,Deqing Wang,Hehan Li,Peizhi Xu,Hanmeng Liu,Shuanglong Li,Xin Pei,Fuzhen Zhuang,Zhao Zhang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: LASAR提出了一种基于潜在推理的自适应语义对齐框架，通过SFT+RL两阶段训练将潜在推理引入生成式推荐系统，在保持推荐质量的同时将推理速度提升约20倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在推荐系统中使用CoT逐token生成效率低下，而潜在推理虽在LLM中表现优异但尚未应用于生成式推荐，面临三个挑战：SID符号缺乏语义先验难以联合优化、缺乏推理链监督导致表示漂移、全局固定推理深度次优。

Method: 提出SFT-Then-RL框架：Stage1先为SID注入语义，Stage2引入潜在推理；通过步级双向KL散度对齐CoT文本的隐藏状态锚点，Policy Head预测每样本推理深度；GRPO-RL阶段使用终端KL对齐和REINFORCE优化动态步长分配。

Result: 在三个真实数据集上超越所有基线，潜在推理步数几乎减半，推理延迟极小，速度约为生成显式CoT文本的20倍。

Conclusion: LASAR有效弥合了符号离散推理与连续潜在推理之间的鸿沟，为生成式推荐系统提供了高效且高质量的推理方案。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated powerful reasoning capabilities through Chain-of-Thought (CoT) in various tasks, yet the inefficiency of token-by-token generation hinders real-world deployment in latency-sensitive recommender systems. Latent reasoning has emerged as an effective paradigm in LLMs, performing multi-step inference in a continuous hidden-state space to achieve stronger reasoning at lower cost. However, this paradigm remains underexplored in mainstream generative recommendation. Adapting it reveals three unique challenges: (1) the gap between prior-less Semantic ID (SID) symbols and continuous latent reasoning - SIDs lack pre-trained semantics, hindering joint optimization; (2) representation drift due to a lack of reasoning chain supervision; and (3) the suboptimality of applying a globally fixed reasoning depth. To address these, we propose LASAR (Latent Adaptive Semantic Aligned Reasoning), an SFT-then-RL framework. First, we bridge this gap via two-stage training: Stage 1 grounds SID semantics before Stage 2 introduces latent reasoning, ensuring efficient convergence. Second, we mitigate representation drift through explicit CoT semantic alignment. Step-wise bidirectional KL divergence constrains the latent reasoning trajectory using hidden-state anchors extracted from CoT text, while a Policy Head predicts per-sample reasoning depth. Third, during the GRPO-based RL phase, terminal-only KL alignment accommodates variable-length reasoning, and REINFORCE optimizes the Policy Head to dynamically allocate steps. This nearly halves the average latent step count while simultaneously improving recommendation quality. Experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that LASAR outperforms all baselines. It adds marginal inference latency and is roughly 20 times faster than generating explicit CoT text.

</details>


### [573] [Every Preference Has Its Strength: Injecting Ordinal Semantics into LLM-Based Recommenders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10323)
*Jiwon Jeong,Donghee Han,Sungrae Hong,Woosung Kang,Mun Yong Yi*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出OSA框架，通过数值文本token嵌入作为语义锚点，显式建模序数偏好强度，在CF-LLM混合推荐中保留细粒度偏好语义，实验表现优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CF-LLM框架将显式评分压缩为隐式或正反馈，丢失了序数结构所蕴含的细粒度偏好强度信息，导致模型无法利用分级语义和偏好细微差别。

Method: 提出序数语义锚定（OSA）框架：将序数偏好级别表示为数值文本token，利用其token嵌入作为语义锚点，在LLM隐空间中对齐用户-物品交互表示，通过强度感知对齐保留偏好语义。

Result: 在多个真实数据集上，OSA一致优于现有基线方法，尤其在成对偏好评估任务中表现突出，证明其在建模细粒度用户偏好方面的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过显式建模序数偏好强度并利用语义锚点对齐交互表示，OSA有效提升了CF-LLM混合推荐系统对细粒度偏好的捕捉能力。

Abstract: Recent work has shown that large language models (LLMs) can enhance recommender systems by integrating collaborative filtering (CF) signals through hybrid prompting. However, most existing CF-LLM frameworks collapse explicit ratings into implicit or positive-only feedback, discarding the ordinal structure that conveys fine-grained preference strength. As a result, these models struggle to exploit graded semantics and nuanced preference distinctions. We propose Ordinal Semantic Anchoring (OSA), a hybrid CF-LLM framework that explicitly incorporates preference strength by modeling interaction-level user feedback. OSA represents ordinal preference levels as numeric textual tokens and uses their token embeddings as semantic anchors to align user-item interaction representations in the LLM latent space. Through strength-aware alignment across ordinal levels, OSA preserves preference semantics when integrating collaborative signals with LLMs. Experiments on multiple real-world datasets demonstrate that OSA consistently outperforms existing baselines, particularly in pairwise preference evaluation, highlighting its effectiveness in modeling fine-grained user preferences over prior CF-LLM methods.

</details>


### [574] [AgentGR: Semantic-aware Agentic Group Decision-Making Simulator for Group Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10367)
*Yangtao Zhou,Wenhao You,Hua Chu,Shihao Guo,Jianan Li,Zhifu Zhao,Qingshan Li*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出AgentGR，一种基于LLM驱动智能体的语义感知群体决策模拟器，通过协同-语义用户偏好建模和群体互动模拟来提升群组推荐性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有群组推荐方法将群体偏好学习视为简单的偏好聚合过程，未能捕捉真实群体决策的复杂动态。

Method: 1) 语义元路径引导的链式偏好推理机制；2) 识别群体主题和领导力以显式建模影响因素；3) 静态工作流和动态对话两种多智能体模拟策略。

Result: 在两个真实数据集上，AgentGR在推荐准确性和群体决策模拟方面显著优于最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: AgentGR通过智能体模拟群体决策过程，有效提升了群组推荐性能，展示了在真实群组推荐应用中的潜力。

Abstract: Group Recommendation (GR) aims to suggest items to a group of users, which has become a critical component of modern social platforms. Existing GR methods focus on aggregating individual user preferences with advanced neural networks to infer group preferences. Despite effectiveness, they essentially treat group preference learning as a simple preference aggregation process, failing to capture the complex dynamics of real-world group decision-making. To address these limitations, we propose AgentGR, a novel Semantic-aware Agentic Group Decision-Making Simulator for Group Recommendations, inspired by the semantic reasoning and human behavior simulation capabilities of LLM-driven agents. It aims to jointly capture collaborative-semantic user preferences for member-role-playing and simulate dynamic group interactions to reflect real-world group decision-making processes, thereby boosting recommendation performance. Specifically, to capture collaborative-semantic user preferences, we introduce a semantic meta-path guided chain-of-preference reasoning mechanism that integrates high-order collaborative filtering signals and textual semantics to improve user preference profiles. To model the complex dynamics of group decision-making, we first recognize group topic and leadership to explicitly model the influencing factors within the group decision processes. Building on these, we simulate group-level decision dynamics via two multi-agent simulation strategies for recommendations: a static workflow-based strategy for efficiency and a dynamic dialogue-based strategy for precision. Extensive experiments on two real-world datasets show that AgentGR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both recommendation accuracy and group decision simulation, highlighting its potential for real-world GR applications.

</details>


### [575] [UniRank: Unified List-wise Reranking via Confidence-Ordered Denoising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10527)
*Pengyue Jia,Hailan Yang,Shuchang Liu,Xiaobei Wang,Wanyu Wang,Xiang Li,Yongqi Liu,Kaiqiao Zhan,Kun Gai,Xiangyu Zhao*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出UniRank，一个统一列表级重排序框架，通过迭代去噪过程结合双向列表建模，在推理时能退化为自回归和非自回归重排序器作为特例，实验证明其优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自回归重排序器存在错误传播问题，非自回归重排序器则因槽位独立假设削弱了项目间交互建模。本文旨在设计一个统一架构，结合两者优势。

Method: 提出UniRank框架，采用迭代去噪过程进行双向列表建模，每步填充最置信的槽位。引入任务接地扩散接口(TGD)，在项目级别进行去噪，将语义token聚合成单个项目嵌入，直接对候选池进行槽位评分。

Result: 在Amazon Books、MovieLens-1M和工业短视频数据集上优于最强基线。在线A/B测试中，用户平均使用时长提升0.159%，分享率提升1.016%。

Conclusion: UniRank成功统一了自回归与非自回归重排序范式，通过迭代去噪实现了更强的重排序性能，并在工业场景中验证了实际效果。

Abstract: List-wise reranking arranges a request-specific pool of candidate items into an ordered slate that maximizes user satisfaction. Existing generative rerankers fall into two paradigms: Autoregressive (AR) rerankers construct the slate left to right and capture inter-item dependencies in the exposure list, but they suffer from error propagation because early mistakes affect subsequent slots. Non-autoregressive (NAR) rerankers predict all slots in parallel and avoid error propagation, but they weaken inter-item interaction modeling under a slot independence assumption. This raises a central question: is there a unified architecture that combines the strengths of both paradigms and delivers stronger reranking performance? We answer this question with UniRank, a unified list-wise reranking framework whose inference time variants recover AR and NAR rerankers as special cases. UniRank integrates bidirectional slate modeling into an iterative denoising process and fills the most confident slot at each step. To instantiate this framework for reranking, we introduce the Task Grounded Diffusion Interface (TGD), which performs denoising at the item level and restricts prediction to the request-specific candidate pool. TGD aggregates each item's semantic tokens into a single item embedding and scores each slot directly against the candidate pool. Experiments on Amazon Books, MovieLens-1M, and an industrial short video dataset show that UniRank consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Online A/B tests on a real-world industrial platform further validate its effectiveness, yielding significant improvements of +0.159% in user average app-time and +1.016% in share-rate.

</details>


### [576] [Personalized Deep Research: A User-Centric Framework, Dataset, and Hybrid Evaluation for Knowledge Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10530)
*Xiaopeng Li,Wenlin Zhang,Yingyi Zhang,Pengyue Jia,Yejing Wang,Yichao Wang,Yong Liu,Huifeng Guo,Xiangyu Zhao*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出个性化深度研究(PDR)框架，将动态用户上下文集成到检索-推理核心循环中，实现自适应信息探索，并发布配套基准数据集与评估体系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM驱动的深度研究系统采用静态"一刀切"检索范式，无法根据用户已有知识或潜在兴趣自适应调整探索深度与广度，导致对专家冗余、对新手过密的问题。

Method: PDR将用户画像建模与迭代查询开发、双阶段(私有/公开)检索、上下文感知综合统一到核心检索-推理循环中，实现研究子目标与用户意图的自主对齐，并优化证据收集的停止条件。

Result: 相比商业基线系统，PDR在检索效用和报告相关性上取得显著提升，有效弥合了通用信息检索与个性化知识获取之间的差距。

Conclusion: 将个性化从后处理步骤提升为核心循环要素，能够显著改善LLM深度研究系统对用户需求的适应能力，相关数据集与评估框架已开源。

Abstract: Deep Research agents driven by LLMs have automated the scholarly discovery pipeline, from planning and query formulation to iterative web exploration. Yet they remain constrained by a static, ``one-size-fits-all'' retrieval paradigm. Current systems fail to adaptively adjust the depth and breadth of exploration based on the user's existing expertise or latent interests, frequently resulting in reports that are either redundant for experts or overly dense for novices. To address this, we introduce Personalized Deep Research (PDR), a framework that integrates dynamic user context into the core retrieval-reasoning loop. Rather than treating personalization as a post-hoc formatting step, PDR unifies user profile modeling with iterative query development, dual-stage (private/public) retrieval, and context-aware synthesis. This allows the system to autonomously align research sub-goals with user intent and optimize the stopping criteria for evidence collection. To facilitate benchmarking, we release the PDR Dataset, covering four realistic user tasks, and propose a hybrid evaluation framework combining lexical metrics with LLM-based judgments to assess factual accuracy and personalization alignment. Experimental results against commercial baselines demonstrate that PDR significantly improves retrieval utility and report relevance, effectively bridging the gap between generic information retrieval and personalized knowledge acquisition. The resource is available to the public at https://github.com/Applied-Machine-Learning-Lab/SIGIR2026_PDR.

</details>


### [577] [Rethinking Agentic Search with Pi-Serini: Is Lexical Retrieval Sufficient?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10848)
*Tz-Huan Hsu,Jheng-Hong Yang,Jimmy Lin*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文通过将BM25词汇检索器与强大的LLM（如gpt-5.5）结合，构建了Pi-Serini搜索代理，在BrowseComp-Plus任务上实现了83.1%的答案准确率和94.7%的证据召回率，超越了使用稠密检索器的搜索代理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在LLM能力不断增强的背景下，简单的词汇检索器（如BM25）是否足以支撑高效的深度研究系统，以回答实际构建该类系统时的关键选择问题。

Method: 提出Pi-Serini搜索代理，配备三个工具（检索、浏览、阅读文档），将BM25词汇检索器与具有更强推理和工具使用能力的前沿LLM（如gpt-5.5）相结合，并进行BM25调优和检索深度控制。

Result: Pi-Serini在BrowseComp-Plus上达到83.1%答案准确率、94.7%证据召回率，超越使用稠密检索器的代理；BM25调优比默认设置提升18.0%准确率和11.1%证据召回率；增大检索深度比浅层检索提升25.3%证据召回率。

Conclusion: 与更强LLM配合时，配置良好的词汇检索器（BM25）足以支持深度研究任务，挑战了"必须使用稠密检索"的普遍认知。

Abstract: Does a lexical retriever suffice as large language models (LLMs) become more capable in an agentic loop? This question naturally arises when building deep research systems. We revisit it by pairing BM25 with frontier LLMs that have better reasoning and tool-use abilities. To support researchers asking the same question, we introduce Pi-Serini, a search agent equipped with three tools for retrieving, browsing, and reading documents. Our results show that, on BrowseComp-Plus, a well-configured lexical retriever with sufficient retrieval depth can support effective deep research when paired with more capable LLMs. Specifically, Pi-Serini with gpt-5.5 achieves 83.1% answer accuracy and 94.7% surfaced evidence recall, outperforming released search agents that use dense retrievers. Controlled ablations further show that BM25 tuning improves answer accuracy by 18.0% and surfaced evidence recall by 11.1% over the default BM25 setting, while increasing retrieval depth further improves surfaced evidence recall by 25.3% over the shallow-retrieval setting. Source code is available at https://github.com/justram/pi-serini.

</details>


### [578] [Multi-Level Graph Attention Network Contrastive Learning for Knowledge-Aware Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08499)
*Zhifei Hu,Feng Xia*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多视图图对比学习框架，通过知识图谱蒸馏和多级自监督对比学习（层间、层内、交互级）来增强推荐系统中用户和物品的表征，在三个公开数据集上取得了优于现有方法的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于知识图谱的推荐方法受限于标签稀疏、图结构学习不足以及知识图谱中的噪声实体，导致推荐精度下降。本文旨在解决这些局限性。

Method: 1) 多视图知识图谱蒸馏增强用户表征；2) 聚合邻域实体信息构建物品表征；3) 多级自监督对比学习模块（Inter-Level、Intra-Level、Interaction-Level）进行跨视角比较，提升类间区分度和类内泛化能力。

Result: 在三个公开数据集上的实验表明，所提框架在基线和消融设置下均一致优于现有最先进方法。消融研究验证了各模块的有效性。

Conclusion: 多视图图对比学习框架能有效缓解标签稀疏和知识图谱噪声问题，通过多级对比学习实现更精准的用户偏好建模和推荐性能提升。

Abstract: In recent years, the use of edge information provided by knowledge graphs together with the advantages of higher-order connectivity in graph neural networks for recommendation systems has become an important research direction. However, existing approaches are often limited by sparse labels, insufficient graph structure learning, and noisy entities in the knowledge graph, which reduce recommendation accuracy. To address these limitations, we propose a multi-view graph contrastive learning framework. The proposed method enhances user representations through multi-view knowledge graph distillation, enabling more accurate modeling of user preferences over entities and relations. The network aggregates neighborhood entity information to construct informative item representations. Furthermore, we design a multi-level self-supervised contrastive learning module that performs comparisons across three perspectives: Inter-Level, Intra-Level, and Interaction-Level. This design improves the model's ability to generalize across intra-class samples while increasing discrimination between inter-class samples, thereby enabling more effective multi-dimensional feature modeling. We conduct extensive experiments on three public datasets using both baseline and ablation settings. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. Ablation studies further verify the effectiveness of each module in the proposed model.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [579] [Drain-Vortex Optimization: A Population-Based Metaheuristic Inspired by Multi-Drain Free-Vortex Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08883)
*Mohsen Omidi,Brian Vaughan*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为 Drain-Vortex Optimization (DVO) 的群体元启发式算法，用于连续优化。DVO 将每个候选解建模为在多排水漩涡场中运动的粒子，通过径向吸引和切向旋转的更新规则，结合三阶段机制（远场探索、螺旋向内运动、局部核心开发）以及自适应螺旋开发、漩涡盆地分配和随机盆地切换等策略。在 CEC 2017、CEC 2022、经典函数和五个约束工程设计问题上进行测试，结果表明 DVO 在 CEC 2017 上表现最佳，显著优于多个基线算法，但在简单经典函数和小型工程设计问题上竞争力较弱。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有群体优化算法在探索与开发的平衡上存在不足，作者希望通过模拟流体力学中的漩涡排水现象，设计一种具有结构化多样性且能自适应切换搜索阶段的新型元启发式算法，以提升连续优化问题的求解性能。

Method: DVO 将每个候选解视为在多排水漩涡场中运动的粒子，更新规则分解为径向吸引（向选定排水中心移动）和切向旋转（由正则化自由涡旋定律控制）。采用三阶段机制，根据到排水中心的归一化距离切换：远场探索、螺旋向内运动、局部核心开发。此外，还使用自适应螺旋开发、种群级漩涡盆地分配以及可选的随机盆地切换策略来维持结构化的种群多样性。

Result: 在 CEC 2017 上，DVO 在 58 个测试案例中的 34 个上达到了最佳平均 log10 误差，Friedman 平均排名为 1.67，在 Holm 校正 Wilcoxon 检验下显著优于所有基线。在 CEC 2022 上，DVO 获得最佳 Friedman 排名（2.13），显著优于 7 个基线中的 5 个。但在简单可扩展经典函数和小型约束工程设计问题上竞争力较弱。

Conclusion: DVO 是一种有效的新型群体优化算法，在中高维度和复杂约束问题上表现突出，但在简单问题上优势有限。算法同时实现了 GPU 矢量化并行实现，支持高效执行。

Abstract: This paper proposes Drain-Vortex Optimization (DVO), a population-based metaheuristic for continuous optimization. DVO models each candidate solution as a particle moving in a multi-drain vortex field. Its update rule decomposes motion into radial attraction toward selected drain centres and tangential rotation governed by a regularized free-vortex law. A three-phase mechanism switches between far-field exploration, spiral inward motion, and localized core exploitation according to the normalized distance to the assigned drain. The method also uses adaptive spiral exploitation, population-level vortex basin assignment, and optional stochastic basin switching to support structured diversity. DVO is evaluated against PSO, GWO, WOA, SCA, AOA, EO, and SVOA using a calibration--validation protocol. CEC 2022 is used only to select the final DVO configuration, while CEC 2017, classical functions, and five constrained engineering design problems are used for out-of-sample validation. On CEC 2017, DVO achieves the best mean $\log_{10}$ error on 34 of 58 cases and the best Friedman average rank (1.67), and is significantly better than every baseline under Holm-corrected Wilcoxon tests. On CEC 2022, DVO obtains the best Friedman rank (2.13) and is significantly better than five of the seven baselines; the differences against PSO and SVOA are not significant. DVO is less competitive on simple scalable classical functions and on small constrained engineering designs, which clarifies its operating regime. The algorithm is implemented in a vectorized GPU form that executes independent runs in parallel.

</details>


### [580] [Evolutionary Ensemble of Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09018)
*Zongmin Yu,Liu Yang*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: EvE是一个去中心化框架，将现有编码智能体组织成协同进化的系统，通过保持两个共进化种群（功能代码求解器和智能体引导状态），自主发现可靠的缩放-插值机制，实现示例计数泛化，并证明阶段性智能体自适应对于突破静态性能上限至关重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在"LLM作为优化器"范式中，现有方法往往重新发明轮子，缺乏对编码智能体行为的系统性进化机制。特别是在In-Context Operator Networks (ICON)中，存在示例计数泛化的研究瓶颈，需要一种能够自动发现鲁棒机制的框架。

Method: EvE维护两个共进化种群：功能代码求解器和智能体引导状态。通过同步竞赛评估智能体，基于其对当前求解器状态的边际收益更新Elo评分。系统固定基础智能体底材，专注于进化累积的引导和技能。

Result: 在ICON研究瓶颈上，EvE自主发现了鲁棒的缩放-插值机制，实现了可靠的示例计数泛化。消融实验表明阶段性智能体自适应至关重要，与固定初始智能体或冻结的"最佳进化"智能体相比，EvE避免了相位失配问题。

Conclusion: 将智能体组织成自我修正的集成系统是突破静态性能上限的根本驱动力，证明了去中心化、协同进化的框架能够有效解决复杂代码库中的算法发现问题。

Abstract: We introduce Evolutionary Ensemble (EvE), a decentralized framework that organizes existing, highly capable coding agents into a live, co-evolving system for algorithmic discovery. Rather than reinventing the wheel within the "LLMs as optimizers" paradigm, EvE fixes the base agent substrate and focuses entirely on evolving the cumulative guidance and skills that dictate agent behaviors. By maintaining two co-evolving populations, namely functional code solvers and agent guidance states, the system evaluates agents through a synchronous race, updating their empirical Elo ratings based on the marginal gains they contribute to the current solver state. When applied to a research bottleneck in In-Context Operator Networks (ICON), EvE autonomously discovered a robust rescale-then-interpolate mechanism that enables reliable example-count generalization. Crucially, controlled ablations reveal the absolute necessity of stage-dependent agent adaptation to navigate the shifting search landscapes of complex codebases. Compared to variants driven by a fixed initial agent or even a frozen "best-evolved" agent, EvE uniquely avoids phase mismatch, demonstrating that organizing agents into a self-revising ensemble is the fundamental driver for breaking through static performance ceilings.

</details>


### [581] [Neuromorphic Reinforcement Learning for Quadruped Locomotion Control on Uneven Terrain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09595)
*Zhuangyu Han,Abhronil Sengupta*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于平衡传播（EP）的PPO框架，用于四足机器人在不平坦地形上的运动控制。该框架用局部学习代替全局反向传播，并结合CPG策略与残差姿态调整策略，在A1四足机器人上实现了与反向传播PPO基线相当的性能，同时GPU内存效率提升了4.3倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习训练的四足运动控制器大多依赖离线反向传播训练，部署为固定策略，难以适应地形变化、负载变化、执行器磨损等现实条件，且受限于机载功耗。局部学习提供了一条在机器人本体上进行低功耗自适应训练的潜在路径。

Method: 提出基于平衡传播（EP）的PPO框架：1）控制器结合生物启发的CPG策略与残差姿态调整策略；2）用EP局部学习替代传统的反向传播训练策略网络和价值网络；3）推导了EP兼容的PPO输出驱动信号；4）引入双侧比率裁剪机制以稳定策略更新。

Result: 在12自由度A1四足机器人上进行两阶段不平坦地形运动实验，控制器实现了稳定的策略收敛。性能（成功率、速度跟踪、执行器功率、身体稳定性）与反向传播PPO基线相当，GPU内存效率相比BPTT提升4.3倍。

Conclusion: 局部平衡学习能够支持高维具身运动控制任务，为低功耗机载自适应和微调提供了算法基础。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has enabled robust quadruped locomotion over complex terrain, but most learned controllers are trained offline with backpropagation in massively parallel simulation and deployed as fixed policies, limiting adaptation to terrain variation, payload changes, actuator wear, and other real-world conditions under onboard power constraints. Local learning provides a potential path toward energy-aware on-robot adaptation by replacing global backpropagation graphs with updates driven by local neural states, making the learning rule more compatible with neuromorphic and in-memory computing substrates. This work proposes an equilibrium-propagation (EP)-based proximal policy optimization (PPO) framework for uneven-terrain quadruped locomotion. The controller combines a bio-inspired central pattern generator (CPG) policy with a residual postural adjustment policy, while replacing conventional backpropagation-trained policy and value networks with EP-enabled local learning. To train stochastic continuous-control policies with EP, we derive an EP-compatible PPO output-nudging signal and introduce a two-sided ratio clipping mechanism that stabilizes policy updates during relaxation. Experiments on a 12-DoF A1 quadruped show that the proposed controller achieves stable policy convergence in a two-stage uneven terrain locomotion task. Its locomotion performance is comparable to a backpropagation-trained PPO baseline in success rate, velocity tracking, actuator power, and body stability, while improving GPU memory efficiency by 4.3\(\times\) compared with backpropagation through time (BPTT). These results suggest that local equilibrium-based learning can support high-dimensional embodied locomotion and provide an algorithmic foundation for low-power on-robot adaptation and fine-tuning.

</details>


### [582] [RDEx-CASK: Cauchy Mutation, Archive, and Stagnation Kick for RDEx-CSOP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09652)
*Dikshant,Dikshit Chauhan,Chen Hao,Anupam Trivedi,Harikumar Kandath,Senthilnath Jayavelu*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出RDEx-CASK，通过对RDEx-CSOP进行三项针对性改进（独立截断柯西采样、小规模JADE存档、个体停滞触发的局部覆盖策略），在不改变开发分支的前提下，显著提升了对约束优化问题的求解效率和质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决RDEx-CSOP在处理约束优化问题时出现的停滞（stagnation）和后期方差不足（late-stage variance）问题。

Method: 1) 标准分支的第二尺度因子改为独立截断柯西采样；2) 添加仅含可行解的小型JADE存档（|A|_max=50），采样概率为|A|/(|A|+|P|)；3) 个体停滞计数器在连续180代无改进后触发三项局部覆盖：向全局最优拉拢、提升存档采样下限至0.65、当种群成功率低于0.10时将CR饱和至0.95。

Result: 在CEC CSOP测试集（D=30, 25次运行）上，RDEx-CASK在可行性感知质量上与RDEx、UDE-III、CL-SRDE相当，并在大多数问题上缩短了求解时间（time-to-target）。

Conclusion: 三项针对性改进在不改动原有开发分支的前提下有效缓解了停滞与后期方差问题，使算法在约束优化任务中更具竞争力。

Abstract: We extend RDEx-CSOP with 3 changes that target stagnation & late-stage variance, plus minor parameter tuning. The second scale factor in the standard branch is sampled independently from a truncated Cauchy. A small feasible-only JADE-style archive (|A|_max = 50) is added & sampled with probability |A|/(|A|+|P|). Per-individual stagnation counter triggers, after 180 no-improvement generations, three local overrides on standard branch: pull toward the global best, lift the archive sampling floor to 0.65, & saturate CR to 0.95 when population success rate is below 0.10. The exploitation biased branch & every other RDEx component are left untouched. On CEC CSOP suite (D=30, 25 runs), RDEx-CASK is competitive with RDEx, UDE-III, & CL-SRDE in feasibility-aware quality & improves time-to-target on most problems.

</details>


### [583] [LEVI: Stronger Search Architectures Can Substitute for Larger LLMs in Evolutionary Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09764)
*Temoor Tanveer*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: LEVI是一个基于更强搜索架构（而非更强LLM）的高效进化框架，在系统研究和提示优化任务上，以3.3-35x更低的成本达到或超越现有前沿模型驱动的进化方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM驱动的进化方法（如AlphaEvolve）依赖前沿模型，每次运行成本极高。作者认为这是现有框架在三个方面的缺陷所致：存档未能保持解多样性、盲目使用大模型处理小模型能完成的局部编辑、全量评估浪费rollout资源。

Method: LEVI提出三项改进：1）从开始就建立并维护多样性的解数据库；2）智能突变路由，根据任务难度分配大/小LLM；3）保秩的代理基准测试，减少rollout开销。

Result: 在系统研究基准上，LEVI以3.3-6.7x更低的预算达到最高分，某一问题以35x更低成本匹配最佳结果。在提示优化上，以不到一半的rollout预算匹配或超越GEPA在四个基准上的表现。

Conclusion: 更强的搜索架构可以替代甚至超越更大的LLM在进化搜索中的表现，显著降低成本。

Abstract: LLM-guided evolutionary methods such as AlphaEvolve have proven effective in domains like math, systems research, and algorithmic discovery, but their reliance on frontier models makes each run expensive. We argue this is largely an artifact of how existing frameworks allocate search: archives that fail to preserve solution diversity force compensation through stronger mutation models; blind model use spends frontier dollars on local edits a smaller model could handle; and full-set evaluation wastes rollouts on redundant examples. We introduce LEVI, a harness-first evolutionary framework built on the bet that stronger search architectures can substitute for or even outperform larger LLMs in evolutionary search. LEVI improves on three core components of evolutionary search: a solution database that establishes diversity from the beginning, and then maintains it throughout the run; a smarter mutation router that plays into the strengths of large and small LLMs; and a rank-preserving proxy benchmark for rollout-heavy settings. Across systems-research benchmarks LEVI attains the highest score on a budget 3.3-6.7x smaller than the published frontier-model runs of existing frameworks like ShinkaEvolve, GEPA, and AdaEvolve; on one problem, LEVI matches the existing best at a 35x lower cost. On prompt optimization, LEVI matches or exceeds GEPA at less than half of its rollout budget on four different benchmarks. LEVI is available as an open-source framework at https://github.com/ttanv/levi.

</details>


### [584] [Encoding and Decoding Temporal Signals with Spiking Bandpass Wavelets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09770)
*Jens Egholm Pedersen,Tony Lindeberg,Peter Gerstoft*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出基于尖峰的时间因果小波框架，将脉冲编码重新定义为具有量化带宽和重建误差界限的小波表示，在保持稀疏性和局部性的同时实现了与连续小波变换相当的重建精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有脉冲编码大多基于概率方法，与信号处理文献脱节，缺乏系统的理论框架来量化带宽和重建误差。

Method: 将脉冲编码器重新解释为时间因果小波框架，建立量化带宽和重建误差界限，保留脉冲表示的稀疏性和局部性。

Result: 在心电图和音频数据集上实现了与连续小波变换相当的归一化均方根误差，重建精度仅受脉冲量化和时间离散化的限制。

Conclusion: 尖峰小波直接映射到神经形态硬件，为脉冲编码提供了信号处理的理论基础，兼具能量效率和重建性能。

Abstract: Spike-based encodings are sparse and energy-efficient, but have largely been formulated probabilistically, disconnected from most signal processing literature. We recast spike encoders as time-causal wavelet frames with quantitative bandwidths and reconstruction error bounds. The proposed wavelets preserve the sparsity and locality of spiking representations, with reconstruction up to spike quantization and time discretization. We demonstrate reconstruction on ECG and audio datasets, achieving a normalized RMSE comparable to continuous wavelet transforms. The spiking wavelets map directly to neuromorphic hardware.

</details>


### [585] [EvoPref: Multi-Objective Evolutionary Optimization Discovers Diverse LLM Alignments Beyond Gradient Descent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09777)
*Dongxin Guo,Jikun Wu,Siu Ming Yiu*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: EvoPref 是一种基于多目标进化算法的 LLM 对齐方法，通过 NSGA-II 和存档多样性保持，在保持对齐质量的同时显著提升了偏好的覆盖率和降低了崩溃率（与 ORPO 相比，覆盖率中位数 82.5% vs 70.0%，崩溃率 11.0% vs 20.6%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于梯度的偏好优化方法存在偏好崩溃问题，即收敛到狭窄的行为模式而忽略了偏好的多样性。本文旨在通过进化算法解决这一问题。

Method: 提出 EvoPref，一种多目标进化算法，维护 LoRA 适配器种群，使用 NSGA-II 选择机制和存档多样性保持，同时优化 helpfulness、harmlessness 和 honesty 三个目标。

Result: 偏好覆盖率提升 18%（中位数 82.5% vs 70.0%），崩溃率降低 47%（11.0% vs 20.6%），对齐质量与 ORPO 相当（75.5% vs 75.0%），所有结果均通过严格的统计检验。

Conclusion: 种群方法比梯度下降能发现更多样化的对齐，多目标选择与多样性保持至关重要，进化优化可作为多样化 LLM 对齐的范式。

Abstract: Gradient-based preference optimization methods for large language model (LLM) alignment suffer from preference collapse, converging to narrow behavioral modes while neglecting preference diversity. We introduce EvoPref, a multi-objective evolutionary algorithm that maintains populations of Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) adapters optimized across helpfulness, harmlessness, and honesty objectives using Non-dominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm II (NSGA-II) selection with archive-based diversity preservation.
  Our primary contribution is demonstrating that population-based methods discover substantially more diverse alignments than gradient descent. On standard benchmarks, EvoPref improves preference coverage by 18% (median 82.5% vs. 70.0% for ORPO, $p<0.001$, Wilcoxon, $n=30$) and reduces collapse rates by 47% (11.0% vs. 20.6%, $p<0.001$), while achieving competitive alignment quality (median 75.5% RewardBench vs. 75.0% for ORPO, $p<0.05$). We provide theoretical motivation extending recent multi-objective evolutionary algorithm (MOEA) runtime analysis (Dang et al., 2025) suggesting why archive-based methods escape collapse more effectively than single-trajectory optimization.
  Comprehensive comparisons against MOEA/D, SMS-EMOA, CMA-ES, and gradient baselines (DPO, IPO, KTO, ORPO) with rigorous statistical testing (Friedman with Holm correction, Vargha-Delaney effect sizes, median with IQR) confirm that multi-objective selection with diversity preservation is essential. This work establishes evolutionary optimization as a principled paradigm for diverse LLM alignment.

</details>


### [586] [Parameter-Efficient Neuroevolution for Diverse LLM Generation: Quality-Diversity Optimization via Prompt Embedding Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09781)
*Dongxin Guo,Jikun Wu,Siu Ming Yiu*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出QD-LLM框架，通过演化提示嵌入和紧凑神经接口，在冻结的大语言模型上实现质量-多样性优化，解决模型模式坍缩问题，在HumanEval等基准上覆盖率和QD-Score显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型存在模式坍缩问题，生成同质化输出，无法充分探索有效解空间。

Method: 提出QD-LLM框架：(1)基于无梯度优化的演化提示嵌入，无需微调即可行为引导；(2)混合语义与显式特征的行为表征，带形式化覆盖界；(3)共演化变异算子，包括基于有限差分梯度估计的目标行为突变。

Result: 在HumanEval、MBPP和创意写作基准上，覆盖率高46.4%，QD-Score高41.4%（p<0.001）；下游任务中测试生成增加34%边缘用例，微调数据质量提升8.3%准确率。

Conclusion: 提示嵌入演化是一种有效的范式，能够桥接神经演化与现代大语言模型，无需微调即可实现行为引导和多样性生成。

Abstract: Large Language Models exhibit mode collapse, producing homogeneous outputs that fail to explore valid solution spaces. We present QD-LLM, a framework for parameter-efficient neuroevolution that evolves prompt embeddings, compact neural interfaces (~32K parameters) that steer generation in frozen LLMs (70B+ parameters), within a Quality-Diversity (QD) optimization framework.
