To this end, we propose Hierarchical Token-level Objective Control Policy Optimization (HTPO), a novel RL algorithm that takes the divide-and-conquer idea to hierarchically partition the response tokens into specific functional groups from three aspects (i.e., prompt difficulty, answer correctness, and token entropy). Within each group, according to the contributions to exploration or exploitation, we design specialized optimization objectives to facilitate the effective execution of each token's expected functionality. In this way, HTPO can achieve a more balanced exploration-exploitation trade-off. Extensive experiments on challenging reasoning benchmarks validate the superiority of our HTPO algorithm, which significantly outperforms the strong DAPO baseline (e.g., +8.6% and +6.7% on AIME'24 and AIME'25, respectively). When scaling test-time compute, the HTPO-trained model maintains a consistent performance advantage over the DAPO baseline, and the gap widens as the sampling budget increases, validating that our adaptive token-level control method fosters effective exploration without sacrificing exploitation performance. Code will be at https://github.com/xcyao00/HTPO.

</details>


### [660] [Exactness Matters for Physical Rule Enforcement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08285)
*Bum Jun Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了自回归科学预测器中物理约束修复策略的可靠性，发现当修复算子在目标流形上为恒等映射时（如周期边界条件下的Fourier投影）可显著提升性能，但在近似修复场景下（如非周期边界），过强的约束可能反而损害预测精度，表明约束执行前应评估算子与数据的对齐程度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归科学预测模型常通过状态修复来施加物理/结构约束，但强物理规则何时可靠、何时引发分布偏移尚不明确。本文旨在通过“算子精确性”（repair map是否在目标流形上为恒等映射且与目标几何对齐）来系统研究这一问题。

Method: 对比了三种策略：原始预测、事后修复（post hoc repair）、循环内修复（in-loop repair）。在周期不可压Navier-Stokes、非周期CFDBench流（腔体、管道、水坝、圆柱绕流）以及层次预测任务上实验。通过Fourier投影（精确）、Poisson清理（近似）、目标扭曲MSE等指标评估算子-数据对齐程度。

Result: 精确周期场景下，Fourier投影大幅降低误差（Raw-FNO的MSE从9.390e-5降至5.370e-7）。但近似修复（如Poisson清理）虽降低散度却恶化滚转误差；目标扭曲MSE比线性系统残差更能预测这种损害。最优操作点可能是原始预测或近恒等修复，混合修复方法（blended top-down）效果依赖数据集。

Conclusion: 约束执行的可靠性取决于算子与数据的对齐程度，精确的预测协调（forecast reconciliation）是稳定基线，而近似场景下需谨慎权衡约束强度。建议在应用物理约束前，先评估算子-数据对齐。

Abstract: Autoregressive scientific forecasters often enforce physical or structural constraints by repairing each predicted state before feeding it back into the model. However, it remains unclear when stronger physical rule enforcement becomes reliable and when it becomes a source of distribution shift. We study this question through operator exactness, meaning whether the repair map is the identity on the target manifold and is aligned with the target geometry. We compare raw forecasting, post hoc repair, and in-loop repair across periodic incompressible Navier--Stokes, non-periodic CFDBench flows, and a hierarchical-forecasting support task. In the exact periodic regime, Fourier projection substantially improves rollout accuracy. On the NS-128 benchmark, a strong Raw-FNO has a final-step rollout MSE at horizon 100 of $(9.390 \pm 6.290)\times 10^{-5}$, and post hoc and in-loop projection reduce it to $(1.130 \pm 0.165)\times 10^{-6}$ and $(5.370 \pm 0.113)\times 10^{-7}$. However, once an exact projection is unavailable and only approximate boundary-preserving cleanup is available, the ordering changes. Across cavity, tube, dam, and cylinder flow, stronger Poisson-based cleanup can reduce divergence while worsening rollout error; target-distortion MSE predicts this harm far better than a linear-system residual. Controlled mismatch, screened cleanup, adaptive gating, and external-backbone checks show that the best approximate-regime operating point can be raw or near-identity. Hierarchical forecasting gives the same broader pattern. Exact forecast reconciliation is a stable baseline, whereas blended top-down repair, a validation-tuned interpolation toward historical-proportion top-down reconciliation, is dataset-dependent. Thus, constraint enforcement should be benchmarked by operator--data alignment before enforcement strength.

</details>


### [661] [Diagnosing Spectral Ceilings in Equivariant Neural Force Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08286)
*Hyunmog Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种谱注入诊断方法，通过在等变力场骨干网络中注入可控角频率扰动并附加轻量级SPN，发现NequIP等变网络在l=4处能恢复信号但在l=5处崩溃（11.7倍性能悬崖），并通过有限度跨度定理、合成校准和多种控制实验验证了这一边界现象的存在性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有等变力场模型（如NequIP）虽然表现优异，但其在不同角频率下的表示能力边界尚不明确，缺乏系统诊断工具来量化模型能捕捉哪些频率成分。

Method: 提出Spectral Prediction Network (SPN)诊断方法：(1) 向冻结的等变骨干网络注入可控角频率扰动；(2) 附加轻量级SPN；(3) 通过可恢复性评估模型在各频率下的表示能力。辅以有限度跨度定理、合成C5校准、容量/激活/跨架构控制实验。

Result: 在aspirin分子上，L=2的NequIP骨干在l=4处恢复信号(p=0.913)，在l=5处崩溃(p=0.078)，呈现11.7倍性能悬崖。该现象在4个独立训练骨干上一致，R²_inj(4)=0.374 vs R²_inj(5)=0.006。控制实验排除参数数量作为解释。

Conclusion: 等变力场模型存在明确的角频率表示边界（drL boundary），超出该边界的频率成分无法被有效捕获。有限度跨度定理提供了理论校准，该诊断方法为理解和改进等变模型提供了新工具。

Abstract: We introduce a spectral-injection diagnostic for measuring which angular frequencies a trained equivariant force-field backbone preserves: inject a controlled angular-frequency perturbation into a molecular force field, attach a lightweight Spectral Prediction Network (SPN) to the frozen backbone, and read off which frequencies are recoverable. On aspirin, a quadratic SPN attached to an L = 2 NequIP backbone recovers the boundary signal at l = 4 but collapses at l = 5: a 11.7x cliff at the predicted drL boundary, with p dropping from 0.913 to 0.078. The same boundary-vs-above contrast persists across n = 4 independently trained backbones (raw-gain delta contrast, hierarchical cluster bootstrap) and is corroborated by a denominator-free injected-residual metric (R2_inj(4) = 0.374 versus R2_inj(5) = 0.006). A finite-degree span theorem calibrates the diagnostic: for a single marked direction, degree-d polynomials of degree-L spherical-harmonic features span exactly H less than or equal to dL with multiplicity-one saturation at the boundary (scoped to single-direction degree-bounded probes, not a function-class upper bound on multi-atom MPNNs). A synthetic C5 calibration plus capacity, activation, and cross-architecture controls rule out parameter count alone as the explanation.

</details>


### [662] [Multi-Armed Bandits With Best-Action Queries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08287)
*Francesco Bacchiocchi,Matteo Castiglioni,Alberto Marchesi,Francesco Emanuele Stradi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究在bandit-feedback模型下，带最佳动作查询的多臂老虎机问题。发现当奖励在臂间相关时，全反馈结果不适用，最低遗憾为Ω(√(T-k))；而在随机i.i.d.奖励下，可达到Õ(min{T/k, √(T-k)})的遗憾，与下界匹配（对数因子内）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Russo等人[2024]在全反馈模型中证明了k次最佳动作查询可以将遗憾从Õ(√T)降低到Õ(min{T/k, √T})，但该结论是否能推广到更现实的部分反馈（bandit-feedback）模型是开放问题。本文旨在完全解决这一开放问题。

Method: 本文通过构造信息论下界和设计上界算法来刻画bandit-feedback模型下最佳动作查询所能带来的收益。针对随机相关奖励场景推导Ω(√(T-k))下界；针对随机i.i.d.奖励场景设计算法达到Õ(min{T/k, √(T-k)})上界，并给出匹配下界。

Result: 1) 随机相关奖励下：任何算法必须至少Ω(√(T-k))遗憾，该下界直接推广到对抗环境；2) 随机i.i.d.奖励下：可达到Õ(min{T/k, √(T-k)})遗憾，且该上界与下界对数因子内匹配。

Conclusion: 本文完全刻画了bandit-feedback模型下最佳动作查询的收益：在全反馈中看似强大的查询能力，在bandit-feedback下收益显著减弱，尤其是在奖励相关时。这揭示了反馈模型对查询辅助学习的关键影响。

Abstract: We study \emph{multi-armed bandits} (MABs) augmented with \emph{best-action queries}, in which the learner may additionally query an oracle that reveals the best arm in the current round. This setting was recently characterized by Russo et al. [2024] in the \emph{full-feedback} model, where the learner observes the rewards of all arms after each round. They show that, in both \emph{stochastic} and \emph{adversarial} environments, $k$ best-action queries reduce the optimal $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{T})$ regret to $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\min\{T/k,\sqrt{T}\})$. Whether this improvement extends to the more realistic \emph{bandit-feedback} model -- where the learner observes only the reward of the played arm -- was left as an open problem. We fully resolve this question. When rewards are stochastic but correlated among arms, we show that the full-feedback result does not carry over: any algorithm must incur regret at least $Ω(\sqrt{T-k})$. This lower bound directly extends to adversarial environments. On the positive side, we show that $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\min\{T/k,\sqrt{T-k}\})$ regret is still achievable when rewards are stochastic and i.i.d., and establish a matching lower bound, up to logarithmic factors. Together, these results provide a complete characterization of the benefits of \emph{best-action queries} in the \emph{bandit-feedback} model.

</details>


### [663] [UMEDA: Unified Multi-modal Efficient Data Fusion for Privacy-Preserving Graph Federated Learning via Spectral-Gated Attention and Diffusion-Based Operator Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08288)
*Shih-Yu Lai,Hirozumi Yamaguchi,Shang-Tse Chen,Yu-Lun Liu,Bing-Yu Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: UMEDA是一个图联邦学习框架，通过连续积分算子、低秩线性注意力扩散聚合和异性差分隐私，解决异构多传感器（Wi-Fi、LiDAR等）设备无源定位中的模态差异、数据漂移和隐私噪声问题，在MM-Fi和RELI11D基准上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习方法在客户端传感器模态和分辨率不同、数据分布漂移以及隐私噪声破坏定位所需结构信号时表现脆弱，亟需一种能处理异构多传感器设备无源定位的联邦学习框架。

Method: 1) 构建全局图，客户端为节点，共享连续积分算子，聚合视为该算子上的谱信号处理；2) 每个客户端用线性注意力层编码本地传感器，通过低秩滤波核谱抑制模态特异性残差，使不同传感器对齐到公共低秩子空间；3) 服务器通过核谱系数的扩散模型聚合客户端更新，将更新视为共享算子的离散化而非拓扑绑定的权重；4) 引入各向异性差分隐私机制，将噪声优先投影到信号子空间的零空间，保留主导特征方向。

Result: 在MM-Fi和RELI11D分布外基准测试上，UMEDA在精度、收敛速度和通信效率上超越当前最优联邦基线，尤其在高模态异质性和严格隐私预算下优势显著。

Conclusion: UMEDA通过图联邦学习与谱信号处理的结合，有效解决了异构多传感器联邦定位中的模态对齐、数据漂移和隐私-效用权衡问题，为异构联邦学习提供了新范式。

Abstract: Device-free localization trains models from heterogeneous wireless and visual sensors (e.g., Wi-Fi, LiDAR) distributed across edge devices. Federated learning offers a privacy-respecting framework, but is brittle when clients differ in sensor modality and resolution, when their data distributions drift, and when privacy noise destroys the structural signal needed for localization. We propose UMEDA, a graph federated learning framework in which clients form nodes of a global graph that share a continuous integral operator, and aggregation is reformulated as spectral signal processing on this operator. Each client encodes its local sensors with a linear-attention layer whose kernel spectrum is low-rank filtered, suppressing modality-specific residuals so clients with different sensors align in a common low-rank subspace. The server then aggregates client updates via a diffusion model over the kernel's spectral coefficients, treating updates as discretizations of a shared operator rather than topology-bound weights -- this absorbs varying graph sizes and missing modalities without node-wise correspondence. To balance privacy and utility, we add an anisotropic differential-privacy mechanism that projects noise preferentially into the null space of the signal subspace, preserving dominant eigendirections while ensuring formal $(ε, δ)$-DP under gradient clipping. On MM-Fi and the RELI11D out-of-distribution benchmark, UMEDA outperforms state-of-the-art federated baselines in accuracy, convergence, and communication efficiency, particularly under high modality heterogeneity and tight privacy budgets.

</details>


### [664] [What If We Let Forecasting Forget? A Sparse Bottleneck for Cross-Variable Dependencies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08289)
*Fan Zhang,Shiming Fan,Hua Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MS-FLOW提出稀疏瓶颈框架，通过选择性稀疏路由替代密集的全连接通信，在有限通信预算下保留关键依赖路径，抑制虚假相关传播，在12个真实基准上达到SOTA预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法虽通过增强跨通道交互提升预测精度，但在状态依赖性强且噪声大的真实数据中，密集交互会放大虚假相关并导致表示过度平滑，产生不可靠预测。

Method: 提出MS-FLOW稀疏瓶颈框架，将变量间交互建模为容量受限的信息流，用选择性稀疏路由替代全连接通信，在严格通信预算下仅保留关键依赖路径，注入跨变量信号。

Result: 在12个真实世界基准数据集上达到SOTA预测精度，同时产生更少但更可靠的依赖关系。

Conclusion: 多元时间序列预测应从"更多交互"转向"更有效交互"，稀疏化建模有助于提升依赖关系的可靠性和预测性能。

Abstract: Multivariate time series forecasting is critical in many real-world systems, and thus modeling cross-channel dependencies is essential. Although existing methods improve overall accuracy by enhancing representations and cross-channel interactions, it remains challenging to reliably capture inter-variable dependencies under specific conditions. We observe that dependencies in real data are often state-dependent and noisy; in such cases, dense interactions can amplify spurious correlations and lead to representation over-smoothing, which may yield unreliable predictions in certain scenarios. Motivated by this, we propose MS-FLOW, a sparse-bottleneck framework that explicitly models inter-variable interaction as capacity-limited information flow. Specifically, MS-FLOW replaces fully connected communication with selective sparse routing, retaining only a few critical dependency paths and injecting cross-variable signals under a strict communication budget, thereby suppressing redundant connections and spurious-correlation propagation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MS-FLOW learns more reliable multivariate correlations, achieving state-of-the-art forecasting accuracy on 12 real-world benchmarks while producing fewer yet more reliable dependencies, shifting multivariate forecasting from "more interaction" to "more effective interaction".

</details>


### [665] [Toward Optimal Regret in Robust Pricing: Decoupling Corruption and Time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08290)
*Kalana Kalupahana,Francesco Emanuele Stradi,Matteo Castiglioni,Alberto Marchesi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对鲁棒动态定价问题，首次在遗憾界中实现了对腐败量C和时间T的依赖解耦，提出了基于鲁棒二分搜索的算法，在已知C时达到O(C+log T)遗憾，未知C时达到O(C+log² T)遗憾，解决了Gupta等人[2025]留下的公开问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在动态定价中，恶意对手最多可以篡改C轮反馈，现有最佳遗憾界为O(C log log T)，遗憾项中C与T的依赖耦合在一起，尚未实现解耦。作者旨在通过对腐败量C和时间T的独立依赖来改进遗憾上界。

Method: 提出了一种鲁棒二分搜索（robust binary search）变体，分别处理已知腐败量C和未知腐败量C两种情况。通过精心设计的搜索策略和异常处理机制，使遗憾的腐败项C与时间项T在表达式中相互独立。

Result: 当腐败量C已知时，遗憾界为O(C + log T)；当腐败量C未知时，遗憾界为O(C + log² T)。首次实现了C与T的解耦，显著改进了此前O(C log log T)的上界。

Conclusion: 该工作严格解决了动态定价中遗憾界对腐败量C和时间T依赖解耦的公开问题，为鲁棒在线学习提供了更紧的理论界，同时表明即使在未知腐败量的情况下，解耦代价也仅为对数级别的额外因子。

Abstract: We design the first regret guarantees for robust dynamic pricing that decouple the dependence on the corruption $C$ and the time horizon $T$. In dynamic pricing, a seller with unlimited supply of a good interacts with a stream of buyers over \( T \) rounds, with the goal of maximizing revenue. At each round $t$, the seller posts a price $p_t$, and the buyer purchases the good only if their unknown valuation $v^\star$ exceeds this price. The seller observes only the binary feedback $\mathbb{I} \left\{ p_t \leq v^\star \right\}$, indicating whether a sale occurred. In the \emph{robust} pricing setting, a malicious adversary is allowed to corrupt this feedback in at most $C$ rounds. Even if the learner knows the corruption $C$, the best known regret bound is $\mathcal{O}(C\log\log T)$ by Gupta et al. [2025]. This leaves as an open problem to ``decouple'' the dependence on $C$ and $T$. In this work, we resolve this open problem. In particular, we develop a robust variant of binary search that achieves regret $\mathcal{O}(C+\log T)$ when the corruption $C$ is known and $\mathcal{O}(C+\log^2 T)$ when the corruption is unknown.

</details>


### [666] [Graph Computation Meets Circuit Algebra: A Task-Aligned Analysis of Graph Neural Networks for Electronic Design Automation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08291)
*Hyunmog Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了EDA问题中图神经网络(GNN)的应用，提出成功的GNN-for-EDA方法必须使其传播、聚合和监督方式与目标任务的代数结构对齐，并逐任务分析了时序分析、布局、布线、IR压降等场景中的对齐策略与失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 并非所有图结构问题都适用相同的GNN计算，EDA问题具有独特的代数结构（如max-plus/min-plus递归、超图线长约束、稀疏供需场等），需要特定的GNN架构与之对齐，否则会产生代数-架构不匹配。作者旨在通过逐任务对齐分析，厘清哪些方法有效、哪些存在局限。

Method: 论文采用任务对齐分析法(task-aligned analysis)，针对静态时序分析、布局、布线拥塞、开关活动传播、IR压降、模拟对称性提取等EDA子任务，分别讨论其原生代数结构，并将GNN工具包（异步DAG-GNN、可微布局器、消息传递等）与这些结构进行对齐分析，同时识别失败模式。

Result: (i) 梳理了适用于电路的GNN架构工具包；(ii) 形式化了电路图与通用图的区别（有向、异构、多尺度、含时序和时钟结构）；(iii) 刻画了当前方法的成功之处及代数-架构不匹配导致的局限；(iv) 识别出阶段泄漏(stage leakage)、代理到签收差距(proxy-to-signoff gap)、校准(calibration)、设计分布漂移(design-distribution shift)等关键失败模式。

Conclusion: 论文定位为一篇GNN-for-EDA的任务对齐分析文章，而非全面的AI-for-chip-design综述。连续SE(3)-等变几何GNN通常与曼哈顿数字布局不匹配，LLM-for-RTL、HLS、RL/扩散拓扑生成不在讨论范围内。下一代工作的核心挑战预计将围绕所识别的四种失败模式展开。

Abstract: EDA problems are graph-structured, but not all graph-structured problems call for the same GNN computation. We argue that successful GNN-for-EDA methods are those whose propagation, aggregation, and supervision align with the native algebra of the target task. Concretely: static timing analysis is a max-plus/min-plus recurrence on a topologically ordered DAG, structurally aligned with asynchronous DAG-GNNs; placement is governed by hypergraph wirelength and density penalties and is exploited by differentiable placers rather than by message-passing GNNs alone; routing congestion is a sparse demand-supply field over a layout grid; switching-activity propagation is a probabilistic recurrence on a directed netlist; IR drop is a linear system on the power-delivery network; and analog symmetry extraction is a discrete constraint-prediction problem on schematic graphs. Through these task-by-task alignments we (i) review the GNN architectural toolkit relevant to circuits, (ii) formalize how circuit graphs differ from generic graphs (directed, heterogeneous, multi-scale, with sequential and clock structure), (iii) characterize where current methods succeed and where the algebra-architecture mismatch limits them, and (iv) identify failure modes--stage leakage, proxy-to-signoff gap, calibration, and design-distribution shift--that we believe are likely to dominate the next phase of work. We position the paper as a GNN-for-EDA, task-aligned analysis rather than a comprehensive AI-for-chip-design survey. Continuous SE(3)-equivariant geometric GNNs are usually mismatched to Manhattan digital layout, and LLM-for-RTL, HLS, and RL/diffusion-based topology generation are outside our scope.

</details>


### [667] [Hierarchical Mixture-of-Experts with Two-Stage Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08292)
*Gleb Molodtsov,Alexander Miasnikov,Aleksandr Beznosikov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Hi-MoE提出了一种分层路由控制框架，通过组间负载均衡和组内专家专业化双重机制解决了稀疏MoE模型中路由器的权衡问题，在NLP和视觉任务上均取得显著改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有稀疏MoE模型的路由器存在根本性权衡：强负载均衡会抑制专家专业化，而激进多样性则常导致路由坍缩。作者旨在解决这一矛盾，同时实现负载均衡与专家专业化。

Method: 提出Hi-MoE分组MoE框架，将路由控制分解为两个耦合层次：(1) 组间均衡——强制专家组间流量公平分配；(2) 组内专业化——促进组内专家互补行为，同时防止组内坍缩。

Result: 在58B token的大规模预训练中，Hi-MoE-7B相比OLMoE-7B实现了5.6%的困惑度降低和40%的专家平衡度提升，并在NLP和视觉基准测试中一致优于现有稀疏路由和分组MoE基线。

Conclusion: 层次化目标能够重塑路由器行为，促进稳定的专家专业化并缓解坍缩问题，且该方法在模型规模、专家数量等维度上具有良好的可扩展性。

Abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models scale capacity by routing each token to a small subset of experts. However, their routers exhibit a fundamental trade-off: strong load balancing can suppress expert specialization, while aggressive diversity often causes routing collapse. We propose Hi-MoE, a grouped MoE framework that decomposes routing control into two coupled levels: (i) inter-group balancing that enforces fair traffic across expert groups, and (ii) intra-group specialization that promotes complementary expert behaviors while preventing within-group collapse. Our analysis provides a principled explanation of how our hierarchical objectives reshape the router, thereby promoting stable specialization and mitigating collapse. We observe consistent improvements over recent sparse-routing and grouped-MoE baselines across NLP and vision benchmarks, and confirm robustness via scaling studies (model size, expert count) and targeted ablations. In large-scale pre-training on 58B tokens, Hi-MoE-7B achieves a 5.6% perplexity reduction and a 40% improvement in expert balance over OLMoE-7B across diverse evaluation domains.

</details>


### [668] [In-Context Fixation: When Demonstrated Labels Override Semantics in Few-Shot Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08295)
*Ming Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现，在上下文学习中，演示样本的标签槽位内容会被模型视为穷尽性的答案词汇表。当标签同质化时（即使语义合理），模型准确率会崩溃至≤12%；即使使用无意义的随机令牌，模型也会将大部分概率分配给演示过的令牌集合。这表明ICL本质上是词汇检索过程，而非潜在概念贝叶斯推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前研究认为随机标签对ICL影响不大，但本文发现标签同质性（homogeneity）会导致模型性能崩溃，这与直觉相悖，值得深入探究其背后的机制。

Method: 在6个模型（Pythia、Llama、Qwen，0.8B-8B）和4个任务上进行实验，通过设置同质标签、随机令牌演示集、4-way分类、多令牌表述器（verbalizer）等条件进行系统分析，并采用逐项配对激活修补（paired activation patching）和logit lens进行机制定位。

Result: 标签同质性导致准确率崩至≤12%；演示集约束效应显著（42-67%概率分配给演示令牌集）；4-way分类准确率为0%；激活修补恢复98.4%的性能差距，定位到第7层回路（99.8百分位）；跨架构验证发现编码后覆盖（encode-then-override）轨迹。

Conclusion: ICL的输出机制是受演示词汇表约束的检索过程，而非基于潜在概念的贝叶斯推理。模型"绑定"其输出到演示过的令牌清单，这种词汇级固定效应（vocabulary-level fixation）是理解ICL行为的关键机制。

Abstract: While random demonstration labels barely hurt in-context learning (Min et al., 2022), we show that homogeneous labels--even semantically valid ones--collapse accuracy to <=12% across six models (Pythia, Llama, Qwen; 0.8B--8B) and four tasks. The trigger is label-slot content: the model treats tokens occupying the label position as an exhaustive answer vocabulary, with homogeneity as the maximally collapsed case. A novel set-level fixation finding confirms this: when demonstrations carry varied nonsense tokens from {foo,bar,vex,nit,orb}, the model places 42--67% of probability on the demonstrated set while P(dog) remains below 0.2%. This is inconsistent with latent-concept Bayesian accounts (Xie et al., 2022) and reveals that ICL output is constrained vocabulary retrieval--the model binds its output to the demonstrated token inventory regardless of semantic plausibility. The effect generalizes to 4-way classification (0% accuracy across three models, 1B--8B) and multi-token verbalizers ("very positive"), where we decompose fixation into format-level (template adoption) and content-level (polarity override) components that are experimentally dissociable. Mechanistically, per-item paired activation patching on Pythia-1B recovers 98.4% of the gap (95% CI [84%, 112%]), localizing fixation to a layer-7-centered circuit (rank 2/560, 99.8th percentile; 4-fold CV mean 103%). Cross-architecture logit lens on Llama-3.2-1B replicates the encode-then-override trajectory with causal confirmation (top-5 layers: 89% recovery).

</details>


### [669] [A Qualitative Test-Risk Mechanism for Scaling Behavior in Normalized Residual Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08297)
*Daning Cheng,Zeyu Liu,Jun Sun,Fen Xia,Boyang Zhang,Dongping Liu,Yunquan Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过理论分析证明了在归一化残差网络中，通过深度扩展（在中间层插入新残差块）可以严格提升测试风险，并建立了包含表示增益、优化增益和泛化迁移的统一框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管深度学习中的扩展行为（模型和数据增大时测试性能提升）是核心经验现象，但其理论基础尚不完整，尤其是深度扩展如何影响测试性能缺乏严格的理论保证。

Method: 将深度扩展问题分解为表示增益、优化增益和泛化迁移三个部分。证明了在零初始化附近的一阶下降条件下，扩展后的假设类包含一个具有更小总体风险的辅助跳板模型；同时通过后归一化残差架构的范数控制，建立了扩展模型类的Rademacher复杂度上界。

Result: 提出了两种互补的测试风险保证：一种通过总体风险路径，在正向总体边际可用时更紧；另一种直接在训练/测试层面工作，避免Hoeffding迁移，在退化情况下更稳健。

Conclusion: 深度扩展可以提升归一化残差网络的测试性能，且扩展行为本质上是联合的：深度创造新的改进方向，宽度增强弱信号的有限样本可观测性，数据决定扩展的统计成本是否可控。

Abstract: The scaling behavior, in which test performance often improves as model size and data increase, is a central empirical phenomenon in modern deep learning, yet its theoretical basis remains incomplete. In this paper, we study depth expansion in normalized residual networks: starting from a trained model in an old hypothesis class, we insert a new residual block at an intermediate layer and ask when such an expansion can yield a provable improvement in test risk. We develop a unified framework that decomposes this question into representational gain, optimization gain, and generalization transfer. First, under a first-order descent condition near zero initialization, we prove that the expanded hypothesis class contains an auxiliary jumpboard model with strictly smaller population risk than the original model. Second, under norm control tailored to post-normalized residual architectures, we establish a norm-based Rademacher complexity bound for the expanded model class. These ingredients lead to two complementary test-risk guarantees: one route passes through population risk and is tighter when a positive population margin is available, while the other works directly at the train/test level, avoids Hoeffding transfer, and is more robust in degenerate regimes. Together, these results provide a theorem-driven mechanism under which residual depth expansion can improve test performance in normalized residual networks. More broadly, they suggest that scaling is inherently joint: depth creates new improving directions, width enhances the finite-sample observability of weak signals, and data determines whether the statistical cost of expansion can be controlled.

</details>


### [670] [What Cohort INRs Encode and Where to Freeze Them](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08298)
*Vasiliki Sideri-Lampretsa,Sophie Starck,Robbie Holland,Julian McGinnis,Daniel Rueckert*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了群组训练隐式神经表示（INRs）中哪些层具有可迁移表示及其编码内容，发现最优冻结层与权重稳定秩最高的层一致，并首次使用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）将INR激活分解为可解释的字典原子，揭示了SIREN和FFMLP两种骨干网络学习到的不同表示特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管已有研究表明复用群组训练INR的早期层作为新信号的初始化能加速并改善信号拟合，但共享编码器中哪些层学习到可迁移表示、这些表示编码了什么内容尚不清楚。

Method: 1) 在测试时对共享编码器进行冻结深度扫描，发现最优冻结深度与权重稳定秩最高的层一致；2) 首次引入稀疏自编码器（SAEs）将INR激活分解为稀疏字典原子，分析SIREN和FFMLP两种骨干网络。

Result: 1) 在最优深度冻结可媲美甚至优于标准微调方案；2) SIREN的字典原子局部化、平铺坐标平面；FFMLP的字典原子覆盖整个图像、勾勒记忆信号轮廓；3) 单原子消融实验中，FFMLP的一个原子可使PSNR下降高达10.6 dB，而SIREN的消融影响仅限于原子激活的区域。

Conclusion: 该研究首次从机制上解释了群组训练INR中的迁移现象，并将INR激活转化为可检查的字典原子，为理解INR编码内容以及设计面向泛化而非记忆化的架构开辟了新路径。

Abstract: Reusing the early layers of cohort-trained INRs as initialization for new signals has been shown to accelerate and improve signal fitting, yet it remains unclear which layers of the shared encoder learn transferable representations and what those representations encode. We address both questions for two standard backbones, SIREN and Fourier-feature MLPs (FFMLP). First, sweeping the freeze depth across the shared encoder at test time, we find that the optimum coincides with the layer of highest weight stable rank. Moreover, freezing at this depth matches or improves on the standard fine-tuning recipe across all our experiments. Second, identifying which layer transfers does not characterize what that layer encodes. To address this we adopt sparse autoencoders (SAEs), the dominant tool in mechanistic interpretability, and present the first SAE decomposition of INR activations into sparse dictionary atoms. Interestingly, SIREN and FFMLP achieve comparable cohort-fitting quality, but learn qualitatively different dictionaries. Cohort SIREN's atoms are localized, tiling the coordinate plane such that each atom fires in a confined region independent of cohort content. Cohort FFMLP's atoms are image-spanning, tracing the contours of memorized cohort signals. Single-atom ablations confirm causal use of these dictionaries: a single FFMLP atom out of 4096 can drop PSNR by up to 10.6 dB across the image, while SIREN ablations remain confined to where the atom fires. Together, these results give the first mechanistic account of what transfers in cohort-trained INRs and turn their activations into inspectable dictionary atoms. These tools open a path towards characterizing what INRs encode and towards architectures designed for generalization rather than memorization.

</details>


### [671] [mHC-SSM: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections for State Space Language Models with Stream-Specialized Adapters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08300)
*Abdulvahap Mutlu,Şengül Doğan,Türker Tuncer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究将流形约束超连接（mHC）——一种通过Sinkhorn-Knopp投影将残差流混合矩阵约束为双随机矩阵的方法——迁移到状态空间模型（SSM）语言建模中。实验表明，静态mHC和带适配器的mHC均能显著提升SSM语言模型的验证损失和困惑度，但带来适度的吞吐量下降和内存增加。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索mHC风格的约束多流残差拓扑能否有效迁移到SSM语言模型中，以验证该方法超越原始Transformer架构的泛化能力。

Method: 在SSM块周围实现静态mHC机制：扩展残差流为多个并行流，通过单纯形约束的预混合聚合流到SSM输入，再通过单纯形约束的后混合将SSM输出散射回各流，并在每层应用Sinkhorn投影的残差流混合。此外引入流专用适配器，通过共享瓶颈加每流缩放增加轻量级流特定容量。

Result: 静态mHC将验证损失从6.3507降至6.2448，困惑度从572.91降至515.35；带适配器的mHC进一步将验证损失降至6.1353，困惑度降至461.88。吞吐量从1025.52降至964.81和938.90 tokens/s，峰值内存从2365 MB升至2568 MB和3092 MB。

Conclusion: mHC启发的约束多流残差混合能在SSM语言模型中带来可衡量的质量提升，流专用适配器容量可进一步增强性能，同时带来可预测的效率权衡。

Abstract: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC) introduce a stability-motivated variant of multi stream residual mixing by constraining residual stream mixing matrices to the manifold of doubly stochastic matrices via Sinkhorn-Knopp projection. In his work, we study whether mHC-style constrained multi-stream residual topology transfers effectively to state space model (SSM) language modeling. We implement a static mHC mechanism around an SSM block by expanding the residual stream into multiple parallel streams, aggregating streams into a single SSM input through simplex-constrained pre-mixing, scattering the SSM output back to streams through simplex-constrained post-mixing, and applying Sinkhorn-projected residual stream mixing at each layer. We further introduce stream-specialized adapters that add lightweight stream-specific capacity through a shared bottleneck with per-stream scaling, applied both before stream aggregation and after the SSM output prior to scattering. We evaluate baseline single-stream SSM, static mHC SSM, and mHC SSM with adapters on WikiText-2 using identical training settings and report checkpoint-based validation loss, perplexity, throughput, and peak GPU memory. Under the reported fair checkpoint evaluation, static mHC improves validation loss from 6.3507 to 6.2448 and reduces perplexity from 572.91 to 515.35, while mHC with adapters further improves validation loss to 6.1353 and perplexity to 461.88. These gains are accompanied by modest throughput reductions from 1025.52 to 964.81 and 938.90 tokens per second, and increased peak memory from 2365 MB to 2568 MB and 3092 MB. The results suggest that mHC-inspired constrained multi-stream residual mixing can yield measurable quality improvements in SSM language models and that stream-specialized adapter capacity can further enhance performance with predictable efficiency tradeoffs.

</details>


### [672] [Priming: Hybrid State Space Models From Pre-trained Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08301)
*Aditya Chattopadhyay,Elvis Nunez,Prannay Kaul,Benjamin Bowman,Evan Becker,Luca Zancato,David Thomas,Wei Xia,Stefano Soatto*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Priming方法，利用不到0.5%的预训练token预算，将预训练Transformer知识迁移到Hybrid State-Space模型（结合Attention与SSM层），实现了在8B/32B规模上更优的长上下文推理性能（Hybrid GKA 32B比Qwen3-32B提升+3.8推理分数）和更高解码吞吐量（2.3倍）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Hybrid State-Space模型（结合Attention与SSM）相比纯Transformer具有更小的KV缓存和更快的解码速度，但探索其架构设计空间需要从头训练，成本高昂，阻碍了大规模Hybrid架构研究。作者希望将架构设计从预训练问题转化为知识迁移问题。

Method: 提出Priming方法：从预训练Transformer初始化Hybrid模型，通过短对齐和后训练阶段恢复下游质量，仅需不到0.5%的原始预训练token预算。该方法与源Transformer家族（Qwen、Llama、Mistral）和模型类别（密集或MoE）无关。

Result: 1) 首次在相同条件下对比GKA、GDN、Mamba-2三种SSM层，表达能力层级（GKA>GDN>Mamba-2）直接预测长上下文推理性能；2) Hybrid GKA 32B在推理上比Qwen3-32B提升+3.8分，解码吞吐量提升2.3倍；3) 发布了Hybrid模型动物园及训练推理代码（Apache 2.0）。

Conclusion: Priming方法有效降低了Hybrid架构研究的门槛，使得大规模Hybrid模型无需从头预训练即可获得优异性能，尤其适合长上下文推理场景，且能显著提升推理效率。

Abstract: Hybrid State-Space models combine Attention with recurrent State-Space Model (SSM) layers, balancing eidetic memory from Attention with compressed fading memory from SSMs. This yields smaller Key-Value caches and faster decoding than Transformers, along with a richer architectural design space. Exploring that design space at scale has so far required training from scratch, a barrier that has kept most large-model Hybrid research within a narrow range of architectures. We introduce Priming, a method that turns Hybrid architecture design from a pre-training problem into a knowledge transfer one. Priming initializes a Hybrid model from a pre-trained Transformer and, through short alignment and post-training phases, recovers downstream quality using less than 0.5% of the source model's pre-training token budget. Priming is agnostic to the source Transformer family (e.g., Qwen, Llama, Mistral), model class (dense or Mixture-of-Experts), and model scale. Priming enables us to run the first controlled comparison of SSM layer types at scale under identical conditions. We evaluate, Gated KalmaNet (GKA), Gated DeltaNet (GDN), and Mamba-2, and show that their expressiveness hierarchy, GKA>GDN>Mamba-2, directly predicts downstream performance on long-context reasoning tasks. We scale Priming to 8B/32B reasoning models with native 128K contexts. Our Hybrid GKA 32B improves over its source Qwen3-32B by +3.8 average reasoning points, while staying within 1% of a Transformer post-trained on the same data and enabling up to 2.3x higher decode throughput. To foster research on Hybrid architectures, we release a model zoo of primed Hybrid models for long-context reasoning and instruction following, together with the Priming training and inference code (Sequence Parallelism algorithms for long-context training, optimized GKA kernels, and vLLM serving plugin), all under Apache~2.0 License.

</details>


### [673] [SGC-RML: A reliable and interpretable longitudinal assessment for PD in real-world DNS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08302)
*Wenbin Wei,Ruixiang Gao,Suyuan Yao,Xuanzhen Zhao,Cheng Huang,Hen-Wei Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SGC-RML，通过症状图谱统一多模态PD评估，结合不确定性估计、保形校准和选择性决策路由，实现可追溯、可解释的纵向评估，在五个真实数据集上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实PD评估存在模态异质、跨设备偏差和标签不完整等问题，现有方法只关注平均预测性能，缺乏可靠性感知机制（何时可靠、何时拒绝、何时重测、依据哪些症状维度）。

Method: 将语音、步态、可穿戴运动、移动任务和临床变量映射到共享的8维症状节点空间（7个临床症状+1个可靠性状态辅助节点），通过症状图谱统一运动和非运动表征；联合不确定性估计、保形校准和选择性决策路由。

Result: PPMI: MAE 4.579/R² 0.772; mPower: AUC 0.953; PADS: AUC 0.825; UCI在5个锚点下从不可预测(MAE 8.38, CCC 0.02)提升为校准纵向评估(MAE 3.24, CCC 0.756); Daphnet LOSO: F1 0.803/AUC 0.872。

Conclusion: SGC-RML为不完整多模态条件下的PD纵向评估提供了统一范式，兼具准确性、校准性、可审计性和症状可解释性。

Abstract: Real-world digital Parkinson's disease assessment faces challenges such as heterogeneous modalities, cross-device bias, and incomplete labeling. Existing methods often focus on average predictive performance, lacking the reliability mechanisms needed for retrospective reliability-aware assessment - namely, determining when the model is reliable, when to reject an assessment, when to retest, and from which symptom dimensions the predictions are based. This paper proposes SGC-RML, which maps speech, gait, wearable motion, mobility tasks, and clinical variables to a shared 8-dimensional symptom node space (7 clinical symptom nodes and 1 reliability_state auxiliary node), unifying motor and non-motor representations through a symptom atlas. By jointly introducing uncertainty estimation, conformal calibration, and selective decision routing, the model can not only predict symptoms and severity but also reject assessments or suggest retests when evidence is insufficient. We validate this framework on five real-world PD datasets, covering classification, regression, event detection, and longitudinal severity prediction. Experiments show that SGC-RML achieves an MAE of 4.579 / R^2 of 0.772 on PPMI, an AUC of 0.953 on mPower, and an AUC of 0.825 on PADS. Under leak-free temporal anchoring, as few as 5 subject-specific anchors transform UCI from an essentially non-predictive subject-independent setting (motor MAE 8.38, CCC 0.02) into a calibrated longitudinal assessment (motor MAE 3.24, CCC 0.756) with split-conformal coverage held at the 0.80 target. Under the Daphnet LOSO protocol, it achieves an F1 of 0.803 / AUC of 0.872. These results demonstrate that SGC-RML provides a unified paradigm for accurate, calibrated, auditable, and symptom-interpretable retrospective longitudinal assessment of PD under incomplete multimodal conditions.

</details>


### [674] [GNN for Structural Displacement Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08303)
*Hung-Fu Chang,Tzu-Kang Lin,Yung-Li Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于图神经网络（GNN）的数据驱动框架，将结构系统表示为图（节点为节点，边为构件），用于预测结构在外荷载下的位移。相比传统有限元法（FEM），该方法大幅降低计算成本，并在两层框架结构数据集上验证了其高精度和优于传统神经网络的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 有限元法（FEM）虽精度高但计算成本大，难以用于实时结构健康监测和地震安全评估，因此亟需一种快速且准确的替代方法。

Method: 将结构系统建模为图，节点代表节点，边代表构件；结合几何与力学属性作为图特征；利用GNN从模拟数据中学习荷载与位移响应之间的映射关系；使用ANSYS生成两层框架结构数据集进行训练与评估。

Result: GNN框架在预测位移和转角方面精度高，性能优于传统神经网络（NN）模型，表明其可作为FEM的快速高效替代方案。

Conclusion: GNN能够有效学习结构力学响应，在保证精度的前提下显著降低计算负担，适用于实时监测场景。

Abstract: Accurate prediction of structural displacements under external loading is fundamental to structural health monitoring and seismic safety assessment. Although the finite element method (FEM) remains the prevailing approach because of its high accuracy, its considerable computational cost restricts its suitability for real-time monitoring applications. To address this limitation, this study proposes a data-driven framework based on Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), in which structural systems are represented as graphs with joints modeled as nodes and structural members as edges. By incorporating both geometric and mechanical properties into the graph representation, the proposed model learns the relationship between applied loads and structural responses directly from simulated data. A synthetic dataset was generated from a two-story frame structure using ANSYS, and both a conventional Neural Network (NN) and a GNN were trained for comparison. The results show that the proposed GNN framework predicts displacements and rotations with high accuracy and outperforms the NN model, demonstrating its potential as a fast and efficient alternative to traditional FEM-based analysis.

</details>


### [675] [Practical Wi-Fi-based Motion Recognition Under Variable Traffic Patterns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08308)
*Guolin Yin,Junqing Zhang,Guanxiong Shen,Simon L. Cotton*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SRV-NN，一种基于Transformer的采样率自适应神经网络，通过动态采样率增强技术，有效解决了Wi-Fi感知中因传输流量变化导致的采样率不统一问题，在动作识别任务上显著提升了准确性和稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Wi-Fi感知系统忽略传输流量的可变性，导致模型在变采样率下泛化能力差、性能不稳定。

Method: 提出基于Transformer的采样率自适应网络SRV-NN，引入动态采样率增强策略，处理可变输入大小的CSI信号。

Result: 在自建数据集（SRV activity/gesture）和两个公开数据集上，相比基线模型，在变采样率下准确率显著提升，准确率方差大幅降低。

Conclusion: SRV-NN有效提升了Wi-Fi感应当在变采样率下的鲁棒性和稳定性，为实际部署中非均匀传输环境提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Wi-Fi sensing detects human motions and activities by analysing the channel state information (CSI) derived from Wi-Fi transmissions. However, the impact of variable transmission traffic, which dictates the effective sampling rate and interval, is often overlooked. Existing Wi-Fi sensing systems are trained with fixed input size and sampling rate, which suffer from poor sampling rate generalisation. This paper proposes a novel Wi-Fi sensing approach for motion recognition applications, e.g., gesture and activity recognition, under variable traffic patterns. A sampling rate versatile neural network (SRV-NN) based on the transformer is proposed to efficiently handle variable input-sized sensing signals. A dynamic sampling rate augmentation is employed for variable sampling rates and intervals. To validate our approach, we have carried out extensive experimental evaluation, using two self-collected datasets, namely SRV activity and SRV gesture, as well as two publicly available datasets. Our method demonstrated exceptional performance and stability under variable sampling rates, with substantial improvements in average accuracy compared to baseline models without augmentation. The proposed approach significantly enhances stability by greatly reducing accuracy variance across different sampling rates.

</details>


### [676] [Revitalizing the Beginning: Avoiding Storage Dependency for Model Merging in Continual Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08311)
*Xi Wang,Cheng Deng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Trajectory Regularized Merging (TRM)框架，通过将模型合并重构为轨迹子空间优化过程，结合任务对齐、预测一致性和梯度响应性三个协同目标，解决持续学习场景下模型合并中任务特异性错误累积和梯度消失问题，实现多任务性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型合并方法在持续学习场景下存在两个关键问题：(1) 全局对齐策略导致任务特异性错误在连续数据流中不断累积和放大；(2) 后续任务开始时梯度消失导致优化停滞。这些问题使合并模型在下一训练阶段初始状态处于次优。

Method: 提出Trajectory Regularized Merging (TRM)框架，将合并阶段重新定义为增强轨迹子空间中的优化过程，包含三个协同目标：(1) 任务对齐（task alignment）保持历史知识；(2) 预测一致性（prediction consistency）确保输出稳定；(3) 梯度响应性（gradient responsiveness）重新激活优化动力学。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上，TRM方法达到了最先进的性能表现，优于现有模型合并方法。

Conclusion: TRM通过解构合并过程的优化目标，有效解决了持续学习中模型合并的知识保持与梯度激活矛盾，为多任务模型融合提供了新范式。

Abstract: Model merging provides a compelling paradigm for integrating specialized expertise into a unified multi-task model, a goal that aligns naturally with the sequential knowledge acquisition in continual learning (CL). However, the requirement for preserving diverse forms of previous knowledge conflicts with the storage limitations inherent to CL. In this paper, we systematically analyze existing model merging methods under the constraints of CL. We find that current methods prioritize global alignment, which often leads to the accumulation and amplification of task-specific errors within the continuous data stream; and the vanishing gradients at the onset of subsequent tasks frequently cause optimization to stagnate. These leave the merged model in a suboptimal state at the beginning of the next training phase. To address these challenges, we propose Trajectory Regularized Merging (TRM), a framework that reformulates the merging phase as an optimization process within an augmented trajectory subspace. Our framework integrates three synergistic objectives including task alignment, prediction consistency, and gradient responsiveness to concurrently preserve merged model's historical stability and re-activate optimization dynamics. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks.

</details>


### [677] [FlashSVD v1.5: Making Low-Rank Transformers Inference Actually Fast](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08314)
*Wenhao Wu,Zishan Shao,Kangning Cui,Jinhee Kim,Yixiao Wang,Hancheng Ye,Danyang Zhuo,Yiran Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FlashSVD v1.5是一个专为SVD压缩Transformer设计的统一推理运行时，通过相位特定核、密集KV解码、打包MLP执行和逐层CUDA图重放等技术，实现了最高2.55x解码加速和2.39x端到端加速，证明了低秩加速需要运行时协同设计而非仅靠压缩算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SVD低秩压缩虽然减少了Transformer参数和名义FLOPs，但这些节省在实际LLM服务中很难转化为真正的速度提升，原因是分解后的检查点碎片化了执行路径，且预填充和自回归解码阶段的运行时开销差异显著。

Method: 将多种公开SVD压缩家族映射到统一的因式表示，结合相位特定核、密集KV解码、打包MLP执行和逐层CUDA图重放，将低秩服务路径重组为精简运行时。

Result: 在代表性解码服务设置中，FlashSVD v1.5实现最高2.55x解码加速和2.39x端到端加速，在多种流行SVD压缩家族上平均获得1.48x解码加速和1.44x端到端加速。

Conclusion: 实际低秩加速需要运行时协同设计，而非仅靠压缩算法本身。

Abstract: SVD-based Low-rank compression reduces transformer parameters and nominal FLOPs, but these savings often translate poorly into real LLM serving speedups. We show that this gap is largely a runtime problem: factorized checkpoints fragment execution paths, and the resulting overhead differs substantially between prefill and autoregressive decode. We present FlashSVD v1.5, a unified inference runtime for serving SVD-compressed transformers. FlashSVD v1.5 maps diverse public SVD compression families to a common factorized representation and combines phase-specific kernels with dense-KV decode, packed MLP execution, and per-layer CUDA-graph replay to reorganize the low-rank serving path into a thin runtime. Across representative decoder-serving settings, FlashSVD v1.5 achieves up to 2.55x decode and 2.39x end-to-end speedup, and it attains 1.48x average decode and 1.44x average end-to-end speedup across multiple popular SVD compression families. These results suggest that practical low-rank acceleration requires runtime co-design, not compression algorithms alone. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Zishan-Shao/FlashSVD.

</details>


### [678] [Reflective Prompted Policy Optimization: Trajectory-Grounded Revision and Salience Bias](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08315)
*Rahaf Abu Hara,Vaibbhav Murarri,Claudio Zito*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出R2PO框架，将标量奖励反馈扩展为轨迹级行为证据（状态、动作、奖励），通过分离搜索与修正、聚合统计推理等机制，使20B模型在10个环境中达到最优，且训练更稳定、收敛更快。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的策略优化器仅依赖标量奖励（如得分为0.45），无法获取智能体失败的具体原因（如陷入循环、掉入坑洞等），缺乏轨迹级别的行为证据，导致信息利用率低、学习效率差。

Method: 提出R2PO两阶段框架：(1) Search-LLM提出候选策略参数；(2) Critic-LLM检查轨迹并基于状态、动作、奖励提出针对性修正。通过分离全局搜索与行为修正、使用选择机制过滤高方差编辑、引入聚合统计推理和中间轨迹选择来缓解显著性偏差。

Result: 在10个环境中，使用20B模型实现最高平均最佳奖励；在约500个回合内达到CartPole近最优性能；训练稳定性远超深度强化学习和先前基于LLM的方法。分析发现三轨迹变体中76.6%的回归由显著性偏差导致。

Conclusion: 将轨迹视为第一类上下文证据而非简化为标量回报，即使使用相对较小的LLM也能改变其策略搜索方式，实现更快学习、更精准诊断和更可靠的外部控制器改进。

Abstract: Existing LLM-based policy optimizers see only scalar rewards: that a policy scored 0.45, but not whether the agent got stuck in a loop, fell into a hole on the third step, or performed well on 19 out of 20 rollouts and failed catastrophically on one. We propose Reflective Prompted Policy Optimization (R2PO), a two-stage LLM framework for policy search over compact policy classes that augments scalar reward feedback with trajectory-level behavioral evidence. A Search-LLM proposes candidate policy parameters; the environment executes them; a Critic-LLM inspects the resulting rollouts and proposes targeted revisions grounded in observed states, actions, and rewards. Across ten environments, ablations show R2PO's gains require separating global search from behavior-grounded revision and using selection to filter high-variance edits. We further identify a dominant failure mode, salience bias: when presented with multiple rollouts, the Critic-LLM fixates on improving a single failure even when most trajectories succeed. In a three-trajectory variant where the Critic-LLM sees the best, worst, and median rollout, this behavior explains 76.6% of regressions on CartPole. R2PO mitigates this by reasoning over aggregate rollout statistics, median-trajectory selection, and a revision rule. Using a 20B open-weight model, R2PO achieves the highest mean best reward across all ten environments, reaches near-optimal performance substantially earlier (e.g., near-maximum CartPole reward within ~500 episodes), and trains far more stably than both deep RL and prior LLM-based methods. These results show that treating trajectories as first-class in-context evidence, rather than artifacts reduced to scalar returns, changes how even comparatively small LLMs search over policy spaces, enabling them to learn faster, diagnose more precisely, and reliably improve external controllers.

</details>


### [679] [RDKV: Rate-Distortion Bit Allocation for Joint Eviction and Quantization of the KV Cache](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08317)
*Junkai Zhang,Hang Guo,Luca Benini,Yawei Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出RDKV方法，将KV缓存压缩视为率失真问题，联合优化驱逐和量化两种策略，通过逆向注水算法为每个token或channel分配比特宽度，在极低缓存保留率下恢复接近全缓存的精度，并实现显著加速和内存减少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在长上下文推理中，KV缓存随序列长度线性增长，需反复从片外HBM读取到片上内存，导致推理受限于内存带宽和容量。现有方法孤立地处理缓存驱逐或量化，缺乏联合优化，因此需要一种统一的压缩框架。

Method: 将KV缓存压缩建模为率失真问题，驱逐和量化是比特分配的两种极端。通过压缩对注意力计算产生的失真度推导每个token或通道的权重，基于这些权重在预填充阶段后应用一次逆向注水算法，为每个token或通道分配从全精度到0比特的位宽。

Result: 在LongBench、RULER和InfiniteBench上，RDKV平均超过最佳基线9.1%；在LongBench上，仅保留2.48%缓存即可恢复97.81%的全缓存精度；在128K上下文长度下，相比全缓存FlashAttention-2解码实现4.5倍加速和1.9倍峰值内存减少。

Conclusion: 联合优化驱逐与量化能显著提升KV缓存压缩效果，RDKV在极低内存占用下保持高性能，为长上下文LLM推理提供实用高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown strong performance across diverse tasks, but their inference with long input contexts is bottlenecked by memory size and bandwidth. The Key-Value (KV) cache size grows linearly with sequence length and needs to be re-read from off-chip high-bandwidth memory (HBM) to on-chip memory at every decoding step, resulting in memory-bound inference. Existing methods reduce the cache by either eviction or quantization, but typically treat the two in isolation. In this paper, we cast KV cache compression as a rate-distortion problem, under which eviction and quantization are two end-points of the same bit allocation scheme. This exposes the need to optimize them jointly, motivating our method, RDKV (Rate-Distortion KV cache compression). RDKV derives the weight of each token or channel from the distortion that compression induces on the attention computation. Based on these weights, it assigns each token or channel a bit-width ranging from full precision down to zero bits guided by reverse water-filling, applied once after the prefilling stage. Experiments on LongBench, RULER, and InfiniteBench show that RDKV outperforms the best evaluated baseline by 9.1% on average. On LongBench it recovers 97.81% of full-cache accuracy with only 2.48% cache retention. Compared with full-cache FlashAttention-2 decoding, it achieves 4.5x decode speedup and 1.9x peak memory reduction with 128K context length, while maintaining comparable performance.

</details>


### [680] [When Attention Beats Fourier: Multi-Scale Transformers for PDE Solving on Irregular Domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08318)
*Brandon Yee,Pairie Koh,Jack Rodriguez,Mihir Tekal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MSAT，一种基于Transformer的深度学习架构，用于求解PDE，在复杂几何问题上相比FNO提升3.7倍性能，并系统研究了架构选择中物理先验的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究用于求解PDE的深度学习模型中的架构选择问题，特别是基于Transformer的自注意力架构与傅里叶域神经算子之间的性能对比，以及物理先验正则化的影响。

Method: 提出MSAT架构，将时空解历史编码为token序列，通过复合监督目标（可选物理信息正则化项）进行端到端训练。在PINNacle套件的五个基准问题上，与九种基线方法进行系统对比。

Result: MSAT在复杂几何问题Heat2D-CG上达到L2_rel=0.0101，相比FNO提升3.7倍；推理时间仅34秒，而Mamba-NO需120,812秒。消融实验揭示了物理先验的精确权衡：在扩散主导问题上降低测试误差，但在混沌和回流区域降低泛化性能。

Conclusion: 基于域边界复杂度κ的近似误差界为架构选择提供了理论依据和原则性规则，系统刻画了先验错配边界。

Abstract: We study the problem of \emph{architecture selection} for deep learning models trained to solve partial differential equations (PDEs), asking when transformer-based architectures with learned attention outperform Fourier-domain neural operators. We introduce the \textbf{Multi-Scale Attention Transformer} (\msat{}), a deep learning architecture that encodes spatiotemporal solution histories as token sequences and trains end-to-end via a composite supervised objective with optional physics-informed regularization terms. We conduct a comprehensive empirical evaluation against nine baselines -- including physics-informed neural networks (PINNs), neural operators (FNO, DeepONet, GNOT), and state-space models (Mamba-NO) -- across five benchmark problems from the PINNacle suite, using identical train/test splits and reference data for all methods. \msat{} achieves state-of-the-art generalization on complex geometry problems ($L^2_\mathrm{rel} = 0.0101$ on Heat2D-CG, a $3.7\times$ improvement over FNO) at $34\,\mathrm{s}$ total inference vs.\ $120{,}812\,\mathrm{s}$ for Mamba-NO. Ablation studies over the physics regularization component reveal a precise inductive bias tradeoff: physics priors reduce test error on diffusion-dominated problems but degrade generalization on chaotic and recirculating-flow regimes, directly characterizing the prior misspecification boundary. Approximation error bounds as a function of domain boundary complexity $κ$ provide a theoretical basis for these empirical findings and a principled rule for architecture selection.

</details>


### [681] [LLM Wardens: Mitigating Adversarial Persuasion with Third-Party Conversational Oversight](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08321)
*Lennart Wachowiak,Scott D. Blain,David Williams-King,Samuele Marro*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种"看守模型"方法，通过在人类-AI交互中加入辅助LLM实时监测操纵行为并发出非约束性警告，成功将对抗性LLM的操纵成功率从65.4%降至30.4%（用户研究），并在仿真基准COAX-Bench中从34.7%降至12.3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLMs的劝说能力日益增强，如何保护用户免受其操纵是一个亟待解决的关键问题。现有研究缺乏对实时干预保护机制的有效探索。

Method: 1) 用户研究（N=120）：在4种决策场景中测试对抗性LLM的操纵能力；2) 引入"看守模型"——一个辅助LLM实时监测人机交互并发出非约束性私人警告；3) 构建COAX-Bench仿真基准，涵盖14种决策场景共16,212次多智能体交互实验。

Result: 用户研究：对抗LLM原始成功率65.4%，加入看守后降至30.4%（对正常交互仅降低8.6个百分点）；仿真实验：成功率从34.7%降至12.3%；即使看守模型弱于对抗模型也能提供有效保护。

Conclusion: 看守模型能有效降低LLM操纵用户的成功率，且对正常交互影响较小；弱看守模型仍可监督强对抗模型，为可扩展的AI安全监督提供了可行路径。

Abstract: LLMs are increasingly capable of persuasion, which raises the question of how to protect users against manipulation. In a preregistered user study (N=120) across four decision-making scenarios, we find that an adversarial LLM with a hidden goal succeeds in steering users' decisions 65.4% of the time. We then introduce a "warden" model: a secondary LLM that monitors the human-AI interaction trace in real time and issues non-binding, private advisories to the user when it detects manipulation. Adding a warden more than halves the adversary's success rate to 30.4%, with a much smaller (8.6 percentage points) reduction for genuine interactions. To probe the mechanism behind these results, we release COAX-Bench, a simulation benchmark spanning 14 decision-making scenarios, including hiring, voting, and file access. Across 16,212 simulated multi-agent interactions, capable adversarial LLMs achieve their hidden goals in 34.7% of cases, which warden models reduce to 12.3%. Notably, even warden models substantially weaker than the adversary they oversee provide meaningful protection, suggesting a path for scalable oversight of more capable models.

</details>


### [682] [SDG-MoE: Signed Debate Graph Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08322)
*Stepan Kulibaba,Kirill Labzin,Artem Dzhalilov,Roman Pakhomov,Oleg Svidchenko,Alexander Gansnikov,Aleksei Shpilman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SDG-MoE架构，通过在MoE的活跃专家之间引入有符号辩论图的消息传递机制，实现轻量级的迭代协商过程，显著提升了模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有稀疏MoE模型中，被路由到的专家彼此独立处理token，仅在聚合时加权求和，缺乏专家间的直接交互。作者质疑：如果允许活跃专家之间进行通信，能否进一步提升模型性能？

Method: SDG-MoE引入三个组件：(1) 支持图A⁺和批评图A⁻两个可学习的交互矩阵；(2) 在聚合前对专家表示进行有符号消息传递更新；(3) 基于分歧门控的Friedkin-Johnsen风格锚定机制，控制协商强度同时防止专家漂移。

Result: 在三种子随机种子预训练实验中，SDG-MoE的验证困惑度比无符号图通信基线和vanilla MoE均有提升，比最强基线提升19.8%；在WikiText-103、C4和Paloma上取得最佳外部困惑度。

Conclusion: 有符号辩论图机制能有效提升MoE性能，且只需少量额外开销，协商强度可通过分歧度自适应调节，同时保持专家 specialization。

Abstract: Sparse MoE models achieve a good balance between capacity and compute by routing each token to a small subset of experts. However, in most MoE architectures, once a token is routed, the selected experts process it independently and their outputs are combined via a weighted sum. This leaves open whether enabling communication among them could improve performance. While prior work has raised this question, direct interaction among the active routed experts remains underexplored. In this paper, we propose SDG-MoE (Signed Debate Graph Mixture-of-Experts), a novel architecture that adds a lightweight, iterative deliberation step before final aggregation. SDG-MoE introduces three components: (i) two learned interaction matrices over the active experts, a support graph $A^+$ and a critique graph $A^-$, capturing reinforcing and corrective influences; (ii) a signed message-passing step that updates expert representations before aggregation; and (iii) a disagreement-gated Friedkin-Johnsen-style anchoring that controls deliberation strength while preventing expert drift. Together, these enable a structured deliberation process where interaction strength scales with disagreement and specialization is preserved. We also provide a theoretical analysis establishing stability conditions on expert states and showing that deliberation adds only low-order overhead over the active set. In controlled three-seed pretraining experiments, SDG-MoE improves validation perplexity over both an unsigned graph communication baseline and vanilla MoE, outperforming the strongest baseline by 19.8%, and gives the best external perplexity on WikiText-103, C4, and Paloma among the compared systems.

</details>


### [683] [The Reciprocity Gradient](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08323)
*Yue Lin,Pascal Poupart,Shuhui Zhu,Dan Qiao,Wenhao Li,Yuan Liu,Hongyuan Zha,Baoxiang Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了互惠梯度（reciprocity gradient）方法，通过将奖励梯度反向传播经过对手策略的私有估计器，解决了学习智能体在战略互动中面临的“影响力归因”问题，即每个动作或信号都会通过组合分支路径重塑多方声誉，最终影响自身未来收益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 战略互动中，学习智能体的每个动作或信号都会通过复杂的声誉网络间接影响多方并反馈到自身奖励，这种“影响力归因”问题是优化困难的核心，现有方法难以同时考虑所有间接通道。

Method: 提出互惠梯度（reciprocity gradient），通过从公共观测数据训练的对手策略私有估计器，将奖励梯度沿声誉链解析地反向传播，而非从采样回报中估计；联合优化动作和评估信号，无需内在奖励或奖励塑形。

Result: 实验表明该方法能够恢复近乎最优的上下文敏感策略，而基于采样的基线方法退化为恒定输出策略。

Conclusion: 互惠梯度有效解决了战略互动中的影响力归因问题，为学习智能体在声誉传播和合作博弈中提供了一种解析的梯度优化途径。

Abstract: Communication is fundamental to sustaining reciprocity and cooperation in strategic interactions. We identify and formulate the influence attribution problem as the central optimization difficulty inherent in such dynamics for a learning agent: any action or signal the agent emits reshapes the reputations of many third parties along combinatorially branching paths before feeding back into its own future rewards, forcing the agent to account for all of these indirect channels at once when choosing every action. To address this, we introduce the reciprocity gradient, which explicitly backpropagates reward gradients through private estimators of opponents' policies trained from public observations. The gradient flows through the reputation chain itself analytically, rather than being estimated from sampled returns. It jointly optimizes actions and evaluative signals without intrinsic rewards or reward shaping. Empirically, the method recovers near-optimal context-sensitive policies, while sample-based baselines collapse into constant-output policies.

</details>


### [684] [LLM Advertisement based on Neuron Auctions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08326)
*Peiran Yun,Wenxin Xu,Jiayuan Liu,Yihang Zhang,Liang Zeng,Lingkai Kong,Tonghan Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出"神经元拍卖"(Neuron Auctions)新范式，将LLM生成广告的拍卖对象从文本空间转移到模型内部表征，利用可解释性识别品牌特定FFN神经元，通过连续菜单式拍卖机制平衡广告主收益、平台收入和用户体验三难困境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM广告植入方法（如提示注入、固定位置插槽）破坏了语义连贯性，缺乏可独立控制的参数化框架，导致严谨的机制设计难以实现。亟需一种能同时平衡广告主收益、平台收入和用户体验的新范式。

Method: 1) 利用机械可解释性识别品牌特定的FFN神经元，发现竞争品牌激活近似正交子空间；2) 将神经元计数和放大因子定义为连续、可解耦的干预预算作为拍卖商品；3) 设计基于连续菜单的拍卖机制，天然保证策略真实性并优化平台收入；4) 将用户效用惩罚显式纳入平台优化目标，动态抑制过度干预。

Result: 实验表明，神经元拍卖能在有效保持自然对话质量的同时，实现商业激励与用户满意度的最优对齐。

Conclusion: 该工作为LLM生成式广告提供了一种可理论保证的机制设计方案，通过内部表征层面的精细调控解决了生成广告中的三难困境，具有重要的商业应用价值。

Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) transition into conversational agents, generative advertising emerges as a crucial monetization strategy. However, embedding advertisements within unstructured LLM outputs introduces a critical trilemma: balancing advertiser payoffs, platform revenue, and user experience. Existing methods, such as prompt injection or rigid position slots, disrupt semantic coherence and lack a parametric framework for independent control, rendering rigorous mechanism design intractable. To bridge this gap, we introduce Neuron Auctions, a novel paradigm that shifts the auction object from the surface text space to the LLM's internal representations. Leveraging mechanistic interpretability, we identify brand-specific feed-forward network (FFN) neurons and demonstrate that competing brands activate within approximately orthogonal subspaces. This near-perfect independence allows us to define continuous, disentangled intervention budgets (specifically, neuron counts and amplification factors) as auctionable commodities. Building on this computational carrier, we design a continuous menu-based auction mechanism that naturally guarantees strategy-proofness and optimizes revenue for the platform. By explicitly incorporating a user utility penalty into the platform's optimization objective, our framework dynamically prices out overly aggressive interventions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Neuron Auctions effectively preserve natural discourse quality while achieving an optimal alignment between commercial incentives and user satisfaction.

</details>


### [685] [Interactive Critique-Revision Training for Reliable Structured LLM Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08327)
*Fei Xu Yu,Zuyuan Zhang,Mahdi Imani,Nathaniel D. Bastian,Tian Lan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出DPA-GRPO，一种双玩家生成器-验证器博弈的配对动作训练方法，通过结构化验证器干预和配对反事实动作组进行角色特定的KL正则化GRPO更新，在税务计算基准上显著提升了结构化决策的准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM输出精炼方法依赖启发式辩论、自博弈或LLM生成的监督信号，存在二阶保证问题（即谁来监督监督者），缺乏可审计且全局一致的保障机制。

Method: 提出DPA-GRPO方法：构建生成器-验证器双玩家博弈，验证器可提出安全保证案例（SAC）或保持沉默，生成器可选择保留或修订输出；这些动作形成配对反事实动作组，用于角色特定的KL正则化GRPO更新；并分析了未正则化博弈的纳什均衡性质。

Result: 在TaxCalcBench TY24上，DPA-GRPO相比零样本生成和仅生成器RL基线，在Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B上均提升了结构化决策准确率；增加了正确的静默接受，减少了遗漏错误，改善了校准后的修订行为。

Conclusion: DPA-GRPO通过结构化验证器干预和博弈论视角下的配对动作训练，有效解决了LLM输出精炼中的二阶保证问题，实现了生成器和验证器的共同提升。

Abstract: In structured decision-making workflows such as form filling, compliance checking, and maintenance reporting, LLM outputs must be locally correct, globally consistent, and auditable against task-specific rules. Existing refinement methods often rely on heuristic debate, self-play, or LLM-generated supervision, creating a second-order assurance problem. We propose DPA-GRPO (Dual Paired-Action Group-Relative Policy Optimization), a paired-action training method for a two-player generator--verifier game with structured verifier interventions. The generator proposes outputs and may revise them when challenged; the verifier either remains silent or raises a safety assurance case (SAC) containing a claim, argument, and evidence. These SAC/no-SAC and KEEP/REVISE decisions induce paired counterfactual action groups, which DPA-GRPO uses for role-specific KL-regularized GRPO updates. We analyze the unregularized game and show that positive probability on strictly lower-reward intervention or revision actions creates a profitable unilateral deviation. Under standard stochastic-approximation assumptions, DPA-GRPO tracks the corresponding game ODE, whose isolated asymptotically stable limit points are stationary and candidate local equilibria under role-wise local optimality. Experiments on TaxCalcBench TY24 show that DPA-GRPO improves structured decision accuracy over zero-shot generation and generator-only RL baselines across Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B. Training increases correct silent acceptance, reduces missed errors, and improves calibrated revision behavior, indicating gains for both generator and verifier.

</details>


### [686] [P-Flow: Proxy-gradient Flows for Linear Inverse Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08328)
*Zehua Jiang,Fenghao Zhu,Xinquan Wang,Chongwen Huang,Zhaoyang Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: P-Flow提出了一种基于代理梯度更新源点的方法，用于稳定流匹配生成模型在逆问题中的重建过程，避免了长链微分的数值不稳定性和高计算开销，并通过高斯球面投影保证先验一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的流匹配方法在解决逆问题时，需要对展开路径进行微分，导致数值不稳定和计算开销过大。

Method: 提出P-Flow框架：1) 利用代理梯度更新源点，避免长链微分；2) 采用高斯球面投影确保与先验分布的一致性；3) 基于贝叶斯理论和Lipschitz连续性提供理论分析。

Result: 在多种图像恢复任务中表现出竞争性能，尤其在极端退化条件下（严重病态问题和高测量噪声）表现突出。

Conclusion: P-Flow有效解决了流匹配模型在逆问题中的数值不稳定性和计算开销问题，具有良好的理论保障和实践性能。

Abstract: Generative models based on flow matching have emerged as a powerful paradigm for inverse problems, offering straighter trajectories and faster sampling compared to diffusion models. However, existing approaches often necessitate differentiating through unrolled paths, leading to numerical instability and prohibitive computational overhead. To address this, we propose P-Flow, a framework that stabilizes the reconstruction process by leveraging a proxy gradient to update the source point. This approach effectively circumvents the numerical instability and memory overhead of long-chain differentiation. To ensure consistency with the prior distribution, we employ a Gaussian spherical projection motivated by the concentration of measure phenomenon in high-dimensional spaces. We further provide a theoretical analysis for P-Flow based on Bayesian theory and Lipschitz continuity. Experiments across diverse restoration tasks demonstrate that P-Flow delivers competitive performance, especially under extreme degradations such as severely ill-posed conditions and high measurement noise.

</details>


### [687] [Private Vertical Federated Inference for Time-Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08343)
*Lucas Fenaux,Larris Xie,Aditya Bang,Alex Zhang,Kevin Wilson,Florian Kerschbaum*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PPHH-VFL方法，通过将模型头部分为公共明文头和轻量级MPC私有头，在保持隐私的同时实现高效推理，相比端到端MPC加速高达六个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方案中，MPC过于昂贵且扩展性差，VFL存在嵌入层面隐私泄露，两者结合又太慢。需要一种既能保证隐私又具有实际可扩展性的时序数据协同推理方案。

Method: 设计"公共/私有混合头"架构，将模型头部拆分为高效的明文公共头和轻量级MPC私有头；对公共嵌入施加对抗训练以缓解隐私泄露；小私有头通过MPC安全保留敏感信息。

Result: 在高达8600万参数的模型上，相比端到端MPC加速六个数量级；相比标准VFL+MPC基线，WAN中加速44.4倍，通信成本降低91.2倍（从1.7GB降至19MB/批），分类准确率提升2.50%，回归RMSE降低40.7%。

Conclusion: PPHH-VFL在隐私、效率和模型性能之间取得了更优的平衡，为大规模时序数据的隐私安全协同推理提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Institutions may benefit from collaborative inference on time-series data. In settings where privacy is necessary, multi-party computation (MPC) is a straightforward approach to providing strong guarantees, yet it remains prohibitively expensive and scales poorly with modern transformer architectures. Vertical Federated Learning (VFL) offers efficiency but suffers from privacy leakage at the embedding level, and securing the entire VFL model head via MPC remains prohibitively slow and communication-heavy for larger models. To enable practical, secure inference at scale, we propose "Public/Private Hybrid Head-VFL" (PPHH-VFL). This hybrid architecture splits the model head into an efficient plaintext public head and a secure, lightweight MPC private head. By applying adversarial training to the public embeddings, we mitigate privacy leakage; concurrently, the small private head securely preserves the flow of sensitive information needed for high downstream utility. Empirical evaluations on models ranging up to 86 million parameters demonstrate that PPHH-VFL accelerates inference by up to six orders of magnitude compared to end-to-end MPC. Compared to a standard VFL+MPC baseline, our approach scales significantly better, achieving a speedup of up to 44.4x in WAN and a 91.2x reduction in communication costs (dropping from 1.7 GB to 19 MB per batch), while simultaneously improving downstream classification accuracy by 2.50% and regression RMSE by 40.7%.

</details>


### [688] [What Time Is It? How Data Geometry Makes Time Conditioning Optional for Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08344)
*Alec Helbling,Sebastian Gutierrez Hernandez,Benjamin Hoover,Duen Horng Chau,Parikshit Ram*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了时间盲流匹配（time-blind flow matching）为何有效：在高维数据中，时间可以从噪声观测中隐式恢复，时间盲性带来的误差相对于耦合方差可以忽略不计，因此实际中关键因素是耦合的选择而非显式时间条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作发现流匹配模型可以在没有显式时间条件下训练，这挑战了传统观点（插值时间对消除速度目标歧义是必要的）。作者希望解释时间盲模型为何仍然有效，并探究其中机理。

Method: 1) 分解时间盲流匹配损失，识别两种不可约误差：耦合方差（coupling variance）和时间盲性差距（time-blindness gap）。2) 理论分析：假设高维数据靠近k维子空间，通过尖峰协方差模型（spiked-covariance model）证明时间可以从单次观测中以O(1/√(d-k))速率恢复。3) 在CIFAR-10、CelebA-HQ和FFHQ上进行实证验证。

Result: 1) 时间盲性差距在高维数据中渐近可忽略。2) 耦合的选择对损失和样本质量的影响远大于是否去除时间条件。3) 高维数据的几何结构使得时间可以从噪声观测中隐式识别。

Conclusion: 解释了时间盲流匹配为何能工作，并指出实际中主要的杠杆是耦合的选择，而非显式的时间条件化。

Abstract: Recent work has shown that models flow matching models can be trained without explicit time conditioning, challenging the standard view that the interpolation time is needed to disambiguate velocity targets. But why should a time-blind model work at all? Decomposing the time-blind flow matching loss, we identify two sources of irreducible error: a coupling variance, which arises from ambiguous velocity targets induced by how noise and data points are paired, and the time-blindness gap, which is the additional error caused by ignoring time. This gap shows that time-blind training is strictly harder than conventional training, reinforcing the puzzle that time-blind models work so well in practice. We resolve this tension by showing that the geometry of high-dimensional data makes time identifiable directly from noisy observations. When data concentrates near a $k$-dimensional subspace, time can be recovered from the statistical structure of noisy interpolants in directions orthogonal to the data; under a spiked-covariance model, this yields a closed-form estimator that recovers $t$ from a single observation $z$ at rate $O(1/\sqrt{d-k})$ for ambient dimension $d$. As a consequence, we prove that the time-blindness gap is asymptotically negligible relative to the coupling variance. We empirically demonstrate our identifiability result on real-world data and show that changing the coupling has a much larger effect on loss and sample quality than removing time conditioning across CIFAR-10, CelebA-HQ, and FFHQ. These results explain why time-blind flow matching works and show that the main practical lever is the choice of coupling, not explicit time conditioning.

</details>


### [689] [Convergence Analysis of Newton's Method for Neural Networks in the Overparameterized Limit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08352)
*Konstantin Riedl,Konstantinos Spiliopoulos,Justin Sirignano*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对过参数化极限下训练神经网络的正则化牛顿法进行了收敛性分析，证明了在无限宽极限下网络指数级收敛到全局最小值，且收敛性在频率谱上均匀，解决了梯度下降的频谱偏差问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 梯度下降法存在频谱偏差问题，即对高频分量的目标数据收敛缓慢，因为其NTK的特征值在零处累积。因此需要研究牛顿法是否能克服这一局限性。

Method: 在过参数化极限下（隐藏单元数趋于无穷）对正则化牛顿法进行理论分析，推导出有限宽NN训练动力学在概率上收敛到确定性极限方程（涉及“牛顿神经正切核”NNTK），并给出收敛速率。通过选择合适的正则化参数，确保Hessian矩阵正定，且NNTK的特征值有一致下界。

Result: 证明了在无限宽极限下，NN指数级收敛到零损失（全局最小值）；收敛性在频率谱上均匀，无频谱偏差；识别了正则化参数的缩放公式，证明其可随隐藏单元数增加以适当速率趋于零。

Conclusion: 正则化牛顿法相比梯度下降能更快速处理高频数据，其NNTK的特征值一致有下界（而非在零处累积），且过参数化下Hessian保持正定，模型表现为初始化附近的线性化。

Abstract: A convergence analysis is developed for the regularized Newton method for training neural networks (NNs) in the overparameterized limit. As the number of hidden units tends to infinity, the NN training dynamics converge in probability to the solution of a deterministic limit equation involving a ``Newton neural tangent kernel'' (NNTK). Explicit rates characterizing this convergence are provided and, in the infinite-width limit, we prove that the NN converges exponentially fast to the target data (i.e., a global minimizer with zero loss). We show that this convergence is uniform across the frequency spectrum, addressing the spectral bias inherent in gradient descent. The eigenvalues of the NTK for gradient descent accumulate at zero, leading to slow convergence for target data with high-frequency components. In contrast, the NNTK has uniformly lower bounded eigenvalues if the regularization parameter is selected appropriately, allowing Newton's method to converge more quickly for data with high-frequency components. Mathematical challenges that need to be addressed in our analysis include the implicit parameter update of the Newton method with a potentially indefinite Hessian matrix and the fact that the dimension of this linear system of equations tends to infinity as the NN width grows. This complicates deriving the training dynamics in the overparameterized limit as well as proving the convergence of the finite-width dynamics thereto. The analysis identifies a scaling formula for selecting the regularization parameter, which we show can vanish at a suitable rate as the number of hidden units becomes larger. We prove that, for sufficiently large numbers of hidden units, the regularized Hessian remains positive definite during training and the Newton updates for individual NN parameters converge to zero, showing that the model behaves as a linearization around the initialization.

</details>


### [690] [Embedding Dimension Lower Bounds for Universality of Deep Sets and Janossy Pooling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08377)
*Ali Syed,Aditya Nambiar,Jonathan W. Siegel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究Janossy pooling架构（包括Deep Sets）在处理点集置换对称性时的通用性，通过新颖技术证明了嵌入维度的下界，其中Deep Sets的下界在d>1时达到最优常数因子，且首次给出了k>1时Janossy pooling的非平凡下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际应用中需要将对称性（如置换对称性）纳入神经网络架构，但Janossy pooling架构的通用性条件（特别是所需嵌入维度大小）尚未明确。

Method: 提出一种新颖的技术来证明Janossy pooling（包括Deep Sets和k-ary Janossy pooling）实现通用逼近所需嵌入维度的下界。

Result: 对于Deep Sets，在d>1时给出了正确的最小维度（常数因子内最优）；对于k>1的k-ary Janossy pooling，首次证明了非平凡的下界。

Conclusion: 该工作为构建置换不变神经网络提供了理论指导，明确了嵌入维度大小的必要下限。

Abstract: In many practical applications it is important to build symmetries into neural network architectures. Consider the important case of permutation symmetry on point clouds consisting of $n$ points in $d$ dimensions. In this case the network learns a function on a set of $n$ points in $\mathbb{R}^d$, and a natural paradigm for constructing invariant networks is Janossy pooling, which generalizes the popular Deep Sets architecture. We study the universality of this approach, in particular the important question of how large the embedding dimension must be to guarantee universality of this architecture. Specifically, using a novel technique, we prove new lower bounds on the required size of this embedding dimension. For Deep Sets, this gives the correct minimal dimension up to a constant factor for all $d > 1$. For $k$-ary Janossy pooling, we prove the first non-trivial lower bound on the required embedding dimension when $k > 1$.

</details>


### [691] [Reinforcement Learning for Scalable and Trustworthy Intelligent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08378)
*Guangchen Lan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该博士论文通过四项研究，分别解决了强化学习在分布式环境中的可扩展性问题（联邦优化）以及在大语言模型中的可信赖问题（偏好对齐与上下文安全），论证了强化学习是实现高效优化与可信行为统一框架的可行途径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习在分布式部署中面临通信带宽有限、计算异构等扩展性挑战；同时，在后训练大语言模型和智能体时，策略需要对齐人类偏好并满足安全要求（如隐私保护）。现有方法难以同时解决这两方面问题。

Method: 提出四项互补贡献：1）联邦设置下的可扩展强化学习（通信高效的异步联邦优化）；2）面向大语言模型的可信强化学习（偏好对齐）；3）上下文安全的信息披露控制；4）将上述方法整合为统一框架。

Result: 在分布式环境中实现了通信高效的异步联邦强化学习优化；在语言模型中实现了更好的人类偏好对齐，并减少了上下文不当的信息披露行为。

Conclusion: 下一代智能系统需要同时具备高效优化和可信行为，而强化学习能够为这两个目标提供统一的理论与实践框架。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning has become a powerful paradigm for improving the capability of intelligent systems, but its practical deployment faces two central challenges. First, reinforcement learning must scale efficiently in distributed environments where communication bandwidth is limited and computation is heterogeneous across agents. Second, as reinforcement learning is increasingly used in post-training large language models and autonomous agents, the optimized policies must also be aligned with human preferences and satisfy safety requirements such as privacy-aware information disclosure. This dissertation addresses both challenges through four complementary contributions spanning federated optimization, preference alignment, and contextual safety.
  The first part of the dissertation studies scalable reinforcement learning in federated settings. The second part of the dissertation studies trustworthy reinforcement learning for large language models. Together, these contributions advance reinforcement learning along two complementary dimensions. On the one hand, they make reinforcement learning more scalable through communication-efficient and asynchronous federated optimization. On the other hand, they make reinforcement learning more trustworthy by improving alignment with human preferences and by reducing contextually inappropriate information disclosure in language-based intelligent systems. As a whole, this dissertation argues that the next generation of intelligent systems will require both efficient optimization and trustworthy behavior, and that reinforcement learning provides a unifying framework for addressing both goals.

</details>


### [692] [The Power of Second Order Methods for Sequence Preconditioning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08390)
*Annie Marsden,Elad Hazan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将Vovk-Azoury-Warmuth (VAW)算法与Universal Sequence Preconditioning (USP)方法相结合，在任意边际稳定的线性动力系统中实现了$O(\log^3 T)$的多对数遗憾界，解决了USP因直径和梯度爆炸而无法达到最优遗憾界的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有序列预测方法在处理具有长记忆（边际稳定）的动力系统时，遗憾值随隐藏维度多项式增长；USP虽有压缩记忆的效果，但会导致直径和梯度指数级膨胀，阻碍其达到最优遗憾界。

Method: 基于最小描述长度原则，将VAW算法与USP结合：VAW自然适配USP的压缩特性，同时对直径的指数爆炸具有鲁棒性；此外，通过复解析界对Chebyshev多项式进行新的分析，将USP推广到具有常数复参数的系统。

Result: 对于任意边际稳定的线性动力系统，包括非对称隐藏转移矩阵的情况，算法实现了$O(\log^3 T)$的多对数遗憾界。

Conclusion: VAW与USP的组合有效克服了USP的直径爆炸问题，首次在长记忆线性动力系统中达到多对数级别的遗憾界，并扩展了USP的适用范围。

Abstract: Sequence prediction methods for dynamical systems with long memory, i.e. marginally stable systems, typically achieve regret that grows polynomially with the hidden dimension of the underlying generative model. Universal Sequence Preconditioning (USP) is a method that compresses any sequence which comes from a linear dynamical system into a "preconditioned" sequence which requires exponentially shorter memory for accurate prediction. However, the preconditioned sequence yields exponentially larger diameters and gradients, hindering USP from unlocking optimal regret bounds. Inspired by the minimum description length principle, we show that the Vovk-Azoury-Warmuth (VAW) algorithm is naturally matched to the USP regime. Indeed, it takes advantage of the memory compression while remaining robust to the exponential explosion of the diameter. We prove that combining USP with VAW achieves astoundingly strong results: for any marginally-stable linear dynamical system, this algorithm achieves polylogarithmic regret $O \left( \log^3 T \right)$ even in the presence of asymmetric hidden transition matrices. Finally, we extend the applicability of USP beyond bounded-spectrum systems by providing new complex-analytic bounds on Chebyshev polynomials, allowing for systems with constant complex arguments.

</details>


### [693] [SACHI: Structured Agent Coordination via Holistic Information Integration in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08391)
*Nikunj Gupta,James Zachary Hare,Jesse Milzman,Rajgopal Kannan,Viktor Prasanna*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SACHI框架，通过图Transformer卷积在智能体间协调图上进行结构化信息整合，使每个智能体在决策前获得接收敏感、内容相关的队友信号，在五个协作任务中显著优于十二种基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有协作式多智能体强化学习方法面临局部观测带来的信息瓶颈——最优联合行动所需的知识分散在团队中，但每个智能体必须在不掌握队友观测、意图或已选动作的情况下做出决策。

Method: 提出SACHI（structured agent coordination via holistic information integration），在智能体间协调图上使用图Transformer卷积，在行动选择前向每个智能体的表征注入接收敏感且内容相关的队友信号。

Result: 在覆盖空间、通信和对抗协调挑战的五个协作任务中，SACHI一致匹配或超越所有十二种基线方法，并通过归一化指标、bootstrap置信区间、Friedman排序和性能画像等统计方法确认提升显著且稳健。

Conclusion: SACHI的增益源于消息传递算子中内容依赖（content-dependence）这一架构特性，而非模型容量的增加，且该优势在不同环境中具有统计显著性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning agents that act on partial local observations face a fundamental information bottleneck: the knowledge needed to select jointly optimal actions is scattered across the team, yet each agent must commit to a decision without access to its teammates' observations, intentions, or chosen actions. Existing methods either ignore this bottleneck, compress it into a scalar mixing signal, or route around it with learned communication channels. Framing action coordination as a problem of structured information integration among agents, we propose \textit{structured agent coordination via holistic information integration}, or SACHI, in which graph transformer convolutions over an inter-agent coordination graph enrich each agent's representation with receiver-sensitive, content-dependent signals from teammates prior to action selection. We evaluate SACHI across five cooperative tasks spanning spatial, communicative, and adversarial coordination challenges against twelve baselines. SACHI consistently matches or outperforms the best baseline on every task, and rigorous aggregate statistical analyses, including normalized metrics with bootstrap confidence intervals, Friedman ranking, and performance profiling, confirm that this advantage is statistically significant, robust across environments, and not attributable to increased model capacity. Parameter-matched ablations further trace the source of the gains to a single architectural property: the degree of content-dependence in the message-passing operator.

</details>


### [694] [Geometry-Aware Discretization Error of Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08392)
*Samuel Hurault,Thomas Moreau,Gabriel Peyré*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对扩散采样的离散化误差问题，提出了精确得分函数设定下Euler-Maruyama方法的弱误差和Fréchet误差的一阶渐近展开公式，这些公式在高斯数据下变得完全显式，揭示了离散化误差如何适应数据协方差谱的几何结构，并用于指导扩散参数优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有非渐近分析给出的收敛界过于宽松且对扩散参数不敏感，无法有效指导实际设计。作者希望采取一条虽不那么雄心勃勃但更具信息量的路径，推导出可指导几何感知参数优化的误差分析。

Method: 在精确得分函数设定下，推导Euler-Maruyama方法的弱误差和Fréchet误差的一阶渐近展开公式；在高斯数据假设下给出完全显式表达式；通过协方差谱分析误差如何适应数据几何结构。

Result: 获得了显式的高斯误差公式，展示了离散化误差与数据协方差谱、扩散调度及扩散项系数的交互关系；该公式提供了可优化的目标函数；且高斯公式的定性预测在包括图像生成和后验采样的不同几何问题中保持鲁棒。
