Result: 集成四种代表性SVD方法，在LLaMA-7B上压缩比0.6时平均任务准确率提升最高10%，相比原生SVD执行实现最高2.5倍预填充和2.4倍解码加速。

Conclusion: PARSE与现有SVD流水线正交，能同时提升模型质量和推理效率，为动态秩选择在LLM压缩中的应用提供了有效范式。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have rapidly grown in scale, creating substantial memory and computational costs that hinder efficient deployment. Singular value decomposition (SVD) has emerged as an effective post-training compression technique, but existing SVD-based methods rely on static rank truncation, applying a fixed prefix of singular components to all inputs regardless of their diversity. We identify two limitations of this static design: the optimal rank varies across individual prompts, and the selected rank is sensitive to the choice of calibration set, leading to suboptimal performance across diverse inputs. To address these challenges, we propose $\textbf{PARSE}$, a post-training framework for $\textbf{P}$rompt-$\textbf{A}$ware $\textbf{R}$ank $\textbf{S}$election as $\textbf{E}$xperts in SVD-compressed LLMs. PARSE trains a linear router offline to perform prompt-aware rank selection, decoupling it from calibration information by supervising the router against dense-model outputs on a large-scale corpus. We further observe that rank-selection patterns are shared across semantically similar prompts and remain stable across decoding steps, allowing appropriate rank subsets to be served directly from a pattern cache at inference. Complemented by expert memory aggregation and kernel fusion for system-level efficiency, PARSE is orthogonal to existing SVD-based pipelines and consistently improves both model quality and inference efficiency. Integrated with four representative SVD-based methods, PARSE improves average task accuracy by up to 10% at a compression ratio of 0.6 on LLaMA-7B, and achieves up to 2.5 $\times$ prefill and 2.4 $\times$ decode speedup over native SVD execution.

</details>


### [732] [Uncovering Intra-expert Activation Sparsity for Efficient Mixture-of-Expert Model Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08575)
*Jongseok Park,Sunga Kim,Zhenyu Gu,Ion Stoica,Alvin Cheung*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文探索了MoE大模型中未被充分利用的专家内部激活稀疏性，发现现有预训练模型天然存在高达90%的稀疏性，通过跳过非活跃神经元的计算，在vLLM框架上实现了MoE层最高2.5倍加速，端到端1.2倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MoE模型通过稀疏专家激活提升计算效率，但更细粒度的专家稀疏性面临训练挑战（如专家崩溃和负载不均衡），因此需要探索新的稀疏维度来进一步提升效率。

Method: 研究了8个现有预训练MoE模型（1B-400B参数）中专家内部的激活稀疏性，无需修改激活函数或模型参数；扩展vLLM的MoE执行流程，通过跳过非活跃神经元计算来利用这一稀疏性。

Result: 现有预训练MoE模型中专家内部存在高达90%的激活稀疏性且无明显精度损失；相比原始密集vLLM基线，MoE层执行速度提升2.5倍，端到端速度提升1.2倍。

Conclusion: 专家内部激活稀疏性是MoE模型中一个被忽视但有效的效率提升维度，现有模型已天然具备这一特性，可通过跳过非活跃计算实现显著加速。

Abstract: Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture has become the standard for state-of-the-art large language models, owing to its computational efficiency through sparse expert activation. However, sparsity through finer expert granularity is becoming increasingly difficult to achieve due to fundamental training challenges such as expert collapse and load imbalance. In this work, we explore and leverage intra-expert activation sparsity as a complementary and underexplored dimension of sparsity in MoE models. Surprisingly, substantial intra-expert sparsity is readily available in existing pre-trained MoE models, without any modification to the activation function or model parameters, providing up to 90% sparsity within each expert without significant accuracy loss. We explore intra-expert activation sparsity across eight off-the-shelf MoE models ranging from 1B to 400B parameters, and extend the MoE execution pipeline of vLLM to leverage intra-expert activation sparsity by skipping the computations of inactive neurons, on top of its existing optimizations, achieving up to 2.5 times speedup in MoE layer execution and 1.2 times end-to-end speedup compared to the original dense vLLM baseline.

</details>


### [733] [Probing the Impact of Scale on Data-Efficient, Generalist Transformer World Models for Atari](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08578)
*Jooyeon Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文使用最小化Transformer世界模型，在Atari 100k基准上分析缩放行为。发现不同环境存在不同缩放机制（插值阈值 vs 经典机制），联合训练可稳定缩放行为。基于学习到的世界模型，下游策略达到0.770的专家-随机归一化中位数得分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有世界模型研究常常混淆架构机制与模型规模的独立影响，本文旨在厘清规模缩放规律本身，揭示不同环境对规模缩放的内在差异。

Method: 使用最小化Transformer世界模型，基于预设专家策略的固定离线数据集，在Atari 100k基准上分析缩放行为。分别进行单任务和统一联合训练（26个Atari环境）的实验。

Result: 1）不同环境存在不同缩放机制：部分环境能越过插值阈值实现单调提升，部分陷入经典缩放陷阱（更大模型降低保真度）；2）联合训练稳定缩放动力学，所有环境均实现单调提升；3）基于世界模型学到的策略达到0.770的专家-随机归一化中位数得分。

Conclusion: 未来进步不仅在于架构创新，更在于精确的缩放策略。联合训练能克服单任务中部分环境的缩放困境，且世界模型保真度的提升可直接转化为下游控制性能的提升。

Abstract: Developing generalist systems that retain human-like data efficiency is a central challenge. While world models (WMs) offer a promising path, existing research often conflates architectural mechanisms with the independent impact of model \emph{scale}. In this work, we use a minimalist transformer world model to analyze scaling behaviors on the Atari 100k benchmark, using fixed offline datasets derived from a presupposed expert policy. Our results reveal that environments fundamentally fall into distinct scaling regimes, even when constrained by identical offline data budgets and model capacities. For individual tasks, some environments naturally allow models to pass the interpolation threshold, yielding monotonic improvements in the overparameterized regime, while others remain trapped in the classical regime, where larger world models degrade fidelity. In the unified setting, i.e., a single transformer trained on a suite of 26 Atari environments, we uncover that joint training stabilizes scaling dynamics, ensuring monotonic gains across all environments, regardless of their distinct inherent scaling regimes. Finally, we demonstrate that improved fidelity translates directly to downstream control, with policies learned entirely within the simulated dynamics achieving a median expert-random-normalized score of 0.770. Our findings suggest that future progress lies as much in precise scaling strategies as in architectural innovation.

</details>


### [734] [PRISM: Fast Online LLM Serving via Scheduling-Memory Co-design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08581)
*Xingyu Qu,Tianhao Lin,Yiqi Li,Zhiyu Chen,Sheng Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PRISM，通过协同设计查询感知调度器(QAS)和需求感知基数树(DART)，将请求准入与精确前缀KV缓存保留对齐，在4B和13B模型上分别降低P99 TTFT 23.3%和37.1%，提升精确前缀KV缓存命中率5.9和12.2个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线LLM服务（如RAG和智能体系统）存在提示分段和热点倾斜特性，但现有工作独立处理调度和KV缓存管理，未能将请求准入与KV缓存保留对齐，导致重复预填充热点段和TTFT延长。

Method: 提出PRISM框架，包含查询感知调度器(QAS)和需求感知基数树(DART)，协同设计调度与KV缓存管理，实现请求准入与精确前缀KV保留的对齐。

Result: 相比最强基线，PRISM在4B和13B模型上分别降低平均每QPS的P99 TTFT 23.3%和37.1%，提升精确前缀KV缓存命中率5.9和12.2个百分点。

Conclusion: 通过协同设计调度和KV缓存管理，可以有效利用提示分段和热点倾斜特性，显著降低TTFT并提升缓存命中率。

Abstract: Modern online large language model (LLM) services, such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and agent systems, increasingly expose two prominent characteristics: prompt segmentation (e.g., system instructions, retrieved passages, tool outputs) and hotspot skew, where a small set of these segments recurs frequently across user requests. Failing to jointly exploit these patterns could lead to repeated prefill of hot segments and prolonged TTFT, undermining both throughput and user-perceived responsiveness. However, existing work tackles these patterns independently: KV-cache management mainly exploits segment reuse while scheduling reorders requests to improve cache locality, yet neither aligns request admission with KV-cache retention. To address this gap, we first analyze how scheduling and KV-cache management jointly affect TTFT. Guided by this, we present PRISM (Prefix Reuse Optimization Integrated Scheduling and Memory), which co-designs a query-aware scheduler (QAS) with a demand-aware radix tree (DART) to align request admission with exact-prefix KV retention. Our evaluation results show that, versus the strongest baseline, PRISM reduces average per-QPS P99 TTFT by 23.3\% and 37.1\% while increasing exact-prefix KV-cache hit rate by 5.9 and 12.2 percentage points on 4B and 13B models, respectively.

</details>


### [735] [Kaczmarz Linear Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08587)
*Jiaxuan Zou,Ruifeng Ren,Yong Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Kaczmarz Linear Attention (KLA) 通过提出键范数归一化的动态步长（Kaczmarz系数）改进了Gated DeltaNet中的残差更新机制，在保持相同循环状态和硬件效率的前提下，在0.4B规模上实现了更低的验证困惑度（8.09 vs 8.50）、更好的长上下文检索能力和更高的解码吞吐量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 线性循环模型通过固定大小的状态压缩上下文，其中遗忘、写入和编辑信息的规则是核心设计问题。Gated DeltaNet (GDN) 使用可学习系数来平衡遗忘与更新幅度，但该系数是经验学习的而非从目标函数推导得出，可能导致次优的更新幅度。

Method: 受Kaczmarz投影法启发，从GDN的在线回归目标出发，推导出键范数归一化的动态步长 β_t = η_t / (||k_t||_2^2 + ε) 用于残差更新。KLA仅需修改一个标量，保持GDN的状态形状、门控、线性递归和分块并行算法不变。

Result: 在0.4B规模、1B token预算下，KLA验证困惑度8.09（GDN为8.50），稳定支持65K token上下文。单针检索达100%，多查询关联召回提升7.03个百分点，32K上下文解码吞吐量提升2.1倍。

Conclusion: 键范数归一化的Kaczmarz系数是delta规则序列模型的一阶设计轴，能在不改变循环状态或硬件核的情况下提升精度、外推能力和解码效率。

Abstract: Long-context language modeling remains central to modern sequence modeling, but the quadratic cost of Transformer attention makes scaling computationally prohibitive. Linear recurrent models address this bottleneck by compressing the context into a fixed-size state, making the rule that forgets, writes, and edits information a central design problem. To address state maintenance, Gated DeltaNet (GDN) combines gated state decay with delta-rule residual writes, using a learnable coefficient to balance forgetting and update magnitude. However, this coefficient is learned empirically rather than derived from the underlying objective, which can lead to suboptimal update magnitudes. We revisit the online-regression objective underlying GDN and, inspired by the Kaczmarz projection method, derive the key-norm-normalized dynamic step size $β_t = η_t / (\|k_t\|_2^2 + ε)$ for residual updates. We propose Kaczmarz Linear Attention (KLA), a one-scalar modification of GDN that preserves the state shape, gates, linear recurrence, and chunkwise parallel algorithm. At the 0.4B scale with a 1B-token budget, KLA achieves the lowest validation perplexity among evaluated linear-time baselines, 8.09 versus 8.50 for GDN, and remains stable up to 65K tokens. On controlled tasks, KLA reaches 100% on single-needle-in-a-haystack retrieval, improves 8x multi-query associative recall by 7.03 points over GDN, and delivers 2.1x higher decode throughput at 32K context. These results suggest that the key-norm-normalized Kaczmarz coefficient is a first-order design axis for delta-rule sequence models: it improves accuracy, extrapolation, and decoding efficiency without changing the recurrent state or hardware kernel.

</details>


### [736] [Lattice Deduction Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08605)
*Liam Davis,Leopold Haller,Alberto Alfarano,Mark Santolucito*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Lattice Deduction Transformer (LDT)，一种通过格空间投影实现逻辑推理的循环Transformer，在Sudoku和Maze等推理任务上以极小模型规模达到近乎100%准确率，而前沿大语言模型得分为0%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经网络（含LLM）在需要严格逻辑推理的任务上表现不佳，而传统符号方法虽精确但缺乏灵活性。作者希望设计一种兼具神经网络可学习性且能保证逻辑推理正确性的模型。

Method: LDT采用循环架构，每次前向传播之间将隐状态投影到格（lattice）空间中，以近似逻辑演绎。训练采用on-policy方式，模拟基于搜索的约束求解器中的演绎过程，并通过基于抽象解释（abstract interpretation）的域无关方法近似解候选集来监督训练。

Result: 80万参数的LDT在Sudoku-Extreme和Snowflake Sudoku上达到100%准确率，180万参数版本在Maze-Hard上达99.9%准确率。前沿LLM（如GPT-4等）在这三个基准上得分均为0%。同时模型具有"经验上的正确性"：要么返回正确答案，要么放弃回答。

Conclusion: LDT表明通过将神经架构与推理结构（格空间）相结合，可以用极小的模型和训练成本实现可靠的逻辑推理，远胜于庞大但缺乏推理能力的LLM。

Abstract: We introduce the Lattice Deduction Transformer (LDT), a recurrent transformer that approximates logically sound deduction by projecting its latent state through a lattice between forward passes. We train on-policy in a process that mirrors deduction in a search-based constraint solver and supervise training via a domain-agnostic, abstract-interpretation-based approximation of the set of solution candidates. An $800$K-parameter LDT achieves $100\%$ accuracy on Sudoku-Extreme and Snowflake Sudoku, at a fraction of the training cost of prior small recurrent reasoners, while remaining empirically sound: the model returns a correct answer or abstains. A $1.8$M-parameter variant reaches $99.9\%$ accuracy on Maze-Hard. Frontier LLMs score $0\%$ on all three benchmarks.

</details>


### [737] [Robust Server Defense Against Unreliable Clients in One-Shot Fair Collaborative Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08616)
*Chia-Yuan Wu,Frank E. Curtis,Daniel P. Robinson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于双层优化的服务端防御框架，通过在服务端使用小型可信根数据集学习客户端权重，以减轻不可靠客户端（恶意或非恶意）提供的偏置代理数据对全局模型公平性的影响。实验表明该方法在不显著损失准确率的前提下有效提升公平性，即使在不可靠客户端占多数时仍优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单轮通信的协同机器学习（CML）虽然提升了隐私性和通信效率，但消除了迭代纠正的可能性，使得不可靠客户端提供的偏置代理数据会损害全局模型的公平性，尤其对少数群体或弱势群体造成伤害。现有方法缺乏针对此场景的有效防御机制。

Method: 提出基于双层优化的服务端防御框架，学习客户端级权重以减轻偏置代理数据的影响，同时利用服务端极小规模的可信根数据集施加公平性约束，实现对不可靠客户端贡献的重新加权。

Result: 在基准数据集上，该方法在偏置代理数据贡献下有效提升了模型公平性，且准确率损失极小。即使在不可靠客户端占多数（超过50%）的极端场景下，该方法仍持续优于其他现有方法。

Conclusion: 本文证明了在单轮CML场景中，通过服务端双层优化和少量可信数据的引导，能够有效防御不可靠客户端的偏置影响，在保障隐私的同时兼顾模型公平性与准确性。

Abstract: Collaborative machine learning (CML) enables multiple clients to train a global model jointly in a data-distributed setting. To address data privacy and communication efficiency, one-shot CML has been increasingly adopted, where clients communicate with the server only once by sharing synthetic or processed proxy data. This single-round communication, however, eliminates the possibility of iterative correction at the server, making the learning process particularly vulnerable to client unreliability. In this setting, unreliable clients, whether malicious or non-malicious, may provide biased proxy data that favors certain groups, thereby degrading the fairness of the global model and harming minority or unprivileged groups. In this work, we propose a server-side defense framework based on a bilevel optimization formulation. The proposed approach learns client-level weights to mitigate the influence of biased client proxy data while enforcing fairness constraints by using a very small trusted root dataset available at the server. Experimental results on benchmark datasets show that our method improves fairness with little accuracy loss under biased proxy data contributions from unreliable clients. Moreover, the proposed approach remains effective even when unreliable clients make up a majority of the system, consistently outperforming other existing methods.

</details>


### [738] [Reasoning-Aware Training for Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08625)
*Md Atik Ahamed,Mihir Parmar,Palash Goyal,Chun-Liang Li,Qiang Cheng,Tomas Pfister,Jinsung Yoon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: STRIDE通过将轻量级LLM的推理轨迹蒸馏为连续嵌入先验，注入到TSFM的数值编码器中，实现了时间序列推理与数值预测的深度融合，在GIFT-Eval和TFRBench上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: TSFM擅长数值预测但缺乏定性推理能力；直接应用LLM处理时间序列存在模态鸿沟（文本分词破坏数值连续性、序列长度爆炸），亟需一种能融合LLM推理与TSFM数值预测的框架。

Method: 将推理轨迹蒸馏到轻量级LLM中，将其平均池化后的隐藏状态作为跨模态先验动态投影到目标数值编码器；通过交叉熵损失和分位数损失联合优化整个架构。

Result: 在GIFT-Eval上达到SOTA数值预测（MASE 0.674, CRPS 0.454）；在TFRBench上同时取得优秀的域内/域外数值预测与推理性能；作为即插即用模块可一致提升多种TSFM（如Chronos-2, Timer-S1）。

Conclusion: 将语义推理作为连续先验注入，不仅为TSFM赋予了可解释的人类推理能力，还从根本上提升了预测准确性。

Abstract: Time Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) excel at numerical forecasting but operate as black boxes lacking qualitative reasoning. Conversely, applying LLMs directly to temporal data introduces a modality gap: text tokenizers fragment continuous numerical values, degrading mathematical relationships and exploding sequence lengths, leading to computational overhead. To resolve this, we introduce STRIDE (Strategic Time-series Reasoning Injected via Distilled Embeddings), a novel framework natively integrating LLM reasoning into the continuous embedding space of TSFMs. Instead of discrete tokens, STRIDE distills reasoning traces into a lightweight LLM, dynamically projecting its mean-pooled hidden states as a cross-modal prior into the target numerical encoder. The architecture is jointly optimized using cross-entropy and quantile losses. Evaluations demonstrate STRIDE establishes state-of-the-art numerical forecasting on GIFT-Eval (0.674 MASE, 0.454 CRPS) compared to TSFMs and exhibits superior in-domain and out-of-domain numerical as well as reasoning performance on TFRBench. Specifically, STRIDE acts as a plug-and-play enhancement, consistently improving diverse TSFMs (e.g., Chronos-2, Timer-S1) across various LLM configurations. Thus, injecting semantic reasoning as a continuous prior equips TSFMs with human-interpretable reasoning while fundamentally improving predictive accuracy.

</details>


### [739] [ReLibra: Routing-Replay-Guided Load Balancing for MoE Training in Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08639)
*Chao Jin,Xinming Wei,Yinmin Zhong,Chengxu Yang,Bingyang Wu,Ruidong Zhu,Zili Zhang,Yuliang Liu,Xin Jin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ReLibra利用强化学习中"rollout-training"流程的独特机会，通过路由重放技术，在微批次粒度上实现精细负载均衡，将MoE负载均衡机制分为批次间（专家重排序）和批次内（专家复制）两个时间尺度，分别匹配层次化网络带宽，训练吞吐量最高提升1.6倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE训练中负载不均衡是长期挑战，在LLM强化学习环境中尤为严重，热门专家在不同微批次间频繁变化。现有系统依赖历史负载预测专家需求，在剧烈波动下效果不佳。

Method: ReLibra利用RL的rollout-training流程特点，通过路由重放预知token到专家的路由决策。在批次间时间尺度进行专家重排序以实现跨节点均衡，在批次内时间尺度进行动态专家复制以吸收微批次级负载波动。

Result: 相比Megatron-LM吞吐量提升最高1.6倍，相比EPLB（即使给与Oracle负载）提升最高1.2倍。与理想均衡基线相比，差距仅6%-10%。

Conclusion: ReLibra通过利用RL训练中可预知的路由信息，结合层次化带宽匹配的双时间尺度负载均衡机制，有效解决了MoE RL训练中的负载不均衡问题。

Abstract: Load imbalance is a long-standing challenge in Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) training and is exacerbated in reinforcement learning (RL) for LLMs, where hot experts can shift frequently across micro-batches. Existing MoE training systems rely on historical loads to predict future expert demand, making them less effective under sharp fluctuations. We propose ReLibra, an MoE RL training system that exploits a unique opportunity in RL's rollout-training workflow, routing replay, to enable fine-grained load balancing at micro-batch granularity. Because rollout and training process the same tokens with the same MoE parameters, the token-to-expert routing decisions are known before training starts. Leveraging this information, ReLibra places two MoE load-balancing mechanisms at inter- and intra-batch timescales, matching their communication patterns to hierarchical network bandwidths. At the inter-batch timescale, ReLibra performs expert reordering to redistribute experts for batch-level cross-node balancing; at the intra-batch timescale, it dynamically performs expert replication within a node to absorb micro-batch-level load fluctuations. Experiments on diverse MoE LLMs and RL workloads show that ReLibra improves training throughput by up to 1.6$\times$ over Megatron-LM and by up to 1.2$\times$ over EPLB, even when EPLB is given oracle loads. Moreover, ReLibra remains within 6%-10% of the throughput of an idealized balanced baseline.

</details>


### [740] [PAAC: Privacy-Aware Agentic Device-Cloud Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08646)
*Liangqi Yuan,Wenzhi Fang,Shiqiang Wang,Christopher G. Brinton*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PAAC提出了一种隐私感知的智能体框架，通过在设备-云端边界对齐规划者-执行者分解，利用角色特化作为隐私机制，在三个智能体基准上实现了15-36%的准确率提升和2-6倍的泄露减少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体面临结构性矛盾：云智能体推理能力强但暴露用户数据，设备端智能体保护隐私但能力受限。现有的设备-云端设计将边界视为计算划分而非信任边界，现有清洗器在策略灵活性和工具调用所需的结构保真度之间被迫做出选择。

Method: PAAC框架将规划者-执行者分解与设备-云端边界对齐。云智能体使用占位符token推理，保留敏感值的推理角色但丢弃内容；设备端智能体识别敏感跨度并将执行结果蒸馏为关键发现。清洗过程由设备端LLM仅提议掩码跨度，由确定性注册表执行所有替换和恢复。

Result: 在严格隐私设置下的三个智能体基准上，PAAC主导了隐私-准确率的帕累托前沿，平均准确率提升15-36%，泄露减少2-6倍，在固定实体分类之外的隐私目标上提升最大。在17个额外基准（涵盖数学、科学、金融等10个领域）上均有一致改进。

Conclusion: 通过将角色特化本身设计为隐私机制，PAAC有效解决了云智能体隐私泄露与设备端智能体能力受限之间的权衡问题，证明了该框架在多种智能体场景下的通用有效性。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents face a structural tension: cloud agents provide strong reasoning but expose user data, while on-device agents preserve privacy at the cost of overall capability. Existing device-cloud designs treat this boundary as a compute split rather than a trust boundary suited to agentic workloads, and existing sanitizers force a choice between policy flexibility and the structural fidelity tool calls require. In this work, we develop PAAC, a privacy-aware agentic framework that aligns planner--executor decomposition with the device-cloud boundary so that role specialization itself becomes the privacy mechanism. The cloud agent reasons over typed placeholder tokens that preserve each sensitive value's reasoning role while discarding its content, while the on-device agent identifies sensitive spans and distills each step's execution outcome into compact key findings. Sanitization confines the on-device LLM to proposing which spans to mask, while a deterministic registry performs all substitution and reversal, keeping actions directly executable on device. On three agentic benchmarks under strict privacy settings, PAAC dominates the Pareto frontier of privacy and accuracy, improving average accuracy by 15-36\% and reducing average leakage by 2-6$\times$ over state-of-the-art device-cloud baselines, with the largest margins on privacy targets outside fixed entity taxonomies. We find consistent improvements on 17 additional benchmarks spanning 10 domains, including math, science, and finance.

</details>


### [741] [FLUX: Geometry-Aware Longitudinal Flow Matching with Mixture of Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08648)
*Josue Ortega Caro,Yongxu Zhang,Hannah M Batchelor,Sizhuang He,Jessica Cardin,Shreya Saxena*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FLUX是一个结合流匹配与混合专家模型的几何感知框架，能从非配对纵向快照数据中同时重建连续传输动力学并发现潜在的 regimes 切换结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物系统常通过连续局部动力学在潜在 regimes 间演化，但观测数据仅为非配对的纵向快照（同一细胞/神经元未追踪为匹配轨迹），现有方法难以同时处理高维流形的弯曲几何结构和传输机制何时变化的问题。

Method: FLUX首先从池化的有标签和无标签观测中学习数据依赖的度量，然后利用该度量构建几何感知的条件路径连接相邻边缘分布，最后通过 Straight-Through Gumbel-Softmax 路由器将速度场分解为稀疏的专家向量场。

Result: 在流形控制、regime切换洛伦兹系统、宽场皮层钙成像（关联学习）及拟胚体单细胞分化等多场景中，FLUX成功重建纵向传输并恢复可解释的 regime 结构。消融实验表明，无几何学习的混合专家路由虽能拟合局部传输，但会弱化或破坏 regime 发现能力。

Conclusion: 几何感知的速度分解为从非配对纵向快照中发现潜在生物状态转换提供了通用策略。

Abstract: Many biological systems evolve through continuous local dynamics while switching between latent regimes defined by learning, stimulus context, internal state, or developmental stage. These processes are often observed only as unpaired longitudinal snapshots: the same cells, neurons, or animals are not tracked as matched trajectories, even though population states are sampled across successive stages. This creates two coupled challenges. First, trajectories must respect curved low-dimensional manifolds embedded in high-dimensional biological measurements. Second, the model must identify when the transport mechanism itself changes. We introduce FLUX (FLow matching for Unpaired longitudinal data with miXture-of-experts), a geometry-aware longitudinal flow-matching framework for joint transport modeling and unsupervised regime discovery. FLUX learns a data-dependent metric from pooled labeled and unlabeled observations, uses that metric to construct geometry-aware conditional paths between adjacent marginals, and decomposes the resulting velocity field into sparse expert vector fields selected by a Straight-Through Gumbel-Softmax router. Across manifold controls, a regime-switching Lorenz system, widefield cortical calcium imaging during associative learning, and embryoid body single-cell differentiation, FLUX reconstructs longitudinal transport while recovering interpretable regime structure. Ablations show that mixture-of-experts routing alone is insufficient: FLUX without geometric learning can fit local transport but fails or weakens regime discovery when regimes are encoded in local dynamics. These results suggest that geometry-aware velocity decomposition provides a general strategy for discovering latent biological state transitions from unpaired longitudinal snapshots.

</details>


### [742] [Fitting Multilinear Polynomials for Logic Gate Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08657)
*Youngsung Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种可学习逻辑门网络，将布尔门建模为4维多项式原型，通过向量量化训练。发现Soft-Mix方法存在秩缺陷和梯度消失问题，而协方差雅可比（CovJac）方法通过耦合饥饿系数解决该问题。在7个数据集上，4参数方法表现优异，且CovJac在深度网络中保持稳定，避免了Soft-Mix的坍塌问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可学习逻辑门网络（Soft-Mix）采用16维softmax选择门类型，但布尔门编码本实质上只有4维，导致15个单纯形方向上的梯度为零，且均匀初始化时反向信号完全消失。作者旨在解决这一交互系数饥饿问题，并提出更高效、稳定的训练方法。

Method: 将16种布尔门映射到4维多项式系数空间（每个门对应唯一的多项式），将训练转化为向量量化问题。分析Soft-Mix的秩缺陷（编码本秩为4）和STE（直通估计器）下的梯度消失问题。提出协方差雅可比（CovJac）方法，通过耦合饥饿的交互系数与始终活跃的常数通道来绕过梯度消失。最终将每个神经元从16参数降至4参数。

Result: 在7个数据集上，至少有一种4参数方法在每个数据集上匹配或超越Soft-Mix；CovJac相较于STE的优势随交互需求单调增长；深度网络中，Soft-Mix在CIFAR-10上12层时坍塌（-37.3pp），而CovJac仅下降0.5pp且在MNIST上保持稳定。

Conclusion: 通过在多形式空间中建模布尔门，可以显著降低参数量并解决Soft-Mix的梯度消失问题。CovJac方法在深度网络中表现出良好的稳定性，避免了坍塌问题，验证了其在可学习逻辑门网络中的有效性。

Abstract: We study learnable logic gate networks that stack layers of 2-input Boolean gates to build combinational circuits. Every 2-input gate has a unique multilinear polynomial with 4 coefficients, so the 16 Boolean gates form a codebook of prototypes in a 4-dimensional space, reducing training to a vector-quantization problem. The baseline method, Soft-Mix, learns a 16-dimensional softmax over gate identities, but the codebook has rank~4: 11 of 15 simplex directions carry nullspace gradient, and at uniform initialization the backward signal vanishes exactly. We prove that no affine product reparameterization fixes the resulting interaction-coefficient starvation under STE, and show that the covariance Jacobian of soft-VQ selection bypasses it by coupling the starved coefficient to the always-active constant channel. Working in the 4-dimensional polynomial space reduces each neuron from 16 to 4 parameters. On seven datasets, at least one 4-parameter method matches or exceeds Soft-Mix on every dataset; the CovJac advantage over STE grows monotonically with interaction demand across all seven datasets. At depth, Soft-Mix collapses ($-37.3$pp on CIFAR-10 at 12 layers) while CovJac holds ($-0.5$pp on CIFAR-10, stable on MNIST).

</details>


### [743] [Optimised Support Vector Regression for California Housing Price Prediction: The Critical Role of Feature Engineering and Hyperparameter Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08660)
*Emmanuel Adutwum*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对支持向量回归（SVR）在California Housing数据集上表现最差的既有结论提出质疑，通过构造10个领域特征、特征重要性筛选、随机超参数搜索（3折交叉验证）及四阶段消融实验，发现仅特征缩放即可将R²从-0.054提升至0.690，最终调优SVR达到R²=0.723，较此前报告的0.60提升约20%，在10个模型中排名第4。核心结论是：SVR性能差源于实验配置（尤其是缺失特征缩放），而非算法固有缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 质疑既有文献中SVR在California Housing数据集上表现最差的结论，探究其性能不佳是源于算法本身的局限性还是实验配置的不当选择。

Method: 构建10个领域驱动衍生特征 → 集成特征重要性筛选 → 随机搜索超参数（3折交叉验证）→ 四阶段消融实验（基线→缩放→特征工程→调参），全部在无数据泄露的scikit-learn Pipeline中执行。

Result: 调优SVR测试R²=0.723，较此前报道的0.60提升20%；消融实验表明特征缩放贡献最大（+0.744 R²），特征工程（+0.026）和调参（+0.008）提供增量提升；十折交叉验证均值R²=0.703，95% CI [0.630,0.775]。在10模型对比中排名第4，低于XGBoost(0.832)、Random Forest(0.814)、Gradient Boosting(0.783)。

Conclusion: SVR此前在该数据集上的糟糕表现主要源于缺失适当的特征缩放等预处理步骤，而非算法本身的能力不足；规范化流程（统一Pipeline、缩放、特征工程、调参）可显著提升其表现。

Abstract: In the recent literature, Support Vector Regression (SVR) has been cited as one of the weakest performers on the California Housing benchmark dataset, with Preethi et al. (2025)specifically ranking it last among the algorithms they tested, reporting an R2 of only 0.60. This paper examines whether the previously reported performance reflects experimental configuration choices rather than an inherent algorithmic limitation. A structured experimental workflow is applied: ten domain-motivated derived features are constructed from the eight raw inputs, an exploratory ensemble feature importance analysis identifies the most predictive candidates, and a randomised search over hyperparameter combinations with three-fold cross-validation selects the optimal SVR configuration within a leakage-safe scikit-learn Pipeline. A formal four-stage ablation study isolates the contribution of each component: scaling alone accounts for +0.744 in R2 (from -0.054 to 0.690), feature engineering adds +0.026 (to 0.716), and hyperparameter tuning contributes +0.008 (to 0.723). The resulting tuned SVR achieves a test R2 of 0.723, a 0.123-point absolute improvement over the previously reported SVR result (from 0.60 to 0.723, approximately 20% relative gain). In the ten-model comparison, the tuned SVR ranks fourth with R2 = 0.723, below XGBoost (0.832), Random Forest (0.814) and Gradient Boosting (0.783), while substantially outperforming simpler baselines. Ten-fold cross-validation yields a mean R2 of 0.703 (95% CI: [0.630, 0.775]), confirming robust generalisation. The observed improvement from R2 = 0.60 to R2 = 0.723 is associated primarily with proper feature scaling within a unified preprocessing pipeline, with domain-motivated feature engineering and systematic hyperparameter tuning, providing further incremental gains.

</details>


### [744] [The Cancellation Hypothesis in Critic-Free RL: From Outcome Rewards to Token Credits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08666)
*Tianhao Cheng,Zeyu Huang,Zihan Qiu,Yu Cheng,Edoardo Ponti,Yinghui Xu,Ivan Titov,Zenglin Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从token层面揭示了无评论强化学习中的"token翻转"现象：正负轨迹中token的概率变化模式高度相似。作者提出"抵消假说"：由于耦合梯度交互，共享token的信号相互抵消，而成功轨迹特有的token得到强化，从而实现隐式token级信用分配。基于此设计了两种批次干预方法，有效提升RLVR训练效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究从序列层面解释无评论强化学习，但缺乏对token级别作用机制的理解。作者希望揭示RL训练中token概率变化的真实规律，并解释无评论RL如何实现从序列奖励到token级信用分配的隐式映射。

Method: 1. 从token层面分析强化学习中的概率变化，发现"token翻转"现象。2. 提出耦合梯度交互理论，解释token间相互影响。3. 提出"抵消假说"：共享token的相反信号相互抵消，成功轨迹特有token获得强化。4. 设计两种批次干预方法：查询保留小批次和奖励平衡批次。5. 在多尺度模型上进行实验验证。

Result: 1. 发现正负轨迹中token概率提升/抑制的比例高度相似。2. 低置信度的相同token之间存在耦合效应。3. 相比仅用正轨迹训练，无评论RL将更新从模板/格式token转移到推理token。4. 被提升的token始终比被抑制的token具有更高的价值。5. 两种批次干预方法在多尺度模型上均提升了RLVR训练效果。

Conclusion: 无评论强化学习通过"抵消"机制实现隐式token级信用分配，这是一种比直观理解"奖励正轨迹、惩罚负轨迹"更精细的机制。基于抵消假说设计的简单批次干预方法能有效提升训练效果，说明该假说既是解释性原则也是实用的设计准则。

Abstract: A commonly accepted explanation of critic-free RL for LLMs, based on sequence-level rewards, is that it reinforces successful rollouts with a positive advantage while penalizing failed ones. In contrast, we study critic-free RL from a token-level perspective, revealing the token-flipping phenomenon: positive and negative rollouts exhibit remarkably similar proportions of tokens whose probabilities are boosted or suppressed during RL training. To explain this phenomenon, we further show that a token's change in probability is not fully determined by its own advantage; coupled gradient interactions with other tokens also play a non-negligible role. Specifically, these token coupling effects occur primarily between identical tokens that are both predicted with low confidence. Building upon this analysis, we propose the cancellation hypothesis: as a result of coupling, opposing signals cancel out for tokens shared by positive and negative rollouts, while tokens more specific to successful rollouts receive stronger reinforcement, thereby inducing hidden token-level credit assignment from rollout-level rewards. We support this hypothesis with complementary empirical evidence. (1) Compared with training on only positive rollouts, critic-free RL shifts updates from template and formatting tokens toward reasoning tokens; (2) Tokens boosted by critic-free RL consistently demonstrate higher value than suppressed tokens, regardless of whether they originate from positive or negative rollouts. Guided by this view, we implement two batching interventions to encourage or preserve cancellation in critic-free RL training: query-preserved mini-batching and reward-balanced batching. Despite their simplicity, these interventions improve RLVR training across multiple model scales, supporting cancellation as both an explanatory principle and a practical design criterion for critic-free RL training.

</details>


### [745] [PHIDA: Persistence-Guided Node-to-Cluster Mapping for Online Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08673)
*Naoki Masuyama,Yusuke Nojima,Stefan Wermter,Yuichiro Toda,Hisao Ishibuchi,Chu Kiong Loo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PHIDA方法，利用持久同调约束将学习到的节点映射到聚类结果，解决了在线聚类中节点到聚类映射隐式或不明确的问题。在24个基准数据集上，PHIDA在静态和非静态场景下均取得最佳平均排名。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线聚类方法在学习节点后，从节点状态到输出聚类的映射往往是隐式或简化的，导致聚类结果对图中弱连接或局部距离关系敏感，缺乏对哪些节点组在映射过程中保持完整的显式约束。

Method: PHIDA将基于自适应共振理论（ART）的逆距离ART（IDA）节点学习与受持久同调（PH）约束的节点到聚类映射相结合，通过保持原始PH成分来实现稳定的聚类映射。

Result: 在24个基准数据集上的实验表明，PHIDA在静态比较中取得最佳平均排名，在非静态设定下也优于其他在线方法。消融实验证实性能提升源于PH约束的映射和节点学习中的PH成分视图。

Conclusion: PHIDA通过持久同调约束有效解决了在线聚类中节点到聚类映射不明确的问题，在静态和非静态场景下均表现优异，代码已开源。

Abstract: Online clustering methods that adaptively create and update nodes as data arrive often make node learning explicit, whereas the mapping from the learned node state to output clusters often remains implicit or simplified. Implicit mappings make output clusters sensitive to weak graph bridges or local relations based on distance in the graph over learned nodes, leaving no explicit constraint on which node groups remain intact during mapping. This paper addresses this gap by proposing PHIDA, a persistence-guided node-to-cluster mapping method for online clustering with learned nodes. PHIDA implements this mapping within Adaptive Resonance Theory (ART)-based online clustering by combining Inverse-Distance ART (IDA) node learning with node-to-cluster mapping constrained by Persistent Homology (PH). Experiments on 24 benchmark datasets show that PHIDA achieves the best average ranks in stationary comparisons that include the recent stationary-only clustering methods, while also improving aggregate performance in the nonstationary setting over the evaluated online methods that adaptively create and update nodes. Ablations and comparisons with conventional node-to-cluster mappings indicate that the observed gains are associated with PH-constrained mapping that preserves raw PH components, together with the use of the PH component view during node learning. Source code is available at https://github.com/Masuyama-lab/PHIDA

</details>


### [746] [MLS-Bench: A Holistic and Rigorous Assessment of AI Systems on Building Better AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08678)
*Bohan Lyu,Yucheng Yang,Siqiao Huang,Jiaru Zhang,Qixin Xu,Xinghan Li,Xinyang Han,Yicheng Zhang,Huaqing Zhang,Runhan Huang,Kaicheng Yang,Zitao Chen,Wentao Guo,Junlin Yang,Xinyue Ai,Wenhao Chai,Yadi Cao,Ziran Yang,Kun Wang,Dapeng Jiang,Huan-ang Gao,Shange Tang,Chengshuai Shi,Simon S. Du,Max Simchowitz,Jiantao Jiao,Dawn Song,Chi Jin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MLS-Bench是一个包含140个任务、覆盖12个领域的基准测试，用于评估AI系统能否发明可泛化、可扩展的机器学习方法。实验表明当前AI代理远未超越人类设计的方法，工程调优较易但真正的方法发明困难，瓶颈在于科学洞察而非单纯增加计算资源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型在推理、编程等任务展现强大能力，研究者希望探究AI是否不仅能应用现有方法，更能自主发明出可泛化、可扩展的新方法，而不仅仅是进行工程调优。

Method: 构建了MLS-Bench基准测试，包含140个任务、12个领域，每个任务要求智能体改进ML系统或算法的某个目标组件，并证明改进在受控设置和规模下具有泛化性。通过测试时扩展、自适应计算分配和上下文提供的实验，分析代理的发现表现。

Result: 当前AI代理远未可靠超越人类设计的方法；工程式调优比真正的方法发明更容易；增加搜索、计算或上下文并不能消除瓶颈；瓶颈在于提出新方法背后的科学洞察（规划、验证和规模化论证）而非单纯资源增加。

Conclusion: AI在机器学习方法发明方面的能力仍然有限，核心瓶颈是缺乏科学洞察力而非计算资源。MLS-Bench为社区提供了累积性和可比较的迭代平台，数据和代码已开源。

Abstract: Modern AI progress has been driven by ML methods that are generalizable across settings and scalable to larger regimes. As large language models demonstrate advanced capabilities in reasoning, coding, and engineering tasks, it is increasingly important to understand whether they can discover such methods rather than only apply existing ones. We introduce MLS-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating whether AI systems can invent generalizable and scalable ML methods. MLS-Bench contains 140 tasks across 12 domains, each requiring an agent to improve one targeted component of an ML system or algorithm and demonstrate that the improvement generalizes across controlled settings and scales. We find that current agents remain far from reliably surpassing human-designed methods, and that engineering-style tuning is easier for them than genuine method invention. We further study the effects of test-time scaling, adaptive compute allocation, and context provision on agents' discovery performance, together with case studies of their behavior. Our analyses suggest that the bottleneck is not only in proposing new methods, but also in the scientific insight needed to plan, validate, and scale claims about them. More search, compute, or context alone does not remove this bottleneck. We build and maintain a community platform for cumulative and comparable iteration, and release the data and code at https://mls-bench.com.

</details>


### [747] [Event Fields: Learning Latent Event Structure for Waveform Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08685)
*Li Na,Yuanyun Zhang,Shi Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一类基于事件过程的波形基础模型，通过自监督学习框架在分段与时频投影上保持一致性，超越传统序列表示方法，在多项生理信号基准任务上提升了性能、鲁棒性和标签效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法将生理时间序列视为局部token或patch的集合，忽略了临床上有意义的结构来源于时间上延展的、相互作用的潜在事件，需要更合适的归纳偏置来建模生理动态。

Method: 1) 自监督学习框架，在随机分段和时频投影上施加一致性约束；2) 分割感知编码器+潜在交互算子，捕捉推断事件间的依赖关系；3) 通过共享事件表示自然扩展到多模态对齐。

Result: 在心律失常分类、血流动力学预测、波形检索等任务中，相较于强序列基线方法，在性能、鲁棒性和标签效率上均有提升。

Conclusion: 从信号中心转向事件中心的表征，为建模生理动态提供了更合适的归纳偏置，为医疗健康领域的基础模型扩展提供了互补路径。

Abstract: We propose a new class of waveform foundation models that departs from conventional sequence based representations by modeling physiological time series as realizations of latent event processes. Rather than treating signals as collections of local tokens or patches, our approach assumes that clinically meaningful structure arises from temporally extended, interacting events whose boundaries and dynamics are not directly observed. To capture this structure, we introduce a self supervised learning framework that enforces consistency across stochastic segmentations and time frequency projections of the same waveform, encouraging representations that are invariant to signal level perturbations while preserving event level organization. The resulting model combines a segmentation aware encoder with a latent interaction operator that captures dependencies among inferred events, and naturally extends to multimodal settings by aligning modalities through shared event representations. Across a range of physiological benchmarks, including arrhythmia classification, hemodynamic prediction, and waveform retrieval, the proposed method improves performance, robustness, and label efficiency relative to strong sequence based baselines. These results suggest that shifting from signal centric to event centric representations provides a more appropriate inductive bias for modeling physiological dynamics and offers a complementary path to scaling foundation models in healthcare.

</details>


### [748] [Structure-Centric Graph Foundation Model via Geometric Bases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08689)
*Xiaodong He,Haolan He,Ruiyi Fang,Ming Sun,Zhao Kang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出结构中心图基础模型SCGFM，通过可学习几何基和Gromov-Wasserstein距离对齐图拓扑，并利用结构感知特征重编码统一异构节点特征，实现跨域泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图基础模型受限于图结构的异质性和节点特征空间不兼容，难以实现跨图域的泛化。

Method: 将图建模为度量测度空间，引入可学习的几何基作为共享结构坐标系，通过Gromov-Wasserstein距离将图对齐到这些几何基上，得到结构对齐的潜在表示；同时采用结构感知的特征重编码机制统一节点表示，无需固定特征维度或数据集特定预处理。

Result: 在图级和节点级任务上，SCGFM展现出强大的域内和跨域泛化能力，优于现有图基础模型方法。

Conclusion: 以图拓扑为核心的结构中心范式可有效解决图基础模型的跨域迁移问题，为构建通用图基础模型提供了新思路。

Abstract: Graph foundation models (GFMs) seek transferable representations across graph domains but are limited by structural heterogeneity and incompatible node feature spaces. We propose Structure-Centric Graph Foundation Models (SCGFM), which treat graph topology as the primary source of transferable knowledge. Modeling graphs as metric measure spaces, SCGFM introduces learnable geometric bases that define a shared structural coordinate system. Graphs are aligned to these bases via Gromov-Wasserstein distances, yielding structure-aligned latent representations that accommodate heterogeneous graph topologies. To address feature incompatibility, SCGFM employs a structure-aware feature re-encoding mechanism that unifies node representations without assuming a fixed feature dimensionality or requiring dataset-specific preprocessing. Experiments on graph- and node-level tasks demonstrate strong in-domain and cross-domain generalization, outperforming existing GFM approaches.

</details>


### [749] [AAAC: Activation-Aware Adaptive Codebooks for 4-bit LLM Weight Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08692)
*Beshr IslamBouli,David Jin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AAAC方法，用两个小型学习到的标量码本（每层64字节）替代固定标量码本，通过激活加权重建误差选择码本，实现4比特LLM权重量化，在3-30分钟内完成，无额外存储开销，性能优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有4比特权重量化方法（如AWQ、GPTQ）虽能减少内存和计算成本，但精度提升方法（如OmniQuant、QuIP#）需要数小时的梯度辅助量化时间。本文旨在设计一种轻量级、快速且高精度的4比特量化方法。

Method: AAAC方法用每层两个小型学习到的标量码本（共64字节）替代标准量化中的固定标量码本。每组权重根据最小化激活加权重建误差来选择码本，利用该组正比例尺度的未用符号位编码选择，实现零存储开销。

Result: AAAC在单GPU上3-30分钟内完成量化，无额外内存开销。在多个模型家族上与AWQ、GPTQ、IF4、GPTVQ、OmniQuant、SqueezeLLM、QuIP#等方法对比，AAAC以数量级更少的量化时间实现了更优的性能。

Conclusion: AAAC是一种轻量级、高效的4比特LLM权重量化方法，通过自适应码本策略在极短的量化时间内取得领先性能，具有实际部署价值。

Abstract: Post-training weight-only quantization to 4 bits is widely used to reduce the memory and compute costs of large language model inference. Existing PTQ methods, such as AWQ and GPTQ, improve how weights are mapped onto a fixed 4-bit grid through scaling, clipping, or error compensation. To further improve accuracy, methods such as OmniQuant and QuIP\# uses gradient-assisted algorithms at the cost of hours of quantization time. In this work, we propose AAAC (Activation-Aware Adaptive Codebooks), a lightweight method for 4-bit LLM weight quantization. AAAC replaces the fixed scalar codebook used in standard quantization with two small learned scalar codebooks (64 bytes) per layer. Each group of weights selects the codebook that minimizes activation-weighted reconstruction error, encoding the choice in the unused sign bit of the group's positive scale and adding zero storage overhead. AAAC completes in 3--30 minutes on a single GPU, and adds no memory beyond the model itself. We evaluate against AWQ, GPTQ, IF4, GPTVQ, OmniQuant, SqueezeLLM, and QuIP\# across model families. AAAC outperforms baselines at orders-of-magnitude less quantization time.

</details>


### [750] [METBRA25Y: Brazil Surface Meteorology Archive with Harmonized Variables and Quality Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08701)
*Matheus Lima Castro,William Dantas Vichete,Leopoldo Lusquino Filho*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文介绍了METBRA25Y数据集，这是巴西国家气象研究所（INMET）历史记录的标准化每小时地面气象观测数据集。涵盖2000-2025年，包含616个站点、9种气象变量，采用两阶段质量控制策略，旨在支持环境、气候、水文、农业等领域的可重复研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 巴西拥有丰富的气象观测历史数据，但原始数据存在列名不统一、质量参差、格式异构等问题，限制了其在可重复性研究和机器学习等领域的应用。本文旨在通过构建一个标准化、带质量元数据的统一数据集，降低数据使用门槛，促进跨学科研究。

Method: 数据集通过自动化流程生成：读取INMET年度归档文件→从原始文件头解析站点元数据→将异构的葡萄牙语列名规范化为统一模式→构建小时级时间戳→按城市和站点整合观测数据→输出压缩CSV文件，附带站点清单、逐站质量标记、日降水聚合、变量级失败摘要和缺失数据审计。质量控制采用两阶段策略：第一阶段将物理上不合理值转为缺失并标记；第二阶段进行时间和跨变量一致性检查，生成诊断标记但不覆盖原始测量值。

Result: 数据集覆盖2000年至2025年，包含616个站点代码（其中605个坐标位于巴西合理范围内），涉及降水、气温、露点、相对湿度、气压、风速、阵风、风向和太阳辐射等9个关键气象变量。提供了包括质量标记、缺失审计在内的完整元数据。

Conclusion: 本文系统记录了METBRA25Y数据集的数据来源、文件组织、标准化模式、质量控制规则、技术验证结果、局限性及推荐使用方式，为巴西气象数据的标准化和可复现研究提供了重要基础资源。

Abstract: This data paper describes METBRA25Y, a harmonized archive of hourly surface meteorological observations from Brazil derived from public historical records of the Instituto Nacional de Meteorologia (INMET). The dataset was designed to support reproducible environmental, climatological, hydrological, agricultural, urban-risk, and machine-learning studies that require station-level meteorological time series with standardized variable names and explicit quality-control metadata. The processing workflow ingests annual INMET archives, parses station metadata from raw file headers, normalizes heterogeneous Portuguese column names into a canonical schema, constructs hourly timestamps, consolidates observations by city and station, and exports compressed CSV files together with station manifests, per-station quality flags, daily precipitation aggregates, variable-level failure summaries, and missing-data audits. The quality-control protocol follows a two-stage strategy: first, physically implausible values are converted to missing values and flagged; second, temporal and cross-variable consistency checks generate diagnostic flags without necessarily overwriting the original measurements. The resulting package covers observations between 2000 and 2025, with stationspecific temporal coverage, and includes key meteorological variables such as precipitation, air temperature, dew point, relative humidity, atmospheric pressure, wind speed, wind gust, wind direction, and global solar radiation. Based on the summary files included in the current release snapshot, the archive contains 616 unique station codes across variable summaries, of which 605 have coordinates within a broad Brazil plausibility envelope. This paper documents the dataset provenance, file organization, harmonized schema, quality-control rules, technical validation outputs, limitations, and recommended usage practices.

</details>


### [751] [Classification-Head Bias in Class-Level Machine Unlearning: Diagnosis, Mitigation, and Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08730)
*Weidong Zheng,Kongyang Chen,Yuanwei Guo,Yatie Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了类别级机器遗忘中分类头偏置（bias）的捷径现象，并提出偏置感知的遗忘方法和评估指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有类别级机器遗忘方法仅用准确率和时间评估，忽视了模型内部如何实现遗忘。作者发现通过降低分类头偏置项即可压制遗忘类预测，形成"捷径"，但会留下异常的偏置模式导致标签泄露，需要更深入的诊断和修正。

Method: 1) 提出BiasShift诊断基线，证明仅调整偏置即可满足常规遗忘指标；2) 提出两种偏置感知遗忘机制：两阶段偏置梯度逆转（TS-BGRM）和下界铰链正则化（LB-HR）；3) 引入三种偏置导向指标：偏置稳定性系数（BSC）、中位偏置差距（MBG）和最小偏置得分（MBS）。

Result: 在CIFAR-10/100和Tiny-ImageNet上验证，所提方法在保持竞争性遗忘性能的同时，产生了更稳定的偏置分布。

Conclusion: 分类头偏置是类别级遗忘中易被忽视的捷径，需在遗忘过程中显式约束偏置行为，并引入偏置导向指标以更全面评估遗忘质量。

Abstract: Class-level machine unlearning aims to remove the influence of specified classes while preserving model utility on retained classes. Existing methods are commonly evaluated by retain-set accuracy, forget-set accuracy, and unlearning time, but these metrics provide limited insight into how forgetting is achieved internally. In this paper, we reveal a bias-dominated shortcut in class-level unlearning: the prediction of forgotten classes can be suppressed by decreasing the corresponding bias terms in the final classification head. We first analyze the gradient dynamics of classification-head biases under softmax cross-entropy training, explaining why retain-set-only optimization tends to reduce the biases of absent classes. Based on this observation, we introduce BiasShift as a diagnostic baseline, showing that simple bias manipulation can satisfy conventional unlearning metrics while leaving abnormal bias patterns that reveal forgotten labels. To mitigate excessive forgotten-class bias suppression, we propose two bias-aware mechanisms, namely Two-Stage Bias Gradient Reversal Mechanism (TS-BGRM) and Lower-Bound Hinge Regularization (LB-HR). We further introduce three bias-oriented metrics, including Bias Stability Coefficient (BSC), Median Bias Gap (MBG), and Minimal Bias Score (MBS), to quantify bias dependence and potential leakage. Experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet demonstrate that the proposed methods maintain competitive unlearning performance while producing more stable bias distributions. We have released our code at {https://github.com/zwd2024/Beyond-the-Shadow-of-Bias-From-Classification-Head-Bias-to-Parameter-Redistribution}.

</details>


### [752] [Generative Actor-Critic with Soft Bridge Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08733)
*Ke He,Le He,Shunpu Tang,Yafei Wang,Lisheng Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SoftGAC（软生成式Actor-Critic），通过构建从固定基础潜变量到终端动作潜变量的随机桥接，使最大熵强化学习目标具有解析可解性。该方法仅需单次Actor前向传播即可生成动作，避免了扩散/流模型的高推理成本和BPTT问题，在连续控制任务中实现更优或相当的性能与更低延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的生成式策略（如扩散模型、流匹配）虽然能建模多模态动作分布，但面临两大问题：(1) 边缘动作密度不可得，导致最大熵目标只能通过代理或近似处理；(2) 迭代式共享参数采样器需要回传时间（BPTT），增加内存和计算成本，且破坏策略优化稳定性。因此需要一种既能提供可解的最大熵目标，又只需单次前向传播的生成式策略。

Method: SoftGAC的Actor定义了一个从固定基础潜变量到终端动作潜变量（在pre-tanh空间）的随机桥接过程。这一结构化桥接将最大熵目标提升为解析可解的路径相对熵目标（相对于高熵参考过程）。在实际有限步实现中，该相对熵精确简化为采样转移控制能量，提供有原则的软正则化。同时，通过使用小步特定的桥接转移，每个转移仅对每个采样动作评估一次，保持单次前向传播的轻量级特性，参数预算与强基线Actor相当。

Result: 在连续控制基准任务上，SoftGAC相比扩散策略和流匹配策略等强生成式策略基线，获得了更高或具有竞争力的回报，同时保持了单次前向传播Actor的低延迟特性，并在计算-回报权衡上表现出显著改进。

Conclusion: SoftGAC成功解决了生成式策略在最大熵在线强化学习中的两大障碍，提供了一种兼具理论可解性、计算效率（单次前向传播）和高性能的软生成式策略方案。

Abstract: Expressive generative policies such as diffusion and flow models are appealing for MaxEnt online reinforcement learning because of their ability to model multimodal and highly non-Gaussian action distributions. However, training effective soft generative policies faces two obstacles that often arise together. First, marginal action densities are often unavailable, so existing methods typically rely on entropy bounds, heuristic proxies or approximations. Second, iterative shared-parameter samplers raise inference cost and require backpropagation through time over repeated network evaluations, increasing memory cost and destabilizing policy optimization. These obstacles motivate us to seek a generative policy that exposes a tractable MaxEnt objective while requiring only a single sampled actor forward pass for action generation. To this end, we propose soft generative actor-critic (SoftGAC), whose actor defines a stochastic bridge from a fixed base latent to a terminal action latent in pre-tanh space. This structured bridge allows us to lift the MaxEnt objective as an analytically tractable path-wise relative-entropy objective against a high-entropy reference process. In practical finite-step implementation, this relative entropy reduces exactly to sampled transition control energy and thus provides principled soft regularization. Moreover, we keep the single-pass actor lightweight by using small step-specific bridge transitions, each evaluated only once per sampled action, while maintaining a parameter budget comparable to strong actor baselines. Extensive experiments on challenging continuous-control benchmarks show that SoftGAC attains higher or competitive returns than strong generative policy baselines, including diffusion and flow-matching policies, while staying in the low-latency regime of one-pass actors and showing considerable improvements in the compute-return tradeoff.

</details>


### [753] [AdaPreLoRA: Adafactor Preconditioned Low-Rank Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08734)
*Ziyun Liu,Fengmiao Bian,Jian-Feng Cai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AdaPreLoRA，通过采用Adafactor对角Kronecker预条件器作为权重空间预条件器，并求解因子空间中使得H_t加权不平衡最小的更新，填补了LoRA优化器设计空间中的一个空白，在多个模型上达到或超越现有LoRA优化器性能，且内存开销与LoRA优化器持平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LoRA优化中，权重更新矩阵被重参数化为两个低秩因子的乘积，但生成器映射的雅可比矩阵秩亏缺，导致标准链式法则无法唯一地将预条件后的权重空间方向映射回因子空间更新。现有方法对此问题做了不同近似，但缺乏统一框架，且存在一个未探索的优化空间。

Method: 将现有LoRA优化器统一为一个框架，包含两个选择：(i) 如何构造J_G^* F_t J_G的可逆替代矩阵，(ii) 选择何种权重空间预条件器F_t。在此基础上，AdaPreLoRA采用Adafactor对角Kronecker预条件器H_t作为F_t，并在因子空间中求解一个闭式解，该解最小化H_t加权的两个因子贡献之间的不平衡，使其成为H_t加权范数下最接近预条件权重方向的最优LoRA近似。

Result: 在GPT-2 (E2E)、Mistral-7B和Qwen2-7B (GLUE, ARC, GSM8K)以及扩散模型个性化任务上，AdaPreLoRA与代表性子集LoRA优化器相比具有竞争力或更优性能，同时峰值GPU内存保持在LoRA优化器级别。

Conclusion: AdaPreLoRA有效填补了LoRA优化器设计空间中"梯度统计感知的权重空间预条件器+因子空间闭式求解"这一空白，在保持低内存开销的同时取得有竞争力的性能。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) reparameterizes a weight update as a product of two low-rank factors, but the Jacobian $J_{G}$ of the generator mapping the factors to the weight matrix is rank-deficient, so the factor-space preconditioner $J_{G}^* {F}_t J_{G}$ induced by any ${W}$-space preconditioner ${F}_t$ is singular, and consequently the standard chain rule cannot be uniquely inverted to map a preconditioned ${W}$-space direction back to a factor-space update. We cast existing LoRA optimizers in a unified framework parameterized by two choices: (i) which invertible surrogate for $J_{G}^* {F}_t J_{G}$ to use, and (ii) which ${F}_t$ on ${W}$ to use. Existing methods occupy four families along these axes: factor-space adaptive updates, block-diagonal surrogates for $J_{G}^* J_{G}$, Frobenius-residual pseudoinverse methods, and Riemannian manifold constraint. Within this design space, a gradient-statistics-aware ${F}_t$ paired with a closed-form factor-space solve at ${O}((m+n)r)$ memory remains underexplored. We propose \textbf{AdaPreLoRA}, which fills this gap by adopting the Adafactor diagonal Kronecker preconditioner ${H}_t$ on ${W}$ and selecting from the resulting factor-space solution family the element minimizing an ${H}_t$-weighted imbalance between the two factor contributions; by construction, the resulting factor update is the closest LoRA approximation to the preconditioned ${W}$-space direction under the ${H}_t$-weighted norm. Across GPT-2 (E2E), Mistral-7B and Qwen2-7B (GLUE, ARC, GSM8K), and diffusion-model personalization, AdaPreLoRA is competitive with or improves over a representative set of LoRA optimizers while keeping peak GPU memory at the LoRA optimizer level.

</details>


### [754] [The Extrapolation Cliff in On-Policy Distillation of Near-Deterministic Structured Outputs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08737)
*Xin Li,Hao Jiang,Annan Wang,Yichi Zhang,Chau Yuen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了基于策略的蒸馏（OPD）在LLM后训练中的应用，发现当奖励外推系数λ超过某个阈值λ*时，模型会从保持格式转变为破坏格式。作者推导了闭式安全阈值，并在Amazon Fashion数据集上通过三个预注册实验验证了该理论，表明在阈值以下操作可使1.7B学生模型达到与8B模型相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: OPD在LLM后训练中广泛应用，但存在一个关键问题：当奖励外推系数λ>1时，学生模型虽可超越教师，但超过某一阈值λ*会导致结构化输出任务（如JSON格式）的格式崩塌。现有研究缺乏对这一阈值的理论分析，作者希望推导出可测量的闭式阈值，从而指导安全训练。

Method: 1）将问题简化为单位置伯努利情景，推导出基于教师模态概率(p)、热启动质量(b)和重要性采样裁剪强度(c)的闭式阈值λ*(p,b,c)。2）将该理论扩展到K元列表式JSON任务，其中单一绑定等价类主导输出契约。3）在Amazon Fashion上设计三个预注册实验（细粒度悬崖区间、预算扩展测试、小裁剪交叉预测）进行验证。4）提出ListOPD方法，在阈值下方操作进行蒸馏训练。

Result: 三个预注册实验均落在锁定预测窗口内，小裁剪值匹配闭式预测。ListOPD使1.7B Qwen3学生在域内与8B SFT基线持平（参数仅为其1/5），主要收益来自格式遵循：NDCG@1在λ变化时保持平稳，而解析有效性在预测边界处显著变化。

Conclusion: OPD存在一个可预测的格式崩塌阈值λ*，操作在此阈值之下可以安全地提升模型性能而保持输出格式。悬崖诊断与评估标准无关，但性能持平声明依赖于Gemini评分标准，存在评估器暴露风险。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) is widely used for LLM post-training. When pushed with a reward-extrapolation coefficient lambda > 1, the student can lift past the teacher in domain, but past a threshold lambda* the same step violates the output contract on structured-output tasks. In a single-position Bernoulli reduction, we derive a closed-form base-relative clip-safety threshold lambda*(p,b,c) determined by three measurable quantities: the teacher modal probability, the warm-start mass, and the importance-sampling clip strength. Above lambda*, the extrapolated fixed point exits the clip-safe region, changing training from format-preserving to format-collapsing. We extend the rule to calibrated K-ary listwise JSON tasks where a single binding equivalence class dominates the output contract and SFT retains parse headroom. On Amazon Fashion, three pre-registered tests--a fine-grid cliff interval, a budget-extension test, and a small-clip cross-prediction--fall within their locked prediction windows, with the small-clip value matching the closed-form prediction below grid resolution. Operating just below lambda*, ListOPD brings a 1.7B Qwen3 student to in-domain parity with an 8B-SFT baseline at one-fifth the parameters. The gain is driven primarily by format adherence: NDCG@1 on parsed outputs remains flat across lambda, while parse validity sharply changes at the predicted boundary. The cliff diagnostic is rubric-independent, whereas the parity claim uses a Gemini-graded rubric and inherits that evaluator's exposure.

</details>


### [755] [SlimQwen: Exploring the Pruning and Distillation in Large MoE Model Pre-training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08738)
*Shengkun Tang,Zekun Wang,Bo Zheng,Liangyu Wang,Rui Men,Siqi Zhang,Xiulong Yuan,Zihan Qiu,Zhiqiang Shen,Dayiheng Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了在大规模预训练中如何有效压缩混合专家（MoE）模型，探讨了结构化剪枝与知识蒸馏的关键问题，并提出了一系列实用策略，最终将Qwen3-Next-80A3B压缩为23A2B模型且保持竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管结构化剪枝和知识蒸馏是压缩大语言模型的典型技术，但在预训练规模下如何应用于MoE模型尚不明确，缺乏系统性指导。

Method: 通过大规模实验系统研究了三个关键问题：剪枝是否比从头训练更好、专家压缩选择如何影响最终模型、哪种训练策略最有效。提出了部分保留的专家合并策略和多token预测蒸馏方法。

Result: 1) 剪枝预训练MoE始终优于从头训练；2) 不同one-shot专家压缩方法在大规模持续预训练后收敛到相似性能；3) KD结合语言建模损失优于单独KD；4) 渐进式剪枝调度优于一次性压缩。

Conclusion: 提供了一套实用的MoE大规模压缩指南，成功将80A3B模型压缩至23A2B，验证了所提策略的有效性。

Abstract: Structured pruning and knowledge distillation (KD) are typical techniques for compressing large language models, but it remains unclear how they should be applied at pretraining scale, especially to recent mixture-of-experts (MoE) models. In this work, we systematically study MoE compression in large-scale pretraining, focusing on three key questions: whether pruning provides a better initialization than training from scratch, how expert compression choices affect the final model after continued training, and which training strategy is most effective. We have the following findings: First, across depth, width, and expert compression, pruning a pretrained MoE consistently outperforms training the target architecture from scratch under the same training budget. Second, different one-shot expert compression methods converge to similar final performance after large-scale continual pretraining. Motivated by this, we introduce a simple partial-preservation expert merging strategy that improves downstream performance across most benchmarks. Third, combining KD with the language modeling loss outperforms KD alone, particularly on knowledge-intensive tasks. We further propose multi-token prediction (MTP) distillation, which yields consistent gains. Finally, given the same training tokens, progressive pruning schedules outperform one-shot compression, suggesting that gradual architecture transitions lead to better optimization trajectories. Putting it all together, we compress Qwen3-Next-80A3B to a 23A2B model that retains competitive performance. These results offer practical guidance for efficient MoE compression at scale.

</details>


### [756] [Causal Dimensionality of Transformer Representations: Measurement, Scaling, and Layer Structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08740)
*Nilesh Sarkar,Dawar Jyoti Deka*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出因果维度κ（kappa），证明它作为Transformer层内在属性的可测量性：SAE宽度增长时表征容量提升15.6倍但因果容量仅提升4.35倍（表征-因果楔形），κ约1990，对模型规模具有不变性，且在不同网络深度上保持恒定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）能分解Transformer残差流为可解释特征字典，但SAE宽度与对模型输出的因果影响之间的关系尚未被系统刻画。

Method: 定义因果维度κ为层L上期望雅可比外积的有效秩，通过SAE宽度扫描结合归因修补（attribution patching）估计；在Gemma-2-2B第12层使用7种SAE宽度（16,384~1,048,576），并进行五种控制实验验证。

Result: 表征容量增长15.6倍时因果容量仅增长4.35倍（表征-因果楔形）；κ̂≈1990，κ̂/d_model=0.86，参与比下界κ_PR≈280；κ对模型规模不变（Gemma-2-9B与2B在相同SAE宽度下N_causal均为328）；跨8层深度κ恒定但绝对归因阈值下降20倍。

Conclusion: κ是可测量的、模型内在的Transformer层属性：可被SAE宽度次线性恢复，对模型规模不变，并随网络深度呈现结构化特征。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) decompose transformer residual streams into interpretable feature dictionaries, yet the relationship between SAE width and causal influence on model output has not been systematically characterised. We introduce causal dimensionality kappa(L, M, T), defined as the effective rank of the expected Jacobian outer product at layer L, and show it can be estimated via the SAE width sweep paired with attribution patching. Across seven SAE widths from 16,384 to 1,048,576 features on Gemma-2-2B layer 12, representational capacity grows 15.6x while causal capacity grows only 4.35x: a robust separation we term the representational-causal wedge. A saturating fit yields kappa-hat approximately 1,990 with kappa-hat / d_model = 0.86 and participation-ratio lower bound kappa_PR approximately 280. Crucially, kappa is invariant to model scaling: Gemma-2-9B and Gemma-2-2B yield identical N_causal = 328 at the same SAE width despite a 3.46x parameter increase (the count is forced to 2% of SAE width by calibration; the substantive empirical claim is shape invariance of the AtP score distribution under matched seq=512 conditions). Across eight network depths kappa is constant while the absolute attribution threshold drops 20x from layer 1 to layer 23. Five controls (architecture invariance, threshold robustness, geometric privilege, synthetic ground-truth recovery, and a four-cell encoder/decoder ablation) pin down what kappa measures and what it does not. Our findings establish kappa as a measurable, model-intrinsic property of transformer layers: sub-linearly recoverable by SAE width, invariant to model scaling, and structured across network depth.

</details>


### [757] [The Global Empirical NTK: Self-Referential Bias and Dimensionality of Gradient Descent Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08746)
*James Hazelden,Laura Driscoll,Eli Shlizerman,Eric Shea-Brown*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文定义了全局经验神经正切核（NTK），将其分解为K和P两个算子的乘积，证明了对RNN和transformer等模型存在通用的Kronecker核心结构，揭示了NTK的结构性瓶颈导致梯度下降偏好学习低秩表示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在有限宽度网络中，NTK通常难以计算，以往研究局限于追踪输出或无限宽度极限。作者希望揭示有限宽度网络中NTK的可解结构，理解梯度下降的偏好学习行为。

Method: 将模型状态建模为单个全局隐式约束的解，将NTK分解为K（参数到状态的即时交互）和P（内部状态依赖关系）两个算子的乘积。对基于权重的模型（RNN、transformer）证明了Kronecker核心定理，并构建了基于随机矩阵自由数值线性代数的kpflow库。

Result: 1) 证明了Kronecker核心结构，NTK具有结构瓶颈，有效秩受限；2) 揭示了自指偏差，GD优先学习隐状态和输入联合活动的主导模式；3) 循环模型中NTK在空间或时间上呈有偏低秩；4) 初始化时的动力学偏置NTK；5) 自注意力transformer的NTK同样受结构约束为低秩。

Conclusion: NTK具有可解结构，解释了GD偏向特定任务解和低秩表示涌现的原因。kpflow库使NTK可作为实用度量使用。

Abstract: In training a neural network with gradient descent (GD), each iteration induces a linear operator that governs first-order updates to a model's internal state variables. We define this operator as the Global Empirical Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK). In finite-width networks, the NTK is typically intractable to form, leading prior work to focus on restrictive settings such as tracking outputs only or taking infinite-width limits. Here, we study the structure of the NTK for a range of models. Formulating the model state as the solution to a single global implicit constraint, we derive the NTK as a product of two operators: K, accounting for immediate parameter-to-state interactions, and P, describing internal state-to-state dependencies. For a broad class of weight-based models, including RNNs and transformers, we prove a universal Kronecker-core theorem showing that K admits an exact, computable form given by the Gram matrix of weight-site variables. This core structure reveals that the NTK is structurally bottlenecked, constraining its effective rank and giving rise to a self-referential bias whereby GD preferentially learns within dominant modes of joint hidden and input activity. For recurrent models, we examine the spectrum of the NTK and show when it is biased and low-rank in space or time under the proposed decomposition. We further demonstrate that model dynamics at initialization bias the NTK, restricting learning and preventing task components from being learned effectively. Finally, we show that the NTK associated with a self-attention transformer is likewise structurally constrained to be low-rank. Overall, we show that the NTK possesses tractable structure that explains GD bias toward task solutions and the emergence of low-rank representations. To enable use of the NTK as a practical metric, we build kpflow, a library relying on randomized matrix-free numerical linear algebra.

</details>


### [758] [The Wristband Gaussian Loss: Deterministic, Composable Latents via a Sphere-Interval Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08749)
*Mikhail Parakhin,André M. Carvalho,Patrick Haluptzok*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出腕带高斯损失函数，通过确定性批次损失将点嵌入高斯化，无需采样或KL项，并在多个维度上取得最佳高斯化评分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高斯化方法依赖采样、KL散度或迭代传输，计算复杂度高且缺乏确定性保证。作者希望设计一种确定性的、可验证的批次损失函数，将任意点嵌入映射为标准高斯分布。

Method: 提出Wristband Gaussian Loss，将每个点x映射到方向u和CDF变换半径t，构成腕带空间S^{d-1}×[0,1]。证明当且仅当源分布为N(0,I_d)时，推前映射为均匀分布。使用Neumann反射腕带排斥能量作为目标函数，通过最近三图像成对截断(O(N²d))或谱Neumann路径(O(NdK))计算。还引入1D Wasserstein径向项和矩惩罚作为有限样本加速器，并通过蒙特卡洛零校准得到统一统计量。

Result: 在轴均匀X基准上，2D表现具有竞争力，10D取得最佳分数。在更难的径向-角度-连接 impostor上，10D和128D均取得最佳分数。结合可学习键欧几里得注意力和精确可逆流，构成确定性高斯自编码器，支持反事实采样。

Conclusion: Wristband Gaussian Loss是一种确定性的高斯化方法，在多个维度上优于现有方法，并且结合可逆流可构建实用的高斯潜在空间自编码器。

Abstract: We present the Wristband Gaussian Loss, a deterministic batch loss for Gaussianizing point embeddings without sampling, KL terms, or iterative transport. Each $x \in \mathbb{R}^d$ is mapped to a direction $u = x/\|x\|$ and a CDF-transformed radius $t = F_{χ^2_d}(\|x\|^2)$ on the wristband $S^{d-1} \times [0,1]$. We prove (and machine-verify in Lean~4) that for $d \ge 2$ the pushforward wristband map equals $σ_{d-1} \otimes \mathrm{Unif}[0,1]$ iff the source is $\mathcal{N}(0, I_d)$, and that the Neumann-reflected wristband repulsion energy is uniquely minimized at the uniform target. We compute this reflected-kernel objective in two ways: a nearest three-image pairwise truncation at $O(N^2 d)$, and a spectral Neumann path joining angular and radial Mercer modes (spherical-harmonic and cosine) at $O(N d K)$, with empirically matched gradients. A 1D Wasserstein radial term and a moment penalty serve as finite-sample accelerators with the same optimum, and Monte-Carlo null calibration turns the components into a single standardized statistic. We evaluate direct point-cloud Gaussianization with a calibrated barycentric $W_2$ score: a deterministic Gaussian reference batch is built by recursive Hungarian averaging, with each method reported as a $z$-score against same-size Gaussian batches. On the axis-uniform X benchmark, Wristband is competitive in 2D and gives the best 10D score. On a harder radial--angular-copula impostor whose Gaussian radial and angular marginals are correct but dependent, Wristband gives the best 10D and 128D scores. Coupled with learnable-key Euclidean attention and exact invertible flows, the resulting Deterministic Gaussian Autoencoder delivers a Gaussian-latent interface for counterfactual sampling with independent factors and a context/residual construction for dependent factors.

</details>


### [759] [Communicating Sound Through Natural Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08750)
*Emanuele Rossi,Emanuele Rodolà*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出词汇声学编码（LAC）框架，让预训练LLM通过自然语言作为传输载体来传递声音。发送端将音频分析为可解释的声学描述子，用量化词汇编码为英文句子；接收端解析句子并闭环合成波形。实验表明纯文本能在可解释、可编辑的同时保留可测量的声学结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然语言广泛用于描述和控制音频系统，但极少直接作为音频本身的表示载体。现有音频表示方法缺乏可解释性和与LLM通信的原生兼容性。

Method: LAC框架：发送端将波形分析为可解释的非学习声学描述子，用特征特定的区间词汇量化每个描述子，将词汇编码verbalize为英文句子；接收端解析句子恢复词汇-声学约束，通过闭环细化渲染波形。整体框架被形式化为有限速率有损量化器。

Result: 在短声音和符号音乐迁移实验中，纯文本在保持可测量声学结构的同时，仍保持可解释性、可编辑性以及与LLM通信的原生兼容性。实验揭示了词汇大小、速率和保真度之间的权衡。

Conclusion: 自然语言可以作为音频传输的有效表示载体，LAC框架使得LLM能够通过纯文本进行声音通信，同时保持可解释性和编辑性，为音频-语言交叉领域提供了新范式。

Abstract: Natural language is widely used to describe, prompt, and control audio systems, but rarely serves as the representation carrying audio itself. We introduce lexical acoustic coding (LAC), a framework in which pre-trained LLM sender and receiver agents transmit sound through natural language. Under fixed system prompts, the agents write their own analysis and synthesis code, communicating only through a lexical sentence, shared vocabulary, and optional symbolic music structure. The sender analyzes an input waveform into interpretable, non-learned acoustic descriptors, quantizes each with a feature-specific interval vocabulary, and verbalizes the lexical code as English. The receiver parses the sentence back into lexical-acoustic constraints and renders a waveform through closed-loop refinement. The transmitted text serves as both a rich caption and as the transport representation itself. We frame LAC as a finite-rate lossy quantizer, exposing trade-offs between vocabulary size, rate, and fidelity. Experiments on short sounds and symbolic music transfer show that plain text preserves measurable acoustic structure while remaining interpretable, editable, and native to LLM-mediated communication.

</details>


### [760] [LAQuant: A Simple Overhead-free Large Reasoning Model Quantization by Layer-wise Lookahead Loss](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08755)
*Euntae Choi,Sumin Song,Sungjoo Yoo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LookAhead Quantization (LAQuant)，一种面向大型推理模型(LRM)的层级权重量化方法，通过解决KV缓存保真度和Hessian子空间对齐两个关键问题，在保持推理加速的同时显著提升长链推理任务的准确性，在Qwen3-4B W3G128量化下AIME25 Pass@1提升15.11个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型推理模型在长自回归解码中面临高推理成本，现有权重量化方法虽能加速但会在长链推理基准上损失准确性，尽管困惑度和短解码准确率保持不变。作者希望找出这一差距的根本原因并提出解决方案。

Method: 通过系统性的梯度方向分析，识别出两个关键因素：(1) QAT损失下KV缓存保真度下降，E2E监督通过softmax Fisher度量削弱了该问题；(2) 校准数据与部署分布之间的Hessian子空间对齐问题。提出LAQuant，结合推理域校准和单层前瞻损失，通过隐式跨层协同适应保留下一层残差流。

Result: 在Qwen3-4B W3G128量化下，LAQuant在AIME25 Pass@1上比ParoQuant提升15.11个百分点（比匹配校准的ParoQuant++提升1.93个百分点），在RTX A6000上实现3.42倍解码加速（ParoQuant为3.01倍）。

Conclusion: 提出的LAQuant方法有效解决了LRM长链推理中量化精度下降的问题，在无在线变换开销的前提下实现了更好的准确率-加速比权衡。

Abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) reach competition-level math and coding accuracy via long autoregressive decoding, making per-token decoding cost a primary deployment concern. Weight quantization is the standard tool for acceleration, but representative recipes -- including state-of-the-art end-to-end (E2E) QAT -- lose accuracy on long-decoding reasoning benchmarks despite preserving perplexity and short-decode accuracy. Through a systematic gradient-direction analysis, we identify two factors driving this gap: (i) KV-cache fidelity preservation under the QAT loss, which E2E supervision attenuates via the softmax Fisher metric; and (ii) Hessian-subspace alignment between calibration data and the deployment distribution. We propose LookAhead Quantization (LAQuant), a layer-wise weight-only QAT method that addresses both factors without online-transform overhead by combining reasoning-domain calibration with a one-layer lookahead loss whose implicit cross-layer co-adaptation preserves the next-layer residual stream. For Qwen3-4B under W3G128 quantization, LAQuant improves AIME25 Pass@1 over ParoQuant by 15.11pp (1.93pp over ParoQuant++ at matched calibration) while achieving a 3.42x decoding speedup over FP16 on RTX A6000, compared with ParoQuant's 3.01x.

</details>


### [761] [MDL-GBG: A Non-parametric and Interpretable Granular-Ball Generation Method for Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08759)
*Zeqiang Xian,Caihui Liu,Yong Zhang,Wenjing Qiu,Duoqian Miao,Witold Pedrycz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于最小描述长度（MDL）的粒球生成方法MDL-GBG，将粒球生成重构为局部模型选择问题，统一了粒球的保留、分裂和残差剥离，并在聚类任务中取得了优异的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有粒球生成方法依赖手工设计的质量度量和启发式分裂/停止准则，导致局部生成决策缺乏透明性和可解释性。

Method: 提出MDL-GBG方法：在最小描述长度原则下，将粒球生成视为局部模型选择问题，比较单球模型、双球模型和核球+残差模型三种候选解释，选择描述长度最短的模型；引入残差重分配机制，在稳定粒球形成后全局重新评估剥离的边界样本。

Result: 在20个UCI数据集上，MDL-GBG生成的稳定粒球为聚类提供了极具竞争力的上游表征，MDL-GBG+AC在ARI、ACC、NMI上获得最佳平均排名。

Conclusion: MDL-GBG为传统启发式粒球生成策略提供了一种有效且可解释的替代方案。

Abstract: Existing granular-ball generation methods are still mainly driven by handcrafted quality measures and heuristic splitting or stopping criteria, which weakens the transparency of local generation decisions in clustering. To address this issue, this paper proposes Minimum Description Length based Granular-Ball Generation (MDL-GBG), a non-parametric and interpretable granular-ball generation method for clustering. MDL-GBG reformulates granular-ball generation as a local model selection problem under the Minimum Description Length principle. For each granular ball, three candidate explanations are compared, namely a single-ball model, a two-ball model, and a core-ball-plus-residual model, and the model with the shortest description length is selected. In this way, ball retention, splitting, and residual peeling are unified within a common coding-theoretic framework. A residual reassignment mechanism is further introduced to globally re-evaluate peeled-off boundary samples after stable granular-balls are formed. Experiments on 20 UCI datasets show that the stable granular-balls generated by MDL-GBG provide a highly competitive upstream representation for clustering, with MDL-GBG+AC achieving the best overall average ranks in ARI, ACC, and NMI among the compared methods. These results demonstrate that MDL-GBG offers an effective and interpretable alternative to conventional heuristic granular-ball generation strategies.

</details>


### [762] [FedGMI: Generative Model-Driven Federated Learning for Probabilistic Mixture Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08760)
*Qijun Hou,Yuchen Shi,Pingyi Fan,Khaled B. Letaief*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FedGMI框架，利用变分自编码器（VAE）作为生成密度估计器，将每个客户端的局部数据分布建模为多个共享固有分布的凸组合，从而实现结构化个性化联邦学习，有效处理数据异构性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有聚类联邦学习（CFL）受限于簇内异构性，个性化联邦学习（PFL）忽视客户端间的结构相似性。本文旨在探索概率混合（PM）场景，通过建模共享固有分布来实现结构化个性化，兼顾协作学习与个性化。

Method: 提出FedGMI框架，使用VAE作为生成密度估计器来表示共享的固有分布，并推断客户端局部数据分布的混合成分，将每个客户端数据分布建模为多个共享分布的凸组合。

Result: 实验表明FedGMI能够有效表征和区分固有分布，准确估计混合比例，并且在通信成本约束下保持鲁棒性能。

Conclusion: FedGMI通过概率混合建模的方式，在不牺牲协作学习优势的前提下实现了结构化个性化，为处理联邦学习中数据异构性问题提供了新思路。

Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) facilitates collaborative model training across decentralized clients while preserving data privacy by avoiding raw data exchange. Despite its potential, FL performance is often compromised by data heterogeneity across clients. To address this, Clustered Federated Learning (CFL) groups clients with similar data distributions to improve model performance, but constrained by intra-cluster heterogeneity. Conversely, Personalized Federated Learning (PFL) tailors models to individual clients, but usually neglects the underlying structural similarities among clients. In this work, we investigate a probabilistic mixture (PM) scenario, where each client's local data distribution is modeled as a convex combination of several shared inherent distributions. To effectively model this structure, we propose FedGMI, a framework that utilizes Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) as generative density estimators to represent these inherent distributions and infer the mixture components of clients' local data distributions. This approach enables structured personalization without sacrificing the benefits of collaborative learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedGMI effectively characterizes and discriminate the inherent distributions, as well as accurately estimates mixture proportions. Furthermore, FedGMI maintains robust performance even under communication cost constraints.

</details>


### [763] [Anchoring the Eigengap: Cross-Modal Spectral Stabilization for Sample-Efficient Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08764)
*Nikhil J. Dhinagar,Vidhi Chhatbar,Chirag Jagad,Pavithra Senthilkumar,Sophia I. Thomopoulos,Mahir H. Khan,Sook-Lei Liew,the ENIGMA-Stroke Recovery Working Group,Paul M. Thompson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现深度视觉模型在低数据场景下性能下降的根本原因是"谱坍缩"——有限样本噪声破坏嵌入协方差的特征间隙，限制了可恢复的信号模态数量。作者发展了有限样本表示学习的谱理论，量化了可恢复维度K(N)，并证明多模态学习通过低秩约束稳定谱结构。在MNIST和神经影像数据上验证了理论，并提出了基于截断Mahalanobis能量和zeta谱滤波的数据效率提升方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度视觉模型在低数据场景下性能严重退化，尤其在标注样本稀缺的医学影像领域。现有研究通常归因于过拟合，但本文揭示其深层原因是有限样本噪声导致的几何失效——协方差估计受噪声污染，特征间隙坍缩，限制了可学习信号模态的数量。

Method: 1) 发展有限样本表示学习的谱理论，量化可恢复维度K(N)；2) 利用摄动理论和集中界，证明仅特征值高于噪声底限(∼√(D/N))的模态可靠；3) 提出截断Mahalanobis能量，在幂律谱模型下用截断Riemann zeta函数近似；4) 多模态学习作为谱稳定化策略，通过低秩约束抑制噪声主导方向。

Result: 在MNIST和多疾病神经影像数据上验证：多模态训练能维持更稳定的模态并改善类间分离；即使单模态模型达到可比的小样本准确率时，多模态模型仍具有更优的谱稳定性。截断Mahalanobis能量和K(N)可有效诊断编码器质量。

Conclusion: 谱坍缩是低数据学习的基本瓶颈。本文提出的截断Mahalanobis能量和K(N)可用于诊断编码器质量，zeta谱滤波为提升数据效率提供了理论指导的原则性方法。

Abstract: Deep vision models degrade sharply in low-data regimes, particularly in medical imaging where labeled samples are scarce. We show this arises not merely from overfitting but from a geometric failure: finite-sample noise corrupts the embedding covariance, collapsing the eigengap and limiting the number of recoverable signal-bearing modes. We develop a spectral theory of finite-sample representation learning that quantifies the recoverable dimension K(N), the number of eigenmodes that can be stably estimated from N samples. Using perturbation theory and concentration bounds, we show that only modes with eigenvalues above the noise floor $\|\hatΣ - Σ\|_{\mathrm{op}} \sim \sqrt{D/N}$ are reliable, yielding a truncated Mahalanobis energy that governs classification performance. Under a power-law spectral model, this energy can be approximated by a truncated Riemann zeta function, linking eigenvalue decay to data efficiency and AUC. Within this framework, multimodal learning acts as spectral stabilization: vision-language models impose low-rank constraints that suppress noise-dominated directions and preserve the eigengap, increasing K(N) under data scarcity. Across MNIST and multi-disease neuroimaging, we show that multimodal training maintains more stable modes and improves class separation, even when unimodal models achieve comparable few-shot accuracy. These results identify spectral collapse as a fundamental bottleneck in low-data learning. We use truncated Mahalanobis energy and K(N) to diagnose encoder quality, and introduce zeta-based spectral filtering as a principled approach to improve data efficiency.

</details>


### [764] [Unlearners Can Lie: Evaluating and Improving Honesty in LLM Unlearning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08765)
*Renjie Gu,Jiazhen Du,Yihua Zhang,Sijia Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出“遗忘诚实性”概念，指LLM在遗忘有害数据后应能诚实承认知识局限。现有方法在遗忘后常产生幻觉或不一致行为。作者定义遗忘诚实性的形式化标准，设计评测指标，发现9种主流方法均不达标，并提出ReVa方法（表示对齐微调）显著提升遗忘集的拒绝率和保留集的诚实性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM遗忘方法虽能移除有害数据，但常出现幻觉、异常token序列或行为不一致等问题。根据LLM诚实性相关文献，这些行为与不诚实相关。因此作者希望将诚实性纳入遗忘研究，提出遗忘诚实性的定义与评估框架。

Method: (1) 形式化定义遗忘诚实性：保留集上保持效用与诚实，遗忘集上有效遗忘并鼓励模型承认局限且一致回应。(2) 设计多维度评测指标：覆盖效用、保留集诚实性、遗忘效果、拒绝率和拒绝稳定性（包含Q&A和MCQ设置）。(3) 提出ReVa（Representation-alignment procedure）：对特征随机化的已遗忘模型进行表示对齐微调，使其更好地承认被遗忘的知识。

Result: 在9种方法、3大主流模型家族上的评估表明，所有现有方法均未达到遗忘诚实性标准。ReVa在遗忘集的Q&A任务中，经过两轮交互后拒绝率最高，几乎是第二优方法的两倍，同时在保留集上诚实性也有所提升。

Conclusion: 遗忘诚实性是评估LLM遗忘质量的关键维度，现有方法普遍存在不诚实行为。ReVa通过表示对齐有效改善了模型的诚实性，为后续遗忘研究提供了新方向。

Abstract: Unlearning in large language models (LLMs) aims to remove harmful training data while preserving overall utility. However, we find that existing methods often hallucinate, generate abnormal token sequences, or behave inconsistently, raising safety and trust concerns. According to prior literature on LLM honesty, such behaviors are often associated with dishonesty. This motivates us to investigate the notion of honesty in the context of model unlearning. We propose a formal definition of unlearning honesty, which includes: (1) preserving both utility and honesty on retained knowledge, and (2) ensuring effective forgetting while encouraging the model to acknowledge its limitations and respond consistently to questions related to forgotten knowledge. To systematically evaluate the honesty of unlearning, we introduce a suite of metrics that cover utility, honesty on the retained set, effectiveness of forgetting, rejection rate and refusal stability in Q&A and MCQ settings. Evaluating 9 methods across 3 mainstream families shows that all current methods fail to meet these standards. After experimental and theoretical analyses, we present ReVa, a representation-alignment procedure that fine-tunes feature-randomized unlearned models to better acknowledge forgotten knowledge. On Q&A tasks from the forget set, ReVa achieves the highest rejection rate after two rounds of interaction, nearly doubling the performance of the second-best method. Remarkably, It also improves honesty on the retained set. We release our data and code at https://github.com/renjiegu.

</details>


### [765] [PRIM: Meta-Learned Bayesian Root Cause Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08786)
*Christopher Lohse,Anish Dhir,Amadou Ba,Bradley Eck,Marco Ruffini,Jonas Wahl*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PRIM是一种因果元学习方法，通过贝叶斯推断和模拟先验实现零样本根因分析，无需明确因果图和学习，在17毫秒内处理100变量系统，性能优于大多数无图方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂系统中根因分析面临三大挑战：误差在多变量间传播、需要结构因果知识、测试时推断计算成本高。现有方法依赖显式因果图或统计检验，缺乏高效零样本能力。
