### [989] [FORGE: Fragment-Oriented Ranking and Generation for Context-Aware Molecular Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10230)
*Qingchuan Zhang,He Cao,Hao Li,Yanjun Shao,Zhiyuan Liu,Shihang Wang,Shufang Xie,Shenghua Gao,Xinwu Ye*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FORGE是一个两阶段分子优化框架，通过上下文感知的局部编辑和自动挖掘的片段替换对，在多个基准上超越了大语言模型和图方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于自然语言的分子优化方法存在数据扩展瓶颈、化学幻觉以及忽略片段效应的上下文依赖等问题。

Method: 两阶段框架：Stage 1在完整分子上下文中对候选片段进行属性贡献排序注入化学先验，Stage 2生成显式片段替换。基于0.6B小型语言模型，通过上下文示例适应黑盒目标。

Result: 在Prompt-MolOpt、PMO-1k和ChemCoTBench上一致优于先前方法，包括更大的语言模型和图方法。

Conclusion: 显式片段级监督相比自然语言训练更易获取、可扩展且无幻觉，是更优的替代方案。

Abstract: Molecular optimization seeks to improve a molecule through small structural edits while preserving similarity to the starting compound. Recent language-model approaches typically treat this task as prompt-conditioned sequence generation. However, relying on natural language introduces an inherent data-scaling bottleneck, often leads to chemical hallucinations, and ignores the strong context dependence of fragment effects. We present FORGE, a two-stage framework that reformulates molecular optimization as context-aware local editing. By utilizing automatically mined, verified low-to-high edit pairs instead of expensive human text annotations, Stage 1 ranks candidate fragments by their property contribution under the full molecular context to inject chemical prior, and Stage 2 generates explicit fragment replacements. Built on a compact 0.6B language model, FORGE further adapts to unseen black-box objectives through in-context demonstrations. Across Prompt-MolOpt, PMO-1k and ChemCoTBench, FORGE consistently outperforms prior methods, including substantially larger language models and graph methods. These results highlight the value of explicit fragment-level supervision as a more easily obtainable, scalable, and hallucination-less alternative to natural language training.

</details>


### [990] [When Does Non-Uniform Replay Matter in Reinforcement Learning?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10236)
*Michal Korniak,Mikołaj Czarnecki,Yarden As,Piotr Miłoś,Pieter Abbeel,Michal Nauman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了非均匀回放采样在离线策略强化学习中的有效性，发现其受回放容量、预期新近度和采样分布熵三个因素影响，并提出了一种简单高效的截断几何回放采样策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代离线策略强化学习算法通常采用均匀回放采样，但非均匀采样的优势条件和原因尚不明确，本文旨在澄清何时及为何非均匀回放是有益的。

Method: 通过实验分析三个关键因素（回放容量、预期新近度、采样分布熵）对非均匀回放效果的影响，并基于发现提出截断几何回放（Truncated Geometric Replay）采样策略。

Result: 非均匀回放在低回放容量时最有效；高熵采样即使在预期新近度相同时也很重要；截断几何回放在低容量场景下提升样本效率，在高容量场景下与均匀采样竞争。

Conclusion: 提供了回放设计在离线策略RL中的实用指导，提出了一种计算开销极低的截断几何回放策略，在多种设置下表现良好。

Abstract: Modern off-policy reinforcement learning algorithms often rely on simple uniform replay sampling and it remains unclear when and why non-uniform replay improves over this strong baseline. Across diverse RL settings, we show that the effectiveness of non-uniform replay is governed by three factors: replay volume, the number of replayed transitions per environment step; expected recency, how recent sampled transitions are; and the entropy of the replay sampling distribution. Our main contribution is clarifying when non-uniform replay is beneficial and providing practical guidance for replay design in modern off-policy RL. Namely, we find that non-uniform replay is most beneficial when replay volume is low, and that high-entropy sampling is important even at comparable expected recency. Motivated by these findings, we adopt a simple Truncated Geometric replay that biases sampling toward recent experience while preserving high entropy and incurring negligible computational overhead. Across large-scale parallel simulation, single-task, and multi-task settings, including three modern algorithms evaluated on five RL benchmark suites, this replay sampling strategy improves sample efficiency in low-volume regimes while remaining competitive when replay volume is high.

</details>


### [991] [The Benefits of Temporal Correlations: SGD Learns k-Juntas from Random Walks Efficiently](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10237)
*Elisabetta Cornacchia,Dan Mikulincer,Elchanan Mossel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了数据中的时间相关性如何使某些稀疏学习问题通过梯度方法高效可学习。以布尔k-junta问题为例，当数据来自超立方体上的惰性随机游走时，使用带时序差分损失的两层ReLU网络和随机梯度下降，样本复杂度可降至与维度d线性相关，而传统方法无法利用这种时间相关性优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统观点认为梯度方法在处理稀疏学习问题（如布尔k-junta）时存在困难（在独立均匀采样下）。作者想探究当数据存在时间相关性时，是否能让这类问题变得高效可学习。

Method: 使用两层ReLU网络，采用stylized-SGD优化器，损失函数为时序差分损失（temporal-difference loss），比较连续样本间目标值与预测值的增量。

Result: 对于每个固定的k，样本复杂度与维度d呈线性关系；而使用标准凸逐点损失的大批量梯度方法无法获得相同优势。

Conclusion: 时间相关性可以被特定架构（ReLU网络）和特定训练方法（时序差分损失+SGD）利用，从而突破稀疏学习问题的传统瓶颈。但并非所有梯度方法都能利用这种相关性。

Abstract: We study how temporal correlations in the data can make certain sparse learning problems efficiently learnable by gradient-based methods. Our focus is on Boolean k-juntas, a canonical sparse learning problem known to pose barriers for gradient-based methods under independent uniform samples. We show that this picture changes when the samples are generated by a lazy random walk on the hypercube. In this setting, the temporal dependencies can be exploited by a two-layer ReLU network trained using stylized-SGD with a temporal-difference loss, which compares target and predicted increments across consecutive samples. For every fixed k, the resulting sample complexity is essentially linear in the ambient dimension d. By contrast, we show that for large-batch gradient methods using standard convex pointwise losses, temporal correlations do not provide the same advantage.

</details>


### [992] [When Normality Shifts: Risk-Aware Test-Time Adaptation for Unsupervised Tabular Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10242)
*Wei Huang,Hezhe Qiao,Kailai Zhang,Zaisheng Ye,Yu-Ming Shang,Xiangling Fu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出RTTAD方法，通过两阶段机制（训练时协同双任务学习 + 测试时风险感知对比学习）解决无监督表格异常检测中训练数据不足和测试时异常污染问题，在15个数据集上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无监督表格异常检测方法中，训练数据规模有限导致正常模式刻画不完整；测试时自适应（TTA）方法只关注测试阶段优化，忽视了与训练阶段学习的协同；且对所有无标签测试数据不加区分地自适应会引入异常污染，削弱模型区分正常与异常样本的能力。

Method: 提出RTTAD方法，包含两个阶段：(1) 训练阶段：协同双任务学习捕获多层级表示，建立稳健的正常先验；(2) 测试阶段：测试时对比学习（TTCL）模块显式考虑自适应风险，仅用高置信度的伪正常样本选择性更新模型，对异常样本施加约束，同时结合k近邻对比目标优化嵌入分布，增强判别能力。

Result: 在15个表格数据集上进行大量实验，RTTAD取得了整体最优的检测性能。

Conclusion: RTTAD通过训练-测试协同的风险感知自适应机制，有效缓解了训练数据不足和测试时异常污染问题，提升了无监督表格异常检测的性能。

Abstract: Unsupervised tabular anomaly detection methods typically learn feature patterns from normal samples during training and subsequently identify samples that deviate from these patterns as anomalies during testing. However, in practical scenarios, the limited scale and diversity of training data often lead to an incomplete characterization of normal patterns. While test-time adaptation offers a remedy, its isolated focus on test-time optimization ignores the critical synergy with training-phase learning. Furthermore, indiscriminate adaptation to unlabeled test data inevitably triggers anomaly contamination, preventing the model from fully realizing its discriminative capability between normal and anomalous samples. To address these issues, we propose RTTAD, a Risk-aware Test-time adaptation method for unsupervised Tabular Anomaly Detection. RTTAD holistically tackles normality shifts via a synergistic two-stage mechanism. During training, collaborative dual-task learning captures multi-level representations to establish a robust normal prior. During testing, a Test-Time Contrastive Learning (TTCL) module explicitly accounts for adaptation risk by selectively updating the model using high-confidence pseudo-normal samples while constraining anomalous ones. Additionally, TTCL incorporates a k-nearest neighbor-based contrastive objective to refine embedding distributions, thereby further enhancing the model's discriminative capacity. Extensive experiments on 15 tabular datasets demonstrate that RTTAD achieves state-of-the-art overall detection performance.

</details>


### [993] [Teaching LLMs to See Graphs: Unifying Text and Structural Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10247)
*Dario Vajda*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GTLM架构，通过向预训练LLM注入图感知注意力偏置（仅增加0.015%参数），使其原生处理图拓扑而无需GNN编码器压缩文本属性。1B参数GTLM在标准TAG基准上匹配或超越7B SOTA模型，且注意力头隐式学习模拟消息传递。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖多步流水线，使用GNN编码器将丰富文本属性压缩为单一token，造成严重的语义瓶颈。

Method: 提出GTLM，将图感知双向注意力前缀直接注入LLM注意力模块，理论证明保持节点置换等变性与预训练模型后向兼容性。

Result: 1B参数GTLM匹配/超越7B SOTA模型；在GraphQA上显著超越基线；注意力头隐式学习模拟消息传递。

Conclusion: 该范式使LLM具备真正的算法推理能力，为下一代GraphRAG和关系深度学习提供可扩展基础。

Abstract: Using Large Language Models (LLMs) to process graph-structured data is an active research area, yet current state-of-the-art approaches typically rely on multi-step pipelines with Graph Neural Network (GNN) encoders that compress rich textual attributes into solitary tokens, creating a significant semantic bottleneck. In this paper, we introduce the Graph Transformer Language Model (GTLM), a novel architecture that enables pretrained LLMs to natively process graph topologies while entirely eliminating this compressive bottleneck. GTLM is exceptionally parameter-efficient: by injecting graph-aware attention biases directly into the LLM's attention modules, it introduces only 0.015% additional parameters relative to the base model. We theoretically prove that our bidirectional attention prefix preserves node permutation equivariance while maintaining exact backward compatibility with the pretrained base model. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that a 1B-parameter GTLM matches or exceeds the performance of 7B-parameter state-of-the-art models on standard Text-Attributed Graph benchmarks, while significantly surpassing baselines on GraphQA. Finally, we demonstrate that GTLM attention heads implicitly learn to simulate message passing, explaining its superior performance on algorithmic tasks. This paradigm shift enables true algorithmic reasoning within LLMs and provides a scalable foundation for next-generation GraphRAG and relational deep learning.

</details>


### [994] [DP-LAC: Lightweight Adaptive Clipping for Differentially Private Federated Fine-tuning of Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10272)
*Haaris Mehmood,Jie Xu,Karthikeyan Saravanan,Rogier Van Dalen,Mete Ozay*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DP-LAC方法，通过私有直方图估计初始裁剪阈值并在训练中自适应调整，无需消耗额外隐私预算或调整超参数，在联邦学习差分隐私场景下平均准确率提升6.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习中DP-SGD需要裁剪阈值C，现有自适应裁剪方法超参数调优繁琐且消耗隐私预算，因此需要一种自动、高效且不消耗额外隐私预算的阈值自适应方法。

Method: 先通过私有直方图估计在数量级范围内确定初始裁剪阈值，随后在训练过程中自适应调整该阈值，整个过程不消耗额外隐私预算且无需引入新超参数。

Result: 在联邦学习场景下，DP-LAC在平均准确率上比现有自适应裁剪方法和标准DP-SGD提升6.6%。

Conclusion: DP-LAC在保护隐私的同时，有效解决了自适应裁剪中的超参数调优难题，显著提升模型准确率。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables the collaborative training of large-scale language models (LLMs) across edge devices while keeping user data on-device. However, FL still exposes sensitive information through client-provided gradients. Differentially private stochastic gradient descent (DP-SGD) mitigates this risk by clipping each client's contribution to a threshold $C$ and adding noise proportional to $C$. Existing adaptive clipping techniques dynamically adjust $C$ but demand tedious hyperparameter tuning, which can erode the privacy budget. In this paper, we introduce DP-LAC, a method that first estimates an initial clipping threshold within an order of magnitude of the optimum using private histogram estimation, and then adapts this threshold during training without consuming additional privacy budget or introducing new hyperparameters. Empirical results show that DP-LAC outperforms both state-of-the-art adaptive clipping methods and vanilla DP-SGD, achieving an average accuracy gain of $6.6\%$.

</details>


### [995] [Generalization Error Bounds for Picard-Type Operator Learning in Nonlinear Parabolic PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10277)
*Koichi Taniguchi,Sho Sonoda*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究基于Duhamel-Picard迭代的非线性抛物型PDE算子学习，提出了抽象状态转移模型框架，推导了与实现无关的泛化误差界，证明了增加Picard深度可减少截断误差而不导致熵基估计误差的无界增长，并扩展至长时间预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PDE算子学习需要模型具有离散化不变性并能反映PDE特有结构，然而如何将这种结构编码到模型架构、假设类或学习过程中仍是一个开放问题。本文旨在探索基于Duhamel-Picard迭代的算子学习框架来回答这一问题。

Method: 将Picard迭代形式化为抽象状态转移模型；推导与实现无关的泛化误差界，将实现误差与估计误差分离；通过滚动相同局部模型扩展至长时间预测；以非线性热方程为例，使用Picard型傅里叶神经算子作为具体实现。

Result: 增加Picard深度可降低截断误差，同时不会导致熵基估计误差的无界增长；所提框架在理论上保证了离散化不变性，并适用于长时间预测场景。

Conclusion: 基于Duhamel-Picard迭代的算子学习方法能有效编码PDE结构，在理论上具有良好泛化保证，为非线性抛物型PDE的算子学习提供了可解释且鲁棒的框架。

Abstract: Operator learning for partial differential equations (PDEs) aims to learn solution operators on infinite-dimensional function spaces from finite-resolution data. In this setting, it is important for the learned model to be discretization-invariant, or resolution-robust, and to reflect PDE-specific structure. It is therefore natural to ask how such structure should be encoded in the model architecture, hypothesis class, or learning procedure. In this paper, we study operator learning for solution operators of nonlinear parabolic PDEs based on Duhamel--Picard iteration. We formulate Picard iteration as an abstract state-transition model and present a theoretical framework for Picard-type operator learning. We derive implementation-agnostic generalization error bounds that separate the implementation error from the estimation error associated with the abstract state-transition model induced by Picard iteration. A key consequence is that increasing the Picard depth reduces the Picard truncation error without causing an unbounded growth of the entropy-based estimation error. We also extend the analysis to long-time prediction by rolling out the same learned local model over successive time blocks. Finally, we illustrate the theory for nonlinear heat equations on the torus using a Picard-type Fourier neural operator as a concrete implementation.

</details>


### [996] [Predictive Radiomics for Evaluation of Cancer Immune SignaturE in Glioblastoma: the PRECISE-GBM study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10278)
*Prajwal Ghimire,Junjie Li,Liu Yaou,Marc Modat,Thomas Booth*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究利用放射基因组学分析，开发并验证了能够预测IDH野生型胶质母细胞瘤微环境中巨噬细胞M0亚型免疫特征的MRI放射学生物标志物，在三个独立验证集上取得了稳定的性能表现（平衡准确率0.67，精确率0.89）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 放射基因组学可以识别与基因组表型相关的放射学标志物，在胶质母细胞瘤中，这些标志物有望补充现有的患者分层策略，从而为免疫治疗提供更精准的候选者筛选依据。

Method: 回顾性多中心研究，使用TCGA-GBM、CPTAC、IvyGAP、REMBRANDT和CGGA数据集的公开影像与基因组数据。从深度学习自动分割肿瘤的坏死核心、增强区和水肿区域提取MRI放射组学特征，通过嵌套交叉验证LASSO进行特征选择，使用支持向量机和集成模型对17种免疫及细胞特异性评分标签进行训练，并在三个独立数据集上验证模型稳定性与泛化能力。

Result: 纳入176名患者。放射组学特征包括形状、一阶和高阶特征。预测巨噬细胞M0亚型免疫特征的模型在三个独立验证集上表现出稳定性能，集成模型优于SVM，平衡准确率0.67，精确率0.89。

Conclusion: 放射基因组学模型能够非侵入性地预测IDH野生型胶质母细胞瘤中的巨噬细胞M0免疫特征，这些生物标志物有潜力在未来的前瞻性临床试验中对患者进行免疫治疗分层。

Abstract: Background: Radiogenomics allows identification of radiological biomarkers for genomic phenotypes. In glioblastoma, these biomarkers could potentially complement patient stratification strategies. We aim to develop and analytically validate radiological biomarkers that capture immune cell signatures within IDH-wildtype glioblastoma microenvironment using radiogenomic analysis.
  Methods: This was a retrospective multicenter study using curated open-access anonymized imaging and genomic data from TCGA-GBM, CPTAC, IvyGAP, REMBRANDT and CGGA datasets. Imaging data consisted of MRI-based radiomic features extracted from necrotic core, enhancing and edema regions of deep learning-based auto-segmented tumors. Radiomic feature selections were performed using nested cross-validated LASSO. Support vector machine and ensemble models were trained using seventeen immune and cell-specific score labels extracted from deconvoluted transcriptomic data using pan-cancer and glioblastoma immune signature matrices as reference standards. Seventeen classifier models trained in three cross-cohort strategies were validated on three held-out datasets assessing stability and generalizability.
  Results: One-hundred-and-seventy-six patients were included in the study. The immune-related radiomic signatures obtained after feature selection were shape, first order and higher order radiomic features. Models predicting macrophage subtype immune signature showed stable mean performance on balanced accuracy (0.67) and precision (0.89) metrics for three independent holdout datasets with ensemble model outperforming support vector machine model.
  Conclusion: Radiogenomic models non-invasively predicted the macrophage subtype M0 immune signature in IDH-wildtype glioblastoma. These biomarkers have the potential to stratify patients for immunotherapy within prospective glioblastoma clinical trials.

</details>


### [997] [DeepLog: A Software Framework for Modular Neurosymbolic AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10279)
*Robin Manhaeve,Stefano Colamonaco,Vincent Derkinderen,Rik Adriaensen,Lucas Van Praet,Luc De Raedt,Giuseppe Marra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DeepLog是一个通用的神经符号框架，可将多种逻辑语言自动编译为优化算术电路，统一集成到PyTorch工作流中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经符号系统各自采用特定范式和语义，缺乏统一的后端，导致机器学习从业者使用门槛高，开发者也难以快速原型化新的集成策略。

Method: 将多种神经符号语言视为高层规范，自动编译为优化的算术电路，作为可组合模块嵌入PyTorch工作流，实现逻辑与深度学习的统一后端。

Result: 能够模拟多种现有神经符号系统，提供高性能共享基础，降低机器学习从业者的使用门槛。

Conclusion: DeepLog为神经符号系统提供了一个通用、高效且易用的框架，有助于推动该领域的发展和应用。

Abstract: DeepLog is an operational neurosymbolic framework that unifies logic and deep learning within standard PyTorch workflows. While existing neurosymbolic systems focus on a particular paradigm and semantics, DeepLog serves as a universal backend that can emulate many systems in the neurosymbolic alphabet soup. By treating diverse neurosymbolic languages as high-level specifications, the DeepLog software automatically compiles them into optimized arithmetic circuits. This design lowers the barrier for machine learning practitioners by treating logic as composable modules, while providing neurosymbolic developers with a shared, high-performance basis for prototyping new integration strategies. The code is available here: https://github.com/ML-KULeuven/deeplog

</details>


### [998] [BROS: Bias-Corrected Randomized Subspaces for Memory-Efficient Single-Loop Bilevel Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10288)
*Hengrui Zhang,Boao Kong,Engao Zhang,Kun Yuan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BROS是一种内存高效的单循环随机双层优化方法，通过Rademacher双探针校正实现无偏Hessian作用估计，在保持与精确方法相同收敛率（O(ε⁻²)）的同时，最多减少44.9%的峰值内存开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有精确单循环SBO方法对大型下层神经网络内存压力大，而内存高效的替代方法缺乏标准假设下的竞争性收敛保证，亟需一种兼顾内存效率和收敛性能的方法。

Method: 提出BROS方法：在随机子空间中进行下层和辅助更新，并引入Rademacher双探针校正来恢复无偏的Hessian作用估计，从而实现内存高效的单循环优化。

Result: 在标准假设下，BROS保持了与MA-SOBA相同的O(ε⁻²)样本复杂度；在超数据清洗、数据混合学习、超表示学习和ViT样本重加权实验中，峰值内存最多降低44.9%，性能接近全空间基线。

Conclusion: BROS成功解决了精确单循环SBO方法内存压力大和内存高效方法收敛性差的两难问题，为大规模深度学习中的双层优化提供了实用且理论上有保障的解决方案。

Abstract: Stochastic bilevel optimization (SBO) has become a standard framework for hyperparameter learning, data reweighting, representation learning, and data-mixture optimization in deep learning. Existing exact single-loop SBO methods and memory-efficient surrogate SBO methods either create severe memory pressure for large lower-level neural networks or lack competitive convergence guarantees under standard assumptions. In this paper, we propose BROS, a memory-efficient single-loop SBO method with the same convergence rate order as exact single-loop SBO methods. BROS performs lower and auxiliary updates in randomized subspaces with a Rademacher bi-probe correction that recovers an unbiased Hessian-action estimator. We prove that BROS preserves the $\mathcal O(\varepsilon^{-2})$ sample complexity of MA-SOBA for finding an $\varepsilon$-stationary point under only standard assumptions. Experiments on hyper-data cleaning, data-mixture learning, hyper-representation learning, and ViT sample reweighting show that BROS reduces peak memory by up to 44.9% while closely matching full-space baseline performance.

</details>


### [999] [Sample-Mean Anchored Thompson Sampling for Offline-to-Online Learning with Distribution Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10289)
*Bochao Li,Yao Fu,Wei Chen,Fang Kong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于中位数锚定的样本均值锚定汤普森采样算法（Anchor-TS），通过中位数锚定规则修正分布偏移导致的偏差，安全利用离线数据加速在线学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线到在线学习的方法多依赖UCB类算法，而汤普森采样（TS）虽天然适合该场景，但其后验样本不保证对真实臂均值的乐观性，导致纯在线与混合数据的索引难以比较和使用。

Method: 提出Anchor-TS算法，引入基于中位数的锚定规则，将臂索引定义为在线后验样本、混合后验样本和在线样本均值这三者的中位数，通过中位数锚定系统性地修正分布偏移导致的偏差。

Result: 理论证明了算法能安全利用离线数据加速在线学习，量化了分布偏移程度和离线数据大小对遗憾减少的影响；大量实验表明算法持续优于基线方法。

Conclusion: Anchor-TS通过巧妙的中位数锚定机制，有效解决了TS在离线到在线学习中的乐观性缺失问题，为利用带偏移的离线数据提供了一种安全高效的贝叶斯方案。

Abstract: Offline-to-online learning aims to improve online decision-making by leveraging offline logged data. A central challenge in this setting is the distribution shift between offline and online environments. While some existing works attempt to leverage shifted offline data, they largely rely on UCB-type algorithms. Thompson sampling (TS) represents another canonical class of bandit algorithms, well known for its strong empirical performance and naturally suited to offline-to-online learning through its Bayesian formulation. However, unlike UCB indices, posterior samples in TS are not guaranteed to be optimistic with respect to the true arm means. This makes indices constructed from purely online and hybrid data difficult to compare and complicates their use. To address this issue, we propose sample-mean anchored TS (Anchor-TS), which introduces a novel median-based anchoring rule that defines the arm index as the median of an online posterior sample, a hybrid posterior sample, and the online sample mean. The median anchoring systematically corrects bias induced by distribution shift by mitigating over-estimation for suboptimal arms and under-estimation for optimal arms, while exploiting offline information to obtain more accurate estimates when the shift is small. We establish theoretical guarantees showing that the proposed algorithm safely leverages offline data to accelerate online learning, and quantifying how the degree of distribution shift and the size of offline data affect the resulting regret reduction. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements of our algorithm over baselines.

</details>


### [1000] [LeapTS: Rethinking Time Series Forecasting as Adaptive Multi-Horizon Scheduling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10292)
*Sheng Pan,Ming Jin,Bo Du,Shirui Pan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LeapTS是一种将时间序列预测重新构思为动态调度过程的新型框架，通过分层控制器和神经受控微分方程实现多级决策，在提升预测性能的同时显著加速推理速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列预测模型将任务视为从历史到目标区间的固定映射，导致未来时间点之间存在时间解耦，且模型无法随预测进行而适应不断变化的上下文。

Method: 提出LeapTS框架：(1) 分层控制器动态选择每步的最优预测尺度和推进长度；(2) 受控神经微分方程驱动的连续时间状态演化，其中受控更新机制显式耦合了不规则时间动态与离散调度反馈。

Result: 在真实和合成数据集上，LeapTS预测性能提升至少7.4%，推理速度相比代表性Transformer模型提升2.6倍至5.3倍。

Conclusion: 通过显式追踪调度轨迹，展示了模型如何自主适应其预测行为以捕捉非平稳动态，验证了动态调度范式的有效性。

Abstract: Time series forecasting serves as an essential tool for many real-world applications, supporting tasks such as resource optimization and decision-making. Despite significant architectural advancements, most modern models still treat forecasting task as a fixed mapping from history to target horizons. This induces temporal decoupling across future time points and limits the model's ability to adapt to the evolving context as forecasting progresses. In this work, we present LeapTS, a novel framework that reformulates time series forecasting as a dynamic scheduling process over the prediction horizon. Specifically, LeapTS organizes the forecasting process into multi-level decisions using: (1) the hierarchical controller to dynamically select the optimal prediction scale and advancement length at each step, and (2) continuous-time state evolution driven by neural controlled differential equations. Within this process, the controlled update mechanism explicitly couples the irregular temporal dynamics with discrete scheduling feedback. Extensive evaluations on both real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate that LeapTS improves overall forecasting performance by at least 7.4% while achieving a 2.6$\times$ to 5.3$\times$ inference speedup over representative Transformer-based models. Furthermore, by explicitly tracing the scheduling trajectories, we reveal how the model autonomously adapts its forecasting behavior to capture non-stationary dynamics.

</details>


### [1001] [Robust Probabilistic Shielding for Safe Offline Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10293)
*Maris F. L. Galesloot,Thomas Rhemrev,Nils Jansen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将安全策略改进（SPI）与屏蔽技术（Shielding）相结合，用于离线强化学习，在仅依赖固定数据集和已知安全/不安全状态知识的情况下，通过屏蔽策略改进步骤来保证学习策略的安全性和性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线强化学习面临两大挑战：性能保证和安全保证。现有方法中，SPI提供性能保证（新策略优于基线策略），屏蔽技术提供安全保障（限制动作空间），但两者尚未在离线设置下整合。本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 将屏蔽技术扩展到离线强化学习场景，在策略改进步骤中引入屏蔽机制，仅依赖可用数据集和安全/不安全状态知识，以高概率保证策略的安全性。

Result: 实验表明，带屏蔽的SPI在平均性能和最差情况性能上均优于未屏蔽的SPI，尤其在低数据量场景下优势更为明显。

Conclusion: 将屏蔽技术与安全策略改进成功整合，为离线RL提供了一种兼具性能和安全保证的方法，有效提升了低数据环境下的鲁棒性。

Abstract: In offline reinforcement learning (RL), we learn policies from fixed datasets without environment interaction. The major challenges are to provide guarantees on the (1) performance and (2) safety of the resulting policy. A technique called safe policy improvement (SPI) provides a performance guarantee: with high probability, the new policy outperforms a given baseline policy, which is assumed to be safe. Orthogonally, in the context of safe RL, a shield provides a safety guarantee by restricting the action space to those actions that are provably safe with respect to a given safety-relevant model. We integrate these paradigms by extending shielding to offline RL, relying solely on the available dataset and knowledge of safe and unsafe states. Then, we shield the policy improvement steps, guaranteeing, with high probability, a safe policy. Experimental results demonstrate that shielded SPI outperforms its unshielded counterpart, improving both average and worst-case performance, particularly in low-data regimes.

</details>


### [1002] [Set Prediction for Next-Day Active Fire Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10298)
*Yuchen Bai,Georgios Athanasiou,Xin Yu,Diogenis Antonopoulos,Ioannis Papoutsis,Stijn Hantson,Nuno Carvalhais*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出WISP模型，将次日活跃火点预测重新定义为点集预测问题，在375米分辨率下以端到端方式预测火点簇中心，在全局测试集上达到38.2%的平均精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 wildfire 预测方法通常在公里级网格上预测火灾风险或概率，无法直接表征局部火灾事件，缺乏高分辨率、直接预测火点位置的方案。

Method: 提出WISP（Wildfire Ignition Set Predictor），一种基于查询的模型，从48小时的多源协变量（气象、植被、土地、火史）中预测固定大小的排序火点簇中心集合；采用匈牙利匹配进行端到端训练，并提出非对称分类-定位加权策略解决分类分数在分配、排序和查询激活中的冲突。

Result: 在全局测试集上，最佳WISP变体实现38.2%平均精度（AP），覆盖53.4%的火点簇FRP质量，54.1%的观测簇定位在5公里内。

Conclusion: 稀疏点集预测可作为高分辨率 wildfire 预测的有效范式，本文同时为该任务提供了全局分布式基准。

Abstract: Accurate next-day active fire forecasts can support early warning, disaster response, forest risk assessment, and downstream estimation of fire-related carbon emissions. Existing machine learning approaches to wildfire forecasting typically predict wildfire danger or fire probability on kilometre-scale daily grids, which is useful for regional warning but does not directly represent localized fire events. We propose Wildfire Ignition Set Predictor (WISP), a query-based model that reformulates next-day active fire forecasting as point-set prediction. From 48 hours of covariates including meteorology, satellite vegetation products, static land, and fire history, WISP predicts a fixed-size ranked set of future active fire cluster centres on a 375 m grid across globally distributed regions. The model is trained end-to-end with Hungarian matching; to address the conflicting roles of the classification score in assignment, ranking, and query activation, we use asymmetric classification-localization weighting in matching and loss. We further construct a globally distributed, hourly, multi-source benchmark for this task. On a held-out test set spanning fire regions worldwide, the best WISP variant achieves 38.2% average precision (AP) for ranked fire-centre detections, covers 53.4% of fire cluster mass weighted by fire radiative power (FRP), and localizes 54.1% of observed clusters within 5 km. These results establish sparse set prediction as a viable formulation for high-resolution wildfire forecasting and provide a benchmark for future work in this regime.

</details>


### [1003] [Nearly-Optimal Algorithm for Adversarial Kernelized Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10299)
*Shogo Iwazaki*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了对抗性环境下的核化老虎机（高斯过程老虎机）问题，证明了指数权重算法能够达到$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$的对抗性遗憾，并通过下界证明了该算法在SE和Matérn核下的最优性，同时提出了基于Nyström近似的计算高效变体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有核化老虎机工作大多假设随机环境，但实际应用中奖励函数可能被对抗性地选择，因此需要研究对抗性环境下的算法设计与理论保证。

Method: 采用指数权重算法（exponential-weight algorithm），并利用Nyström近似提出计算高效的变体版本。

Result: 指数权重算法实现了$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$的对抗性遗憾；对SE和Matérn核给出了算法无关的下界，证明了算法的最优性（至多对数因子差距）。

Conclusion: 指数权重算法在对抗性核化老虎机问题中达到了近乎最优的遗憾界，且通过Nyström近似可以在保持最优性的同时提升计算效率。

Abstract: This paper studies kernelized bandits (also known as Gaussian process bandits) in an adversarial environment, where the reward functions in a known reproducing kernel Hilbert space (RKHS) may be adversarially chosen at each round. We show that the exponential-weight algorithm achieves $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$ adversarial regret, where $T$ and $γ_T$ denote the number of total rounds and the maximum information gain, respectively. For squared exponential (SE) and $ν$-Matérn kernels, we also show algorithm-independent lower bounds that guarantee the optimality of our algorithm up to polylogarithmic factors. Furthermore, we present a computationally efficient variant of our algorithm using Nyström approximation while maintaining nearly optimal regret guarantees.

</details>


### [1004] [Follow the Mean: Reference-Guided Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10302)
*Pedro M. P. Curvo,Maksim Zhdanov,Floor Eijkelboom,Jan-Willem van de Meent*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于流匹配的可控生成新范式：通过调整参考集的端点均值来引导预训练模型，无需微调、辅助网络或测试时搜索。作者提出了两种实例化方法：免训练的Reference-Mean Guidance和半参数的Semi-Parametric Guidance，分别实现对FLUX.2和DiT-B/4模型的有效控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的可控生成方法通常依赖微调、辅助网络或测试时搜索，这些方法计算成本高且复杂。作者希望探索一种更简洁的控制方式——通过数据（参考集）而非参数更新来引导生成。

Method: 基于确定性插值中速度场仅由条件端点均值决定的数学性质，提出了两种方法：1) Reference-Mean Guidance：从参考集中计算闭合形式的端点均值修正，直接应用于冻结的FLUX.2模型；2) Semi-Parametric Guidance：通过显式的均值锚点和学习的残差精炼器来近似同一思想，允许推理时切换参考集。

Result: Reference-Mean Guidance在保持提示词、种子和权重不变的情况下，实现了对颜色、身份、风格和结构的控制；Semi-Parametric Guidance在AFHQv2上达到了与无条件DiT-B/4相当的质量，同时支持推理时切换参考集。

Conclusion: 这项工作展示了一种新的可控生成方向：生成模型可以通过数据（而非参数更新）来适应和引导，为未来的自适应生成模型提供了新的思路。

Abstract: Existing approaches to controllable generation typically rely on fine-tuning, auxiliary networks, or test-time search. We show that flow matching admits a different control interface: adaptation through examples. For deterministic interpolants, the velocity field is solely governed by a conditional endpoint mean; shifting this mean shifts the flow itself. This yields a simple principle for controllable generation: steer a pretrained model by changing the reference set it follows. We instantiate this idea in two forms. Reference-Mean Guidance is training-free: it computes a closed-form endpoint-mean correction from a reference bank and applies it to a frozen FLUX.2-klein (4B) model, enabling control of color, identity, style, and structure while keeping the prompt, seed, and weights fixed. Semi-Parametric Guidance amortizes the same idea through an explicit mean anchor and learned residual refiner, matching unconditional DiT-B/4 quality on AFHQv2 while allowing the reference set to be swapped at inference time. These results point to a broader direction: generative models that adapt through data, not parameter updates.

</details>


### [1005] [Signature Approach for Contextual Bandits with Nonlinear and Path-dependent Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10313)
*Xin Guo,Grace He,Xinyu Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于签名变换的上下文赌博机方法 DisSigUCB，通过将非线性路径依赖奖励近似为签名空间中的线性泛函，证明了亚线性遗憾界，并在多个实际任务中超越传统基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的上下文赌博机方法难以有效处理奖励函数为非线性且依赖历史路径的情况，亟需一种既能捕捉序列依赖性又保持计算效率的框架。

Method: 利用签名的通用非线性性质，将路径依赖的奖励泛函近似为签名空间中的线性泛函，从而将问题转化为线性上下文赌博机，并设计了基于不相交上置信界的 DisSigUCB 算法。

Result: 在理论上证明了 \(\tilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{(d+m)KT})\) 的高概率亚线性遗憾界；在温度传感器监测、睡眠阶段分类和医院护士排班等实验中，DisSigUCB 一致优于线性 UCB 和核化 UCB 等基线方法。

Conclusion: 签名变换为处理非线性路径依赖奖励提供了有效且高效的理论框架，DisSigUCB 在理论和实证上均表现出色，具有良好的推广潜力。

Abstract: We study contextual bandits with nonlinear and path-dependent rewards through a novel signature-transform-based approach. Leveraging the universal nonlinearity property of signatures, we approximate continuous path-dependent reward functionals by linear functionals in the signature space. This representation enables the use of efficient linear contextual bandit methods while preserving expressive sequential structure. Building on this framework, we propose \texttt{DisSigUCB}, a signature-based disjoint upper confidence bound (UCB) algorithm. Under boundedness and non-degeneracy assumptions, we prove a high-probability data-dependent sublinear regret bound of order \(\tilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{(d+m)KT})\) where \(d\) is the context dimension and \(m\) is the signature feature dimension. Synthetic experiments and numerical applications on temperature sensor monitoring, sleep-stage classification, and hospital nurse staffing demonstrate that \texttt{DisSigUCB} consistently outperforms classical linear and kernelized contextual bandit baselines in nonlinear and path-dependent settings.

</details>


### [1006] [Active Tabular Augmentation via Policy-Guided Diffusion Inpainting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10315)
*Zheyu Zhang,Shuo Yang,Bardh Prenkaj,Gjergji Kasneci*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TAP框架，通过扩散修复结合轻量级策略，解决表格数据增强中生成质量与下游效用的差距问题，在数据稀缺场景下显著提升分类和回归性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式表格增强方法过分关注分布真实性，但高真实性的生成样本并不总能提升下游模型性能，存在 fidelity-utility gap（保真度-效用差距）。

Method: 提出TAP框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 扩散修复（diffusion inpainting）用于生成样本；(2) 轻量级的学习器条件策略，通过显式门控和保守窗口承诺机制，动态决定生成什么样本以及何时注入训练过程。

Result: 在7个真实数据集上，TAP在数据极度稀缺条件下显著优于强生成基线，分类准确率最高提升15.6个百分点，回归RMSE最高降低32%。

Conclusion: 证实了保真度-效用差距的存在，并验证了有条件、动态的生成策略比一味追求分布真实性的生成方式更能有效提升下游模型性能。

Abstract: Generative tabular augmentation is appealing in data-scarce domains, yet the prevailing focus on distributional fidelity does not reliably translate into better downstream models. We formalize a fidelity-utility gap: common generative objectives prioritize distributional plausibility, whereas augmentation succeeds only when injected samples reduce the current learner's held-out evaluation loss. This gap motivates learning not just how to generate, but what to generate and when to inject as training evolves. We propose TAP (Tabular Augmentation Policy), which couples diffusion inpainting with a lightweight, learner-conditioned policy to steer generation toward high-utility regions and controls safe injection via explicit gating and conservative windowed commitment. Under severe data scarcity, TAP consistently outperforms strong generative baselines on seven real-world datasets, improving classification accuracy by up to 15.6 percentage points and reducing regression RMSE by up to 32%.

</details>


### [1007] [Relations Are Channels: Knowledge Graph Embedding via Kraus Decompositions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10317)
*Sayan Kumar Chaki*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Kraus信道结构的KGE框架，通过线性性、迹保持和完全正定性三条公理刻画关系算子，将大多数现有模型统一为Kraus秩κ=1的特例，并提出了无需范数约束、支持N-to-N关系和多跳推理的KrausKGE模型，首次提供了理论上有保证的每关系复杂度度量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有KGE模型缺乏对关系算子的公理化基础，不同模型的设计选择缺乏统一的理论解释，特别是在处理复杂关系模式（如1-to-N、N-to-N）和提供关系复杂度度量方面存在不足。

Method: 通过Kraus表示定理建立关系算子的三类公理（线性性、迹保持、完全正定性）与Kraus信道结构的等价关系；进一步推广到w-Kraus信道以兼容任意度量几何；提出KrausKGE模型，利用Kraus算子自然处理1-to-N和N-to-N关系，支持k跳推理，无需显式路径编码器或范数约束。

Result: KrausKGE在N-to-N关系上持续优于强基线模型，性能提升与关系扇出（fan-out）单调正相关，与理论预测一致。同时提供了第一个理论上有下界保障的每关系复杂度度量，以经验关系矩阵秩为下界。

Conclusion: Kraus信道结构为KGE关系算子提供了统一的公理化基础，KrausKGE在复杂关系建模和理论可解释性方面具有显著优势。

Abstract: Knowledge graph embedding (KGE) models typically represent each relation as an operator on entity embeddings. In this work, we identify three structural axioms that any principled relation operator must satisfy, linearity, trace preservation, and complete positivity, and show that they characterize a Kraus channel structure via the Kraus representation theorem. The completeness constraint defining this family is equivalent to these axioms, providing a principled foundation rather than an externally imposed condition. Under this formulation, most existing operator-based KGE models are recoverable as special cases with Kraus rank $κ= 1$ under specific embedding choices. We further generalize this characterization to arbitrary metric geometries by introducing \mbox{w-Kraus} channels, which satisfy completeness by construction within their respective spaces. Building on this theory, we propose \textsc{KrausKGE}, a principled KGE model that naturally handles $1$-to-$N$ and $N$-to-$N$ relations, supports $k$-hop reasoning without requiring explicit path encoders, and eliminates the need for norm constraints on entity embeddings. Additionally, our framework yields the first theoretically grounded per-relation complexity measure in the KGE literature, with a provable lower bound in terms of the empirical relation matrix rank. Empirical evaluation demonstrates that \textsc{KrausKGE} consistently outperforms strong baselines on $N$-to-$N$ relations, with performance gains that increase monotonically with relation fan-out, in alignment with theoretical predictions.

</details>


### [1008] [Foundations of Reliable Inference: Reliability-Efficiency Co-Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10351)
*Jiayi Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文探讨了AI模型在可靠推理中需要提供可信的不确定性估计，并提出了一个统一框架，旨在平衡可靠性与计算效率，以高效实现可靠推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统AI模型仅关注准确预测，忽视了不确定性估计的重要性；而贝叶斯学习虽能提升可靠性，但面临计算开销大的问题。因此，需要同时优化可靠性与效率。

Method: 从两个视角构建统一框架，旨在降低计算开销的同时保持可信的不确定性量化，实现高效可靠的推理。

Result: 提出了一个兼顾可靠性与效率的统一框架，减少了计算负担，同时保持了不确定性量化的可信度。

Conclusion: 本文的核心贡献在于证明了可靠且高效的推理是可行的，为AI模型在资源受限场景下的不确定性估计提供了新思路。

Abstract: Reliable inference requires that artificial intelligence (AI) models provide trustworthy uncertainty estimates, not merely accurate predictions. Recent advances in Bayesian learning have made significant progress toward this goal, and growing concerns about computational overhead have jointly shifted the design criterion from reliability alone to the co-design of reliability and efficiency, i.e., reducing computational overhead while preserving trustworthy uncertainty quantification. This thesis develops a unified framework from two perspectives to address the central question: can we efficiently perform reliable inference?

</details>


### [1009] [DeepLévy: Learning Heavy-Tailed Uncertainty in Highly Volatile Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10364)
*Yang Yang,Du Yin,Hao Xue,Flora Salim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DeepLévy，一种通过最小化经验与参数特征函数差异来学习Lévy稳定分布混合的神经框架，用于重尾时间序列的深度概率预测，在极端波动场景下优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 重尾时间序列中的极端事件难以被现有深度概率预测模型捕获，而Lévy稳定分布虽适合建模非高斯行为，但其概率密度函数难以处理，限制了传统似然推断方法的应用。

Method: 构建神经网络框架DeepLévy，通过最小化经验特征函数与参数特征函数之间的差异来学习多个Lévy稳定分布的混合模型，并引入自适应混合机制以学习上下文相关的权重和参数，实现多时间跨度的灵活不确定性建模。

Result: 在真实与合成数据集上，DeepLévy在尾部风险指标上显著优于现有最先进的深度概率预测方法，尤其在极端波动情境下表现突出。

Conclusion: DeepLévy通过特征函数匹配策略有效克服了Lévy稳定分布推断困难，为极端事件不确定性建模提供了可行的深度学习方案。

Abstract: Modeling uncertainty in heavy-tailed time series remains a critical challenge for deep probabilistic forecasting models, which often struggle to capture abrupt, extreme events. While Lévy stable distributions offer a natural framework for modeling such non-Gaussian behaviors, the intractability of their probability density functions severely limits conventional likelihood-based inference. To address this, we introduce DeepLévy, a neural framework that learns mixtures of Lévy stable distributions by minimizing the discrepancy between empirical and parametric characteristic functions. DeepLévy incorporates a mixture mechanism that adaptively learns context-dependent weights and parameters over multiple Lévy components, enabling flexible multi-horizon uncertainty modeling. Evaluations on both real and synthetic datasets demonstrate that DeepLévy outperforms state-of-the-art deep probabilistic forecasting approaches in tail risk metrics, especially under extreme volatility.

</details>


### [1010] [PC3D: Zero-Shot Cooperation Across Variable Rosters via Personalized Context Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10377)
*Ahmet Onur Akman,Rafał Kucharski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对多智能体强化学习中团队规模动态变化的问题，提出PC3D方法，通过集中式教师蒸馏个性化协调上下文到分散策略，使智能体能从局部历史中恢复团队上下文并自适应决策，在多个基准上取得更优效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有合作多智能体强化学习通常假设固定执行团队，但实际去中心化系统常需应对部署时活跃智能体数量变化的情况，即"剧集阵容变化"问题，需要每个智能体从局部历史中恢复团队上下文并自适应行为。

Method: 提出PC3D（个性化集中协调上下文蒸馏）方法：训练时，集结构集中式教师将当前团队压缩为协调令牌，并个性化为每个智能体专属上下文，再蒸馏到分散策略中；执行时，每个智能体从局部历史预测自身上下文，自适应地影响决策。

Result: 在三个合作MARL基准测试中，PC3D在已知和未见过的团队规模下均取得比基线更高的回报。消融实验证实收益来自上下文蒸馏和自适应上下文使用两方面。

Conclusion: PC3D有效解决了团队规模动态变化下的分散式多智能体协作问题，通过蒸馏个性化协调上下文使智能体能从局部交互历史中恢复团队信息并自适应决策。

Abstract: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning often assumes a fixed execution team, yet many decentralized systems must operate with varying numbers of active agents during deployment. We study this setting under episodic roster variation: each episode is executed by a set of homogeneous agents, with the team size varying across episodes. Agents act only from local histories, without execution-time communication, privileged coordinators, or online retraining. Therefore, effective cooperation requires each agent to recover relevant context about the active team and adapt its behavior accordingly. To this end, we propose PC3D (Personalized Central Coordination Context Distillation), a method for training decentralized policies to recover and use personalized coordination context from local interaction histories. During training, a set-structured centralized teacher compresses the active team into coordination tokens and personalizes them into agent-specific contexts, which are distilled into decentralized policies. At execution, each agent predicts its own context from local history and adaptively uses it to condition decision-making. Across three cooperative MARL benchmarks, PC3D achieves higher returns than the evaluated baselines with both seen and unseen roster sizes, and ablations attribute these gains to both context distillation and adaptive context use.

</details>


### [1011] [The Polynomial Counting Capabilities of Message Passing Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10393)
*Marco Sälzer,Pascal Bergsträßer,Anthony W. Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究消息传递神经网络（MPNN）超越线性算术的计数能力，主要利用局部和全局均值聚合，探讨在节点标记图中表达带多项式计数约束的分级模态逻辑所需的条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作主要关注MPNN在阈值计数或线性算术约束下的表达能力，但超越线性算术（多项式计数约束）的计数能力尚不清楚，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 作者通过理论分析，研究使用均值聚合的MPNN在节点标记图上表达带多项式计数约束的分级模态逻辑的条件，分别针对全局约束、局部约束（无嵌套模态）以及带嵌套模态的场景进行条件分析。

Result: 1）全局多项式计数约束在温和假设下可用均值MPNN检查；2）局部约束（无嵌套模态）可通过额外允许求和/最大聚合或在正则图上实现；3）带嵌套模态的公式可在树状结构图及类似假设下被均值MPNN捕获。

Conclusion: 本文揭示了均值MPNN在超越线性算术的计数能力上的边界与条件，为理解MPNN的表达力提供了新的理论视角。

Abstract: The counting power of Message Passing Neural Networks (MPNN) has been the subject of many recent papers, showing that they can express logic that involves counting up to a threshold or more generally satisfy a linear arithmetic constraint. In this paper, we study the counting capabilities of MPNN beyond linear arithmetic, primarily utilising local and global mean aggregations. In particular, our goal is to tease out conditions required to express extensions of graded modal logic with polynomial counting constraints. We show that global polynomial counting constraints in node-labelled graphs can be checked using mean MPNN under mild assumptions. Checking local constraints is also possible, if we consider formulas with no nested modalities and additionally either (i) permit sum/max aggregations, or (ii) only restrict to regular graphs. We also show how formulas with nested modalities can be captured by mean MPNN over graphs with tree-like structures and similar assumptions.

</details>


### [1012] [Valid Best-Model Identification for LLM Evaluation via Low-Rank Factorization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10405)
*Elad Tolochinsky,Yaniv Tenzer,Yaniv Romano*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将多臂老虎机（MAB）与低秩预测结合的双稳健框架，在保证统计有效性的前提下，通过减少LLM评估次数来高效识别最佳模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在固定基准上选择最佳大语言模型（LLM）时，穷举评估所有模型-示例对成本高昂。现有MAB算法可减少评估次数，但结合低秩预测分数时，预测偏差可能导致错误识别最佳模型。本文旨在解决预测偏差与统计有效性的矛盾。

Method: 提出一个结合MAB与预测分数的原则性框架。推导每个模型性能的双稳健估计量，利用低秩预测降低方差，并在模型自适应选择、示例不放回抽样的设定下构建有效的有限样本置信区间。

Result: 在真实世界基准上的实验表明，该方法减少了所需评估次数，在显著节省计算和成本的同时，仍能准确识别最佳模型。

Conclusion: 双稳健估计框架能有效解决预测偏差问题，在保证统计有效性的前提下大幅提升LLM评估效率，为低成本模型选择提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Selecting the best large language model (LLM) for a fixed benchmark is often expensive, since exhaustive evaluation requires running every model on every example. Multi-armed bandit (MAB) algorithms can reduce the number of LLM calls by sequentially selecting the next model-example pair to evaluate, thereby avoiding wasted evaluations on clearly underperforming models. Further savings can be achieved by predicting model scores from the partially observed model-example score matrix using low-rank factorization. However, such predictions are not ground truth: they can be biased and may therefore lead to incorrect identification of the best model. In this work, we propose a principled framework that combines MAB with cheap predicted scores without compromising statistical validity. Specifically, we derive doubly robust estimators of each model's performance that use the low-rank predictions to reduce variance. This enables the construction of valid finite-sample confidence intervals in our setting, where models are selected adaptively and examples are sampled without replacement. Empirical results on real-world benchmarks show that our approach reduces the number of required evaluations, yielding meaningful savings in compute and cost while accurately identifying the best-performing model.

</details>


### [1013] [Identified-Set Geometry of Distributional Model Extraction under Top-$K$ Censored API Access](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10407)
*Wenhua Nie,ZiCheng Zhu,Jianan Wu,Binhan Luo,Haoran Zheng,Jyh-Shing Roger Jang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究LLM API仅暴露top-K logit分数时，每位置分布恢复的理论极限。发现TV直径精确为U_K，KL恢复有可计算的下界。实验表明top-K蒸馏恢复12%能力，全logit恢复56%，生成式提取恢复96%，证明top-K限制影响分布保真度但不阻止能力提取。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代LLM API通常只暴露top-K logit分数并屏蔽其余词汇，这种访问限制下能否恢复完整分布？需要从理论上刻画这种限制下的分布恢复极限。

Method: 理论推导了TV距离下识别集的精确直径U_K；给出KL恢复的可计算二端下界和渐近匹配小模糊上界；在Qwen3数学推理模型上设计了top-K蒸馏、全logit蒸馏和生成式提取三种对比实验。

Result: 1) TV直径精确为U_K=(V-K)exp(τ)/(Z_A+(V-K)exp(τ))；2) top-K蒸馏仅恢复12%私有能力，全logit蒸馏恢复56%但KL散度已达99%闭合，生成式提取恢复96%。

Conclusion: Top-K审查限制了每位置的分布恢复，但无法阻止能力提取。这分离了保真度和迁移两个概念，提示在prompt-only logit蒸馏中需关注能力提取而非仅仅分布对齐。

Abstract: Modern LLM APIs often reveal only top-$K$ logit scores and censor the remaining vocabulary. We study the per-position distribution-recovery limits of this access model. For censoring threshold $τ$, the compatible teacher distributions form an identified set whose total-variation diameter is exactly $U_K=(V-K)\exp(τ)/(Z_A+(V-K)\exp(τ))$, where $Z_A$ is the observed partition function. For KL recovery, we give a computable binary-endpoint lower bound and an asymptotically matching small-ambiguity upper bound, with an extension to reference-aware attackers. Experiments on a Qwen3 math-reasoning teacher reveal a layered extraction hierarchy: on-task top-$K$ distillation recovers 12% of private capability, full-logit distillation recovers 56% despite 99% KL closure, and generation-based extraction recovers 96%. Top-$K$ censoring therefore limits per-position distribution recovery but does not by itself prevent capability extraction, separating fidelity from transfer in prompt-only logit distillation.

</details>


### [1014] [Equilibrium Residuals Expose Three Regimes of Matrix-Game Strategic Reasoning in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10410)
*Wenhua Nie,Binhan Luo,Zijie Meng,Jyh-Shing Roger Jang,Ching-Wen Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LLMs在命名博弈基准上表现良好，但移除语义线索后性能急剧下降（2×2: 34%, 3×3: 18%, 5×5: 2%）。监督微调可将未见过的5×5-7×7成功率从2%提升至61%，而可剥削性奖励训练平均为37%但方差大。证明可剥削性残差是2-Lipschitz连续，解释了其迁移能力。主导动作填充实验提供了因果证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示LLMs在博弈论推理中依赖语义记忆而非真正战略计算的问题，并探索提升其近似均衡计算能力的可行方法。

Method: 使用程序生成的匿名零和矩阵博弈进行评测，分离语义记忆与战略计算；采用监督微调（SFT）和可剥削性奖励训练两种方法；通过数学证明分析残差的Lipschitz连续性；设计主导动作填充实验进行因果分析。

Result: 匿名矩阵博弈中LLMs成功率极低（2×2: 34%, 3×3: 18%, 5×5: 2%）；SFT将5×5-7×7提升至61%；可剥削性奖励训练平均37%但方差大；证明残差2-Lipschitz连续；主导动作填充实验表明模型能解嵌入大矩阵中的3×3游戏但无法处理密集大矩阵。

Conclusion: 程序化评估对衡量战略推理能力至关重要；可剥削性奖励提供了一种真实但受格式限制的近似均衡计算途径。

Abstract: Large language models can score well on named game-theory benchmarks while failing on the same strategic computation once semantic cues are removed. We show this gap with procedurally generated zero-sum matrix games: a model that recognizes familiar games drops to 34%, 18%, and 2% success on anonymous $2{\times}2$, $3{\times}3$, and $5{\times}5$ payoff matrices. The benchmark separates semantic recall, learned approximate Nash computation, and an output-interface bottleneck that limits scale. Training only on $2{\times}2$ and $3{\times}3$ games, supervised fine-tuning raises unseen $5{\times}5$--$7{\times}7$ success from 2% to 61%, while exploitability-reward training averages 37% with high seed variance. We prove that the exploitability residual is $2$-Lipschitz in payoff perturbations, unlike discontinuous vertex-returning LP equilibrium selectors, explaining why residual training can transfer under payoff shifts even when formatting instability limits mean performance. A dominated-action padding experiment provides causal evidence: trained models solve $3{\times}3$ games embedded in much larger matrices, while random-padded controls fail and dense $12{\times}12$ games remain near failure. Procedural evaluation is therefore necessary for measuring strategic reasoning, and residual rewards expose a real but format-limited route to approximate equilibrium computation.

</details>


### [1015] [Remember to Forget: Gated Adaptive Positional Encoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10414)
*Riccardo Ali,Alessio Borgi,Christopher Irwin,Mario Severino,Pietro Liò*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GAPE是一种即插即用的位置编码增强方法，通过内容感知的门控机制在保持旋转几何结构的同时解耦距离抑制与token重要性，从而改善长序列下注意力分散和检索退化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RoPE在处理超出训练长度的序列时，旋转相位会进入分布外区域，导致虚假的长程对齐、注意力分散和检索性能下降。现有方法往往在局部位置分辨率与长上下文稳定性之间进行权衡，未能根本解决问题。

Method: GAPE在注意力logits中引入内容感知偏置：查询相关门控（query-dependent gate）压缩不相关上下文，键相关门控（key-dependent gate）保留重要的远距离token。该方法可证明地保证了受保护token的可访问性，同时未受保护的远距离token的注意力权重随查询门控衰减。GAPE可直接在标准缩放点积注意力中实现。

Result: 在合成检索和长上下文基准测试中，GAPE相比RoPE基线始终产生更尖锐的注意力分布，并显著提升了长上下文的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: GAPE有效地解耦了距离抑制与token重要性，在不牺牲局部位置分辨率的前提下提升了长上下文的稳定性，且实现简单，可即插即用。

Abstract: Rotary Positional Encoding (RoPE) is widely used in modern large language models. However, when sequences are extended beyond the range seen during training, rotary phases can enter out-of-distribution regimes, leading to spurious long-range alignments, diffuse attention, and degraded retrieval. Existing remedies only partially address these failures, as they often trade local positional resolution for long-context stability. We propose GAPE (Gated Adaptive Positional Encoding), a drop-in augmentation for positional encodings that introduces a content-aware bias directly into the attention logits while preserving the rotary geometry. GAPE decouples distance-based suppression from token importance through a query-dependent gate that contracts irrelevant context and a key-dependent gate that preserves salient distant tokens. We prove that protected tokens remain accessible, while the attention mass assigned to unprotected distant tokens decays as a function of the query gate. We further show that GAPE can be implemented within standard scaled dot-product attention. We validate these properties empirically, finding that GAPE consistently yields sharper attention and improved long-context robustness over rotary baselines across both synthetic retrieval and long-context benchmarks.

</details>


### [1016] [Real vs. Semi-Simulated: Rethinking Evaluation for Treatment Effect Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10430)
*George Panagopoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 大规模实证研究发现，异质性处理效应评估存在两个关键差距：反事实指标与可观测指标在模型偏好上不一致，且半模拟基准的排名无法推广到真实数据集。简单元学习器搭配强基模型表现持续优于专门因果模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学术界和工业界对异质性处理效应的评估方式存在显著差异，方法论研究依赖半模拟基准和反事实指标，而实际应用基于可观测指标。这种评估体系间的鸿沟尚未被系统研究过。

Method: 大规模实证研究，涵盖标准半模拟基准家族和真实数据集，对比多种元学习器和专门因果机器学习模型，同时使用反事实指标和可观测指标进行评估。

Result: 发现两个关键差距：1）反事实指标无法可靠地选出可观测指标偏好的模型；2）半模拟基准上的模型排名无法迁移到真实数据。简单元学习器+强基模型始终具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 处理效应估计研究不应仅依赖反事实指标和半模拟基准，应纳入可观测指标和真实数据验证。

Abstract: Estimating heterogeneous treatment effects with machine learning has attracted substantial attention in both academic research and industrial practice. However, the two communities often evaluate models under markedly different conditions. Methodological work typically relies on semi-simulated benchmarks and metrics that require counterfactual outcomes, whereas real-world applications rely on observable metrics based on ranking or test outcomes. Despite the well-known gap between methodological progress and practical deployment, the relationship between these evaluation regimes has not been examined systematically. We conduct a large-scale empirical study of treatment effect evaluation across standard semi-simulated benchmark families and real-world datasets. Our benchmark covers meta-learners paired with multiple base learners, as well as specialized causal machine learning models. We evaluate these methods using observable metrics common in application-oriented literature, alongside counterfactual metrics commonly used in methods papers. Our results reveal two complementary gaps. First, counterfactual metrics do not reliably recover the estimators preferred by observable metrics, even on the same semi-simulated benchmarks. Second, rankings obtained on semi-simulated benchmarks do not transfer to real datasets. We further find that simple meta-learners with strong base models are consistently competitive, in contrast to specialized causal models. Overall, our findings suggest that progress in treatment effect estimation research should not be assessed solely through counterfactual metrics and semi-simulated benchmarks, but it would benefit from incorporating observable metrics and real-data validation.

</details>


### [1017] [Don't Fix the Basis -- Learn It: Spectral Representation with Adaptive Basis Learning for PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10451)
*Xuxiang Zhao,Angelica I. Aviles-Rivero*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ABLE框架通过学习数据依赖的自适应谱表示（基于可学习的Parseval框架），替代传统固定全局基函数，在保持FFT计算效率的同时提升了神经算子对多尺度、非平移不变动力学的建模能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统谱神经算子依赖固定的全局基函数（如傅里叶基），难以有效表征空间异质性和多尺度动力学行为，表达能力受限于预定义表示而非算子的复杂度。

Method: ABLE通过学习一个辅助密度函数构建空间自适应的Parseval框架，将算子作用于提升后的谱空间，并通过FFT实现保持O(N log N)的计算复杂度。

Result: 在多个基准测试中，ABLE相比强基线方法提升了精度，尤其在具有尖锐梯度和多尺度特征的场景中提升最大。将ABLE作为可替换的谱层集成到U-FNO、HPM等现有模型中，进一步增强了其性能。

Conclusion: 数据驱动的表示学习（而非算子复杂度本身）是神经算子设计的关键瓶颈；ABLE通过学习基函数本身，为PDE学习中的谱方法提供了原则性且高效的改进框架。

Abstract: Spectral neural operators achieve strong performance for PDE learning, but rely on fixed global bases that limit their ability to represent spatially heterogeneous and multiscale dynamics. We propose Adaptive Basis Learning (ABLE), a framework that learns data-dependent spectral representations instead of relying on predefined bases. ABLE constructs a spatially adaptive Parseval frame via a learned ancillary density, enabling the operator to act in a lifted spectral space while preserving invertibility and maintaining $O(N\log N)$ complexity through FFT-based implementation. This shifts the source of expressivity from spectral coefficients to the representation itself, allowing the model to capture localized structures and non-translation-invariant interactions more efficiently. ABLE integrates seamlessly into existing neural operator architectures as a drop-in replacement for spectral layers. Across a range of benchmarks ABLE improves accuracy over strong baselines, with the largest gains in regimes characterized by sharp gradients and multiscale behavior. Moreover, augmenting existing models (e.g., U-FNO, HPM) with ABLE further enhances their performance, demonstrating its role as a general and complementary spectral refinement. Our results highlight that the data-driven choice of representation, rather than operator complexity alone, is a key bottleneck in neural operator design. By learning the basis itself, ABLE provides a principled and efficient framework for improving spectral methods in PDE learning.

</details>


### [1018] [AxiomOcean: Forecasting the Three-Dimensional Structure of the Upper Ocean](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10455)
*Sensen Wu,Yifan Chen,Guantao Pu,Xiaoyao Sun,Yijun Chen,Jin Qi,Ming Kong,Keyi Yang,Lichen Xu,Wenguan Wang,Xiaofeng Li,Zhenhong Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出AxiomOcean，一种通过显式建模海洋垂直分层结构来提升短期预报精度的全球AI海洋预报模型，在1/12°分辨率下联合预测温、盐和三维流场，相比先进AI模型将第1天RMSE降低20-35%，并更好地保持涡动能和物理一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI海洋预报模型未能保留上层海洋的三维垂直结构，导致次表层特征过度平滑，在强强迫下物理一致性较差，而短期预报技能高度依赖上层海洋的三维结构。

Method: 采用全三维编码器-骨干网络-解码器架构，结合地表大气强迫，在全球1/12°分辨率下联合预测上层海洋（至643m深度）的温度、盐度和三维流场，显式建模水柱内的垂直层次和跨层依赖关系。

Result: 在10天预报中，AxiomOcean在所有变量和预报时长上优于先进AI对比模型，第1天RMSE降低约20-35%，保持更高的异常相关性；更好地保留了涡动能、温度和盐度方差；在整个水柱、赤道太平洋、黑潮延伸体和南大洋均表现出优势。

Conclusion: 显式保留上层海洋三维结构可以同时提升AI海洋预报的准确性和物理保真度。

Abstract: Short-term ocean forecast skill depends strongly on the three-dimensional ocean structure of the upper ocean, which governs stratification, subsurface heat storage, and the response of the ocean to atmospheric forcing. However, AI ocean forecasting models often fail to preserve this vertical structure, resulting in over-smoothed subsurface features and weak physical consistency under strong forcing. Here, we present AxiomOcean, a global AI ocean forecasting model that explicitly represents vertical hierarchy and cross-layer dependence within the water column. By combining a fully three-dimensional encoder-backbone-decoder architecture with surface atmospheric forcing, AxiomOcean jointly predicts upper-ocean temperature, salinity, and three-dimensional currents at global 1/12° resolution down to 643 m depth. In 10-day forecasts, AxiomOcean outperforms an advanced AI comparison model across variables and lead times, reducing day-1 RMSE by approximately 20 to 35% while maintaining higher anomaly correlation. The gain is not achieved through excessive smoothing: AxiomOcean better preserves eddy kinetic energy, temperature and salinity variance. Its advantage also extends through the water column and remains evident across the equatorial Pacific, Kuroshio Extension, and Southern Ocean, yielding a more realistic reconstruction of upper-ocean heat content. These results show that explicitly preserving upper-ocean three-dimensional structure can improve both forecast accuracy and physical fidelity in AI ocean prediction.

</details>


### [1019] [QT-Net: Rethinking Evaluation of AI Models in Atomic Chemical Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10458)
*Pablo Martínez Crespo,Stefano Ribes,Martin Rahm,Richard Beckmann,Robert S. Jordan,Marisa Gliege,Santiago Miret,Vijay Kris Narasimhan,Rocío Mercado*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于SOAP描述子的原子级留出评估协议，严格比较了等变与非等变（旋转增强）模型在预测原子电子布居和多极矩上的表现，并提出了QT-Net——一种旋转增强的非等变图神经网络，能推断分子中原子性质并提升下游分子性质预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原子性质（如部分电荷或多极矩）编码了有化学意义的信息，可辅助下游分子性质预测，但缺乏原子层面合理的数据分布外评估协议，导致难以公平比较不同模型的预测能力。

Method: 提出基于SOAP描述符的原子环境聚类留出评估协议；使用5×5交叉验证与Tukey's HSD进行严格统计比较；提出QT-Net（旋转增强的非等变图神经网络），从QM9推断原子性质并用于下游任务。

Result: QT-Net能推断训练集外分子的原子性质；这些性质作为输入特征可提升下游分子性质预测性能；从QT-Net原子输出计算的分子偶极矩能恢复QM9中的真值。

Conclusion: QT-Net可作为有效工具学习QTA原子性质，为原子级分子机器学习提供归纳偏置；所有代码和数据已开源。

Abstract: Atomic properties such as partial charges or multipoles encode chemically meaningful information that can inform downstream molecular property prediction, but their evaluation as machine learning targets has been complicated by the absence of a principled out-of-distribution evaluation protocol at the atomic level. In this work, we propose a held-out evaluation protocol that clusters atomic environments by SOAP descriptors and computes metrics accounting only for cluster labels unseen during training. Following this procedure, we use 5$\times$5 cross-validation and Tukey's HSD to run a statistically rigorous comparison of E(3)-equivariant against non-equivariant, rotationally augmented models for predicting electron populations and multipoles of H, C, N, and O atoms. Building on our results, we introduce the Quantum Topological Neural Network (QT-Net), a rotationally augmented, non-equivariant graph neural network. We show that QT-Net can be used to infer properties of atoms in molecules from QM9 outside our training set, and that these inferred properties can yield improvement when used as input features for downstream molecular property prediction. To further validate the framework, molecular dipole moments computed from QT-Net's per-atom outputs recover the ground-truth values reported in QM9. We release all code and data, including a JAX implementation of QT-Net, to support the broader use of learned QTA properties as inductive biases for atomic-scale molecular machine learning.

</details>


### [1020] [Self-Attention as a Covariance Readout: A Unified View of In-Context Learning and Repetition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10466)
*Haoren Xu,Guanhua Fang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明，在平稳、遍历和椭圆输入条件下，softmax注意力机制的输出几乎必然收敛到输入的协方差矩阵的线性读出。由此推导出两个结论：(i) 单头softmax注意力可实现一步群体梯度下降，堆叠多头可迭代实现多步梯度下降；(ii) 跨层传播后，自回归生成会渐进坍缩为一阶马尔可夫链，导致重复生成和模式崩溃。上下文学习与重复生成因此统一为协方差读出原理的两个方面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索大语言模型中看似无关的两个现象——上下文学习(ICL)和重复生成——是否可以从注意力机制本身推导出统一的理论解释。

Method: 通过数学推导证明，在平稳、遍历和椭圆输入的假设下，softmax注意力的输出在长上下文极限下收敛为输入协方差矩阵的线性函数。基于此理论，分别分析单头和多头注意力堆叠在上下文线性回归中的梯度下降行为，以及跨层传播对自回归生成过程的影响。

Result: (i) 单头softmax注意力可实现一步群体梯度下降，多头堆叠可实现多步梯度下降；(ii) 跨L层传播后，终端隐状态以1/t速率收敛到仅依赖当前token的函数，自回归生成坍缩为一阶马尔可夫链，产生重复和模式坍缩。

Conclusion: 上下文学习和重复生成并非两个独立现象，而是源于同一个协方差读出原理，为理解Transformer的行为提供了统一的理论框架。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit two striking and ostensibly unrelated behaviours: in-context learning (ICL) and repetitive generation. In both, the model behaves as though it had summarised the context into a population-level statistic and discarded token-level detail. We ask whether this ``summarisation and forgetting'' can be derived from the attention mechanism itself, and answer in the affirmative. Under stationary, ergodic and elliptical inputs, the softmax attention output converges almost surely to $Θ_VΣΘ_K^{\top}Θ_Q x_t$, where $Σ$ is the input covariance; the long-context limit is therefore a linear readout of the input's second-order statistics. Two consequences follow. (i) For in-context linear regression, a single softmax head can implement one step of population gradient descent. Stacking such heads with residual connections iterates this update and implements multiple gradient descent steps. (ii) Propagated across an $L$-layer transformer, this readout drives the terminal hidden state at the parametric $1/t$ rate to a deterministic function of the current token alone, so that autoregressive generation collapses asymptotically to a first-order Markov chain whose attracting orbits furnish a structural account of repetition and mode collapse. The two phenomena thus emerge as facets of a single covariance-readout principle.

</details>


### [1021] [Can Muon Fine-tune Adam-Pretrained Models?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10468)
*Xingyu Qu,Peigeng Huang,Samuel Horvath*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 这篇论文研究了将Muon优化器用于微调（而非预训练）时，因与Adam优化器不匹配导致性能下降的问题，并提出使用LoRA来约束更新强度，从而缓解这种不匹配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muon在预训练中表现优异，但微调时直接切换（从Adam到Muon）会导致性能下降，原因是优化器存在不匹配，阻碍了对预训练知识的有效利用。

Method: 通过控制实验分析Adam与Muon的隐性偏差差异，发现不匹配会破坏预训练知识且与更新强度相关；提出利用LoRA约束更新幅度来缓解不匹配，并在语言和视觉任务上进行验证。

Result: LoRA有效缩小了Adam与Muon在微调中的性能差距；对LoRA秩、灾难性遗忘和变体的实验进一步证实不匹配的严重程度与更新强度正相关。

Conclusion: 优化器不匹配是Muon微调失败的关键原因，通过约束更新强度（如LoRA）可以缓解这一问题，为Muon用于微调提供了可行的思路。

Abstract: Muon has emerged as an efficient alternative to Adam for pretraining, yet remains underused for fine-tuning. A key obstacle is that most open models are pretrained with Adam, and naively switching to Muon for fine-tuning leads to degraded performance due to an optimizer mismatch. We investigate this mismatch through controlled experiments and relate it to the distinct implicit biases of Adam and Muon. We provide evidence that the mismatch disrupts pretrained knowledge, and that this disruption scales with update strength. This leads us to hypothesize that constraining updates should mitigate the mismatch. We validate this with LoRA: across language and vision tasks, LoRA reduces the performance gap between Adam and Muon observed under full fine-tuning. Studies on LoRA rank, catastrophic forgetting, and LoRA variants further confirm that mismatch severity correlates with update strength. These results shed light on how optimizer mismatch affects fine-tuning and how it can be mitigated. Our code is available at https://github.com/XingyuQu/muon-finetune.

</details>


### [1022] [Formally Verifying Analog Neural Networks Under Process Variations Using Polynomial Zonotopes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10474)
*Yasmine Abu-Haeyeh,Tobias Ladner,Matthias Althoff,Lars Hedrich*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于多项式 zonotopes 的可达性分析方法，用于验证受工艺变异影响的模拟神经网络电路，将验证时间从数天缩短到数秒，同时覆盖 99% 的变异样本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模拟神经网络对制造工艺变异高度敏感，传统的蒙特卡洛仿真验证耗时巨大（需要数天），亟需高效的形式化验证方法。

Method: 提出基于多项式的模型模拟神经元电路在工艺变异下的行为，然后利用多项式 zonotopes 进行可达性分析，实现形式化验证。

Result: 在三个数据集上验证了全连接和卷积模拟神经网络，验证时间从数天缩短到数秒，且能覆盖 99% 的变异样本。

Conclusion: 所提出的基于多项式 zonotopes 的形式化验证方法有效且高效，可替代传统蒙特卡洛仿真用于模拟神经网络的鲁棒性验证。

Abstract: Analog neural networks are gaining attention due to their efficiency in terms of power consumption and processing speed. However, since analog neural networks are implemented as physical circuits, they are highly sensitive to manufacturing process variations, which can cause large deviations from the nominal model. We present a polynomial-based model that resembles the performance of the neuron circuit under process variations. Then, we formally verify the behavior of the circuit-level model using reachability analysis with polynomial zonotopes, thus, avoiding conventional, time-consuming Monte Carlo simulations. We evaluate our proposed verification approach on three different datasets, verifying both fully-connected and convolutional analog neural networks. Our experimental results confirm the effectiveness of our verification approach by reducing the verification time from days to seconds while enclosing 99% of the variation samples.

</details>


### [1023] [CMKL: Modality-Aware Continual Learning for Evolving Biomedical Knowledge Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10510)
*Yousef A. Radwan,Yao Li,Qing Qing,Ziqi Xu,Qixin Zhang,Yongcheng Jing,Renqiang Luo,Xikun Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CMKL框架，通过MoE融合多模态信息并采用EWC正则化与K-means多样性回放缓冲，解决生物医学知识图谱的持续学习问题，在实体分类和关系预测任务上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么假设静态图结构，要么无法在动态数据分布下利用多模态信息，且对所有参数使用统一正则化，忽略了不同模态在知识图谱演化中表现出的不同遗忘动态。

Method: 提出CMKL框架：原生编码结构、文本和分子三种模态，通过Mixture-of-Experts路由器进行融合，采用EWC正则化保护已有知识，并利用K-means多样性的多模态回放缓冲缓解灾难性遗忘。

Result: 在129K实体的生物医学持续基准上，实体分类AP达0.591（比最强结构基线提升60%），近乎零遗忘(AF 0.008)；关系预测AP 0.062，优于联合训练和LKGE；冻结文本消融实验揭示贪婪模态不对称性存在于表征层而非融合层。

Conclusion: CMKL有效解决了生物医学知识图谱的持续多模态学习问题，MoE路由能够通过抑制不可达模态来管理模态不对称性，无需通过学习的瓶颈强制融合。

Abstract: Biomedical knowledge graphs are increasingly large, dynamic, and multimodal, driven by rapid advances in biotechnology such as high-throughput sequencing. Machine learning models can infer previously unobserved biomedical relationships and characterize biomedical entities in these graphs, but existing knowledge graph embedding methods and their continual learning extensions either assume static graph structure or fail to exploit multimodal information under evolving data distributions. They also apply uniform regularization across all model parameters, ignoring that different modalities may exhibit distinct forgetting dynamics as the graph evolves. We propose the Continual Multimodal Knowledge Graph Learner (CMKL), a CL framework for biomedical KGs that natively encodes structure, text, and molecules, fuses them through a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) router, and protects previously learned knowledge with standard EWC regularization and a K-means-diverse multimodal replay buffer. We evaluate CMKL on a 129K-entity biomedical continual benchmark with 10 tasks. On continual biomedical entity classification, CMKL reaches AP 0.591 versus 0.370 for the strongest structural baseline, a 60% gain that is driven by access to multimodal features and preserved across the sequence with near-zero forgetting (AF 0.008). On continual relationship prediction, CMKL reaches AP $0.062$, matching Naive Sequential and EWC (0.058) within seed noise and outperforming Joint Training (0.047, p=0.045) and LKGE (0.039). A frozen-text ablation reaches AP 0.136, more than double any jointly trained model, yet that signal is unreachable by margin-ranking gradients: the greedy-modality asymmetry lives at the representation level, not the fusion level, and MoE routing manages it by suppressing the unreachable modality without forcing it through a learned bottleneck. Code: github.com/yradwan147/cmkl-neurips2026

</details>


### [1024] [ConfoundingSHAP: Quantifying confounding strength in causal inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10533)
*Marie Brockschmidt,Santo M. A. R. Thies,Maresa Schröder,Dennis Frauen,Valentyn Melnychuk,Maximilian Muschalik,Eyke Hüllermeier,Stefan Feuerriegel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ConfoundingSHAP，一种基于Shapley值的方法，用于量化观测协变量在因果推断中的混杂强度，帮助识别哪些变量是真正的混杂因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在观察性研究中，混杂因素既影响治疗决策又影响结果，但真实的治疗分配机制未知，难以判断哪些协变量是混杂因素。现有SHAP方法主要用于解释异质性，不适合此任务。

Method: 提出针对混杂强度归因的Shapley博弈，并采用基于TabPFN的可扩展估计方法，避免穷举重拟合，高效计算调整集上的值函数。

Result: 在多个数据集上验证了ConfoundingSHAP的实用价值，能够提供关于哪些观测协变量驱动混杂的解释性信息。

Conclusion: ConfoundingSHAP为因果推断实践提供了更深入的见解，帮助研究者识别关键混杂因素，提升观察性研究中因果推断的可靠性。

Abstract: In causal inference, confounders are variables that influence both treatment decisions and outcomes. However, unlike as in randomized clinical trials, the treatment assignment mechanism in observational studies is not known, and it is thus unclear which covariates act as confounders. Here, we aim to generate insight for causal inference and answer: which of the observed covariates act as confounders? We introduce ConfoundingSHAP, a Shapley-based method for attributing confounding strength to individual covariates. Our contributions are twofold. First, we propose a Shapley game targeted to infer the confounding strength of the covariates. Our resulting Shapley values differ from the standard applications of SHAP explanations on causal targets, such as understanding treatment effect heterogeneity, which are ill-suited for our task. Second, as our task requires evaluating the value function over many adjustment sets, we provide a scalable TabPFN-based estimation that avoids exhaustive refitting. We demonstrate the practical value across various datasets, where ConfoundingSHAP provides informative explanations of which observed covariates drive confounding and thereby helps to provide more insight for causal inference in practice.

</details>


### [1025] [HH-SAE: Discovering and Steering Hierarchical Knowledge of Complex Manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10536)
*Honghan Wu,Tianyan Wang,Jiacong Mi,Zhoyang Jiang,Yunsoo Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出混合分层SAE（HH-SAE）通过三级层次分解（上下文L₀、原子f₁、组合f₂）解决高维关键领域中稀有语义创新被密集背景掩盖的“特征密度冲突”问题，在跨领域零样本欺诈检测中达到0.9156 AUC，并通过知识引导合成实现+9.9% AUPRC提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维、高风险领域中，稀有语义创新常被密集的背景上下文所掩盖，现有方法难以有效区分和提取这些关键信号，作者将此问题定义为“特征密度冲突”（feature density conflict）。

Method: 提出混合分层稀疏自编码器（HH-SAE），将流形分解为三级嵌套层次：上下文层（L₀）、原子层（f₁）和组合层（f₂）。通过“碎裂”行政临床标签为生理模式来实现精细化解耦。

Result: 跨域零样本欺诈检测AUC达0.9156；路径消融实验表明去除上下文减法会导致13.46%的效用崩塌；知识引导合成比最先进生成器高出+9.9% AUPRC。

Conclusion: HH-SAE能够有效优先捕捉高阶机制创新而非环境代理信号，从而在高风险场景中实现高精度发现。

Abstract: Rare semantic innovations in high-dimensional, mission-critical domains are often obscured by dense background contexts, a challenge we define as \textit{feature density conflict}. We introduce the \textbf{Hybrid Hierarchical SAE (HH-SAE)} to resolve this by factorizing manifolds into a nested hierarchy of \textbf{Contextual} ($L_0$), \textbf{Atomic} ($f_1$), and \textbf{Compository} ($f_2$) tiers. Evaluating across disparate manifolds, HH-SAE demonstrates superior resolution by \textbf{``fracturing'' administrative clinical labels into physiological modes} and achieving a peak \textbf{cross-domain zero-shot AUC of 0.9156 in fraud detection}. Path ablation confirms the architecture's structural necessity, revealing a 13.46\% utility collapse when contextual subtraction is removed. Finally, knowledge-steered synthesis achieves a +9.9\% AUPRC lift over state-of-the-art generators, proving that HH-SAE effectively prioritizes high-order mechanistic innovation over environmental proxies to enable high-precision discovery in high-stakes environments.

</details>


### [1026] [Higher Resolution, Better Generalization: Unlocking Visual Scaling in Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10546)
*Raphael Trumpp,Ömer Veysel Çağatan,Barış Akgün,Marco Caccamo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现更高分辨率的视觉输入能显著提升深度强化学习的性能和泛化能力，并提出Impoola架构（用全局平均池化替代展平操作）来解耦参数与分辨率，在Procgen基准上获得28%的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战深度强化学习中广泛使用的低分辨率输入惯例（从早期基准继承而来，缺乏原理性设计依据），揭示观测分辨率是一个被忽视的关键变量。

Method: 提出Impoola架构，用全局平均池化（global average pooling）替代Impala编码器中的空间特征展平（flatten）操作，使参数量与输入分辨率解耦；基于Procgen基准构建Procgen-HD高分辨率版本进行实验。

Result: 在各自最优配置下，Impoola相比Impala获得28%的性能提升；高分辨率带来的增益在需要感知小物体或远距离物体的环境中最为显著；梯度显著性分析证实高分辨率使策略具有更空间局部的视觉注意力。

Conclusion: 挑战了激进下采样输入的惯例，将分辨率无关的架构定位为可扩展视觉深度强化学习的简单有效路径；开源了Procgen-HD基准以促进后续研究。

Abstract: Pixel-based deep reinforcement learning agents are typically trained on heavily downsampled visual observations, a convention inherited from early benchmarks rather than grounded in principled design. In this work, we show that observation resolution is a critical yet overlooked variable for policy learning: higher-resolution inputs can substantially improve both performance and generalization, provided the network architecture can process them effectively. We find that the widely used Impala encoder, which flattens spatial features into a vector, suffers from quadratic parameter growth as resolution increases and fails to leverage the additional visual detail. Replacing this operation with global average pooling, as in the Impoola architecture, decouples parameter count from resolution and yields consistent improvements across resolutions and network widths - at their respective best conditions, visual scaling unlocks a 28 % performance gain for Impoola over Impala. These gains are strongest in environments that require precise perception of small or distant objects, and gradient saliency analysis confirms that the underlying mechanism is a more spatially localized visual attention of the policy at higher resolutions. Our results challenge the prevailing practice of aggressive input downsampling and position resolution-independent architectures as a simple, effective path toward scalable visual deep RL. To facilitate future research on resolution scaling in deep RL, we publicly release the open-source code for the Procgen-HD benchmark: https://github.com/raphajaner/procgen-hd.

</details>


### [1027] [PhysEDA: Physics-Aware Learning Framework for Efficient EDA With Manhattan Distance Decay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10547)
*Zetao Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PhysEDA，将曼哈顿距离指数衰减的物理先验作为归纳偏置融入线性注意力机制和奖励塑造中，在EDA任务上实现O(n)复杂度、跨尺度泛化提升56.8%、14倍加速和98.5%内存节省。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有注意力机制和强化学习方法在EDA任务中面临两个瓶颈：标准注意力的二次复杂度限制了大规模应用，以及数据稀缺导致模型过拟合统计噪声、放大弱长程相关性，偏离了底层物理规律。

Method: 提出PhysEDA，包含两个组件：1) Physics-Structured Linear Attention (PSLA) 将可分离的曼哈顿距离指数衰减作为乘法偏置融入线性注意力核中，将复杂度从O(n²)降至O(n)；2) Potential-Based Reward Shaping (PBRS) 利用相同核构建物理势函数，在稀疏奖励RL中提供密集奖励信号，并通过策略不变性定理保证最优策略不变。

Result: 在去耦电容布局、宏单元布局和IR-drop预测三个EDA任务上，PhysEDA实现零样本跨尺度迁移提升56.8%，在100×100网格上达到14倍推理加速和98.5%内存节省；PBRS在稀疏奖励DPP上额外提升10.8%。

Conclusion: 将物理先验作为统一的归纳偏置同时融入架构和训练，能有效提升EDA任务的效率、可扩展性和泛化能力。

Abstract: Electronic design automation (EDA) addresses placement, routing, timing analysis, and power-integrity verification for integrated circuits. Learning methods -- attention (Transformer) and reinforcement learning (RL) -- have recently emerged on EDA tasks, yet face two common bottlenecks: vanilla attention's quadratic complexity limits scaling, and data-scarce models overfit statistical noise and amplify weak long-range correlations against the underlying physics. We observe that EDA tasks share a physical prior -- pairwise electrical and routing interactions decay exponentially along Manhattan distance -- and integrate it as a unified inductive bias into both architecture and training. We propose PhysEDA, comprising two components Physics-Structured Linear Attention (PSLA) folds the separable Manhattan decay into the linear-attention kernel as a multiplicative bias, reducing complexity from quadratic to linear; Potential-Based Reward Shaping (PBRS) constructs a physical potential from the same kernel, providing dense reward signal under sparse RL while preserving the optimal policy via the policy-invariance theorem. Across three EDA scenarios -- decoupling-capacitor placement, macro placement, and IR-drop prediction -- PhysEDA improves zero-shot cross-scale transfer by 56.8% and achieves 14x inference speedup with 98.5% memory savings on 100x100 grids; PBRS adds another 10.8% in sparse-reward DPP.

</details>


### [1028] [It's All Connected: Topology-Aware Structural Graph Encoding Improves Performance on Polymer Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10551)
*H. Ibrahim Erdogan,Punith Raviswamy,Nikita Agrawal,Yannik Köster,Stefan Zechel,Ulrich S. Schubert,Ruben Mayer,Christopher Kuenneth*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合链尺度图构建和自监督预训练的GNN方法，用于聚合物性质预测。通过从分子量分布中采样代表性链构建包含链拓扑结构的大图，并在10万条无标签数据上预训练后微调。在381个聚合物数据集上，该方法将RMSE从28.36 K降至24.76 K，降低5.1%，且消融实验证明图构建和预训练两者缺一不可。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GNN方法在聚合物性质预测中仅使用重复单元的图表示，忽略了链尺度形态（如分子量分布）对玻璃化转变温度等关键性质的影响。同时，聚合物标注数据稀缺且规模小（通常仅数百个），亟需能有效利用无标签数据并引入链尺度信息的方法。

Method: 1）从Schulz-Zimm分布中采样代表性聚合物链，构建编码链尺度拓扑的大图，并用丰富的化学描述符对原子和键进行特征化；2）在10万条无标签PSMILES字符串上通过掩码图建模预训练GNN编码器；3）在标注数据上微调。实验使用GINE和GATv2两种架构，在381个聚合物（180个均聚物+201个共聚物）上进行验证。

Result: 无预训练时，大图方法与重复单元基线性能相当（28.40 K vs 28.36 K RMSE）；加入预训练后，大图方法达到24.76 K ± 3.30 K，比预训练的重复单元基线（26.08 K ± 4.20 K）降低了5.1%（p < 0.001, 30次运行）。去除化学特征的消融实验导致性能下降至36.65 K。该结果在GINE和GATv2两种编码器上均成立。

Conclusion: 图构建（引入链尺度信息）和自监督预训练对于聚合物性质预测是联合必要的，两者缺一不可。该方法架构无关，为聚合物性质预测提供了一种有效的新范式。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have achieved strong results in molecular property prediction, but polymers present distinct challenges: labeled datasets are scarce and small (typically in the order of hundreds of polymers) due to the need for expensive experimentation, and complex polymer chain distributions influence polymer properties.
