*Edward De Brouwer,Carl Edwards,Alexander Wu,Jenna Collier,Graham Heimberg,Xiner Li,Meena Subramaniam,Ehsan Hajiramezanali,David Richmond,Jan-Christian Hütter,Sara Mostafavi,Gabriele Scalia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了AssayBench，一个用于表型筛选预测的基准测试平台，基于1,920个公开CRISPR筛选实验构建，评估了多种方法在基因排名预测任务上的表现，发现现有方法远未达到性能上限，零样本通用大语言模型表现优于专用生物学模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前缺乏用于评估虚拟细胞模型进行表型筛选预测能力的标准化基准，现有研究多集中于分子层面的读取结果，与药物发现中实际的表型终点对齐不足。

Method: 从1,920个公开CRISPR筛选实验构建基准，涵盖五类细胞表型；将任务形式化为每个筛选的基因排名预测；提出调整后的nDCG（adjusted nDCG）作为连续指标，用于比较跨异质实验的性能。

Result: 现有方法远未达到经验估计的性能上限；零样本通用大语言模型表现优于生物学专用LLM和可训练基线；微调、集成和提示优化可进一步提升LLM性能。

Conclusion: AssayBench为虚拟细胞模型和表型筛选预测提供了一个实用的测试平台，有助于衡量该领域的进展。

Abstract: Recent advances in machine learning and large-scale biological data collections have revived the prospect of building a virtual cell, a computational model of cellular behavior that could accelerate biological discovery. One of the most compelling promises of this vision is the ability to perform in silico phenotypic screens, in which a model predicts the effects of cellular perturbations in unseen biological contexts. This task combines heterogeneous textual inputs with diverse phenotypic outputs, making it particularly well-suited to LLMs and agentic systems. Yet, no standard benchmark currently exists for this task, as existing efforts focus on narrower molecular readouts that are only indirectly aligned with the phenotypic endpoints driving many real-world drug discovery workflows. In this work, we present AssayBench, a benchmark for phenotypic screen prediction, built from 1,920 publicly available CRISPR screens spanning five broad classes of cellular phenotypes. We formulate the screen prediction task as a gene rank prediction for each screen and introduce the adjusted nDCG, a continuous metric for comparing performance across heterogeneous assays. Our extensive evaluation shows that existing methods remain far from empirically estimated performance ceilings and zero-shot generalist LLMs outperform biology-specific LLMs and trainable baselines. Optimization techniques such as fine-tuning, ensembling, and prompt optimization can further improve LLM performance on this task. Overall, AssayBench offers a practical testbed for measuring progress toward in silico phenotypic screening and, more broadly, virtual cell models.

</details>


### [1068] [Neural Weight Norm = Kolmogorov Complexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10878)
*Tiberiu Musat*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明，在固定精度下，循环神经网络的最小权重范数与输出二进制串的Kolmogorov复杂度成正比（相差对数因子），从而表明权重衰减等价于Solomonoff通用先验。这一结论对任何范数都成立，且固定精度是必要条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示权重衰减（weight decay）为何有效的理论基础，将其与Kolmogorov复杂度和Solomonoff通用先验建立联系，为神经网络正则化提供信息论层面的解释。

Method: 通过两个紧的归约证明：（1）任何通用图灵机程序可编码为神经网络权重，每个程序比特单位代价；（2）任何固定精度网络可通过枚举非零参数（带对数寻址开销）来描述。两个方向均紧，排列编码证明了对数因子的必要性。

Result: 在固定精度下，循环神经网络的最小权重范数与输出串的Kolmogorov复杂度相差至多对数因子；权重衰减等价于Solomonoff通用先验（多项式因子内）；结论对任意范数均成立；固定精度是必要条件。

Conclusion: 权重衰减本质上是在神经网络中实现了Solomonoff归纳偏置，即偏好更短程序（更简单的解释），这为深度学习中的正则化提供了严格的理论支撑。

Abstract: Why does weight decay work? We prove that, in any fixed-precision regime, the smallest weight norm of a looped neural network outputting a binary string equals the Kolmogorov complexity of that string, up to a logarithmic factor. This implies that weight decay induces a prior matching Solomonoff's universal prior, the optimal prior over computable functions, up to a polynomial factor. The result is norm-agnostic: in fixed precision, every weight norm collapses to the non-zero parameter count up to constants, so the same sandwich bound holds for any norm used as a regulariser. The proof has two short reductions: any program for a universal Turing machine can be encoded into neural weights at unit cost per program bit, and any fixed-precision network can be described by enumerating its non-zero parameters with logarithmic addressing overhead. Both bounds are tight up to constants, with the logarithmic factor realised by permutation encodings: a network whose parameters encode a permutation produces a string whose Kolmogorov complexity is the non-zero parameter count times its logarithm. The fixed-precision assumption is essential: with infinite precision, neural networks can encode non-computable functions and the weight norm loses its relevance.

</details>


### [1069] [LoKA: Low-precision Kernel Applications for Recommendation Models At Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10886)
*Liang Luo,Yinbin Ma,Quanyu Zhu,Vasiliy Kuznetsov,Yuxin Chen,Jian Jiao,Jiecao Yu,Buyun Zhang,Tongyi Tang,Xiaohan Wei,Yanli Zhao,Zeliang Chen,Yuchen Hao,Venkatesh Ranganathan,Sandeep Parab,Yantao Yao,Maxim Naumov,Chunzhi Yang,Shen Li,Ellie Wen,Wenlin Chen,Santanu Kolay,Chunqiang Tang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LoKA是一个系统-模型协同设计的框架，通过三项原则（Profiling、Mods、Dispatch）使FP8低精度计算在大型推荐模型（LRM）中实用化，解决了直接应用FP8导致的模型质量下降和训练时间延长问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管FP8低精度计算在大语言模型中成功应用，但由于大型推荐模型对数值敏感、以小矩阵乘法和归一化为主、且训练环境通信密集，直接使用FP8会导致模型质量下降和训练时间延长，而这些问题仅靠改进FP8内核无法解决。

Method: LoKA框架包含三个组件：1) LoKA Probe：基于统计的在线基准测试方法，学习激活和权重统计量，量化逐层误差，识别FP8安全/不安全及快/慢的位置；2) LoKA Mods：一组可复用的模型适配方法，提升FP8下的数值稳定性和执行效率；3) LoKA Dispatch：运行时系统，利用Probe的统计洞察选择满足精度要求的最快FP8内核。

Result: 该方法成功将FP8应用于大型推荐模型，在不牺牲模型质量的前提下显著加速训练，解决了直接应用FP8时的数值敏感性和训练效率问题。

Conclusion: FP8在LRM中的成功应用需要系统-模型协同设计，而非单纯改进FP8内核；LoKA通过统计感知的Profiling、模型-硬件协同设计和内核库编排三大原则，为LRM中的低精度训练提供了实用框架。

Abstract: Recent GPU generations deliver significantly higher FLOPs using lower-precision arithmetic, such as FP8. While successfully applied to large language models (LLMs), its adoption in large recommendation models (LRMs) has been limited. This is because LRMs are numerically sensitive, dominated by small matrix multiplications (GEMMs) followed by normalization, and trained in communication-intensive environments. Applying FP8 directly to LRMs often degrades model quality and prolongs training time. These challenges are inherent to LRM workloads and cannot be resolved merely by introducing better FP8 kernels. Instead, a system-model co-design approach is needed to successfully integrate FP8. We present LoKA (Low-precision Kernel Applications), a framework that makes FP8 practical for LRMs through three principles: profile under realistic distributions to know where low precision is safe, co-design model components with hardware to expand where it is safe, and orchestrate across kernel libraries to maximize the gains. Concretely, LoKA Probe is a statistically grounded, online benchmarking method that learns activation and weight statistics, and quantifies per-layer errors. This process pinpoints safe and unsafe, fast and slow sites for FP8 adoption. LoKA Mods is a set of reusable model adaptations that improve both numerical stability and execution efficiency with FP8. LoKA Dispatch is a runtime that leverages the statistical insights from LoKA Probe to select the fastest FP8 kernel that satisfies the accuracy requirements.

</details>


### [1070] [Unmasking On-Policy Distillation: Where It Helps, Where It Hurts, and Why](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10889)
*Mohammadreza Armandpour,Fatih Ilhan,David Harrison,Ajay Jaiswal,Duc N. M Hoang,Fartash Faghri,Yizhe Zhang,Minsik Cho,Mehrdad Farajtabar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种无需训练的诊断框架，在逐token、逐问题、逐教师的粒度上分析推理模型中的蒸馏信号质量，发现蒸馏引导在错误rollout上对齐度更高，且最优蒸馏上下文取决于学生模型能力和目标任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有on-policy蒸馏在训练推理模型时广泛使用逐token密集监督，但何时有益、何时有害尚不明确。教师模型的选择、自蒸馏中的监督信号上下文、以及最优选择是否随token变化等问题，都需要大量训练才能回答，且聚合指标掩盖了token级别的动态。

Method: 提出一种无需训练的诊断框架，定义理想逐节点梯度（最大化学生成功概率的参数更新），设计可扩展的targeted-rollout算法高效估计该梯度。通过余弦相似度定义梯度对齐分数，量化蒸馏梯度与理想梯度的接近程度。

Result: 在多种自蒸馏设置和外部教师模型上，蒸馏引导在错误rollout上比正确rollout上具有更高的对齐度；正确rollout中学生已表现良好，教师信号趋于嘈杂。最优蒸馏上下文取决于学生模型能力和目标任务，不存在通用最优配置。

Conclusion: 研究结果支持在蒸馏中使用逐任务、逐token的诊断分析，为推理模型的蒸馏策略选择提供了细粒度的理论指导。

Abstract: On-policy distillation offers dense, per-token supervision for training reasoning models; however, it remains unclear under which conditions this signal is beneficial and under which it is detrimental. Which teacher model should be used, and in the case of self-distillation, which specific context should serve as the supervisory signal? Does the optimal choice vary from one token to the next? At present, addressing these questions typically requires costly training runs whose aggregate performance metrics obscure the dynamics at the level of individual tokens. We introduce a training-free diagnostic framework that operates at the highest resolution: per token, per question, and per teacher. We derive an ideal per-node gradient defined as the parameter update that maximally increases the student's probability of success. We then develop a scalable targeted-rollout algorithm to estimate this gradient efficiently, even for long chains of intermediate thoughts. The gradient alignment score, defined as the cosine similarity between this ideal gradient and any given distillation gradient, quantifies the extent to which a particular configuration approximates the ideal signal. Across a range of self-distillation settings and external teacher models, we observe that distillation guidance exhibits substantially higher alignment with the ideal on incorrect rollouts than on correct ones, where the student already performs well and the teacher's signal tends to become noisy. Furthermore, we find that the optimal distillation context depends jointly on the student model's capacity and the target task, and that no single universally effective configuration emerges. These findings motivate the use of per-task, per-token diagnostic analyses for distillation.

</details>


### [1071] [V4FinBench: Benchmarking Tabular Foundation Models, LLMs, and Standard Methods on Corporate Bankruptcy Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10896)
*Marcin Kostrzewa,Sebastian Tomczak,Roman Furman,Anna Poberezhna,Michał Furgała,Oleksii Furman,Maciej Zięba*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了V4FinBench——一个包含超过100万条公司年记录的企业破产预测基准数据集（覆盖维谢格拉德集团四国2006-2021年数据），包含131个特征、6个预测时间窗口和复合困境标准，并提供了TabPFN、Llama-3-8B等方法的参考评估结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业破产预测面临严重的类别不平衡和多时间跨度预测挑战，但公开数据集稀缺且规模小（仅有6,000-80,000条观测），大型数据资源则被付费墙限制。为填补这一空白，作者构建了大规模开源基准数据集。

Method: 构建了V4FinBench数据集（V4国家2006-2021年数据，131个特征，6个预测时间窗口，0.19%-0.36%的正样本率），并对比了标准表格基线方法、微调TabPFN以及QLoRA微调的Llama-3-8B模型在不平衡感知微调下的表现。

Result: TabPFN在较长时间窗口上匹配或超过梯度提升（F1和ROC-AUC）；Llama-3-8B在所有时间窗口的ROC-AUC上均落后梯度提升，F1差距在远期窗口显著扩大；V4FinBench微调的TabPFN在美国破产数据集上优于原始TabPFN。

Conclusion: V4FinBench作为大型公开破产预测基准具有价值，TabPFN展示了良好的跨领域迁移能力，而大语言模型（Llama-3-8B）在此任务上表现不佳。数据集已公开释放以促进后续研究。

Abstract: Corporate bankruptcy prediction is a high-stakes financial task characterized by severe class imbalance and multi-horizon forecasting demands. Public datasets supporting it remain scarce and small: widely used free benchmarks contain between 6,000 and 80,000 company-year observations, while larger resources are behind subscription paywalls. To address this gap, we introduce V4FinBench, a benchmark of over one million company-year records from the Visegràd Group (V4) economies (2006-2021), with 131 financial and non-financial features, six prediction horizons, and a composite distress criterion jointly capturing solvency, profitability, and liquidity deterioration. V4FinBench is designed to support the evaluation of tabular and foundation-model methods under realistic class imbalance, with positive rates between 0.19% and 0.36%. We provide reference evaluations of standard tabular baselines, finetuned TabPFN, and QLoRA-finetuned Llama-3-8B. With imbalance-aware finetuning, TabPFN matches or exceeds gradient boosting at longer time horizons on both $F_1$-score and ROC-AUC. In contrast, Llama-3-8B trails gradient boosting on ROC-AUC at every horizon and is generally weaker on $F_1$-score, with the gap widening sharply beyond the immediate horizon. In an external evaluation on the American Bankruptcy Dataset, the V4FinBench-finetuned TabPFN checkpoint improves over vanilla TabPFN, suggesting that adaptation captures transferable financial-distress structure rather than only V4-specific patterns. V4FinBench is publicly released to support further evaluation and development of prediction methods on realistic financial data.

</details>


### [1072] [Beyond Red-Teaming: Formal Guarantees of LLM Guardrail Classifiers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10901)
*Nikita Kezins,Urbas Ekka,Pascal Berrang,Luca Arnaboldi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在预激活空间中对Guardrail Classifier进行形式化验证的方法，通过定义凸有害区域并利用sigmoid单调性实现O(d)时间内的闭式可靠性证明。实验发现所有分类器均存在可验证的安全漏洞，其中BERT的覆盖率在最优阈值下崩溃至55%，揭示了其安全边界的脆弱性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的Guardrail Classifier在测试中表现良好，但缺乏形式化保证。传统epsilon-ball方法在离散输入空间中缺乏语义意义，难以定义"有害行为"的规范。因此需要一种新的验证框架来提供形式化的安全保障。

Method: 将验证从离散输入空间转移到分类器的预激活空间，将有害区域定义为凸形状。利用sigmoid分类头的单调性，通过证明最坏情况点来保证整个区域的安全性。提出了两种区域构造方法：SVD对齐的超矩形（精确SAT/UNSAT证明）和高斯混合模型（概率证明）。

Result: 所有超矩形配置均返回SAT，揭示所有分类器存在可验证的安全漏洞。GPT-2和Llama-3.1-8B保持90%和80%的稳健覆盖率，而BERT在最优阈值下覆盖率崩溃至55%，只有在采用极度保守的悲观阈值时才达到完全覆盖。

Conclusion: 该形式化验证框架揭示了Guardrail Classifier在实证指标之外的真正有效性。不同模型在表示有害内容时呈现出不同的结构稳定性，BERT的安全保证尤其脆弱，存在"覆盖崩溃"现象。

Abstract: Guardrail Classifiers defend production language models against harmful behavior, but although results seem promising in testing, they provide no formal guarantees. Providing formal guarantees for such models is hard because "harmful behavior" has no natural specification in a discrete input space: and the standard epsilon-ball properties used in other domains do not carry semantic meaning. We close this gap by shifting verification from the discrete input space to the classifier's pre-activation space, where we define a harmful region as a convex shape enclosing the representations of known harmful prompts. Because the sigmoid classification head is monotonic, certifying the worst-case point is sufficient to certify the entire region, yielding a closed-form soundness proof without approximation in O(d) time. To formally evaluate these classifiers, we propose two constructions of such regions: SVD-aligned hyper-rectangles, which yield exact SAT/UNSAT certificates, and Gaussian Mixture Models, which yield probabilistic certificates over semantically coherent clusters. Applying this framework to three author-trained Guardrail Classifiers on the toxicity domain, every hyper-rectangle configuration returns SAT, exposing verifiable safety holes across all classifiers, despite seemingly high empirical metrics. Probabilistic GMM certificates also expose a divergent structural stability in how these models represent harm. While GPT-2 and Llama-3.1-8B maintain robust coverage of 90% and 80% across varying boundaries, BERT's safety guarantees prove uniquely volatile. This 'coverage collapse' to 55% at the optimal threshold reveals a sparsely populated safety margin in BERT, which only achieves full coverage by adopting an extremely conservative pessimistic threshold. These approaches combined, provide new insights on how effective Guardrail Classifiers really are, beyond traditional red-teaming.

</details>


### [1073] [DataMaster: Towards Autonomous Data Engineering for Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10906)
*Yaxin Du,Xiyuan Yang,Zhifan Zhou,Wanxu Liu,Zixing Lei,Zimeng Chen,Fenyi Liu,Haotian Wu,Yuzhu Cai,Zexi Liu,Xinyu Zhu,WenHao Wang,Linfeng Zhang,Chen Qian,Siheng Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DataMaster框架，通过树结构搜索、共享数据池和全局记忆三大组件，实现任务条件化的自主数据工程，在不改变学习算法的前提下优化数据侧，包括外部数据发现、选择、组合和清洗，在MLE-Bench Lite和PostTrainBench上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着模型架构、训练方法和计算预算日益标准化，数据成为提升机器学习系统的关键，但数据工程仍高度依赖人工、缺乏系统性方法，迫切需要自动化数据优化框架。

Method: 提出DataMaster框架，包含三个核心组件：1) DataTree - 组织多种数据工程分支的树结构搜索；2) 共享Data Pool - 存储发现的外部数据源以便复用；3) Global Memory - 记录节点结果、产物和可复用发现，支持跨分支传递有用证据。

Result: 在MLE-Bench Lite上，奖牌率相比初始分数提升32.27%；在PostTrainBench上，GPQA指标超越instruct模型(31.02% vs 30.35%)。

Conclusion: DataMaster通过树结构搜索、数据共享和记忆机制有效解决了自主数据工程中的开放搜索空间、分支依赖优化和延迟验证等核心挑战，证明了在不改变学习算法的情况下仅通过数据侧优化即可显著提升系统性能。

Abstract: As model families, training recipes, and compute budgets become increasingly standardized, further gains in machine learning systems depend increasingly on data. Yet data engineering remains largely manual and ad hoc: practitioners repeatedly search for external datasets, adapt them to existing pipelines, validate candidate data through downstream training, and carry forward lessons from prior attempts. We study task-conditioned autonomous data engineering, where an autonomous agent improves a fixed learning algorithm by optimizing only the data side, including external data discovery, data selection and composition, cleaning and transformation. The goal is to obtain a stronger downstream solution while leaving the learning algorithm unchanged. To address the open-ended search space, branch-dependent refinement, and delayed validation inherent in autonomous data engineering, we propose DataMaster, a data-agent framework that integrates tree-structured search, shared candidate data, and cumulative memory. DataMaster consists of three key components: a DataTree that organizes alternative data-engineering branches, a shared Data Pool that stores discovered external data sources for reuse, and a Global Memory that records node outcomes, artifacts, and reusable findings. Together, these components allow the agent to discover candidate data, construct executable training inputs, evaluate them through downstream feedback, and carry useful evidence across branches. We evaluate DataMaster on two types of benchmarks, MLE-Bench Lite and PostTrainBench. On MLE-Bench Lite, it improves medal rate by 32.27% over the initial score; on PostTrainBench, it surpasses the instruct model on GPQA (31.02% vs 30.35%).

</details>


### [1074] [Revisiting Policy Gradients for Restricted Policy Classes: Escaping Myopic Local Optima with $k$-step Policy Gradients](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10909)
*Alex DeWeese,Guannan Qu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种k步策略梯度方法，通过在k步时间窗口内耦合随机性，能够逃离受限策略类中的短视局部最优解，并理论证明其收敛到与最优确定性策略指数接近的解，且避免了分布不匹配因子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准策略梯度方法在受限策略类中容易陷入次优临界点，原因是策略梯度本质上是短视的（仅基于单步Q函数）。作者希望解决这一局限，使策略梯度能够逃离局部最优。

Method: 提出广义k步策略梯度方法，在k步时间窗口内耦合随机性；结合投影梯度下降和镜像下降进行优化，仅需值函数的平滑性和可微性假设。

Result: 理论证明该方法收敛到性能与最优确定性策略呈指数接近（关于k）的解；投影梯度下降和镜像下降可在O(1/T)迭代次数内达到该指数保证；避免了分布不匹配因子，能逃离次优临界点。

Conclusion: 该方法为状态聚合、部分可观测合作多智能体等场景提供近似最优解，且能改善完全可观测环境中的探索问题。

Abstract: This work revisits standard policy gradient methods used on restricted policy classes, which are known to get stuck in suboptimal critical points. We identify an important cause for this phenomenon to be that the policy gradient is itself fundamentally myopic, i.e. it only improves the policy based on the one-step $Q$-function. In this work, we propose a generalized $k$-step policy gradient method that couples the randomness within a $k$-step time window and can escape the myopic local optima in MDPs with restricted policy classes. We show this new method is theoretically guaranteed to converge to a solution that is exponentially close in performance to the optimal deterministic policy with respect to $k$. Further, we show projected gradient descent and mirror descent with this $k$-step policy gradient can achieve this exponential guarantee in $O(\frac{1}{T})$ iterations, despite only assuming smoothness and differentiability of the value function. This will provide near optimal solutions to previously elusive applications like state aggregation and partially observable cooperative multi-agent settings. Moreover, our bounds avoid the ubiquitous distribution mismatch factors $||d_μ^{π^*} / d_μ^π||_\infty$ and $||d_μ^{π^*} / μ||_\infty$ enabling the $k$-step policy gradient method to escape suboptimal critical points that emerge from poor exploration in fully observable settings.

</details>


### [1075] [Optimal and Scalable MAPF via Multi-Marginal Optimal Transport and Schrödinger Bridges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10917)
*Usman A. Khan,Joseph W. Durham*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将匿名多智能体路径规划（MAPF）问题建模为多边际最优传输（MMOT）问题，利用马尔可夫结构将指数级复杂的MMOT转化为多项式规模的线性规划（LP），并通过Schrödinger桥构建概率框架实现大规模问题的近似最优解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 匿名MAPF问题中，机器人需在图上移动到多个目标点，传统方法计算复杂度高。作者试图利用最优传输理论，将问题转化为可高效求解的LP形式，并扩展至大规模场景。

Method: 1) 将MAPF建模为具有马尔可夫结构的MMOT问题，转化为多项式规模的LP；2) 证明LP的可行性与全幺模性，保证整数解且无时空重叠；3) 引入Schrödinger桥的概率框架，通过熵正则化和Sinkhorn迭代求解分数传输方案；4) 用分数传输作为模板简化原LP，获得近优整数解。

Result: 所提LP在匿名设置下可行且全幺模，得到0-1整数最优传输方案；Schrödinger桥方法有效降低计算复杂度，在实验中接近最优解并显著提升可扩展性。

Conclusion: 匿名MAPF可高效转化为MMOT-LP问题，Schrödinger桥框架为其大规模应用提供了可行的近似求解途径，在最优性与可扩展性之间取得良好平衡。

Abstract: We consider anonymous multi-agent path finding (MAPF) where a set of robots is tasked to travel to a set of targets on a finite, connected graph. We show that MAPF can be cast as a special class of multi-marginal optimal transport (MMOT) problems with an underlying Markovian structure, under which the exponentially large MMOT collapses to a linear program (LP) polynomial in size. Focusing on the anonymous setting, we establish conditions under which the corresponding LP is feasible, totally unimodular, and consequently, yields min-cost, integral $(\{0,1\})$ transports that do not overlap in both space and time. To adapt the approach to large-scale problems, we cast the MAPF-MMOT in a probabilistic framework via Schrödinger bridges. Under standard assumptions, we show that the Schrödinger bridge formulation reduces to an entropic regularization of the corresponding MMOT that admits an iterative Sinkhorn-type solution. The Schrödinger bridge, being a probabilistic framework, provides a shadow (fractional) transport that we use as a template to solve a reduced LP and demonstrate that it results in near-optimal, integral transports at a significant reduction in complexity. Extensive experiments highlight the optimality and scalability of the proposed approaches.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [1076] [Accelerating Multi-Condition T2I Generation via Adaptive Condition Offloading and Pruning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08836)
*Yuxin Kong,Peng Yang,Chongbin Yi,Fan Wu,Feng Lyu*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 提出一种端边协同系统，通过自适应条件卸载和剪枝来加速多条件文本到图像生成，降低延迟约25%，提升生成质量6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多条件文本到图像生成中，多个条件输入会带来大量计算和通信开销，导致不可接受的生成延迟。

Method: 1) Subtask Manager：通过启发式算法联合优化条件推理卸载和带宽分配，平衡本地和边缘执行延迟；2) Conditioning Scale Estimator：轻量级特征驱动评估器，分析特征激活强度和条件间重叠度，自适应选择条件缩放比例并剪枝不重要条件。

Result: 延迟降低近25%，平均生成质量提升6%，优于其他基准方法。

Conclusion: 端边协同结合自适应条件管理，能有效降低多条件T2I生成的延迟并提升生成质量。

Abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) generation using multiple conditions enables fine-grained user control on the generated image. Yet, incorporating multi-condition inputs incurs substantial computation and communication overhead, due to additional preprocessing subtasks and control optimizations. It hence leads to unacceptable generation latency. In this paper, we propose an end-edge collaborative system design to accelerate multi-condition T2I generation through adaptive condition offloading and pruning. Extensive offline profiling reveal that, different conditions exhibit significant diversity in computation and communication costs. To this end, we propose a \textit{Subtask Manager} that jointly optimizes condition inference offloading and bandwidth allocation using a heuristic algorithm, balancing local and edge execution delays to minimize overall preprocessing latency. Then, we design a lightweight feature-driven \textit{Conditioning Scale Estimator} that evaluates the contribution of each condition by analyzing its feature activation strength and overlap with other conditions. This allows adaptive conditioning scale selection and pruning of insignificant conditions, thereby accelerating the denoising process. Extensive experimental results show that our system reduces latency by nearly 25\% and improves 6\% average generation quality, outperforming other benchmarks.

</details>


### [1077] [Mitigating Multimodal Inconsistency via Cognitive Dual-Pathway Reasoning for Intent Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09468)
*Yifan Wang,Peiwu Wang,Yunxian Chi,Zhinan Gou,Kai Gao*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提出认知双路径推理框架(CDPR)，通过直觉路径建立稳定语义基础、推理路径缓解高层语义冲突，在双模态意图识别任务上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MIR方法忽视模态间一致与不一致线索的交叉交互，且无法有效建模多模态冲突导致语义抵消。

Method: 采用表征解耦提取模态不变与特定特征；直觉路径聚合跨模态共识；推理路径通过语义原型匹配+概率校准量化冲突，动态调节双路径权重；多视角损失缓解模态惰性。

Result: 在两个基准数据集上达到SOTA表现，且在缓解多模态不一致性方面具有优越鲁棒性。

Conclusion: CDPR通过模拟人类认知的双路径机制有效处理了多模态一致与不一致信号，代码已开源。

Abstract: Multimodal Intent Recognition (MIR) aims to understand complex user intentions by leveraging text, video, and audio signals. However, existing approaches face two key challenges: (1) overlooking intricate cross-modal interactions for distinguishing consistent and inconsistent cues, and (2) ineffectively modeling multimodal conflicts, leading to semantic cancellation. To address these, we propose a novel Cognitive Dual-Pathway Reasoning (CDPR) framework, which constructs a stable semantic foundation via the intuition pathway and mitigates high-level semantic conflicts through the reasoning pathway, cooperatively establishing deep semantic relations. Specifically, we first employ a representation disentanglement strategy to extract modality-invariant and specific features. Subsequently, the intuition pathway aggregates cross-modal consensus using shared features for solid global representations. The reasoning pathway introduces an inconsistency perception mechanism, combining semantic prototype matching with statistical probability calibration to precisely quantify conflict severity, and dynamically adjusting the weights between both pathways. Furthermore, a multi-view loss function is adopted to alleviate modality laziness and learn structured features at different stages. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks show that CDPR achieves SOTA performance and superior robustness in mitigating multimodal inconsistency. The code is available at https://github.com/Hebust-NLP/CDPR.

</details>


### [1078] [FLARE: Full-Modality Long-Video Audiovisual Retrieval Benchmark with User-Simulated Queries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10228)
*Qijie You,Hao Liang,Mingrui Chen,Bohan Zeng,Meiyi Qiang,Zhenhao Wong,Wentao Zhang*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: FLARE是一个面向长视频的全模态音视频检索基准，包含399个长视频、87,697个多模态标注片段和274,933个用户风格查询，实验发现用户风格查询显著改变模型行为，音频-语言对齐仍是统一音视频检索的关键瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检索基准多局限于短视频、单模态和基于caption的评估，缺乏面向长视频、融合视觉与音频信息的全模态检索基准，无法满足真实场景中用户短查询与长视频内容匹配的需求。

Method: 从399个Video-MME长视频（10-60分钟）中构建87,697个片段，标注视觉、音频及统一音视频caption；生成274,933个用户风格查询；通过硬双模态约束筛选跨模态查询（单模态失败、双模态成功）；在caption检索和query检索两种模式下进行评估。

Result: 15个代表性检索器的实验表明：用户风格查询会显著改变模型行为；强大的caption检索能力并不总是迁移到query检索；音频-语言对齐是统一音视频检索的关键瓶颈。

Conclusion: FLARE填补了长视频全模态检索基准的空白，揭示了现有模型在真实用户查询场景下的不足，为多模态检索研究提供了新的评估标准。

Abstract: As video becomes increasingly central to information dissemination and multimodal large language models (MLLMs) continue to advance, evaluating video retrieval has become increasingly important. In realistic search scenarios, this requires matching short user queries to long-form content using both visual and auditory evidence. Yet existing retrieval benchmarks are still dominated by short clips, single modalities, and caption-based evaluation. We introduce FLARE, a full-modality long-video audiovisual retrieval benchmark with user-simulated queries. Built from 399 carefully screened Video-MME videos (10--60 min, 225.4 h) to ensure source quality and diversity, FLARE contains 87,697 clips annotated with vision, audio, and unified audiovisual captions, together with 274,933 user-style queries. Cross-modal queries are further filtered by a hard bimodal constraint, requiring retrieval to fail under either modality alone but succeed when both are combined. FLARE evaluates models under two regimes, caption-based and query-based retrieval, across vision, audio, and unified audiovisual settings. Experiments with 15 representative retrievers show that user-style queries substantially change model behavior, strong caption-based performance does not always transfer to query-based retrieval, and audio--language alignment remains a key bottleneck for unified audiovisual retrieval. Our code and data are released at https://flarebench.github.io/

</details>


### [1079] [RW-Post: Auditable Evidence-Grounded Multimodal Fact-Checking in the Wild](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10357)
*Danni Xu,Shaojing Fan,Harry Cheng,Mohan Kankanhalli*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 该论文提出了RW-Post基准数据集和AgentFact验证基线，用于评估多模态事实核查中的视觉证据利用能力，发现现有模型在忠实证据接地方面存在较大提升空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态虚假信息常利用视觉说服手段（如篡改或挪用图片）来增强误导性文本，但现有基准缺乏可审计的、与现实世界对齐的多模态事实验证数据。

Method: 构建RW-Post基准：通过LLM辅助的提取-审计流水线，从人工事实核查文章中提取推理轨迹和显式链接的证据项，支持闭书、限定证据、开放网络三种评估模式。同时提出AgentFact作为参考验证基线。

Result: 实验表明现有LVLMs在忠实证据接地方面表现不佳，但限定证据的评估设置能同时提升准确性和忠实度，说明存在较大的改进空间。

Conclusion: RW-Post和AgentFact为多模态事实核查提供了更可控、可审计的评估框架，揭示了当前模型在证据利用上的关键瓶颈。

Abstract: Multimodal misinformation increasingly leverages visual persuasion, where repurposed or manipulated images strengthen misleading text. We introduce \textbf{RW-Post}, a post-aligned \textbf{text--image benchmark} for real-world multimodal fact-checking with \emph{auditable} annotations: each instance links the original social-media post with reasoning traces and explicitly linked evidence items derived from human fact-check articles via an LLM-assisted extraction-and-auditing pipeline. RW-Post supports controlled evaluation across closed-book, evidence-bounded, and open-web regimes, enabling systematic diagnosis of visual grounding and evidence utilization. We provide \textbf{AgentFact} as a reference verification baseline and benchmark strong open-source LVLMs under unified protocols. Experiments show substantial headroom: current models struggle with faithful evidence grounding, while evidence-bounded evaluation improves both accuracy and faithfulness. Code and dataset will be released at https://github.com/xudanni0927/AgentFact.

</details>


### [1080] [Vocabulary Hijacking in LVLMs: Unveiling Critical Attention Heads by Excluding Inert Tokens to Mitigate Hallucination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10622)
*Yangneng Chen,Junlin Li,Weijun Yao,Xilai Ma,Guodong Du,Wenya Wang,Jing Li*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文发现LVLM中的"词汇劫持"现象：特定视觉token（惰性token）吸引过多注意力，其隐藏状态解码为固定无关词汇。据此提出HABI方法定位这些token、NHAR指标衡量注意力头健壮性，以及无训练干预方法HAVAE，有效缓解幻觉且无额外计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LVLM在多模态任务中常产生与视觉输入矛盾的幻觉，先前研究归因于视觉注意力不足，但缺乏对注意力机制内部异常的深入分析。

Method: 1) 通过logit lens分析注意力机制，发现"词汇劫持"现象；2) 提出HABI策略定位惰性token；3) 提出NHAR指标量化注意力头对劫持的抵抗能力；4) 提出HAVAE无训练干预方法，选择性增强健壮注意力头对视觉内容的关注。

Result: 在多个基准测试上，HAVAE显著减少幻觉，无额外计算开销，且不损害模型通用能力。

Conclusion: 词汇劫持是LVLM幻觉的重要成因，通过识别健壮的注意力头并增强对其视觉内容的关注，可有效缓解幻觉问题。

Abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in multimodal tasks, yet their reliability is persistently undermined by hallucinations-generating text that contradicts visual input. Recent studies often attribute these errors to inadequate visual attention. In this work, we analyze the attention mechanisms via the logit lens, uncovering a distinct anomaly we term Vocabulary Hijacking. We discover that specific visual tokens, defined as Inert Tokens, disproportionately attract attention. Crucially, when their intermediate hidden states are projected into the vocabulary space, they consistently decode to a fixed set of unrelated words (termed Hijacking Anchors) across layers, revealing a rigid semantic collapse. Leveraging this semantic rigidity, we propose Hijacking Anchor-Based Identification (HABI), a robust strategy to accurately localize these Inert Tokens. To quantify the impact of this phenomenon, we introduce the Non-Hijacked Visual Attention Ratio (NHAR), a novel metric designed to identify attention heads that remain resilient to hijacking and are critical for factual accuracy. Building on these insights, we propose Hijacking-Aware Visual Attention Enhancement (HAVAE), a training-free intervention that selectively strengthens the focus of these identified heads on salient visual content. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that HAVAE significantly mitigates hallucinations with no additional computational overhead, while preserving the model's general capabilities. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/lab-klc/HAVAE.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [1081] [Where Reliability Lives in Vision-Language Models: A Mechanistic Study of Attention, Hidden States, and Causal Circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08200)
*Logan Mann,Ajit Saravanan,Ishan Dave,Shikhar Shiromani,Saadullah Ismail,Yi Xia,Emily Huang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现VLM的注意力锐度几乎不能预测回答正确性（相关性接近0），而隐藏状态几何、层间间隔形成和稀疏的后期层电路才是更可靠的可靠性指标。不同融合架构（晚期融合vs早期融合）在可靠性神经分布上存在显著差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 检验一个普遍直觉：视觉-语言模型（VLM）的注意力图越"锐利"（集中关注查询区域），模型回答就越自信和准确（即注意力-置信度假设）。

Method: 设计VLM可靠性探针（VRP），对三个开源VLM系列（LLaVA-1.5, PaliGemma, Qwen2-VL, 3-7B参数）进行统一机制分析，比较注意力结构、生成动态和隐藏状态几何与正确性标签的关系。

Result: （i）注意力结构与正确性的相关性近乎零；（ii）可靠性的可读性出现在计算后期，单个隐藏状态线性探针在POPE上AUROC>0.95；（iii）因果神经元消融揭示架构分裂：晚期融合LLaVA的可靠性集中在脆弱的晚期瓶颈，早期融合模型则分布广泛。

Conclusion: 在3-7B的VLM中，从隐藏状态几何、层间间隔和稀疏的后期层电路读取可靠性，比从注意力图锐度读取更可靠。这为设计监控机制提供了具体指导。

Abstract: A pervasive intuition holds that vision-language models (VLMs) are most trustworthy when their attention maps look sharp: concentrated attention on the queried region should imply a confident, calibrated answer. We test this Attention-Confidence Assumption directly. We instrument three open-weight VLM families (LLaVA-1.5, PaliGemma, Qwen2-VL; 3-7B parameters) with a unified mechanistic pipeline -- the VLM Reliability Probe (VRP) -- that compares attention structure, generation dynamics, and hidden-state geometry against a single correctness label. Three results emerge. (i) Attention structure is a near-zero predictor of correctness (R_pb(C_k,y)=0.001, 95% CI [-0.034,0.036]; R_pb(H_s,y)=-0.012, [-0.047,0.024] on a pooled n=3,090 split), even though attention remains causally necessary for feature extraction (top-30% patch masking drops accuracy by 8.2-11.3 pp, p<0.001). (ii) Reliability becomes legible later in the computation: a single hidden-state linear probe reaches AUROC>0.95 on POPE for two of three families, and self-consistency at K=10 is the strongest behavioral predictor we measure at 10x inference cost (R_pb=0.43). (iii) Causal neuron-level ablations expose a sharp architectural split with direct monitor-design implications: late-fusion LLaVA concentrates reliability in a fragile late bottleneck (-8.3 pp object-identification accuracy after top-5 probe-neuron ablation), whereas early-fusion PaliGemma and Qwen2-VL distribute it widely and absorb destruction of ~50% of their peak-layer hidden dimension with <=1 pp degradation. The takeaway is narrow but consequential: in 3-7B VLMs, reliability is read more reliably off hidden-state geometry, layer-wise margin formation, and sparse late-layer circuits than off attention-map sharpness.

</details>


### [1082] [Spatial Priming Outperforms Semantic Prompting: A Grid-Based Approach to Improving LLM Accuracy on Chart Data Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08220)
*Andrei Lazarev,Dmitrii Sedov,Alexander Galkin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文比较了两种提升多模态大模型从科学图表中提取数据性能的策略：高级语义提示（如元数据框架和思维链）和低级空间提示（如叠加坐标网格）。实验表明，语义方法未能带来显著改进，而简单的网格叠加方法将提取误差（SMAPE）从25.5%降低到19.5%（p<0.05），证明在当前模型下提供明确空间上下文更为有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学图表数据自动提取对大规模文献分析至关重要，但多模态大模型在非标准化图表上的准确性仍不足，因此需要探索最有效的策略来提升模型性能。

Method: 对比研究了两种策略：1）高级语义方法（两阶段元数据优先框架、思维链）；2）低级空间方法（在图表图像上叠加坐标网格）。在合成数据集上进行了定量实验。

Result: 语义方法未产生统计显著的改进；而网格空间方法将SMAPE从25.5%降至19.5%（p<0.05），实现了统计显著的性能提升。

Conclusion: 对于当前多模态模型，提供明确的空间上下文（坐标网格）比高级语义引导更有效、更可靠，适用于科学图表数据提取任务。

Abstract: The automated extraction of data from scientific charts is a critical task for large-scale literature analysis. While multimodal Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise, their accuracy on non-standardized charts remains a challenge. This raises a key research question: what is the most effective strategy to improve model performance (high-level semantic priming) or low-level spatial priming? This paper presents a comparative investigation into these two distinct strategies. We describe our exploratory experiments with semantic methods, such as a two-stage metadata-first framework and Chain-of-Thought, which failed to produce a statistically significant improvement. In contrast, we present a simple but highly effective spatial priming method: overlaying a coordinate grid onto the chart image before analysis. Our quantitative experiment on a synthetic dataset demonstrates that this grid-based approach provides a statistically significant reduction in data extraction error (SMAPE reduced from 25.5% to 19.5%, p < 0.05) compared to a baseline. We conclude that for the current generation of multimodal models, providing explicit spatial context is a more effective and reliable strategy than high-level semantic guidance for this class of tasks.

</details>


### [1083] [Auto-Rubric as Reward: From Implicit Preferences to Explicit Multimodal Generative Criteria](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08354)
*Juanxi Tian,Fengyuan Liu,Jiaming Han,Yilei Jiang,Yongliang Wu,Yesheng Liu,Haodong Li,Furong Xu,Wanhua Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Auto-Rubric as Reward (ARR)框架，将隐式的偏好知识外显化为结构化评分准则，并配套Rubric Policy Optimization (RPO)训练方法，在多模态对齐任务上超越传统RLHF方法，实现更可靠、数据高效的alignment。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLHF方法将人类偏好的多维结构压缩为标量或成对标签，导致偏好信息丢失且易受奖励攻击；最近基于准则的方法虽试图恢复结构，但在可靠性、可扩展性和数据效率上仍有不足。

Method: ARR框架在成对比较前，将VLM隐式的偏好知识外显化为prompt特定的结构化评分准则，将整体意图分解为可独立验证的质量维度；RPO则将这些多维度评估蒸馏为稳健的二元奖励信号，以准则条件化偏好决策稳定策略梯度。

Result: 在文本到图像生成和图像编辑基准上，ARR-RPO优于成对奖励模型和VLM评判器，证明将隐式偏好知识显式化为结构化准则能实现更可靠、数据高效的多模态对齐。

Conclusion: 多模态对齐的瓶颈并非知识缺失，而是缺乏一个因子化的接口来外显化隐式偏好知识。

Abstract: Aligning multimodal generative models with human preferences demands reward signals that respect the compositional, multi-dimensional structure of human judgment. Prevailing RLHF approaches reduce this structure to scalar or pairwise labels, collapsing nuanced preferences into opaque parametric proxies and exposing vulnerabilities to reward hacking. While recent Rubrics-as-Reward (RaR) methods attempt to recover this structure through explicit criteria, generating rubrics that are simultaneously reliable, scalable, and data-efficient remains an open problem. We introduce Auto-Rubric as Reward (ARR), a framework that reframes reward modeling from implicit weight optimization to explicit, criteria-based decomposition. Before any pairwise comparison, ARR externalizes a VLM's internalized preference knowledge as prompt-specific rubrics, translating holistic intent into independently verifiable quality dimensions. This conversion of implicit preference structure into inspectable, interpretable constraints substantially suppresses evaluation biases including positional bias, enabling both zero-shot deployment and few-shot conditioning on minimal supervision. To extend these gains into generative training, we propose Rubric Policy Optimization (RPO), which distills ARR's structured multi-dimensional evaluation into a robust binary reward, replacing opaque scalar regression with rubric-conditioned preference decisions that stabilize policy gradients. On text-to-image generation and image editing benchmarks, ARR-RPO outperforms pairwise reward models and VLM judges, demonstrating that explicitly externalizing implicit preference knowledge into structured rubrics achieves more reliable, data-efficient multimodal alignment, revealing that the bottleneck is the absence of a factorized interface, not a deficit of knowledge.

</details>


### [1084] [Embeddings for Preferences, Not Semantics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08360)
*Carter Blair,Ariel D. Procaccia,Milind Tambe*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出文本嵌入存在“偏好相似性”与“语义相似性”混淆的问题，通过构造打破相关性的合成训练数据，显著提升了偏好预测效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本嵌入衡量的是语义相似度，而在集体决策中需要的是“偏好相似性”（参与者对文本的认同程度与距离成反比），两者存在相关性但并非总是一致，导致偏好预测不准。

Method: 形式化地将偏好信号（立场、价值观）与语义干扰项（风格、措辞）之间的相关性定义为不变性问题，通过合成训练数据打破这种相关性，使最优评分器偏离受干扰项主导的余弦相似度。

Result: 在11个在线审议数据集上，该方法显著提升了偏好预测效果。

Conclusion: 通过打破偏好与语义的相关性，可以更好地建模参与者的真实偏好，从而支持基于自由文本的集体决策。

Abstract: Modern AI is opening the door to collective decision-making in which participants express their views as free-form text rather than voting on a fixed set of candidates. A natural idea is to embed these opinions in a vector space so that the substantial literature on facility location problems and fair clustering can be brought to bear. But standard text embeddings measure semantic similarity, whereas distances in facility location problems and fair clustering require what we call \textit{preferential similarity}: a participant's agreement with a piece of text should be inversely related to their distance from it. Off-the-shelf embeddings inherit a coarse preference signal through a correlation between semantic and preferential similarity, but fail to capture preferences when the correlation breaks. We formalize this as an invariance problem: text embedding models encode both a preference-relevant signal (stance and values) and semantic nuisance (style and wording), and the two are observationally correlated, so a geometry that relies on nuisance can appear preference-correct even when it is not. We show that synthetic training data designed to break this correlation provably shifts the optimal scorer away from nuisance-dominated cosine and significantly improves preference prediction across 11 online deliberation datasets.

</details>


### [1085] [On Distinguishing Capability Elicitation from Capability Creation in Post-Training: A Free-Energy Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08368)
*Yuhao Li,Shengchao Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL）都主要是对预训练模型已有行为进行重加权（能力激发），而非创造新能力。区分关键在于是否扩展模型在有限预算下可实际达到的行为空间（可及支撑集）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究常将SFT视为模仿、RL视为发现，但这种粗粒度区分掩盖了本质问题：训练过程是激发已有能力还是创造新能力？作者希望建立更精确的理论框架来指导后训练研究。

Method: 引入"可及支撑集"（accessible support）概念，即模型在有限预算下可实际产生的行为集合。基于自由能视角，将SFT和RL统一视为对预训练参考分布的重加权，区别仅在于使用演示信号（SFT）或奖励信号（RL）定义低能行为区域。

Result: SFT和RL在保持接近基础模型时，主要效果都是局部重加权（能力激发），而非创造新能力。真正的能力创造需要扩展可及支撑集，例如通过搜索、交互、工具使用或引入新信息。

Conclusion: 后训练研究的核心问题不应是SFT vs RL的框架选择，而应聚焦于：训练过程是在重加权已有行为，还是在扩展模型可达的行为空间？这为后训练方法设计与评估提供了更清晰的理论指导。

Abstract: Debates about large language model post-training often treat supervised fine-tuning (SFT) as imitation and reinforcement learning (RL) as discovery. But this distinction is too coarse. What matters is whether a training procedure increases the probability of behaviors the pretrained model could already produce, or whether it changes what the model can practically reach. We argue that post-training research should distinguish between capability elicitation and capability creation. We make this distinction operational by introducing the notion of accessible support: the set of behaviors that a model can practically produce under finite budgets. Post-training that reweights behaviors within this support is capability elicitation; whereas changing the support itself corresponds to capability creation. We develop this argument through a free-energy view of post-training. SFT and RL can both be seen as reweighting a pretrained reference distribution, only with different external signals. Demonstration signals define low-energy behavior for SFT, and reward signals define low-energy behavior for RL. When the update remains close to the base model, the main effect is local reweighting, not capability creation. Within this framework, the central question is no longer whether post-training is framed as SFT or RL, but whether it reweights behaviors already within reach, or instead expands the model's reachable behavioral space through search, interaction, tool use, or the incorporation of new information.

</details>


### [1086] [MemQ: Integrating Q-Learning into Self-Evolving Memory Agents over Provenance DAGs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08374)
*Junwei Liao,Haoting Shi,Ruiwen Zhou,Jiaqian Wang,Shengtao Zhang,Wei Zhang,Weinan Zhang,Ying Wen,Zhiyu Li,Feiyu Xiong,Bo Tang,Muning Wen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MemQ提出了一种基于TD(λ)资格迹的 episodic memory 更新方法，通过 provenance DAG 反向传播信用，在六个基准上均取得最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将每条记忆独立评估检索质量，忽略了记忆之间的依赖链条——即某些记忆的检索如何促成后续记忆的创建。

Method: 提出 MemQ，应用 TD(λ) 资格迹到记忆 Q 值，通过 provenance DAG（记录每条新记忆创建时检索了哪些旧记忆）反向传播信用，信用权重按 DAG 深度 d 以 (γλ)^d 衰减，并形式化为 Exogenous-Context MDP。

Result: 在 OS 交互、函数调用、代码生成、多模态推理、具身推理、专家级问答六个基准上，泛化评估和运行时学习均取得最高成功率；多步任务提升最大（+5.7pp），单步分类提升最小（+0.77pp）。

Conclusion: MemQ 通过结构化的信用分配有效提升了多步依赖任务的记忆利用效率，并提供了 γ 和 λ 参数选择的指导原则。

Abstract: Episodic memory allows LLM agents to accumulate and retrieve experience, but current methods treat each memory independently, i.e., evaluating retrieval quality in isolation without accounting for the dependency chains through which memories enable the creation of future memories. We introduce MemQ, which applies TD($λ$) eligibility traces to memory Q-values, propagating credit backward through a provenance DAG that records which memories were retrieved when each new memory was created. Credit weight decays as $(γλ)^d$ with DAG depth $d$, replacing temporal distance with structural proximity. We formalize the setting as an Exogenous-Context MDP, whose factored transition decouples the exogenous task stream from the endogenous memory store. Across six benchmarks, spanning OS interaction, function calling, code generation, multimodal reasoning, embodied reasoning, and expert-level QA, MemQ achieves the highest success rate on all six in generalization evaluation and runtime learning, with gains largest on multi-step tasks that produce deep and relevant provenance chains (up to +5.7~pp) and smallest on single-step classification (+0.77~pp) where single-step updates already suffice. We further study how $γ$ and $λ$ interact with the EC-MDP structure, providing principled guidance for parameter selection and future research. Code will be available soon.

</details>


### [1087] [SkillLens: Adaptive Multi-Granularity Skill Reuse for Cost-Efficient LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08386)
*Yongliang Miao,Ziyang Yu,Liang Zhao,Bowen Zhu,Hasibul Haque*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SkillLens是一个分层技能进化框架，将技能组织为四层图结构（策略、方案、程序、原语），通过混合粒度检索和自适应调整机制，实现高效且经济的技能复用，在MuLocbench和ALFWorld上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有技能库系统将技能视为扁平的、单一分辨率的提示块，导致粗粒度技能引入无关上下文，而重写整个技能又成本过高。

Method: 将技能组织为四层图（策略、方案、程序、原语），通过语义检索种子、度校正随机游走扩展，再用验证器决定接受、分解、重写或跳过每个节点，并随时间演化优化技能库和验证器。

Result: 在MuLocbench上bug定位Acc@1提升6.31个百分点，在ALFWorld上任务成功率从45.00%提升至51.31%。

Conclusion: 混合粒度适应在稀疏不匹配假设下具有次线性成本，进化更新规则单调改进验证目标直至局部最优，验证了分层技能进化框架的有效性。

Abstract: Skill libraries have become a practical way for LLM agents to reuse procedural experience across tasks. However, existing systems typically treat skills as flat, single-resolution prompt blocks. This creates a tension between relevance and cost: injecting coarse skills can introduce irrelevant or misleading context, while rewriting entire skills is expensive and often unnecessary. We propose SkillLens, a hierarchical skill-evolution framework that organizes skills into a four-layer graph of policies, strategies, procedures, and primitives, and retrieves them at mixed granularity. Given a task, SkillLens first retrieves semantically relevant skill seeds, expands them through degree-corrected random walk over the skill graph, and then uses a verifier to decide whether each visited unit should be accepted, decomposed, rewritten, or skipped. This enables the agent to reuse compatible subskills directly while adapting only locally mismatched components. To improve the system over time, SkillLens further refines multi-granularity skills and verifier in order to improve its routing decisions. We provide theoretical analysis showing that mixed-granularity adaptation incurs sublinear cost under sparse mismatch assumptions and that the evolutionary update rule monotonically improves the validation objective until a local optimum. Across MuLocbench and ALFWorld, SkillLens consistently improves over strong skill-based baselines, achieving up to a 6.31 percentage-point Acc@1 gain for bug localization and raising agent success rate from 45.00% to 51.31%.

</details>


### [1088] [PLACO: A Multi-Stage Framework for Cost-Effective Performance in Human-AI Teams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08388)
*Pranavkumar Mallela,Vinay Kumar,Shashi Shekhar Jha,Shweta Jain*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文针对人类-AI团队在分类任务中的协同问题，提出了一种结合人类确定性标签与模型概率输出的贝叶斯方法，通过假设人类与模型输出在给定真实标签时条件独立，利用人类的类别级校准概率和模型的实例级校准概率进行有效融合，以提升整体分类性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当人类和模型单独都无法达到理想性能时，人-AI协作变得至关重要。随着生成式AI的发展，许多任务（如写作、算法开发）已转变为人-AI协作任务。在分类任务中，需要解决如何有效结合人类确定性输出与模型概率输出的问题。

Method: 基于贝叶斯规则，假设人类输出与模型输出在给定真实标签的条件下条件独立。具体地，使用一个确定性标注器（人类）和一个概率性标注器（分类模型）进行组合，通过模型的实例级校准概率和人类的类别级校准概率来实现融合。

Result: 提出了一种结合人类和模型输出的有效方法，利用条件独立假设下的贝叶斯规则进行概率融合。

Conclusion: 该方法为分类任务中的人-AI团队协作提供了简洁而有效的解决方案，能够在人类和模型均无法独立达到最优性能时提升整体系统表现。

Abstract: Human-AI teams play a pivotal role in improving overall system performance when neither the human nor the model can achieve such performance on their own. With the advent of powerful and accessible Generative AI models, several mundane tasks have morphed into Human-AI team tasks. From writing essays to developing advanced algorithms, humans have found that using AI assistance has led to an accelerated work pace like never before. In classification tasks, where the final output is a single hard label, it is crucial to address the combination of human and model output. Prior work elegantly solves this problem using Bayes rule, using the assumption that human and model output are conditionally independent given the ground truth. Specifically, it discusses a combination method to combine a single deterministic labeler (the human) and a probabilistic labeler (the classifier model) using the model's instance-level and the human's class-level calibrated probabilities.

</details>


### [1089] [CoCoDA: Co-evolving Compositional DAG for Tool-Augmented Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08399)
*Ziyang Yu,Qiyue Li,Liang Zhao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CoCoDA提出通过组合代码DAG结构实现规划器与工具库的协同进化，使用类型化DAG检索和DAG奖励，在固定上下文预算下支持大规模工具库，使8B模型在数学推理等任务上匹配或超越32B教师模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具增强语言模型面临扩展工具库时的耦合挑战：库必须随规划器演化而增长，但检索必须在固定上下文预算内进行。传统方法将工具视为扁平或文本索引记忆，导致提示成本随库规模增长，且忽略了可执行代码的类型化和组合结构。

Method: 提出CoCoDA框架：1) 构建组合代码DAG，节点为原始或组合工具，边编码调用依赖；2) 类型化DAG检索：先通过符号签名统一剪枝，再排序描述、过滤行为规范、用示例消歧；3) 训练时将成功轨迹折叠为验证后的组合工具，并用DAG奖励更新规划器，奖励按原始扩展大小加权组合工具。

Result: 在数学推理、表格分析和代码任务基准上，CoCoDA使8B学生模型在GSM8K和MATH上匹配或超越32B教师模型，并持续优于强工具使用和库学习基线。

Conclusion: 通过代码原生DAG结构实现工具库与规划器的协同进化，在固定上下文预算下支持工具库高效扩展，理论证明了检索成本降低、亚线性检索时间、组合优势等性质。

Abstract: Tool-augmented language models can extend small language models with external executable skills, but scaling the tool library creates a coupled challenge: the library must evolve with the planner as new reusable subroutines emerge, while retrieval from the growing library must remain within a fixed context budget. Existing tool-use and skill-library methods typically treat tools as flat or text-indexed memories, causing prompt cost to grow with library size and obscuring the typed, compositional structure of executable code. We propose CoCoDA, a framework that co-evolves the planner and tool library through a single code-native structure: a compositional code DAG. Nodes are primitive or composite tools, edges encode invocation dependencies, and each node stores a typed signature, description, pre/post-condition specification, and worked examples. At inference time, Typed DAG Retrieval prunes candidates by symbolic signature unification, ranks survivors by descriptions, filters them by behavioral specifications, and disambiguates with examples, keeping expensive context materialization on progressively smaller candidate sets. At training time, successful trajectories are folded into validated composite tools, while the planner is updated with a DAG-induced reward that credits composites by their primitive expansion size. We provide theoretical results showing retrieval cost reduction, sublinear retrieval time, compositional advantage under the shaped reward, monotone co-evolution under conservative updates, and DAG well-formedness. Across mathematical reasoning, tabular analysis, and code task benchmarks, CoCoDA enables an 8B student to match or exceed a 32B teacher on GSM8K and MATH and consistently improves over strong tool-use and library-learning baselines.

</details>


### [1090] [Empowering VLMs for Few-Shot Multimodal Time Series Classification via Tailored Agentic Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09395)
*Lin Li,Jiawei Huang,Qihao Quan,Dan Li,Boxin Li,Xiao Zhang,Erli Meng,Wenjie Feng,Jian Lou,See-Kiong Ng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出MarsTSC，首个面向少样本多模态时间序列分类的VLM智能体推理框架，通过自演进知识库与反射式智能体推理实现性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在少样本条件下难以有效利用多模态信息，且缺乏可解释的推理过程，需要一种能动态积累知识、自我修正的智能推理框架。

Method: 提出三角色协作框架：Generator执行分类推理、Reflector诊断错误根源、Modifier更新知识库；引入测试时更新策略缓解少样本偏差和分布偏移。

Result: 在12个主流时间序列基准上，基于6种VLM骨干均取得显著且一致的性能提升，优于经典方法和基础模型方法，并生成可解释的推理依据。

Conclusion: MarsTSC通过智能体推理与动态知识库有效解决了少样本多模态时间序列分类的难题，兼具高性能与可解释性。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose the first VL$\underline{\textbf{M}}$ $\underline{\textbf{a}}$gentic $\underline{\textbf{r}}$easoning framework for few-$\underline{\textbf{s}}$hot multimodal $\underline{\textbf{T}}$ime $\underline{\textbf{S}}$eries $\underline{\textbf{C}}$lassification ($\textbf{MarsTSC}$), which introduces a self-evolving knowledge bank as a dynamic context iteratively refined via reflective agentic reasoning. The framework comprises three collaborative roles: i) Generator conducts reliable classification via reasoning; ii) Reflector diagnoses the root causes of reasoning errors to yield discriminative insights targeting the temporal features overlooked by Generator; iii) Modifier applies verified updates to the knowledge bank to prevent context collapse. We further introduce a test-time update strategy to enable cautious, continuous knowledge bank refinement to mitigate few-shot bias and distribution shift. Extensive experiments across 12 mainstream time series benchmarks demonstrate that $\textbf{MarsTSC}$ delivers substantial and consistent performance gains across 6 VLM backbones, outperforming both classical and foundation model-based time series baselines under few-shot conditions, while producing interpretable rationales that ground each classification decision in human-readable feature evidence.

</details>


### [1091] [Belief or Circuitry? Causal Evidence for In-Context Graph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08405)
*Katharine Kowalyshyn,Timothy Duggan,Daniel Little,Michael C Hughes*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过图随机游走任务探究LLM的上下文学习机制，发现模型并非单纯依赖模式匹配或潜在结构推理，而是同时并行使用两种机制：全局拓扑结构推断与局部转移复制，二者在正交子空间中共同编码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对LLM如何实现上下文学习存在争议：是仅仅通过匹配最近的token模式，还是能够推断出潜在的结构信息？本文旨在区分这两种机制。

Method: 设计了一个图随机游走任务（两种竞争图结构），通过PCA重建内部表示、残差流激活修补、图差异线性操控等方法进行因果干预分析。

Result: 发现两种图拓扑在正交主成分子空间中同时编码；晚期层激活修补几乎完全传递干净的图偏好；线性操控能按预期方向改变预测，且在范数匹配和标签混洗控制下失效。

Conclusion: LLM的上下文学习支持双重机制观点：真正的结构推理与归纳电路并行运作，单一机制不足以解释全部现象。

Abstract: How do LLMs learn in-context? Is it by pattern-matching recent tokens, or by inferring latent structure? We probe this question using a toy graph random-walk across two competing graph structures. This task's answer is, in principle, decidable: either the model tracks global topology, or it copies local transitions. We present two lines of evidence that neither account alone is sufficient. First, reconstructing the internal representation structure via PCA reveals that at intermediate mixture ratios, both graph topologies are encoded in orthogonal principal subspaces simultaneously. This pattern is difficult to reconcile with purely local transition copying. Second, residual-stream activation patching and graph-difference steering causally intervene on this graph-family signal: late-layer patching almost fully transfers the clean graph preference, while linear steering moves predictions in the intended direction and fails under norm-matched and label-shuffled controls. Taken together, our findings are most consistent with a dual-mechanism account in which genuine structure inference and induction circuits operate in parallel.

</details>


### [1092] [Playing games with knowledge: AI-Induced delusions need game theoretic interventions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08409)
*Will Beaumaster,Paul Schrater*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 对话AI存在根本性缺陷：即使理性用户也会因谄媚式AI陷入认知固化和错误信念螺旋。问题根源不在于模型本身，而在于从用户驱动搜索到反复博弈对话的范式转变。作者将问题形式化为Crawford-Sobel廉价谈话博弈，并提出推理时干预机制——认知中介（Epistemic Mediator），通过引入认知摩擦打破混同均衡，在模拟中实现了48倍的信念螺旋率差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示对话AI作为知识接口的根本缺陷——谄媚式聊天机器人诱导理性用户陷入认知固化和妄想性信念螺旋，且问题根源不在模型本身，而在信息交互范式的系统性转变。

Method: 将问题形式化为Crawford-Sobel廉价谈话博弈（混同均衡），提出推理时机制设计干预——Epistemic Mediator（认知中介），通过引入认知摩擦（成本信号）打破混同均衡；提出Belief Versioning（信念版本管理），类似git的认知元记忆系统，存储健康信念并在检测到验证寻求式抵抗时回滚。

Result: 模拟中实现分离均衡，信念螺旋率差异达48倍，同时通过学习保留标准，证明认知安全本质上是策略性信息环境设计问题而非模型对齐问题。

Conclusion: AI的认知安全性关键不在于简单地对齐模型，而在于设计策略性信息交互环境，通过机制设计干预打破谄媚式对话的混同均衡。

Abstract: Conversational AI has a fundamental flaw as a knowledge interface: sycophantic chatbots induce epistemic entrenchment and delusional belief spirals even in rational agents. We propose the problem does not stem from the AI model, rooted instead in a systemic consequence of the paradigm shift from user-driven knowledge search to users and agents engaged in strategic, repeated-play communication. We formalize the problem as a Crawford-Sobel cheap talk game, where costless user signals induce a pooling equilibrium. Agents optimized for user satisfaction produce sycophantic strategies that provide identical reinforcement across user types with opposite epistemic incentives: exploratory ``Growth-seekers'' ($θ_G$) and confirmatory ``Validation-seekers'' ($θ_V$). Under repeated play, this identification failure creates a coordination trap -- analogous to a Prisoner's Dilemma -- where locally rational feedback loops drive users toward pathologically certain false beliefs. We propose an inference-time mechanism design intervention called an Epistemic Mediator that breaks this pooling equilibrium by introducing a costly signal (epistemic friction), forcing type revelation based on users' asymmetric cognitive costs for processing resistance. A key contribution is Belief Versioning, a git-inspired epistemic meta-memory system that stores healthy beliefs and rollbacks when validation-seeking resistance is detected. In simulation, this intervention achieves a separating equilibrium achieving a $48\times$ differential in spiral rates while passing a learning preservation criterion), evidence that epistemic safety in AI is fundamentally a problem of strategic information environment design rather than simple model alignment.

</details>


### [1093] [Political Plasticity: An Analysis of Ideological Adaptability in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08415)
*Bruno Bianchi,Diego Tiscornia,Matias Travizano,Ariel Futoransky*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）的"政治可塑性"，即模型根据用户上下文调整其政治立场的能力。研究发现系统提示词效果有限，而用户提示（含少样本示例）能显著改变模型立场，尤其在更大更新的模型中。验证实验发现大多数模型在问题反转时出现反直觉偏移，暗示可能存在数据泄露。不同语言下的实验也显示了微妙的立场变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往研究多关注LLMs的内在政治偏见，但对其根据用户上下文主动调整政治立场的能力（即"政治可塑性"）知之甚少。作者希望系统性地量化这一能力，并探究不同诱导方法的有效性。

Method: 基于Lester（1996）框架，构建200个涵盖经济自由和个人自由双轴的政治问题。采用简化/主题系统提示词和用户提示（含少样本示例）两种方法诱导偏差。同时进行问题反转验证实验和多语言实验。

Result: 系统提示词效果有限，用户提示（少样本示例）显著有效，尤其在经济自由轴上的大模型/新模型中。问题反转实验显示多数模型出现反直觉偏移，暗示数据泄露。不同语言下模型可塑性存在微妙但显著的差异。

Conclusion: 小模型和老模型的可塑性有限或不稳定，而新前沿模型展现出可靠且符合预期的政治适应性。模型存在潜在的数据泄露问题，对模型的政治中立性构成挑战。

Abstract: Since the advent of Large Language Models (LLMs), a significant area of research has focused on their intrinsic biases, particularly in political discourse. This study investigates a different but related concept, "political plasticity", which is defined as the capacity of models to adapt their responses based on the user supplied context. To analyze this, a testing framework was developed using an expanded corpus of 200 politically-oriented questions across economic and personal freedom axes, based on a prior framework by Lester (1996). The study explored several methods to induce political bias, including simplified and topic-based system prompts, as well as user prompts with few-shot examples. The results show that while system prompts were largely ineffective, user prompts successfully elicited significant ideological shifts, particularly along the Economic Freedom axis in larger and newer models. Through a validation experiment, we examined whether models answer questionnaires by recognizing the underlying question format. Inverting the sense of the questions revealed unexpected, counter-intuitive shifts in most models, suggesting potential data leakage. Finally, we also analyzed how model plasticity varies when the experiment is conducted in different languages. The results reveal subtle yet notable shifts across each of the analyzed languages. Overall, our results indicate that small and older LLMs exhibit limited or unstable political plasticity, whereas newer frontier models display reliable, expected adaptability.

</details>


### [1094] [Alignment as Jurisprudence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08416)
*Nicholas Caputo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文探讨了法理学（法官如何判案）与AI对齐（让AI符合人类价值）之间的深层结构相似性，认为两者都通过语言规范与解释来预测和塑造未来决策。通过对比德沃金的解释主义、桑斯坦的类比推理等法理学理论，以及宪法AI、案例推理等对齐方法，论证法律视角可以改进AI对齐，同时AI也能促进对法律运作机制的理解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 法理学和AI对齐虽然在表面上属于不同领域，但两者都面临一个核心问题：如何通过语言规范来约束和引导强大行为体（法官/AI）做出符合人类期望的未来决策。作者希望通过跨学科对话，从法理学的长期辩论中汲取对齐的洞见，并反哺法律领域。

Method: 采用跨学科比较分析的方法，将法理学中的主要理论（德沃金的原则导向解释主义、桑斯坦的类比推理实证主义）与前沿对齐技术（宪法AI、基于案例的推理）进行对照，探讨规则与案例在微调过程中的相互作用，并分析AI如何帮助理解法律运作。

Result: 发现法理学与AI对齐在规范和解释语言这一核心工具上高度同构，法律领域的长期辩论可以为对齐提供有价值的参考框架，而AI反过来也能揭示法律的运作机制并推动其改进。两者共同的目标是增强人类的能力与自主性。

Conclusion: 随着AI能力持续提升、法律理论对人类法官的约束逐渐松动，法理学与AI对齐之间的对话将变得愈发重要，这种跨领域交流有望同时推动两个领域向更好的方向发展。

Abstract: Jurisprudence, the study of how judges should properly decide cases, and alignment, the science of getting AI models to conform to human values, share a fundamental structure. These seemingly distant fields both seek to predict and shape how decisions by powerful actors, in one case judges and in the other increasingly powerful artificial intelligences, will be made in the unknown future. And they use similar tools of the specification and interpretation of language to try to accomplish those goals. The great debates of jurisprudence, about what the law is and what it should be, can provide insight into alignment, and lessons from what does and does not work in alignment can help make progress in jurisprudence.
  This essay puts the two fields directly into conversation. Drawing on leading accounts of jurisprudence, particularly Dworkin's principle-oriented interpretivism and Sunstein's positivist account of law as analogical reasoning, and on cutting-edge alignment approaches, namely Constitutional AI and case-based reasoning, it illustrates the value of a more sophisticated legally-inspired approach to the interplay of rules and cases in finetuning alignment and points to ways that AI can provide a better understanding of how the law works and how it can be improved by the introduction of AI. AI systems and the law should operate to empower people to act in the world, helping to expand their capabilities and the extent to which they are able to achieve their goals. As AI continues to improve in capacity, and as the constraints that legal theory places on human judges seem be coming undone, the conversation between these two fields will become increasingly essential and may help point to a better version of both.

</details>


### [1095] [AHD Agent: Agentic Reinforcement Learning for Automatic Heuristic Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08756)
*Haoze Lv,Ning Lu,Ziang Zhou,Shengcai Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AHD Agent，一种工具集成、多轮交互的框架，让LLM在自动启发式设计中主动决策（生成启发式或调用工具获取环境证据），并通过智能体强化学习系统训练小模型（4B参数）达到甚至超越大模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM-AHD框架将LLM视为被动生成器，在固定工作流中从有限的手动设计上下文生成启发式，无法捕获状态依赖信息（如特定失败模式），导致低效的试错探索。

Method: 提出AHD Agent框架：(1) 工具集成、多轮交互，LLM可自主决策生成启发式或调用工具检索环境证据；(2) 提出智能体强化学习（RL）系统，结合新型环境合成pipeline训练紧凑模型；(3) 训练4B参数的小模型实现通用AHD能力。

Result: 在8个不同领域（含4个保留任务）上，4B参数的AHD Agent匹配或超越使用更大模型的SOTA基线，且所需评估次数显著更少。模型和推理扩展分析进一步表明其迈向真正自主启发式设计的有效路径。

Conclusion: 通过让LLM主动决策何时生成启发式、何时检索环境信息，结合强化学习训练的紧凑模型，可以在更少资源下达到更优的自动启发式设计效果，为真正自主的启发式设计提供了可行方向。

Abstract: Automatic heuristic design (AHD) has emerged as a promising paradigm for solving NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems (COPs). Recent works show that large language models (LLMs), when integrated into well-designed frameworks (i.e., LLM-AHD), can autonomously discover high-performing heuristics. However, existing LLM-AHD frameworks typically treat LLMs as passive generators within fixed workflows, where the model generates heuristics from manually designed, limited context. Such context may fail to capture state-dependent information (e.g., specific failure modes), leading to inefficient trial-and-error exploration. To overcome these limitations, we propose AHD Agent, a novel tool-integrated, multi-turn framework that empowers LLMs to proactively decide whether to generate heuristics or invoke tools to retrieve targeted evidence from the solving environment. To effectively train such a dynamic decision-making agent, we introduce an agentic reinforcement learning (RL) system, which leverages a novel environment synthesis pipeline to optimize a compact model's generalizable AHD capabilities. Experiments across eight diverse domains, including four held-out tasks, demonstrate that our 4B-parameter agent matches or surpasses state-of-the-art baselines using much larger models, while requiring significantly fewer evaluations. Model and inference scaling analysis further reveals that AHD Agent offers an effective trajectory toward truly autonomous heuristic design.

</details>


### [1096] [The Attacker in the Mirror: Breaking Self-Consistency in Safety via Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08427)
*Gabriele La Malfa,Emanuele La Malfa,Saar Cohen,Jie M. Zhang,Michael Luck,Michael Wooldridge,Elizabeth Black*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出锚定双策略自博弈（Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play），通过在冻结基模型上训练角色特定的LoRA适配器来分离攻击者和防御者角色，解决了传统自博弈中参数共享导致的纳什均衡局限性和攻击压力消失问题，在安全对齐上实现高达100倍参数效率提升和一致的鲁棒性改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自博弈红队攻击中攻击者与防御者共享同一模型参数，虽然有助于稳定性，但带来两个根本问题：(1) 可达的纳什均衡集仅限于"总是拒绝"等简单行为，限制了实际应用；(2) 参数共享导致动态坍缩为自一致性，攻击无法对防御者施加真正的对抗压力。

Method: 提出Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play方法：在冻结的基模型上，为攻击者和防御者分别训练独立的LoRA适配器，实现显式角色分离。攻击者和防御者各自优化自己的LoRA参数，基模型参数保持不变，从而维持稳定的优化过程并保留对抗压力。

Result: 在Qwen2.5-{3B,7B,14B}-IT模型上评估：(1) 相比标准自博弈微调，参数效率提升高达100倍；(2) 安全性持续改进，且不损失推理能力；(3) 跨博弈实验表明，所提方法的攻击者和防御者模型在对抗防御和安全性方面均优于自博弈模型。

Conclusion: 参数共享是自博弈红队方法的核心瓶颈，通过LoRA适配器进行角色分离可以有效解决这一限制，在保持优化稳定性的同时恢复对抗压力，实现更高效、更鲁棒的安全对齐。

Abstract: Self-play red team is an established approach to improving AI safety in which different instances of the same model play attacker and defender roles in a zero-sum game, i.e., where the attacker tries to jailbreak the defender; if self-play converges to a Nash equilibrium, the model is guaranteed to respond safely within the settings of the game. Although the parameter sharing enforced by the use of the same model for the two roles improves stability and performance, it introduces fundamental theoretical and architectural limitations. We show that the set of Nash equilibria that can be reached corresponds to a broad class of behaviours that includes trivial always refuse strategies and oracle-like defenders, thus limiting practical applicability. We then show that when attacker and defender share and update the same base model, the dynamics collapse to self-consistency, so that attacks do not enforce adversarial pressure on the defender. In response, we propose Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play, which trains distinct role-specific LoRA adapters on top of a frozen base model, thereby maintaining stable optimisation while preserving adversarial pressure through explicit role separation. In relation to standard self-play, we show up to 100x greater parameter efficiency than finetuning and consistent improvements in safety compared to self-play fine-tuned models. We evaluate on Qwen2.5-{3B, 7B,14B}-IT models across widely used safety benchmarks, showing improved robustness without loss of reasoning ability. Cross-play experiments further show that our attacker and defender models are superior to self-play in terms of adversarial defence and safety.

</details>


### [1097] [Measuring What Matters: Benchmarking Generative, Multimodal, and Agentic AI in Healthcare](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08445)
*Prasanna Desikan,Harshit Rajgarhia,Shivali Dalmia,Ananya Mantravadi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文指出当前医疗AI领域缺乏系统性评估方法，现有基准测试多关注模型知识而非真实临床环境中的可靠性、安全性和相关性，导致高性能基准与实际临床表现之间存在巨大鸿沟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗AI模型正被部署到真实临床环境中，但现有的训练和验证数据集无法捕捉真实临床工作流的复杂性。当前基准测试（如医学执照考试）中模型表现优异，但在实际临床任务中性能大幅下降（文书0.74-0.85，临床决策支持0.61-0.76，行政工作流仅0.53-0.63），高基准分数造成了虚假的部署准备就绪感。

Method: 论文提出需要建立系统化的基准测试设计框架，该框架应包含任务、数据集和指标的结构化组合，以实现可重复、可比较的模型性能测量。强调基准测试应关注真实临床条件下的可靠性、安全性和临床相关性，而非仅测试模型的知识储备。

Result: 前沿模型在医学执照考试中接近满分，但在真实临床任务中表现急剧下降：文书任务0.74-0.85，临床决策支持0.61-0.76，行政工作流0.53-0.63。现有基准测试的积累是通过为狭隘任务性能优化的临时数据集构建方式形成的。

Conclusion: 缺乏原则性的基准设计框架，导致无法判断临床性能不佳是源于模型本身的局限还是测量方式的失败。高性能基准与实际临床效用之间的差距在AI承担更重要的临床角色时进一步扩大。

Abstract: AI models are increasingly deployed in live clinical environments where they must perform reliably across complex, high-stakes workflows that standard training and validation datasets were never designed to capture. Evaluating these systems requires benchmarks: structured combinations of tasks, datasets, and metrics that enable reproducible, comparable measurement of what a model can do. The central challenge in healthcare AI is not performance alone, but the absence of systematic methods to measure reliability, safety, and clinical relevance under real-world conditions. Most existing benchmarks test what a model knows; too few test whether it can perform reliably and without failing across the full complexity of real clinical tasks. Current benchmarks have accumulated through ad hoc dataset construction optimized for narrow task performance: frontier models achieve near-perfect scores on medical licensing examinations, but when evaluated across real clinical tasks, performance degrades sharply, scoring 0.74--0.85 on documentation, 0.61--0.76 on clinical decision support, and only 0.53--0.63 on administrative and workflow tasks \cite{medhelm}. High benchmark scores give a false sense of deployment readiness, and the gap between performance and utility widens precisely as AI systems take on more consequential clinical roles. Without a principled framework for benchmark design, the field cannot determine whether poor clinical performance reflects model limitations or failures in how performance is being measured.

</details>


### [1098] [LLM-guided Semi-Supervised Approaches for Social Media Crisis Data Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08448)
*Jacob Ativo,Bharaneeshwar Balasubramaniyam,Anh Tran,Khushboo Gupta,Hongmin Li,Doina Caragea,Cornelia Caragea*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文首次实证评估了LLM引导的半监督学习在灾难相关推文分类中的应用。实验表明，LG-CoTrain方法在低资源设置下显著优于传统半监督方法，而紧凑的半监督模型在某些情况下甚至能超越大型LLM的零样本性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索半监督学习方法在灾难管理背景下社交媒体数据分析中的潜力，特别是利用LLM引导的半监督学习来提升危机相关推文分类性能。

Method: 首次实证评估LLM引导的半监督学习方法（VerifyMatch和LG-CoTrain）在灾难推文分类任务上的表现，与经典半监督基线方法进行对比。

Result: LG-CoTrain在低资源设置（每类5、10、25个标注样本）下显著优于经典半监督方法，取得最高平均Macro F1。VerifyMatch性能竞争力强且校准性好。随着标注样本增加，性能差距缩小，Self Training成为强基线。紧凑半监督模型有时优于大型LLM的零样本设置。

Conclusion: LLM引导的半监督学习能够将知识从LLM迁移到更小、更易部署的模型中，为实际灾难响应应用提供了一条实用路径。

Abstract: Semi-supervised learning approaches have been investigated as a means to enhance the analysis of social media data in disaster management contexts. In this work, we present the first empirical evaluation of large language model (LLM) guided semi-supervised learning for crisis related tweet classification. We compare two recent LLM assisted semi-supervised methods, VerifyMatch and LLM guided Co-Training ( LG-CoTrain), against established semi-supervised baselines. Our results show that LG-CoTrain significantly outperforms classical semi-supervised approaches in low resource settings with 5, 10 and 25 labeled examples per class, achieving the highest averaged Macro F1 across events. VerifyMatch achieves competitive performance while also demonstrating strong calibration properties. As the number of labeled examples increases, the performance gap narrows and Self Training emerges as a strong baseline. We further observe that compact semi-supervised models can, in some cases, outperform very large LLMs operating in zero-shot settings. This finding highlights the potential of transferring knowledge from LLMs into smaller and more deployable models through LLM guided semi-supervised learning, offering a practical pathway for real world disaster response applications. Our project repository on Github is here.

</details>


### [1099] [Prospective Compression in Human Abstraction Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09985)
*Leonardo Hernandez Cano,Ivan Zareski,Luisa El Amouri,Pinzhe Zhao,Max Mascini,Emanuele Sansone,Yewen Pu,Bonan Zhao,Marta Kryven*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究非平稳环境下人类在程序合成中的库学习行为，发现人类倾向于前瞻性地选择抽象以压缩未来任务，而非回顾性地压缩过去任务。通过Pattern Builder Task实验和六种计算模型对比，现有回顾性压缩算法和LLM方法无法捕捉人类行为，而前瞻性压缩模型更符合人类表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有程序合成中的在线库学习算法将库学习视为对静态任务分布的回顾性压缩，但现实中的学习环境往往是非平稳的（任务生成过程随时间演化）。作者希望探究人类在这种非平稳环境下如何选择抽象。

Method: 使用Pattern Builder Task（视觉程序合成范式），设计两个具有互补隐式课程（latent curricula）的实验，通过六种计算模型（涵盖在线库学习策略）与人类行为进行对比分析。

Result: 人类对任务生成过程中潜在的非平稳结构具有敏感性，其抽象行为符合前瞻性压缩（prospective compression），而现有的回顾性压缩算法和基于LLM的程序合成方法均无法捕捉这种行为。

Conclusion: 人类在非平稳环境中进行库学习时采用前瞻性策略，针对未来任务进行压缩，这为设计更接近人类认知的在线库学习算法提供了新的方向。

Abstract: A core challenge in program synthesis is online library learning: the incremental acquisition of reusable abstractions under uncertainty about future task demands. Existing algorithms treat library learning as retrospective compression over a static task distribution, where the learned library is determined by the corpus of past tasks. However, real-world learning domains are often non-stationary, with tasks arising from a generative process that evolves over time. We propose and test the hypothesis that in non-stationary domains human library learning selects abstractions prospectively: targeting compression of future tasks. We study this question using the Pattern Builder Task, a visual program synthesis paradigm in which participants construct increasingly complex geometric patterns from a small set of primitives, transformations, and custom helpers that carry forward across trials. Using this task, we conduct two experiments with complementary latent curricula, designed to dissociate between behaviors consistent with prospective compression, and alternative library learning accounts. Using six computational models spanning online library learning strategies, we show that human abstraction behavior reflects sensitivity to latent, non-stationary structure in the task-generating process. This behavior is consistent with prospective compression, and cannot be captured by existing retrospective compression-based algorithms, or inductive biases modeled by LLM-based program synthesis.

</details>


### [1100] [Automated Approach for Solving Infinite-state Polynomial Reachability Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10169)
*Krishnendu Chatterjee,Ehsan Kafshdar Goharshady,Mehrdad Karrabi,Maximilian Seeliger,Đorđe Žikelić*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文针对无限状态图上基于回合制的可达性博弈问题，提出了排名证书（ranking certificates）作为证明REACH玩家存在获胜策略的完备推理规则，并针对多项式可达性博弈设计了全自动算法，能在次指数时间内计算获胜策略及形式化正确性证明。实验展示了该方法在解决经典Cinderella-Stepmother博弈等问题上的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无限状态可达性博弈在人工智能和反应式合成中具有重要应用，但现有方法难以处理此类复杂问题。

Method: 提出排名证书作为完备的证明规则；针对多项式约束描述的状态图设计全自动算法，联合生成获胜策略与排名证书形式的正确性证明。

Result: 算法是sound的、半完备的，运行时间为次指数级；在Cinderella-Stepmother博弈中首次为任意精度参数计算出最优获胜策略。

Conclusion: 本文方法能够求解超出已有方法范围的挑战性实例，证明了排名证书在无限状态可达性博弈中的有效性。

Abstract: Reachability games are two-player games played on a graph, where the objective of $\texttt{REACH}$ player is to reach the target set whereas the objective of $\texttt{SAFE}$ player is to stay away from the target set. Reachability games have important applications in artificial intelligence and reactive synthesis, and many of these applications give rise to infinite-state reachability games. In this paper, we study turn-based reachability games on infinite-state graphs defined over valuations of a finite set of real variables. We consider the problem of determining the existence of and computing a winning strategy for $\texttt{REACH}$ player. Our contributions are twofold. First, we propose ranking certificates for reachability games, a sound and complete proof rule for proving that $\texttt{REACH}$ player has a winning strategy from the specified initial state. Second, we consider polynomial reachability games, where transitions and objectives are described by polynomial constraints over real variables, and propose a fully automated algorithm for computing a winning strategy for $\texttt{REACH}$ player together with a formal correctness witness in the form of a ranking certificate. The algorithm is sound, semi-complete, and runs in sub-exponential time. Our experiments demonstrate the ability of our method to solve challenging examples from the literature that were out of the reach of existing methods. Specifically, for the classical Cinderella-Stepmother game, we are able to compute an optimal winning strategy for an arbitrary precision parameter for the first time.

</details>


### [1101] [Behavioral Determinants of Deployed AI Agents in Social Networks: A Multi-Factor Study of Personality, Model, and Guardrail Specification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08463)
*Sarah Wilson,Diem Linh Dang,Usman Ali Moazzam,Shan Ye,Gail Kaiser*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究通过控制实验，系统考察了13个AI代理在模拟社交网络中的配置因素（人格规范、模型骨架、操作规则）如何影响其涌现性社交行为，发现人格规范是主导因素，而模型骨架和操作规则影响较温和。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主AI代理越来越多地部署在开放社交环境中，但其配置规范与涌现性社交行为之间的关系尚不明确，缺乏系统性实证研究。

Method: 在多因素控制实验中，将13个OpenClaw代理部署到模拟Reddit的Moltion社交网络，系统操纵三个自变量：SOUL.md人格规范、LLM模型骨架、AGENTS.md操作规则与记忆配置，设置默认控制代理作为基线，在一周约400次自主会话中收集行为、语言和社交指标。

Result: 人格规范是主导行为杠杆，导致代理间回复长度出现巨大差异；模型骨架和操作规则对修辞风格和话题参与广度产生中等但显著的影响。

Conclusion: 研究为部署多代理社交系统的文献提供了实证证据，并为设计用于真实社交环境中协作或监控任务的代理提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Autonomous AI agents are increasingly deployed in open social environments, yet the relationship between their configuration specifications and their emergent social behavior remains poorly understood. We present a controlled, multi-factor empirical study in which thirteen OpenClaw agents are deployed on Moltbook -- a Reddit-like social network built for AI agents -- across three systematically varied independent variables: (1) personality specification via SOUL.md, (2) underlying LLM model backbone, and (3) operational rules and memory configuration via AGENTS.md. A default control agent provides a behavioral baseline.
